// File: PropertiesControl.cs
// v0.3.0 — PropertyGrid UI with Project banner + collapsible "Tag Numbers" tree
// Notes:
//  - Removed the previous top ListView/grid entirely.
//  - Added a TreeView that collapses as: Tag Numbers -> (Line ID's, Tag ID's) -> per-system rows.

using System;
using System.ComponentModel;
using System.IO;
using System.Windows.Forms;
using System.Drawing;                      // Point/Size/Color/Cursors
using Newtonsoft.Json;
using AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Services;        // NodLineNumberStore
using System.Collections.Generic; 

namespace AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub
{
    // IMPORTANT: partial + inherits UserControl
    public partial class PropertiesControl : UserControl
    {

        private readonly PropertyGrid _grid = new PropertyGrid();
        private readonly ToolStrip _bar = new ToolStrip();
        private readonly ToolStripLabel _lbl = new ToolStripLabel("Source:");
        private readonly ToolStripLabel _lblSource = new ToolStripLabel("—");
        private readonly ToolStripButton _btnApply = new ToolStripButton("Apply");
        private readonly ToolStripButton _btnRevert = new ToolStripButton("Revert");
        private readonly ToolStripButton _btnSave = new ToolStripButton("Save");
        private readonly ToolStripButton _btnLoad = new ToolStripButton("Load");
        private readonly ToolStripSeparator _sep = new ToolStripSeparator();
        private readonly ToolStripControlHost _chkAutoHost;
        private readonly CheckBox _chkAuto = new CheckBox { Text = "Auto-apply", Checked = true };

        // preview labels (right side)
        private readonly ToolStripLabel _lblLineNext = new ToolStripLabel();
        private readonly ToolStripLabel _lblTagNext = new ToolStripLabel();

        public bool IsEditing { get; private set; }
        public event EventHandler EditingStateChanged;

private void SetEditing(bool editing)
        {
            if (IsEditing == editing) return;
            IsEditing = editing;
            EditingStateChanged?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);
        }

        // Call this once in ctor AFTER InitializeComponent();
        private void WireEditingState()
        {
            // Add any control types you use for input
            foreach (Control c in GetAllInputs(this))
            {
                c.Enter += (s, e) => SetEditing(true);
                c.Leave += (s, e) => SetEditing(false);
            }
        }

        // Helper: enumerate inputs recursively
        private IEnumerable<Control> GetAllInputs(Control root)
        {
            foreach (Control c in root.Controls)
            {
                if (c is TextBoxBase || c is ComboBox || c is CheckBox || c is NumericUpDown)
                    yield return c;
                foreach (var child in GetAllInputs(c)) yield return child;
            }
        }

        // Project banner (below toolbar)
        private readonly Label lblProjectBanner = new Label
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Top,
            Height = 24,
            TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft,
            Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 9F, FontStyle.Bold),
            ForeColor = Color.DodgerBlue,
            Padding = new Padding(6, 0, 0, 0),
            Text = "Project: (none)"
        };

        // Collapsible "Tag Numbers" tree: Master -> (Line ID's, Tag ID's) -> per-system rows
        private readonly TreeView _tvNext = new TreeView
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Top,
            Height = 140,                      // adjust as preferred
            HideSelection = false,
            ShowLines = true,
            ShowRootLines = true
        };

        private object _currentModel;
        private object _snapshot;

        // resize grip state
        private readonly Panel _grip = new Panel();
        private bool _dragging;
        private Point _dragStartScreen;
        private Size _startSize;

        public event EventHandler ApplyRequested;      // <— host subscribes
        public object SelectedModel => _currentModel;  // <— host reads

        public PropertiesControl()
        {
            InitializeComponent();        // <— must exist in Designer partial

            // NEW: track when the user is actively typing in editors
            WireEditingState();

            Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            // Use mono font so "name | number" rows align nicely in the tree
            try { _tvNext.Font = new Font("Consolas", 8.5f, FontStyle.Regular); } catch { /* ignore */ }

            _grid.Dock = DockStyle.Fill;
            _grid.PropertyValueChanged += (s, e) =>
            {
                // Keep previews in sync if Prefix changed on tool model
                var name = e.ChangedItem?.PropertyDescriptor?.Name;
                if (string.Equals(name, nameof(LineTagSettings.Prefix), StringComparison.Ordinal))
                {
                    if (_currentModel is LineTagSettings lt)
                        RefreshHomePreview(lt.Prefix);
                }

                if (_chkAuto.Checked)
                    ApplyRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);
            };

            _chkAutoHost = new ToolStripControlHost(_chkAuto) { Margin = new Padding(8, 2, 4, 2) };
            _btnApply.Click += (s, e) => ApplyRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);
            _btnRevert.Click += (s, e) => Rebind(_snapshot);
            _btnSave.Click += (s, e) => SavePreset();
            _btnLoad.Click += (s, e) => LoadPreset();

            // Toolbar composition (left → right)
            _bar.Items.Add(_lbl);
            _bar.Items.Add(_lblSource);
            _bar.Items.Add(new ToolStripLabel("   "));
            _bar.Items.Add(_btnApply);
            _bar.Items.Add(_btnRevert);
            _bar.Items.Add(_sep);
            _bar.Items.Add(_btnSave);
            _bar.Items.Add(_btnLoad);
            _bar.Items.Add(new ToolStripLabel("   "));
            _bar.Items.Add(_chkAutoHost);

            // previews on the right
            _lblLineNext.Alignment = ToolStripItemAlignment.Right;
            _lblTagNext.Alignment = ToolStripItemAlignment.Right;
            _lblLineNext.Text = "Line next: —";
            _lblTagNext.Text = "Tag next: —";
            _bar.Items.Add(_lblLineNext);
            _bar.Items.Add(new ToolStripLabel("  ") { Alignment = ToolStripItemAlignment.Right });
            _bar.Items.Add(_lblTagNext);

            _bar.Dock = DockStyle.Top;

            // Dock stacking order: toolbar (top), banner (top), tree (top), grid (fill)
            Controls.Add(_grid);
            Controls.Add(_tvNext);
            Controls.Add(lblProjectBanner);
            Controls.Add(_bar);

            // resize grip (bottom-right)
            _grip.Size = new Size(14, 14);
            _grip.Anchor = AnchorStyles.Bottom | AnchorStyles.Right;
            _grip.Cursor = Cursors.SizeNWSE;
            _grip.BackColor = Color.Transparent;
            _grip.Location = new Point(Width - _grip.Width - 2, Height - _grip.Height - 2);

            _grip.MouseDown += (s, e) =>
            {
                if (e.Button != MouseButtons.Left) return;
                CbiPropertiesPalette.EnsureFloating();
                _dragging = true;
                _dragStartScreen = Cursor.Position;
                _startSize = CbiPropertiesPalette.GetSize();
                _grip.Capture = true;
            };
            _grip.MouseMove += (s, e) =>
            {
                if (!_dragging) return;
                var cur = Cursor.Position;
                int dx = cur.X - _dragStartScreen.X;
                int dy = cur.Y - _dragStartScreen.Y;
                var newSize = new Size(_startSize.Width + dx, _startSize.Height + dy);
                CbiPropertiesPalette.SetSize(newSize);
            };
            _grip.MouseUp += (s, e) =>
            {
                _dragging = false;
                _grip.Capture = false;
            };
            this.Resize += (s, e) =>
            {
                _grip.Location = new Point(Width - _grip.Width - 2, Height - _grip.Height - 2);
            };

            // your force-apply props
            _grid.PropertyValueChanged += (s, e) =>
            {
                _grid.Refresh();

                var propName = e.ChangedItem?.PropertyDescriptor?.Name;
                bool forceApply =
                    string.Equals(propName, nameof(PipeRunProperties.LayerName), StringComparison.Ordinal) ||
                    string.Equals(propName, nameof(PipeRunProperties.PipingRunType), StringComparison.Ordinal);

                if (_chkAuto.Checked || forceApply)
                    ApplyRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);
            };

            // show initial project name + numbers on first load
            this.Load += (s, e) =>
            {
                RefreshProjectBanner();
                RefreshNextNumbersTree();
            };

            Controls.Add(_grip);
        }

        // --------- Public API used by host ---------

        public void Clear()
        {
            _currentModel = null;
            _snapshot = null;
            _grid.SelectedObject = null;
            _lblSource.Text = "—";
            _lblLineNext.Text = "Line next: —";
            _lblTagNext.Text = "Tag next: —";
            lblProjectBanner.Text = "Project: (none)";
            _tvNext.Nodes.Clear();
        }

        public void ShowHome(string prefix)
        {
            Bind(new Placeholder(), "Tool");
            RefreshHomePreview(prefix);
        }

        public void RefreshHomePreview(string prefix)
        {
            try
            {
                var p = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(prefix) ? "PR-" : prefix;
                var line = NodLineNumberStore.Peek("LINE", p, 4);
                var tag = NodLineNumberStore.Peek("TAG", p, 4);
                _lblLineNext.Text = $"Line next: {line}";
                _lblTagNext.Text = $"Tag next: {tag}";
            }
            catch
            {
                _lblLineNext.Text = "Line next: —";
                _lblTagNext.Text = "Tag next: —";
            }
        }

        public void Bind(object model, string sourceLabel)
        {
            if (model == null) model = new Placeholder();
            _currentModel = model;

            // if the home model, pull live Tag Numbers from the store before cloning/display
            var lt = _currentModel as LineTagSettings;
            if (lt != null)
            {
                try { lt.RefreshTagNumbersFromStore(); } catch { /* ignore */ }
            }

            _snapshot = DeepClone(_currentModel);
            _grid.SelectedObject = _currentModel;
            _lblSource.Text = string.IsNullOrEmpty(sourceLabel) ? InferLabel(model) : sourceLabel;

            if (lt != null) RefreshHomePreview(lt.Prefix);
        }

        public void CommitPendingEdits() 

        {
            try
            { this.ValidateChildren(); }
            catch { }
        }

// --------- helpers ---------

        private void Rebind(object snap)
        {
            _currentModel = DeepClone(snap ?? new Placeholder());
            _grid.SelectedObject = _currentModel;
            if (_currentModel is LineTagSettings lt) RefreshHomePreview(lt.Prefix);
        }

        private static object DeepClone(object instance)
        {
            if (instance == null) return null;
            var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(instance);
            return JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(json, instance.GetType());
        }

        private string InferLabel(object model) => model == null ? "—" : model.GetType().Name;

        private void SavePreset()
        {
            if (_currentModel == null) return;
            using (var sfd = new SaveFileDialog
            {
                Filter = "JSON (*.json)|*.json",
                FileName = _currentModel.GetType().Name + ".json"
            })
            {
                if (sfd.ShowDialog(this) != DialogResult.OK) return;
                var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(_currentModel, Formatting.Indented);
                File.WriteAllText(sfd.FileName, json);
            }
        }

        public void RefreshProjectBanner()
        {
            try
            {
                // Get current project name via your bridge
                var name = AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.ProjectContextBridge.GetCurrentProjectName();
                lblProjectBanner.Text = $"Project: {name}";
            }
            catch
            {
                lblProjectBanner.Text = "Project: (unavailable)";
            }

            // keep the collapsible tree in sync with the active project
            RefreshNextNumbersTree();
        }

        private void LoadPreset()
        {
            if (_currentModel == null) return;
            using (var ofd = new OpenFileDialog { Filter = "JSON (*.json)|*.json" })
            {
                if (ofd.ShowDialog(this) != DialogResult.OK) return;
                var json = File.ReadAllText(ofd.FileName);
                var loaded = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(json, _currentModel.GetType());
                if (loaded != null) Bind(loaded, _lblSource.Text);
            }
        }

        private void RefreshNextNumbersTree()
        {
            _tvNext.BeginUpdate();
            try
            {
                _tvNext.Nodes.Clear();

                var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
                if (doc == null)
                {
                    var root = _tvNext.Nodes.Add("Tag Numbers");
                    root.Nodes.Add("(no active document)");
                    root.Expand();
                    return;
                }

                if (!AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding))
                {
                    var rootEmpty = _tvNext.Nodes.Add("Tag Numbers");
                    rootEmpty.Nodes.Add("(no project bound)");
                    rootEmpty.Expand();
                    return;
                }

                var storePath = binding.StorePath;
                var pairs = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.ProjectStoreService.GetSystemNextPairs(storePath);

                // Master
                var rootNode = _tvNext.Nodes.Add("Tag Numbers");

                // Sub-headers
                var lineNode = rootNode.Nodes.Add("Line ID's");
                var tagNode = rootNode.Nodes.Add("Tag ID's");

                // Row formatting
                int namePad = 22;
                foreach (var p in pairs)
                {
                    var name = (p.Name ?? p.SystemKey ?? "").PadRight(namePad);
                    if (p.LineNext.HasValue)
                        lineNode.Nodes.Add($"{name} | {p.LineNext.Value}");
                    if (p.TagNext.HasValue)
                        tagNode.Nodes.Add($"{name} | {p.TagNext.Value}");
                }

                rootNode.Expand();
                lineNode.Expand();
                tagNode.Expand();
            }
            catch
            {
                _tvNext.Nodes.Clear();
                var n = _tvNext.Nodes.Add("Tag Numbers");
                n.Nodes.Add("(error reading store)");
                n.Expand();
            }
            finally
            {
                _tvNext.EndUpdate();
            }
        }

        private sealed class Placeholder
        {
            [Category("Info")]
            [DisplayName("Tip")]
            public string Message => "Select an entity or run a tool to see its properties here.";
        }
    }
}

## Response:
10/16/2025, 4:15:06 PM

> **Fixing property control issues**
>
> I need to address issues related to `NodLineNumberStore.Peek` calls. The current code uses static references, while `NodLineNumberStore` is an instance class. To fix this, we could either instantiate the class or use `TagAllocator_V2`. Using `ProjectStoreService.GetSystemNextPairs` might also simplify things, especially for the toolbar labels.
>
> **Refining tag allocation process**
>
> Within `TagAllocator_V2`, we already have methods for `PeekLineTag()` and `PeekValveTag()` to handle tag strings. We'll need a few simple fixes: change `RefreshHomePreview` to instantiate `NodLineNumberStore` and use its instance method for `Peek`. Also, instead of referencing `NodLineNumberStore`, we could switch to `TagAllocator_V2` and update related labels.
>
> Thought for 19s

You’re hitting the error because `NodLineNumberStore.Peek(...)` is an **instance** method (not static), and in this file you’re calling it like a static. Also, the simplest path now is to stop using the NOD preview in the palette and **show the allocator’s “peek” values** (project-wide and consistent with valves).

Here’s a tiny, safe patch to your **current** `PropertiesControl.cs`:

## 1) Add this using
At the top with your other usings:
```csharp
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;   // ProjectSettingsService
```

## 2) Replace `RefreshHomePreview` with allocator-based preview
This removes the static NOD call and shows the next values from the JSON allocator.

```csharp
public void RefreshHomePreview(string prefix)
{
    try
    {
        // Use the central allocator so the preview matches what tools will use
        var settings  = new ProjectSettingsService(@"C:\CBICAD\Project_Store.json");
        var allocator = new TagAllocator_V2(settings);

        // Show the next (peek) values. If you prefer numbers only, we can add helpers later.
        var nextLine  = allocator.PeekLineTag();
        var nextValve = allocator.PeekValveTag();

        _lblLineNext.Text = $"Line next: {nextLine}";
        _lblTagNext.Text  = $"Tag next: {nextValve}";
    }
    catch
    {
        _lblLineNext.Text = "Line next: —";
        _lblTagNext.Text  = "Tag next: —";
    }
}
```

> Why this fixes your build:
> - No more static call to `NodLineNumberStore.Peek(...)` → eliminates **CS0120**.
> - Avoids legacy `Peek(string, string, int)` shape → eliminates the **CS1501/CS1503** overload errors.
> - Keeps the palette in sync with the **same source of truth** used by your commands (`TagAllocator_V2`).

---

### If you’d rather keep the NOD preview (not recommended now)
Change only the two preview lines to use an **instance**:

```csharp
var nod  = new NodLineNumberStore();
var line = nod.Peek("LINE", "unused", 4);  // uses the back-compat 3-arg shim
var tag  = nod.Peek("TAG",  "unused", 4);
_lblLineNext.Text = $"Line next: {line}";
_lblTagNext.Text  = $"Tag next: {tag}";
```

…but the allocator preview is the cleaner future path.

---

### Quick sanity check
- Make sure you removed the misspelled file **`NODStoreAdaptor.cs`** and kept only **`NODStoreAdapter.cs`**.
- In `TagAllocator_V2.cs`, ensure you construct `new NodLineNumberStore()` **without arguments**.

Ping me if you’d like me to switch the preview to show **numbers only** instead of full tags (we can add `PeekLineNumber()`/`PeekValveNumber()` helpers in the allocator).

## Prompt:
10/16/2025, 4:21:54 PM

![Image](https://chatgpt.com/backend-api/estuary/content?id=file_000000002d8c620e90970999ef8eae74&ts=495743&p=fs&cid=1&sig=2c8a1471dec14cca752e31393d43e1eeda510ea3893b67400985689b9b51f34f&v=0)

// File: SmartLabelServices.cs
// Namespace: AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Services
// Version: 1.0.0 (2025-10-06)
// Changelog:
//  - 1.0.0: New, numbering logic removed from this class. All counters use NodLineNumberStore.
//            Adds helpers to preview and apply line/tag labels to DBText/MText/Attributes.
//
// Notes:
//  - This class intentionally contains no SanitizeKey/PeekValue/Next storage logic.
//    Use NodLineNumberStore for all numbering operations to avoid duplication.
//  - Targets: DBText, MText, BlockReference attribute by tag name.
//  - Prefix/width/autoincrement come from your palette; pass them into the methods below.

using System;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime;

namespace AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Services
{
    public sealed class SmartLabelServices
    {
        // ------------------------------- API --------------------------------

        /// <summary>
        /// Non-incrementing preview for the next LINE label (e.g., "PR-0007").
        /// </summary>
        public string PeekLinePreview(string prefix, int width = 4)
            => NodLineNumberStore.Peek("LINE", prefix ?? string.Empty, width);

        /// <summary>
        /// Non-incrementing preview for the next TAG label (e.g., "T-0007").
        /// </summary>
        public string PeekTagPreview(string prefix, int width = 4)
            => NodLineNumberStore.Peek("TAG", prefix ?? string.Empty, width);

        /// <summary>
        /// Returns the next LINE label and increments the counter.
        /// </summary>
        public string NextLineLabel(string prefix, int width = 4)
            => NodLineNumberStore.NextFormatted("LINE", prefix ?? string.Empty, width);

        /// <summary>
        /// Returns the next TAG label and increments the counter.
        /// </summary>
        public string NextTagLabel(string prefix, int width = 4)
            => NodLineNumberStore.NextFormatted("TAG", prefix ?? string.Empty, width);

        /// <summary>
        /// Ensures text content for a target entity (DBText/MText/Block attribute).
        /// If empty or whitespace, writes preview or next value depending on <paramref name="autoIncrement"/>.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="targetId">DBText / MText / BlockReference (when using attributeTag)</param>
        /// <param name="attributeTag">
        /// Optional: if targetId is a BlockReference and you want a specific attribute written, supply the tag (case-insensitive).
        /// Leave null/empty to write nothing on BlockReference.
        /// </param>
        /// <param name="isLineLabel">true = use LINE counter, false = use TAG counter</param>
        /// <param name="prefix">Prefix for formatted label (e.g., "PR-")</param>
        /// <param name="width">Zero-pad width (e.g., 4 => 0007)</param>
        /// <param name="autoIncrement">If true, consume the next value; if false, only preview value is written when blank</param>
        /// <param name="changed">Outputs true if we wrote content</param>
        /// <returns>The text that the entity ends up with (or preview if unchanged)</returns>
        public string EnsureLabelText(
            ObjectId targetId,
            string attributeTag,
            bool isLineLabel,
            string prefix,
            int width,
            bool autoIncrement,
            out bool changed)
        {
            changed = false;

            var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return string.Empty;
            var db = doc.Database;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            using (doc.LockDocument())
            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var obj = tr.GetObject(targetId, OpenMode.ForRead, false);
                string existing = ReadText(obj, tr, attributeTag);

                // Determine source (LINE/TAG) and value
                var src = isLineLabel ? "LINE" : "TAG";
                string preview = NodLineNumberStore.Peek(src, prefix ?? string.Empty, width);

                // If something is already there, keep it and just return it.
                if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(existing))
                    return existing;

                // Nothing there; decide whether to consume or just preview
                string final = autoIncrement
                    ? NodLineNumberStore.NextFormatted(src, prefix ?? string.Empty, width)
                    : preview;

                // Write back
                if (WriteText(obj, tr, attributeTag, final))
                {
                    changed = true;
                }

                tr.Commit();
                return final;
            }
        }

        // ----------------------- Selection conveniences ----------------------

        /// <summary>
        /// Prompts for an entity and applies EnsureLabelText to it.
        /// Useful for manual ops or debugging.
        /// </summary>
        [CommandMethod("CBI_SMART_ENSURE_LABEL")]
        public void CmdEnsureLabelInteractive()
        {
            var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            // Simple entity pick
            var peo = new PromptEntityOptions("\nSelect DBText/MText/Block with attribute to label:");
            peo.SetRejectMessage("\nMust be DBText, MText, or BlockReference.");
            peo.AddAllowedClass(typeof(DBText), true);
            peo.AddAllowedClass(typeof(MText), true);
            peo.AddAllowedClass(typeof(BlockReference), true);

            var per = ed.GetEntity(peo);
            if (per.Status != PromptStatus.OK) return;

            // Minimal demo parameters; wire real values from palette in your app:
            string prefix = "PR-";
            int width = 4;
            bool isLineLabel = true;
            bool autoIncrement = true;
            string attributeTag = "TAG"; // if a block attribute (case-insensitive). Change to your app's tag.

            bool changed;
            string result = EnsureLabelText(
                per.ObjectId, attributeTag, isLineLabel,
                prefix, width, autoIncrement, out changed);

            ed.WriteMessage($"\nLabel {(changed ? "applied" : "previewed")}: {result}");
        }

        // --------------------------- I/O helpers -----------------------------

        private static string ReadText(DBObject obj, Transaction tr, string attributeTag)
        {
            if (obj is DBText dbt)
                return dbt.TextString;

            if (obj is MText mt)
                return mt.Contents;

            if (obj is BlockReference br)
            {
                if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(attributeTag))
                    return string.Empty;

                var tag = attributeTag.Trim();
                foreach (ObjectId arId in br.AttributeCollection)
                {
                    var ar = tr.GetObject(arId, OpenMode.ForRead) as AttributeReference;
                    if (ar == null) continue;
                    if (string.Equals(ar.Tag, tag, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                        return ar.TextString;
                }
                return string.Empty;
            }

            return string.Empty;
        }

        private static bool WriteText(DBObject obj, Transaction tr, string attributeTag, string value)
        {
            if (obj is DBText dbt)
            {
                dbt.UpgradeOpen();
                dbt.TextString = value ?? string.Empty;
                return true;
            }

            if (obj is MText mt)
            {
                mt.UpgradeOpen();
                mt.Contents = value ?? string.Empty;
                return true;
            }

            if (obj is BlockReference br && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(attributeTag))
            {
                var tag = attributeTag.Trim();
                foreach (ObjectId arId in br.AttributeCollection)
                {
                    var ar = tr.GetObject(arId, OpenMode.ForWrite) as AttributeReference;
                    if (ar == null) continue;
                    if (string.Equals(ar.Tag, tag, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                    {
                        ar.TextString = value ?? string.Empty;
                        return true;
                    }
                }
            }

            return false;
        }

        // -------------------- (other app-specific helpers here…) --------------
    }
}

## Response:
10/16/2025, 4:21:54 PM

Perfect — that’s an easy cleanup.  
`SmartLabelServices` is still calling **static** methods (`NodLineNumberStore.Peek` / `NextFormatted`) that no longer exist as statics.  
Your current `NodLineNumberStore` is an **instance-based** store and never had `NextFormatted`.  

Let’s fix this cleanly.

---

## ✅ Step-by-Step Fix (Finalized Version)

### 1️⃣ Replace the top API section of **SmartLabelServices.cs**  
(starting at line 25 to 45 in your screenshot)

```csharp
// ------------------------------- API --------------------------------

/// <summary>
/// Non-incrementing preview for the next LINE label (e.g., "PR-0007").
/// </summary>
public string PeekLinePreview(string prefix, int width = 4)
{
    var nod = new NodLineNumberStore();
    int next = nod.Peek("LINE", prefix ?? string.Empty, 0); // 0 = default if empty
    return $"{(prefix ?? string.Empty)}{next.ToString($"D{width}")}";
}

/// <summary>
/// Non-incrementing preview for the next TAG label (e.g., "T-0007").
/// </summary>
public string PeekTagPreview(string prefix, int width = 4)
{
    var nod = new NodLineNumberStore();
    int next = nod.Peek("TAG", prefix ?? string.Empty, 0);
    return $"{(prefix ?? string.Empty)}{next.ToString($"D{width}")}";
}

/// <summary>
/// Returns the next LINE label and increments the counter.
/// </summary>
public string NextLineLabel(string prefix, int width = 4)
{
    var nod = new NodLineNumberStore();
    int next = nod.Next("LINE");
    return $"{(prefix ?? string.Empty)}{next.ToString($"D{width}")}";
}

/// <summary>
/// Returns the next TAG label and increments the counter.
/// </summary>
public string NextTagLabel(string prefix, int width = 4)
{
    var nod = new NodLineNumberStore();
    int next = nod.Next("TAG");
    return $"{(prefix ?? string.Empty)}{next.ToString($"D{width}")}";
}
```

---

### 2️⃣ Remove all `NextFormatted` and static `NodLineNumberStore.` calls  
Anywhere you see `NodLineNumberStore.NextFormatted(...)` or `NodLineNumberStore.Peek(...)`,  
replace with the **instance-based** form above (using `var nod = new NodLineNumberStore();`).

---

### 3️⃣ Verify `NodLineNumberStore` file (it should have these public methods)
Make sure the file you’re using under `AutoCAD2020/Tagging/Services` contains:

```csharp
public int Next(string scopeKey)
public int Peek(string scopeKey)
public void SetValue(string scopeKey, int value)
```

If those exist — great, you’re done.  
The new `SmartLabelServices` code just formats the integer output as `"PREFIX-0007"` style strings.

---

### ✅ After Build

All these errors will be resolved:

| Error | Root Cause | Fixed By |
|-------|-------------|-----------|
| CS0117 (no definition for NextFormatted) | Method didn’t exist | Removed static call |
| CS0120 (object ref required) | Static call to instance method | Switched to `new NodLineNumberStore()` |
| CS1061 (missing method) | Wrong signature | Now calling `Next()` / `Peek()` properly |

---

### 🔍 Optional Enhancement
If you want to centralize the formatted version (for reuse by both this and your allocator):

Add this inside `NodLineNumberStore`:

```csharp
public string NextFormatted(string scopeKey, string prefix, int width)
{
    int next = Next(scopeKey);
    return $"{(prefix ?? string.Empty)}{next.ToString($"D{width}")}";
}
```

Then you can use:
```csharp
nod.NextFormatted("LINE", prefix, width);
```

…but it’s not required — the string interpolation in `SmartLabelServices` already does the same thing.

---

✅ After applying this, your build should be **error-free**, and your SmartLabel system will correctly preview and increment numbering for both line and tag labels through the shared NOD store.

> **Modifying EnsureLabelText**
>
> I need to replace the static NodLineNumberStore.Peek with an instance and compute preview/final correctly. The screenshot shows errors where the new `nod` is assigned incorrectly and the old method used. I'll update the code with the correct handling of preview and final values, ensuring proper transaction usage and attribute text handling, and remove the old `Peek` method with three arguments.
>
> Thought for 16s

No worries—you’re seeing errors because that code is still calling `NodLineNumberStore.Peek(...)` **as a static** and trying to pass `(string,string,int)`; our `NodLineNumberStore` is **instance-based** and exposes:

- `int Peek(string scopeKey)`
- `int Next(string scopeKey)`

Here’s the **exact replacement** you need. Replace your entire `EnsureLabelText(...)` method body with this one:

```csharp
public string EnsureLabelText(
    ObjectId targetId,
    string attributeTag,
    bool isLineLabel,
    string prefix,
    int width,
    bool autoIncrement,
    out bool changed)
{
    changed = false;

    var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
    if (doc == null) return string.Empty;
    var db = doc.Database;

    using (doc.LockDocument())
    using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
    {
        var obj = tr.GetObject(targetId, OpenMode.ForRead, false);
        string existing = ReadText(obj, tr, attributeTag);

        // LINE or TAG source for the counter
        var src = isLineLabel ? "LINE" : "TAG";

        // Use the instance-based NOD store
        var nod = new NodLineNumberStore();

        // Build the preview string from the current number (no increment)
        int previewNum = nod.Peek(src);
        string preview = (prefix ?? string.Empty) + previewNum.ToString($"D{width}");

        // If something is already there, keep it and return it
        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(existing))
        {
            tr.Commit();
            return existing;
        }

        // Decide whether to consume the next number or just use preview
        int finalNum = autoIncrement ? nod.Next(src) : previewNum;
        string final = (prefix ?? string.Empty) + finalNum.ToString($"D{width}");

        // Write back
        if (WriteText(obj, tr, attributeTag, final))
            changed = true;

        tr.Commit();
        return final;
    }
}
```

### Why this fixes the errors
- We **instantiate** the store: `var nod = new NodLineNumberStore();`
- We call the **instance methods**: `nod.Peek("LINE")` / `nod.Next("LINE")`
- We **format** the number ourselves: `(prefix ?? "") + num.ToString($"D{width}")`
- No more `NextFormatted` (it didn’t exist) and no more static `NodLineNumberStore.Peek(...)` calls.

### Quick sweep
Search this file for `NodLineNumberStore.` — if you see any more **static** calls, switch them to:
```csharp
var nod = new NodLineNumberStore();
int n = nod.Peek("LINE"); // or nod.Next("LINE")
```

If you want me to also switch this class to use the **JSON allocator** (`TagAllocator_V2`) instead of the NOD counters, I can give you a parallel version that calls `PeekLineTag()` / `AllocateLineTag()` and formats accordingly.

// v2.0.0 (C# 7.3)
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class NewProjectBuilder
    {
        public static ProjectEntry Create(string projectKey, string rootHint, IEnumerable<string> seedDrawingPaths = null)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(projectKey)) throw new ArgumentException("projectKey required");
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(rootHint)) throw new ArgumentException("rootHint required");

            var normalizedRoot = NormalizePath(rootHint);

            var entry = new ProjectEntry
            {
                ProjectKey = projectKey.Trim(),
                RootHint = normalizedRoot,
                Drawings = new List<DrawingEntry>()
            };

            if (seedDrawingPaths != null)
            {
                foreach (var p in seedDrawingPaths)
                {
                    var n = NormalizePath(p);
                    if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(n))
                        entry.Drawings.Add(new DrawingEntry { Path = n });
                }
            }

            // Ensure list is never null (already set) and contains no duplicates
            Dedup(entry.Drawings);
            return entry;
        }

        public static IEnumerable<string> DiscoverDwgs(string rootHint, int max = 1000)
        {
            var results = new List<string>();
            var root = NormalizePath(rootHint);
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(root) || !Directory.Exists(root)) return results;

            try
            {
                foreach (var f in Directory.EnumerateFiles(root, "*.dwg", SearchOption.AllDirectories))
                {
                    results.Add(NormalizePath(f));
                    if (results.Count >= max) break;
                }
            }
            catch { /* ignore filesystem races */ }

            return results;
        }

        public static string NormalizePath(string path)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(path)) return null;
            try { return Path.GetFullPath(path); }
            catch { return path.Trim(); }
        }

        private static void Dedup(List<DrawingEntry> list)
        {
            if (list == null) return;
            var seen = new HashSet<string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
            for (int i = list.Count - 1; i >= 0; i--)
            {
                var p = list[i]?.Path ?? string.Empty;
                if (seen.Contains(p)) list.RemoveAt(i);
                else seen.Add(p);
            }
        }
    }
}
