namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static partial class ProjectStoreService
    {
        public sealed class SystemNextPair
        {
            public string SystemKey { get; set; }
            public string Name { get; set; }
            public string Prefix { get; set; }
            public long? LineNext { get; set; } // v0.4 doesn't model line; leave null
            public long? TagNext { get; set; } // Systems[key].Next
        }

        public static List<SystemNextPair> GetSystemNextPairs(string storePath)
        {
            var list = new List<SystemNextPair>();
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(storePath) || !File.Exists(storePath)) return list;

            var root = JObject.Parse(File.ReadAllText(storePath));

            // v0.4: Systems is an OBJECT
            var systems = root["Systems"] as JObject;
            if (systems != null)
            {
                foreach (var p in systems.Properties())
                {
                    var o = p.Value as JObject; if (o == null) continue;
                    list.Add(new SystemNextPair
                    {
                        SystemKey = p.Name,
                        Name = (string)(o["System"] ?? p.Name) ?? p.Name,
                        Prefix = (string)(o["Prefix"] ?? ""),
                        TagNext = (long?)o["Next"]
                    });
                }
            }

            return list;
        }
    }
}

// File: ProjectSettingsService.cs
// v2.0.0 (C# 7.3)
// NOTE: Wire this to your existing JSON load/save IO and CBI Properties Home.
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public sealed class ProjectSettingsService : IProjectSettingsService_V2
    {
        private readonly string _storePath;
        public ProjectSettingsService(string storePath) { _storePath = storePath; }

        public ProjectStoreSnapshot Read()
        {
            if (!File.Exists(_storePath)) return new ProjectStoreSnapshot();
            var json = File.ReadAllText(_storePath);
            var snap = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<ProjectStoreSnapshot>(json) ?? new ProjectStoreSnapshot();
            if (ProjectStoreValidator.RepairCommon(snap)) Write(snap);
            return snap;
        }

        public void Write(ProjectStoreSnapshot snapshot)
        {
            var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(snapshot, Formatting.Indented);
            Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(_storePath) ?? ".");
            File.WriteAllText(_storePath, json);
        }

        // === New Project ===
        // v2.0.0 (C# 7.3) — drop-in for the existing method
        public void CreateNewProject(string projectKey, string rootHint, bool scanForDrawings)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(projectKey))
                throw new ArgumentException("projectKey required", nameof(projectKey));
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(rootHint))
                throw new ArgumentException("rootHint required", nameof(rootHint));

            var snap = Read();
            if (snap.Projects == null) snap.Projects = new Dictionary<string, ProjectEntry>();

            if (snap.Projects.ContainsKey(projectKey))
                throw new InvalidOperationException("Project already exists: " + projectKey);

            // Normalize and seed drawings (optionally)
            var normalizedRoot = NewProjectBuilder.NormalizePath(rootHint);
            var drawings = scanForDrawings
                ? NewProjectBuilder.DiscoverDwgs(normalizedRoot)
                : (IEnumerable<string>)new List<string>();

            var entry = NewProjectBuilder.Create(projectKey, normalizedRoot, drawings);

            // Ensure Tagging + Blocks defaults exist
            if (entry.Tagging == null) entry.Tagging = new TaggingEntry();
            if (entry.Blocks == null) entry.Blocks = new BlocksEntry();

            snap.Projects[projectKey] = entry;
            snap.ActiveProjectKey = projectKey;

            // Validate & persist
            var issues = ProjectStoreValidator.Validate(snap);
            // We tolerate empty Drawings[] but NEVER null RootHint or null lists.
            var critical = issues.FindAll(i =>
                i.Path.EndsWith(".RootHint", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                i.Message.IndexOf("null", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0);

            if (critical.Count > 0)
                throw new InvalidOperationException("Invalid new project: " + string.Join("; ", critical.ConvertAll(c => c.Message)));

            Write(snap);
        }

        // === Prefix read/write for CBI Properties Home ===
        public string GetValvePrefix() => Read().Projects.TryGetValue(GetActive(), out var p) ? p.Tagging.Valve.Prefix : "V-";
        public void SetValvePrefix(string prefix)
        {
            var snap = Read();
            var key = GetActiveOrThrow(snap);
            snap.Projects[key].Tagging.Valve.Prefix = prefix ?? "V-";
            Write(snap);
        }

        public string GetLinePrefix() => Read().Projects.TryGetValue(GetActive(), out var p) ? p.Tagging.Line.Prefix : "L-";
        public void SetLinePrefix(string prefix)
        {
            var snap = Read();
            var key = GetActiveOrThrow(snap);
            snap.Projects[key].Tagging.Line.Prefix = prefix ?? "L-";
            Write(snap);
        }

        // === Peek/Allocate (no increment vs increment) ===
        public int PeekNextValveNumber()
        {
            var s = Read(); var k = GetActiveOrThrow(s); return s.Projects[k].Tagging.Valve.NextNumber;
        }
        public int PeekNextLineNumber()
        {
            var s = Read(); var k = GetActiveOrThrow(s); return s.Projects[k].Tagging.Line.NextNumber;
        }

        public string AllocateValveTag()
        {
            var s = Read(); var k = GetActiveOrThrow(s);
            var ch = s.Projects[k].Tagging.Valve;
            var tag = ch.Prefix + ch.NextNumber.ToString(ch.Padding > 0 ? new string('0', ch.Padding) : "0");
            ch.NextNumber++;
            Write(s);
            return tag;
        }

        public string AllocateLineTag()
        {
            var s = Read(); var k = GetActiveOrThrow(s);
            var ch = s.Projects[k].Tagging.Line;
            var tag = ch.Prefix + ch.NextNumber.ToString(ch.Padding > 0 ? new string('0', ch.Padding) : "0");
            ch.NextNumber++;
            Write(s);
            return tag;
        }

        private string GetActive() => Read().ActiveProjectKey;
        private static string GetActiveOrThrow(ProjectStoreSnapshot s)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s.ActiveProjectKey)) throw new InvalidOperationException("No active project.");
            return s.ActiveProjectKey;
        }

        // Ensures a project with key exists; if not, creates a minimal one.
        public void EnsureProject(string projectKey, string rootHint)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(projectKey)) throw new ArgumentException("projectKey required");
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(rootHint)) throw new ArgumentException("rootHint required");

            var snap = Read();
            if (snap.Projects == null) snap.Projects = new Dictionary<string, ProjectEntry>();

            if (!snap.Projects.ContainsKey(projectKey))
            {
                var entry = NewProjectBuilder.Create(projectKey, NewProjectBuilder.NormalizePath(rootHint));
                if (entry.Tagging == null) entry.Tagging = new TaggingEntry();
                if (entry.Blocks == null) entry.Blocks = new BlocksEntry();

                snap.Projects[projectKey] = entry;
                snap.ActiveProjectKey = projectKey;
                Write(snap);
            }
            else if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(snap.ActiveProjectKey))
            {
                snap.ActiveProjectKey = projectKey;
                Write(snap);
            }
        }

        // Adds a DWG path to the project's Drawings[] if missing (de-duplicated).
        public bool AddDrawingIfMissing(string projectKey, string drawingPath)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(projectKey)) throw new ArgumentException("projectKey required");
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(drawingPath)) return false;

            var snap = Read();
            if (snap.Projects == null || !snap.Projects.ContainsKey(projectKey)) return false;

            var norm = NewProjectBuilder.NormalizePath(drawingPath);
            var list = snap.Projects[projectKey].Drawings ?? (snap.Projects[projectKey].Drawings = new List<DrawingEntry>());

            foreach (var d in list)
                if (string.Equals(d?.Path, norm, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                    return false; // already present

            list.Add(new DrawingEntry { Path = norm });
            Write(snap);
            return true;
        }

        // Convenience: Ensure project + add single drawing atomically.
        public bool EnsureProjectAndAddDrawing(string projectKey, string rootHint, string drawingPath)
        {
            EnsureProject(projectKey, rootHint);
            return AddDrawingIfMissing(projectKey, drawingPath);
        }
    }

    public interface IProjectSettingsService_V2
    {
        ProjectStoreSnapshot Read();
        void Write(ProjectStoreSnapshot snapshot);
        void CreateNewProject(string projectKey, string rootHint, bool scanForDrawings);

        string GetValvePrefix();
        void SetValvePrefix(string prefix);
        string GetLinePrefix();
        void SetLinePrefix(string prefix);
        int PeekNextValveNumber();
        int PeekNextLineNumber();

        string AllocateValveTag();
        string AllocateLineTag();
    }
}

// File: ProjectStoreModels.cs
// v2.0.0 (C# 7.3)
using System.Collections.Generic;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public sealed class ProjectStoreSnapshot
    {
        public Dictionary<string, ProjectEntry> Projects { get; set; } = new Dictionary<string, ProjectEntry>();
        public string ActiveProjectKey { get; set; }
    }

    public sealed class ProjectEntry
    {
        public string ProjectKey { get; set; }
        public string RootHint { get; set; } // absolute path or UNC
        public List<DrawingEntry> Drawings { get; set; } = new List<DrawingEntry>();
        public TaggingEntry Tagging { get; set; } = new TaggingEntry();
        public BlocksEntry Blocks { get; set; } = new BlocksEntry();
    }

    public sealed class DrawingEntry { public string Path { get; set; } }

    public sealed class TaggingEntry
    {
        public TagChannel Line { get; set; } = new TagChannel { Prefix = "L-", NextNumber = 1000, Padding = 0 };
        public TagChannel Valve { get; set; } = new TagChannel { Prefix = "V-", NextNumber = 1, Padding = 0 };
    }

    public sealed class TagChannel
    {
        public string Prefix { get; set; }
        public int NextNumber { get; set; }
        public int Padding { get; set; }
    }

    public sealed class BlocksEntry
    {
        public ValveBlocks Valve { get; set; } = new ValveBlocks();
    }

    public sealed class ValveBlocks
    {
        public Dictionary<string, ValveTypeRef> Types { get; set; } = DefaultValveTypes();
        public ValveSizeMap SizeMap { get; set; } = new ValveSizeMap
        {
            Units = "in",
            DynamicProperty = "SIZE",
            NominalToBlockScale = new Dictionary<string, double> { { "0.5", 0.5 }, { "1", 1.0 }, { "2", 2.0 } }
        };

        static Dictionary<string, ValveTypeRef> DefaultValveTypes()
        {
            return new Dictionary<string, ValveTypeRef>
            {
                { "Ball",      new ValveTypeRef { Name = "VALVE_BALL", Path = @"C:\Libraries\valves.dwg" } },
                { "Butterfly", new ValveTypeRef { Name = "VALVE_BFY",  Path = @"C:\Libraries\valves.dwg" } },
                { "Check",     new ValveTypeRef { Name = "VALVE_CHK",  Path = @"C:\Libraries\valves.dwg" } },
            };
        }
    }

    public sealed class ValveTypeRef { public string Name { get; set; } public string Path { get; set; } }

    public sealed class ValveSizeMap
    {
        public string Units { get; set; }              // "in" | "mm"
        public string DynamicProperty { get; set; }    // e.g., "SIZE"
        public Dictionary<string, double> NominalToBlockScale { get; set; } = new Dictionary<string, double>();
    }
}

// File: AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStorePaths.cs
using System;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class ProjectStorePaths
    {
        private static readonly string RootDir =
            System.IO.Path.Combine(Environment.GetFolderPath(Environment.SpecialFolder.MyDocuments), "CBIProjects");

        public static string GetDefaultStorePath(string projectName)
        {
            var projectDir = System.IO.Path.Combine(RootDir, projectName);
            return System.IO.Path.Combine(projectDir, "Project_Store.json");
        }

        public static string GetManifestPath()
        {
            return System.IO.Path.Combine(RootDir, "Project_Manifest.json");
        }
    }
}

using System.Collections.Generic;
using System;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using Newtonsoft.Json;
using Newtonsoft.Json.Linq;

// File: AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreService.cs
namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore

{

    public sealed class SystemNextInfo
    {
        public string SystemKey { get; set; } = "";
        public string Name { get; set; } = "";
        public string Prefix { get; set; } = "";
        public long Next { get; set; } = 0;
    }

    public static partial class ProjectStoreService
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Reads Project_Store.json and returns a list of systems with their next numbers.
        /// This is resilient to both "object" and "array" styles for the "systems" node.
        /// Expected fields (if present): key/name/prefix/next; also supports tagCounters fallback.
        /// </summary>
        public static List<SystemNextInfo> GetSystemNextList(string storePath)
        {
            var list = new List<SystemNextInfo>();
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(storePath) || !System.IO.File.Exists(storePath))
                return list;

            var root = JObject.Parse(System.IO.File.ReadAllText(storePath));

            // 1) Try systems as OBJECT:  "systems": { "PROC": { "name": "...", "prefix":"PR-", "next": 101 } }
            var sysObj = root["systems"] as JObject;
            if (sysObj != null)
            {
                foreach (var prop in sysObj.Properties())
                {
                    var o = prop.Value as JObject;
                    if (o == null) continue;
                    list.Add(new SystemNextInfo
                    {
                        SystemKey = prop.Name,
                        Name = (string)(o["name"] ?? prop.Name),
                        Prefix = (string)(o["prefix"] ?? o["Prefix"] ?? ""),
                        Next = (long?)(o["next"] ?? o["Next"]) ?? 0
                    });
                }
            }

            // 2) Try systems as ARRAY:  "systems": [ { "key":"PROC", "name":"Process", "prefix":"PR-", "next":101 } ]
            var sysArr = root["systems"] as JArray;
            if (sysArr != null)
            {
                foreach (var tok in sysArr.OfType<JObject>())
                {
                    list.Add(new SystemNextInfo
                    {
                        SystemKey = (string)(tok["key"] ?? tok["systemKey"] ?? tok["name"] ?? ""),
                        Name = (string)(tok["name"] ?? tok["key"] ?? ""),
                        Prefix = (string)(tok["prefix"] ?? tok["Prefix"] ?? ""),
                        Next = (long?)(tok["next"] ?? tok["Next"]) ?? 0
                    });
                }
            }

            // 3) Fallback: try tagCounters if present: "tagCounters": { "PROC": { "Next": 101 } }
            var counters = root["tagCounters"] as JObject;
            if (counters != null)
            {
                foreach (var prop in counters.Properties())
                {
                    var o = prop.Value as JObject;
                    if (o == null) continue;

                    var found = list.FirstOrDefault(x => x.SystemKey == prop.Name);
                    var next = (long?)(o["next"] ?? o["Next"]) ?? 0;

                    if (found == null)
                    {
                        list.Add(new SystemNextInfo
                        {
                            SystemKey = prop.Name,
                            Name = prop.Name,
                            Prefix = (string)(o["prefix"] ?? o["Prefix"] ?? ""),
                            Next = next
                        });
                    }
                    else if (found.Next == 0 && next > 0)
                    {
                        found.Next = next; // fill missing
                    }
                }
            }

            // Normalize/unique by SystemKey
            return list
                .GroupBy(x => x.SystemKey ?? x.Name ?? "")
                .Select(g => g.OrderByDescending(x => x.Next).First())
                .OrderBy(x => x.SystemKey)
                .ToList();
        }
        public static void CreateNewStore(string projectId, string projectName, string storePath, string manifestPath)
        {
            Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(storePath));

            // v0.4 canonical seed
            var root = new JObject
            {
                ["Version"] = "0.4",

                ["Config"] = new JObject
                {
                    ["GraceDays"] = 7,
                    ["PreferReleasedLowestFirst"] = true
                },

                ["Project"] = new JObject
                {
                    ["Name"] = projectName,
                    ["RootHint"] = null,
                    ["Drawings"] = new JArray() // you’ll append actual drawings later as you scan/see them
                },

                // SYSTEMS: object keyed by system name
                ["Systems"] = new JObject
                {
                    ["GENERAL"] = new JObject
                    {
                        ["System"] = "GENERAL",
                        ["Prefix"] = "V",
                        ["Pad"] = 4,
                        ["Start"] = 1001,
                        ["End"] = 1999,
                        ["Next"] = 1001
                    }
                },

                ["Released"] = new JObject(), // e.g., "GENERAL": [1007, 1012]
                ["Tags"] = new JArray(),  // tag records appended as placed
                ["History"] = new JArray()   // audit entries appended as actions happen
            };

            File.WriteAllText(storePath, root.ToString(Formatting.Indented));

            // Optional: append to manifest
            try
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(manifestPath));
                if (!File.Exists(manifestPath)) File.WriteAllText(manifestPath, "[]");
                var arr = JArray.Parse(File.ReadAllText(manifestPath));
                arr.Add(new JObject
                {
                    ["projectId"] = projectId,
                    ["name"] = projectName,
                    ["storePath"] = storePath,
                    ["updatedUtc"] = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o")
                });
                File.WriteAllText(manifestPath, arr.ToString(Formatting.Indented));
            }
            catch { /* non-fatal */ }
        }
    }

}

// File: ProjectStoreValidator.cs
// v2.0.0 (C# 7.3)
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class ProjectStoreValidator
    {
        public sealed class ValidationIssue
        {
            public string Path;   // e.g., "Projects.X.RootHint"
            public string Message;
        }

        public static List<ValidationIssue> Validate(ProjectStoreSnapshot snap)
        {
            var issues = new List<ValidationIssue>();
            if (snap == null) { issues.Add(new ValidationIssue { Path = "$", Message = "Snapshot is null" }); return issues; }

            if (snap.Projects == null) issues.Add(new ValidationIssue { Path = "Projects", Message = "Projects is null" });

            if (snap.Projects != null)
            {
                foreach (var kv in snap.Projects)
                {
                    var key = kv.Key;
                    var p = kv.Value;
                    if (p == null) { issues.Add(new ValidationIssue { Path = $"Projects.{key}", Message = "Project entry is null" }); continue; }

                    if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(p.ProjectKey))
                        issues.Add(new ValidationIssue { Path = $"Projects.{key}.ProjectKey", Message = "Missing ProjectKey" });

                    if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(p.RootHint))
                        issues.Add(new ValidationIssue { Path = $"Projects.{key}.RootHint", Message = "RootHint is empty" });

                    if (p.Drawings == null)
                        issues.Add(new ValidationIssue { Path = $"Projects.{key}.Drawings", Message = "Drawings is null (must be an array)" });

                    if (p.Tagging == null)
                        issues.Add(new ValidationIssue { Path = $"Projects.{key}.Tagging", Message = "Tagging missing" });

                    if (p.Blocks == null || p.Blocks.Valve == null)
                        issues.Add(new ValidationIssue { Path = $"Projects.{key}.Blocks.Valve", Message = "Valve block config missing" });
                }
            }

            return issues;
        }

        // Non-destructive repair for common problems you reported.
        public static bool RepairCommon(ProjectStoreSnapshot snap)
        {
            if (snap == null) return false;
            var changed = false;

            if (snap.Projects == null)
            {
                snap.Projects = new Dictionary<string, ProjectEntry>();
                changed = true;
            }

            foreach (var kv in snap.Projects.ToList())
            {
                var p = kv.Value;
                if (p == null)
                {
                    snap.Projects[kv.Key] = new ProjectEntry { ProjectKey = kv.Key, Drawings = new List<DrawingEntry>() };
                    changed = true;
                    continue;
                }
                if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(p.ProjectKey)) { p.ProjectKey = kv.Key; changed = true; }
                if (p.Drawings == null) { p.Drawings = new List<DrawingEntry>(); changed = true; }
                if (p.Tagging == null) { p.Tagging = new TaggingEntry(); changed = true; }
                if (p.Blocks == null) { p.Blocks = new BlocksEntry(); changed = true; }
                if (p.Blocks.Valve == null) { p.Blocks.Valve = new ValveBlocks(); changed = true; }
            }

            return changed;
        }
    }
}

using System;
using System.Linq;
using AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore;
using Newtonsoft.Json.Linq;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class StoreGuards
    {
        public static bool TagIdExists(string storePath, string id)
        {
            var root = JObject.Parse(System.IO.File.ReadAllText(storePath));
            var tags = root["Tags"] as JArray;
            if (tags == null) return false;
            return tags.OfType<JObject>().Any(t =>
                string.Equals((string)t["Id"], id, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
        }

        public static bool ChildHandleExists(string storePath, string childHandle)
        {
            var root = JObject.Parse(System.IO.File.ReadAllText(storePath));
            var tags = root["Tags"] as JArray;
            if (tags == null) return false;
            return tags.OfType<JObject>().Any(t =>
                string.Equals((string)t["ChildHandle"], childHandle, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
        }

        public static bool NumberTakenInSystem(string storePath, string systemKey, int number)
        {
            var root = JObject.Parse(System.IO.File.ReadAllText(storePath));
            var tags = root["Tags"] as JArray;
            if (tags == null) return false;
            return tags.OfType<JObject>().Any(t =>
                string.Equals((string)t["System"], systemKey, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                && (int?)t["Number"] == number);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Returns true if the given tag Id is already recorded in the store
        /// AND the owning record's ParentHandle matches the supplied parentHandle.
        /// Case-insensitive compare for both Id and handle.
        /// </summary>
        public static bool TagIdOwnedByParent(string storePath, string id, string parentHandle)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(storePath) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(id) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(parentHandle))
                return false;

            try
            {
                var store = ProjectTagStore.LoadOrCreate(storePath);
                return TagIdOwnedByParent(store, id, parentHandle);
            }
            catch
            {
                return false;
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// In-memory variant if you already have the store loaded.
        /// </summary>
        public static bool TagIdOwnedByParent(ProjectTagStore store, string id, string parentHandle)
        {
            if (store?.Tags == null ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(id) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(parentHandle))
                return false;

            return store.Tags.Any(t =>
                string.Equals(t.Id, id, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) &&
                string.Equals(t.ParentHandle, parentHandle, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
        }
    }
}

// File: AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/SafeStoreAllocator.cs
// C# 7.3
using System;
using System.IO;
using System.Security.Cryptography;
using System.Text;
using System.Threading;
using Newtonsoft.Json;
using Newtonsoft.Json.Linq;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class SafeStoreAllocator
    {
        public sealed class AllocResult
        {
            public string SystemKey;
            public string Prefix;
            public int Pad;
            public int Number;
            public string PrintedId; // e.g., V-1023
            public string Action;    // ALLOCATE or REUSE
        }

        // Main entry: safe allocation (mutex + file lock + atomic replace + retries)
        public static AllocResult AllocateNextSafe(string storePath, string systemKey, string who, string drawingPath, int maxRetries = 6)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(storePath)) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(storePath));
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(systemKey)) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(systemKey));

            var mutexName = @"Global\CBI_Store_" + HashForName(storePath) + "_" + Sanitize(systemKey);
            using (var mutex = new Mutex(false, mutexName))
            {
                var rand = new Random();
                for (int attempt = 0; attempt < maxRetries; attempt++)
                {
                    bool lockTaken = false;
                    try
                    {
                        // Intra-process/machine guard (wait up to ~2s then retry with backoff)
                        lockTaken = mutex.WaitOne(TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(2000));
                        if (!lockTaken) throw new IOException("Mutex contention.");

                        // Cross-process/machine guard: open with exclusive share
                        using (var fs = OpenExclusive(storePath))
                        using (var sr = new StreamReader(fs, Encoding.UTF8, true, 4096, leaveOpen: true))
                        using (var sw = new StreamWriter(fs, Encoding.UTF8, 4096, leaveOpen: true))
                        {
                            // read JSON
                            fs.Seek(0, SeekOrigin.Begin);
                            var json = sr.ReadToEnd();
                            var root = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(json) ? new JObject() : JObject.Parse(json);

                            // version stamp (optional)
                            var versionTick = (int?)root["VersionTick"] ?? 0;

                            // -------- allocate (REUSE or ALLOCATE) ----------
                            var res = AllocateInMemory(root, systemKey, who, drawingPath);

                            // bump version
                            root["VersionTick"] = versionTick + 1;

                            // -------- atomic save ----------
                            var tmp = storePath + ".tmp";
                            File.WriteAllText(tmp, root.ToString(Formatting.Indented), Encoding.UTF8);
                            // Replace preserves ACLs; if not available use Move after Delete
                            TryFileReplace(tmp, storePath, storePath + ".bak");

                            return res;
                        }
                    }
                    catch (IOException)
                    {
                        // brief backoff (jitter) then retry
                        Thread.Sleep(120 + rand.Next(0, 200) * (attempt + 1));
                    }
                    catch (JsonReaderException)
                    {
                        // corrupt/incomplete read due to race; back off and retry
                        Thread.Sleep(150);
                    }
                    finally
                    {
                        if (lockTaken) mutex.ReleaseMutex();
                    }
                }

                throw new IOException("Could not acquire store for allocation after multiple retries.");
            }
        }

        // In-memory allocator (v0.4 semantics)
        private static AllocResult AllocateInMemory(JObject root, string systemKey, string who, string drawingPath)
        {
            if (root["Systems"] == null) root["Systems"] = new JObject();
            if (root["Released"] == null) root["Released"] = new JObject();
            if (root["History"] == null) root["History"] = new JArray();

            var systems = (JObject)root["Systems"];
            if (!systems.ContainsKey(systemKey))
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"System '{systemKey}' not found.");

            var cfg = new StoreConfigLite(root["Config"] as JObject);

            var sys = (JObject)systems[systemKey];
            var prefix = (string)(sys["Prefix"] ?? "V");
            var pad = (int?)sys["Pad"] ?? 4;
            var start = (int?)sys["Start"] ?? 1;
            var end = (int?)sys["End"] ?? 9999;
            var next = (int?)sys["Next"] ?? start;

            var released = (JObject)root["Released"];
            var relArr = (JArray)(released[systemKey] ?? (released[systemKey] = new JArray()));

            int number;
            var action = "ALLOCATE";

            if (cfg.PreferReleasedLowestFirst && relArr.Count > 0)
            {
                // pick lowest
                int min = int.MaxValue, idx = -1;
                for (int i = 0; i < relArr.Count; i++)
                {
                    var n = (int)relArr[i];
                    if (n < min) { min = n; idx = i; }
                }
                if (idx >= 0) relArr.RemoveAt(idx);
                number = min;
                action = "REUSE";
            }
            else
            {
                if (next < start) next = start;
                if (next > end) throw new InvalidOperationException($"System '{systemKey}' exhausted ({end}).");
                number = next;
                sys["Next"] = next + 1;
            }

            var printed = $"{prefix}-{number.ToString(new string('0', pad))}";

            // history append
            var hist = (JArray)root["History"];
            hist.Add(new JObject
            {
                ["WhenUtc"] = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o"),
                ["Who"] = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(who) ? Environment.UserName : who,
                ["Action"] = action,
                ["System"] = systemKey,
                ["Number"] = number,
                ["Id"] = printed,
                ["DrawingPath"] = drawingPath ?? string.Empty
            });

            return new AllocResult
            {
                SystemKey = systemKey,
                Prefix = prefix,
                Pad = pad,
                Number = number,
                PrintedId = printed,
                Action = action
            };
        }

        // ------------- low-level helpers -------------

        private static FileStream OpenExclusive(string path)
        {
            // Ensures cross-process/cross-machine exclusion on SMB
            return new FileStream(
                path, FileMode.Open, FileAccess.ReadWrite, FileShare.None,
                bufferSize: 4096, FileOptions.None);
        }

        private static void TryFileReplace(string temp, string target, string backup)
        {
            try
            {
                // Windows atomic replace
                File.Replace(temp, target, backup, ignoreMetadataErrors: true);
            }
            catch (PlatformNotSupportedException)
            {
                // Fallback if Replace unsupported (rare)
                if (File.Exists(target)) File.Delete(target);
                File.Move(temp, target);
            }
        }

        private static string HashForName(string input)
        {
            using (var sha = SHA256.Create())
            {
                var bytes = sha.ComputeHash(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(input ?? ""));
                // short hash is enough for mutex name
                return BitConverter.ToString(bytes, 0, 8).Replace("-", "");
            }
        }

        private static string Sanitize(string name)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(name)) return "SYS";
            var sb = new StringBuilder(name.Length);
            foreach (var ch in name)
                sb.Append(char.IsLetterOrDigit(ch) ? ch : '_');
            return sb.ToString();
        }

        private sealed class StoreConfigLite
        {
            public int GraceDays { get; }
            public bool PreferReleasedLowestFirst { get; }

            public StoreConfigLite(JObject cfg)
            {
                GraceDays = (int?)cfg?["GraceDays"] ?? 7;
                PreferReleasedLowestFirst = (bool?)cfg?["PreferReleasedLowestFirst"] ?? true;
            }
        }
    }
}

// NOD_X_Data/ProjectTagStore.cs
// C# 7.3 compatible

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore
{
    /// <summary>
    /// JSON-backed project store: Systems (ranges), Released pool, Tags (allocations),
    /// History, and Project metadata. Authoritative schema v0.4.
    /// </summary>
    public class ProjectTagStore
    {
        public const string CurrentVersion = "0.4";

        // -------- Root --------
        public string Version { get; set; } = CurrentVersion;
        public ConfigBlock Config { get; set; } = new ConfigBlock();
        public ProjectMetadata Project { get; set; } = new ProjectMetadata();

        // system key -> range config
        public Dictionary<string, SystemConfig> Systems { get; set; }
            = new Dictionary<string, SystemConfig>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        // system key -> released numbers (available for reuse; lowest-first)
        public Dictionary<string, SortedSet<int>> Released { get; set; }
            = new Dictionary<string, SortedSet<int>>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        // all tag assignments
        public List<TagRecord> Tags { get; set; } = new List<TagRecord>();

        // append-only audit log
        public List<HistoryEvent> History { get; set; } = new List<HistoryEvent>();

        // -------- Blocks --------
        public class ConfigBlock
        {
            public int GraceDays { get; set; } = 7;
            public bool PreferReleasedLowestFirst { get; set; } = true;
        }

        public class ProjectMetadata
        {
            public string Name { get; set; }
            public DateTime CreatedUtc { get; set; }
            public string Engineer { get; set; }
            public string Notes { get; set; }
            public List<ProjectDrawingInfo> Drawings { get; set; } = new List<ProjectDrawingInfo>();
        }

        public class ProjectDrawingInfo
        {
            public string Path { get; set; }
            public string Name { get; set; }
            public DateTime? LastSeenUtc { get; set; }
            public string DbGuid { get; set; } // optional
        }

        public class SystemConfig
        {
            public string System { get; set; }
            public string Prefix { get; set; } = "V"; // e.g. "V"
            public int Pad { get; set; } = 4;         // digits for numeric part
            public int Start { get; set; }
            public int End { get; set; }
            public int Next { get; set; }             // next candidate in range
        }

        public class TagRecord
        {
            // identity
            public string Id { get; set; }            // e.g. "V-2001"
            public string System { get; set; }
            public int Number { get; set; }
            public string Prefix { get; set; }
            public int Pad { get; set; }

            // context
            public string DrawingPath { get; set; }
            public string DrawingName { get; set; }
            public string Layout { get; set; } = "Model";

            // links (parent valve / child bubble)
            public string ParentHandle { get; set; }
            public string ChildHandle { get; set; }
            public string ChildBlock { get; set; }
            public string ChildVisState { get; set; }

            // lifecycle
            public string Status { get; set; } = "Active"; // Active | MissingInDWG | Released | Reserved | Superseded
            public DateTime? LastSeenUtc { get; set; }
            public DateTime? MissingSinceUtc { get; set; }
            public DateTime? ReleasedUtc { get; set; }
            public string ReleasedBy { get; set; }

            // edit hints
            public EditedHints Edited { get; set; } = new EditedHints();

            // provenance
            public DateTime? WhenUtc { get; set; }
            public string By { get; set; }

            public string DrawingFingerprint { get; set; }  // unique to each DWG
            public string CBIValveKey { get; set; }          // <FingerprintGuid>:<Handle>
        }

        public class EditedHints
        {
            public bool NumberTextEdited { get; set; }
            public bool FuncTextEdited { get; set; }
            public string Note { get; set; }
        }

        public class HistoryEvent
        {
            public DateTime WhenUtc { get; set; }
            public string Who { get; set; }
            public string Action { get; set; } // ALLOCATE | REUSE | RELEASE | MISSING | SEEN | REATTACH | JUMP_NEXT | RESERVE
            public string System { get; set; }
            public int Number { get; set; }
            public string Id { get; set; }
            public string DrawingPath { get; set; }
            public string Handle { get; set; }
            public string Notes { get; set; }
        }

        // -------- Load / Save --------
        public static ProjectTagStore LoadOrCreate(string path)
        {
            ProjectTagStore store;

            if (File.Exists(path))
            {
                var json = File.ReadAllText(path);
                store = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<ProjectTagStore>(json) ?? new ProjectTagStore();
            }
            else
            {
                store = new ProjectTagStore();
            }

            // upgrade / hydrate defaults
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(store.Version)) store.Version = CurrentVersion;
            if (store.Config == null) store.Config = new ConfigBlock();

            if (store.Project == null) store.Project = new ProjectMetadata();
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(store.Project.Name))
                store.Project.Name = Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(path);
            if (store.Project.CreatedUtc == default(DateTime))
                store.Project.CreatedUtc = DateTime.UtcNow;
            if (store.Project.Drawings == null) store.Project.Drawings = new List<ProjectDrawingInfo>();

            if (store.Systems == null)
                store.Systems = new Dictionary<string, SystemConfig>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
            if (store.Tags == null) store.Tags = new List<TagRecord>();
            if (store.Released == null)
                store.Released = new Dictionary<string, SortedSet<int>>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
            if (store.History == null) store.History = new List<HistoryEvent>();

            return store;
        }

        public void Save(string path)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Version)) Version = CurrentVersion;
            if (Project == null) Project = new ProjectMetadata();
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Project.Name))
                Project.Name = Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(path);
            if (Project.CreatedUtc == default(DateTime))
                Project.CreatedUtc = DateTime.UtcNow;

            var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(this, Formatting.Indented);
            File.WriteAllText(path, json);
        }

        // -------- Allocation / Reuse --------
        private SortedSet<int> GetReleasedSet(string system)
        {
            SortedSet<int> set;
            if (!Released.TryGetValue(system, out set))
            {
                set = new SortedSet<int>();
                Released[system] = set;
            }
            return set;
        }

        public static string FormatId(string prefix, int number, int pad)
        {
            var n = number.ToString().PadLeft(Math.Max(0, pad), '0');
            return string.IsNullOrEmpty(prefix) ? n : $"{prefix}-{n}";
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Allocate next number for a system. Reuse released numbers first (lowest).
        /// Appends a History event (ALLOCATE or REUSE). Returns the number (not the Id).
        /// </summary>
        public int AllocateNextInSystem(string system)
        {
            SystemConfig cfg;
            if (!Systems.TryGetValue(system, out cfg))
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"System '{system}' is not defined.");

            var pool = GetReleasedSet(system);
            if (Config.PreferReleasedLowestFirst && pool.Count > 0)
            {
                var n = pool.Min;
                pool.Remove(n);

                History.Add(new HistoryEvent
                {
                    WhenUtc = DateTime.UtcNow,
                    Who = Environment.UserName,
                    Action = "REUSE",
                    System = system,
                    Number = n,
                    Id = FormatId(cfg.Prefix, n, cfg.Pad)
                });
                return n;
            }

            if (cfg.Next <= 0) cfg.Next = Math.Max(cfg.Start, 1);
            if (cfg.Next < cfg.Start) cfg.Next = cfg.Start;
            if (cfg.Next > cfg.End)
                throw new InvalidOperationException(
                    $"System '{system}' is out of numbers (Next={cfg.Next}, Range={cfg.Start}..{cfg.End}).");

            var alloc = cfg.Next;
            cfg.Next = (alloc + 1 <= cfg.End) ? alloc + 1 : cfg.End + 1;
            Systems[system] = cfg;

            History.Add(new HistoryEvent
            {
                WhenUtc = DateTime.UtcNow,
                Who = Environment.UserName,
                Action = "ALLOCATE",
                System = system,
                Number = alloc,
                Id = FormatId(cfg.Prefix, alloc, cfg.Pad)
            });

            return alloc;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Release a specific number back to the pool. Idempotent. Leaves TagRecord for audit.
        /// </summary>
        public void ReleaseNumber(string system, int number, string note = null)
        {
            SystemConfig cfg;
            if (!Systems.TryGetValue(system, out cfg))
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"System '{system}' is not defined.");

            if (number < cfg.Start || number > cfg.End)
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Number {number} is outside {system} range {cfg.Start}..{cfg.End}.");

            var pool = GetReleasedSet(system);
            pool.Add(number);

            History.Add(new HistoryEvent
            {
                WhenUtc = DateTime.UtcNow,
                Who = Environment.UserName,
                Action = "RELEASE",
                System = system,
                Number = number,
                Id = FormatId(cfg.Prefix, number, cfg.Pad),
                Notes = note
            });
        }

        // -------- Convenience for reconcile/viewer --------
        public void MarkSeen(TagRecord rec)
        {
            if (rec == null) return;
            rec.Status = "Active";
            rec.LastSeenUtc = DateTime.UtcNow;

            History.Add(new HistoryEvent
            {
                WhenUtc = rec.LastSeenUtc.Value,
                Who = Environment.UserName,
                Action = "SEEN",
                System = rec.System,
                Number = rec.Number,
                Id = rec.Id,
                DrawingPath = rec.DrawingPath,
                Handle = rec.ChildHandle
            });
        }

        public void MarkMissing(TagRecord rec)
        {
            if (rec == null) return;
            var now = DateTime.UtcNow;
            rec.Status = "MissingInDWG";
            if (!rec.MissingSinceUtc.HasValue) rec.MissingSinceUtc = now;

            History.Add(new HistoryEvent
            {
                WhenUtc = now,
                Who = Environment.UserName,
                Action = "MISSING",
                System = rec.System,
                Number = rec.Number,
                Id = rec.Id,
                DrawingPath = rec.DrawingPath,
                Handle = rec.ChildHandle
            });
        }

        public TagRecord FindTag(string id, string drawingPath, int number)
        {
            return Tags.FirstOrDefault(t =>
                string.Equals(t.Id, id, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) &&
                string.Equals(t.DrawingPath, drawingPath, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) &&
                t.Number == number);
        }

        /// <summary>Globally unique identifier for this drawing (db.FingerprintGuid).</summary>
        public string DrawingFingerprint { get; set; }

        /// <summary>Stable unique cross-DWG identity for this valve (FingerprintGuid:Handle).</summary>
        public string CBIValveKey { get; set; }
    }
}

using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;

namespace AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore
{
    public static class ProjectTagPath
    {
        private const string LegacyDict = "CBI_ProjectData";
        private const string LegacyKey = "TagStorePath";

        public static void SetPath(Database db, Transaction tr, string path)
        {
            var nod = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(db.NamedObjectsDictionaryId, OpenMode.ForWrite);

            if (!nod.Contains(LegacyDict))
                nod.SetAt(LegacyDict, new DBDictionary());

            var dict = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(nod.GetAt(LegacyDict), OpenMode.ForWrite);

            if (dict.Contains(LegacyKey))
            {
                var xr = (Xrecord)tr.GetObject(dict.GetAt(LegacyKey), OpenMode.ForWrite);
                xr.Data = new ResultBuffer(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Text, path ?? string.Empty));
            }
            else
            {
                var xr = new Xrecord { Data = new ResultBuffer(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Text, path ?? string.Empty)) };
                dict.SetAt(LegacyKey, xr);
                tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(xr, true);
            }
        }

        public static string GetPath(Database db, Transaction tr)
        {
            var nod = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(db.NamedObjectsDictionaryId, OpenMode.ForRead);

            // Try legacy
            if (nod.Contains(LegacyDict))
            {
                var dict = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(nod.GetAt(LegacyDict), OpenMode.ForRead);
                if (dict.Contains(LegacyKey))
                {
                    var xr = (Xrecord)tr.GetObject(dict.GetAt(LegacyKey), OpenMode.ForRead);
                    var arr = xr.Data?.AsArray();
                    if (arr != null && arr.Length > 0)
                    {
                        var s = arr[0].Value as string;
                        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s))
                            return s;
                    }
                }
            }

            // Fallback to new binder
            var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            return ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var b) ? b.StorePath : null;
        }

        public static string GetPath()
        {
            var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            using (var tr = doc?.TransactionManager.StartOpenCloseTransaction())
            {
                return tr == null ? null : GetPath(doc.Database, tr);
            }
        }
    }
}

## Response:
10/17/2025, 4:07:49 PM

> **Reviewing code duplication**
>
> We need to address some code duplication and overlap: The GetSystemNextPairs method has two versions (commented and new). Similarly, GetSystemNextList and ProjectStoreService’s methods overlap. Other potential duplications include SafeStoreAllocator vs ProjectTagStore.AllocateNextInSystem, and modifications in ProjectStoreSnapshot vs. ProjectTagStore schema. I'd suggest consolidating these into fewer services, unifying under one ProjectStoreService and simplifying the functions that deal with systems.
>
> **Proposing code merge plan**
>
> We should merge under a unified versioning plan, keeping ProjectTagStore (v0.4) and SafeStoreAllocator, removing/merging GetSystemNextPairs into a single method (maybe adding a StoreReader class). ProjectSettingsService uses different snapshot JSON, so let's mark it as 'v1', deprecate TaggingEntry, and create an adapter for ProjectTagStore to avoid dual sources of truth. Steps: delete unnecessary methods, replace calls, and refactor as needed.
>
> Thought for 18s

Got it—thanks for pasting. I read through everything you sent. You’re right: there’s **real duplication** (and a couple of split sources of truth) between your “Project Settings” JSON and the “Tag Store v0.4” JSON. Here’s a straight, actionable review.

# What you have (at a glance)

- **Two “project” JSONs / models**
  1) **ProjectSettingsService + ProjectStoreSnapshot** (per-project RootHint/Drawings + Tagging {Line/Valve} counters & prefixes).
  2) **ProjectTagStore v0.4** (Systems ranges/prefix/pad + Released pool + Tags + History).

- **Two allocator paths**
  - `ProjectSettingsService.AllocateValveTag/AllocateLineTag()` (increments `Tagging.Line/Valve.NextNumber`).
  - `SafeStoreAllocator.AllocateNextSafe()` and `ProjectTagStore.AllocateNextInSystem()` (the v0.4 system).

- **Two “next” readers**
  - `ProjectStoreService.GetSystemNextList()` (reads flexible “systems”/“tagCounters” from *some* JSON).
  - `ProjectStoreService.GetSystemNextPairs()` (reads “Systems” (capital S) from **v0.4**).

- **Two “new project” creators**
  - `ProjectSettingsService.CreateNewProject(...)` (builds **ProjectStoreSnapshot**).
  - `ProjectStoreService.CreateNewStore(...)` (builds **v0.4 store** + manifest).

- Helpers that are fine: `NewProjectBuilder`, `ProjectStoreValidator`, `StoreGuards`, `ProjectTagPath`, `ProjectStorePaths`, `ProjectTagStore` (v0.4).

# Problems (root causes)

1) **Two sources of truth for counters/prefixes**  
   - `ProjectSettingsService.Tagging.Line/Valve` **vs** `ProjectTagStore.Systems[...].Next/Prefix/Pad`.
   - Leads to drift and “which one should the UI show?” questions.

2) **Duplicated readers / different casings**  
   - `GetSystemNextList` (lowercase `systems`) vs `GetSystemNextPairs` (uppercase `Systems`) repeating the same job.

3) **Duplicated “new project” logic**  
   - One creates “settings” JSON; the other creates v0.4 store. Users will get one or the other depending on which button path they use.

# Recommendation (clean, minimal moves)

## A) Choose **ProjectTagStore v0.4** as the **authoritative** tag allocator
- Keep: `ProjectTagStore`, `SafeStoreAllocator`, `StoreGuards`, `ProjectTagPath`, `ProjectStoreService.CreateNewStore(...)`.
- Deprecate (do NOT delete yet): the *counter* parts of `ProjectSettingsService` (peek/allocate methods, Tagging.NextNumber).
- **UI/palette** should read/write prefix/pad **from v0.4** (Systems), not from `ProjectSettingsService.Tagging`.

### Small, safe code change
Replace in `ProjectSettingsService`:

- Remove/stop using:
  - `PeekNextValveNumber()`, `PeekNextLineNumber()`
  - `AllocateValveTag()`, `AllocateLineTag()`
- Mark them `[Obsolete("Use SafeStoreAllocator / ProjectTagStore instead.")]` now, and stop calling them anywhere.

Add thin **forwarders** (so palette & tools are aligned):

```csharp
public string GetSystemPrefix(string systemKey)
{
    var path = _storePath; // or resolve via ProjectTagPath for current DWG if needed
    var store = AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.ProjectTagStore.LoadOrCreate(path);
    if (store.Systems.TryGetValue(systemKey, out var cfg))
        return cfg.Prefix ?? "V";
    return "V";
}

public void SetSystemPrefix(string systemKey, string prefix)
{
    var path = _storePath;
    var store = AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.ProjectTagStore.LoadOrCreate(path);
    if (!store.Systems.TryGetValue(systemKey, out var cfg))
        store.Systems[systemKey] = cfg = new AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.ProjectTagStore.SystemConfig { System = systemKey, Start = 1, End = 9999, Next = 1 };
    cfg.Prefix = prefix ?? "V";
    store.Save(path);
}
```

> Then make your **CBI Properties Home** point to these methods (or directly to `ProjectTagStoreAdapter`) so the prefix is **the same** one used by allocation.

## B) Consolidate the “next” readers into **one** API
Keep a single method under `ProjectStoreService`:

```csharp
public static List<SystemNextInfo> GetSystemNextList(string storePath)
```

…and make it **only** read **v0.4** (`Systems` object with `Next/Prefix/Pad`).  
Delete the duplicate `GetSystemNextPairs` (or have it call `GetSystemNextList` and mark `[Obsolete]`). Your bottom (active) `GetSystemNextPairs` already only reads `Systems` (v0.4); so:

- **Keep** `SystemNextInfo` (key, name, prefix, next).
- **Remove** `SystemNextPair` **and** the commented legacy block.
- Make the palette “Tag Numbers” tree use just `GetSystemNextList`.

## C) Unify “new project” behavior
- Make your **buttons/commands** create:
  1) The **v0.4** store: `ProjectStoreService.CreateNewStore(...)`
  2) Optionally a small `ProjectStoreSnapshot` (settings) **without counters** (just root/drawings) if you still want that file for other non-tag settings.

- In your command path:
  - If a v0.4 store **doesn’t exist** in the support folder → create it.
  - Always bind DWG to the store path (`ProjectTagPath.SetPath`).
  - Use `ProjectSettingsService` only for **root/drawing list** management (no counters).

## D) Keep both allocators, but route calls consistently
- For **actual tag numbers** at runtime: call `SafeStoreAllocator.AllocateNextSafe(...)` (cross-process safe) or, if you have the object in memory already in a single process, `ProjectTagStore.AllocateNextInSystem(...)` followed by `Save`.
- For **preview**: read `ProjectTagStore.Systems[sys].Next` (or compute with `Released` lowest-first rule) and format.

## E) Tiny maintenance / hygiene
- Remove the commented `ProjectStoreService.NextReaders.cs` block (the big commented duplicate).
- Ensure casing is **`Systems`** everywhere for v0.4.
- Keep `NewProjectBuilder` (normalize paths + seed dwgs) — it’s fine; call it **only** from the *settings* side to populate `Drawings`, not for counters.

# Minimal patch list (what to change today)

1) **Delete or obsolete**:
   - `ProjectStoreService.GetSystemNextPairs(...)` **OR** make it call `GetSystemNextList(...)` and add `[Obsolete]`.
   - The huge commented legacy block (the earlier pairs reader).

2) **ProjectSettingsService**:
   - Add `[Obsolete]` to `PeekNextValveNumber/PeekNextLineNumber/AllocateValveTag/AllocateLineTag`.
   - Stop calling them anywhere.
   - Add `GetSystemPrefix` / `SetSystemPrefix` (to interact with v0.4’s Systems prefix).
   - Keep `CreateNewProject`, `EnsureProject`, `AddDrawingIfMissing` for **root/drawing** registry only.

3) **Palette / Properties Home**:
   - Read prefix & next values via **v0.4** (`GetSystemNextList` + `SetSystemPrefix` or direct adapter).
   - Remove any display that pulls from `TaggingEntry` numbers.

4) **Line/Valve tools**:
   - For preview: use v0.4 `Systems[sys].Next` + `Released` lowest-first rule (or a small `Allocator.Preview` helper).
   - For allocation: `SafeStoreAllocator.AllocateNextSafe(...)`.

5) **Commands**:
   - Ensure new-project buttons call **only** the v0.4 creator for the tag store; optionally also create/maintain the `ProjectStoreSnapshot` but **don’t store counters there**.

# Why this is safe

- You reduce to a **single source of truth** for tag numbers/prefix/pad: `ProjectTagStore v0.4`.
- You keep your existing “project registry” (root/drawings) intact, just not as a counter DB.
- Your UI becomes predictable: what you see is exactly what will be allocated.

If you want, I can provide the exact diffs for:
- Rewriting `GetSystemNextList` as the only reader.
- Obsoleting the four `ProjectSettingsService` methods.
- A tiny `AllocatorPreview` helper that resolves “released lowest-first” without committing.

When you’re ready, paste your next chunk (or tell me which file to patch first), and I’ll give you drop-in code.

// File: Commands_ProjectRepair.cs
// v2.0.0 (C# 7.3)
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;

namespace AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore
{
    public static class ProjectRepairCommands
    {
        private static readonly string StorePath = @"C:\CBICAD\Project_Store.json";

public static void CBI_RepairProjectStore()
        {
            try
            {
                var svc = new ProjectSettingsService(StorePath);
                var snap = svc.Read();
                var changed = ProjectStoreValidator.RepairCommon(snap);

                // Optional: if RootHint empty but ActiveProjectKey known, prompt to set it.
                if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(snap.ActiveProjectKey) &&
                    snap.Projects.ContainsKey(snap.ActiveProjectKey))
                {
                    var p = snap.Projects[snap.ActiveProjectKey];
                    if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(p.RootHint))
                    {
                        // You could reuse the folder prompt here to set RootHint.
                    }
                }

                if (changed) svc.Write(snap);
                Application.ShowAlertDialog("Project store repair completed.");
            }
            catch (System.Exception ex)
            {
                Application.ShowAlertDialog("Repair failed: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }
    }
}

using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;

namespace AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore
{
    public static class ProjectNodBinder
    {
        // Writes: NOD["CBI"]["Project"] = Xrecord( Id, Name, StorePath )
        public static void BindProjectToDrawing(Document doc, string projectId, string name, string storePath)
        {
            if (doc == null) return;
            var db = doc.Database;

            using (doc.LockDocument())
            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var nod = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(db.NamedObjectsDictionaryId, OpenMode.ForRead);

                DBDictionary cbi;
                if (nod.Contains("CBI"))
                {
                    cbi = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(nod.GetAt("CBI"), OpenMode.ForWrite);
                }
                else
                {
                    nod.UpgradeOpen();
                    cbi = new DBDictionary();
                    nod.SetAt("CBI", cbi);
                    tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(cbi, true);
                }

                var data = new ResultBuffer(
                    new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Text, projectId ?? string.Empty),
                    new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Text, name ?? string.Empty),
                    new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Text, storePath ?? string.Empty)
                );

                if (cbi.Contains("Project"))
                {
                    var xr = (Xrecord)tr.GetObject(cbi.GetAt("Project"), OpenMode.ForWrite);
                    xr.Data = data;
                }
                else
                {
                    var xr = new Xrecord { Data = data };
                    cbi.SetAt("Project", xr);
                    tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(xr, true);
                }

                tr.Commit();
            }
        }
    }
}

using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;

namespace AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore
{
    public static class ProjectContextBridge
    {
        public static string GetStorePathOrNull()
        {
            var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            return ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var b) ? b.StorePath : null;
        }

        public static string GetCurrentProjectName()
        {
            var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            return ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var b) ? (b.Name ?? "(unnamed)") : "(no project bound)";
        }
    }
}

// File: AutoCAD2020/ProjectStore/ProjectContextBridge.cs
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Exposes minimal information about the active project binding to the
// shared UI layer (e.g., the CBI Properties Palette).
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;

namespace AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore
{
    public struct ProjectBinding
    {
        public string ProjectId;
        public string Name;
        public string StorePath;
        public bool IsValid => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(StorePath);
    }

    public static class ProjectBindingService
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Resolve the bound project from NOD: NOD["CBI"]["Project"] = XRecord(Id, Name, StorePath)
        /// </summary>
        //public static bool TryGetBoundProject(Document doc, out ProjectBinding binding)
        //{
        //    binding = new ProjectBinding();
        //    if (doc == null) return false;

        //    var db = doc.Database;
        //    using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartOpenCloseTransaction())
        //    {
        //        var nod = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(db.NamedObjectsDictionaryId, OpenMode.ForRead);
        //        if (!nod.Contains("CBI")) return false;

        //        var cbi = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(nod.GetAt("CBI"), OpenMode.ForRead);
        //        if (!cbi.Contains("Project")) return false;

        //        var xr = (Xrecord)tr.GetObject(cbi.GetAt("Project"), OpenMode.ForRead);
        //        var data = xr.Data?.AsArray();
        //        if (data == null || data.Length < 3) return false;

        //        binding.ProjectId = data[0].Value as string ?? string.Empty;
        //        binding.Name = data[1].Value as string ?? string.Empty;
        //        binding.StorePath = data[2].Value as string ?? string.Empty;

        //        return binding.IsValid;
        //    }
        //}

        public static bool TryGetBoundProject(Document doc, out ProjectBinding binding)
        {
            binding = default(ProjectBinding);
            if (doc == null) return false;

            var db = doc.Database;
            try
            {
                using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartOpenCloseTransaction())
                {
                    var nod = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(db.NamedObjectsDictionaryId, OpenMode.ForRead, false, true);
                    if (nod == null || !nod.Contains("CBI")) return false;

                    var cbi = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(nod.GetAt("CBI"), OpenMode.ForRead);
                    if (cbi == null || !cbi.Contains("ProjectStore")) return false;

                    var ps = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(cbi.GetAt("ProjectStore"), OpenMode.ForRead);
                    if (ps == null) return false;

                    // … read your binding record safely, null-checking everything …

                    tr.Commit();
                    return true;
                }
            }
            catch
            {
                return false;
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Convenience overload for current MDI doc.
        /// </summary>
        public static bool TryGetBoundProject(out ProjectBinding binding)
        {
            var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            return TryGetBoundProject(doc, out binding);
        }
    }
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// File: AutoCAD2020/ProjectStore/OpenSupportFolderCommand.cs
// Language: C# 7.3 (AutoCAD 2020)
// Purpose : Opens the folder that contains Project_Store.json for the active DWG
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

using System;
using System.IO;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;

namespace AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore
{
    public static class OpenSupportFolderCommand
    {
        public static void OpenFromActiveDrawing()
        {
            var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            var ed = doc.Editor;

            // Read the bound project info from NOD via the new reader
            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding))
            {
                ed.WriteMessage("\nNo project is bound to this drawing. Run CBI_NewProjectStore first.");
                return;
            }

            var storePath = binding.StorePath ?? string.Empty;
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(storePath))
            {
                ed.WriteMessage("\nNo Project_Store.json path is recorded for this drawing. Run CBI_NewProjectStore.");
                return;
            }

            // Prefer to open the folder that actually contains the JSON
            var folder = Path.GetDirectoryName(storePath);
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(folder))
            {
                ed.WriteMessage("\nThe recorded Project_Store.json path is invalid.");
                return;
            }

            // If the JSON isn’t there (moved/renamed), still try to open the folder
            if (!Directory.Exists(folder))
            {
                ed.WriteMessage($"\nFolder not found:\n  {folder}");
                return;
            }

            try
            {
                System.Diagnostics.Process.Start(new System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo
                {
                    FileName = folder,
                    UseShellExecute = true
                });
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ed.WriteMessage($"\nFailed to open folder:\n  {folder}\nReason: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
    }
}

// File: AutoCAD2020/ProjectStore/NewProjectCommands.cs
// v2.0.0 (C# 7.3)

using System;
using System.IO;
using AcApp = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application;
using AcDoc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Document;
using AcEd = Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using WinForms = System.Windows.Forms;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;

namespace AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore
{
    /// <summary>Centralized "new project" flows.</summary>
    public static class NewProjectCommands
    {
        private static readonly string GlobalStorePath = @"C:\CBICAD\Project_Store.json";

        /// <summary>
        /// Ribbon-friendly flow: builds support folder next to the active DWG,
        /// seeds Project_Store.json, binds NOD, and refreshes the palette banner.
        /// </summary>
        public static void CreateFromActiveDrawing()
        {
            var doc = AcApp.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            // 1) Require saved drawing
            var dwgPath = doc.Name;
            var root = Path.GetDirectoryName(dwgPath);
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(root))
            {
                ed.WriteMessage("\nPlease save the drawing first.");
                return;
            }

            // 2) Project name default from DWG
            var defaultName = Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(dwgPath);
            var name = PromptForProjectName(ed, defaultName);
            if (name == null) return; // cancel

            // 3) Support folder + local store path
            var supportDir = Path.Combine(root, "CBI_Support");
            Directory.CreateDirectory(supportDir);
            var localStorePath = Path.Combine(supportDir, "Project_Store.json");

            // 4) Create/seed store (Shared service owns shape & validation)
            var projectId = Guid.NewGuid().ToString("D");
            var manifestPath = ProjectStorePaths.GetManifestPath(); // your shared resolver
            ProjectStoreService.CreateNewStore(projectId, name, localStorePath, manifestPath);

            // 5) Bind to drawing via NOD (your AutoCAD side binder)
            ProjectNodBinder.BindProjectToDrawing(doc, projectId, name, localStorePath);

            // 6) Optional readme/changelog (idempotent)
            var readme = Path.Combine(supportDir, "Readme.txt");
            if (!File.Exists(readme))
            {
                File.WriteAllText(readme,
@"CBI Support Folder

- Project_Store.json   : Systems, counters, entities, links (schema v1)
- Changelog.txt        : High-level project log (append-only)
");
            }
            var changelog = Path.Combine(supportDir, "Changelog.txt");
            if (!File.Exists(changelog)) File.WriteAllText(changelog, string.Empty);

            // 7) UI feedback + palette banner refresh
            ed.WriteMessage($"\nCBI Project created at:\n  {localStorePath}");
            AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub.CbiPropertiesPalette.RefreshBannerIfOpen();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Interactive flow: user picks project name and a root folder anywhere
        /// (also initializes global Project_Store.json if you use one).
        /// </summary>
        public static void CreateInteractive()
        {
            var name = PromptInput("Enter Project Name:");
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name)) return;

            var root = PromptFolder("Select Project Root Folder:");
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(root)) return;

            var scan = WinForms.DialogResult.Yes ==
                       WinForms.MessageBox.Show("Scan root for DWGs and seed the drawing list?",
                                                "Seed Drawings",
                                                WinForms.MessageBoxButtons.YesNo);

            var svc = new ProjectSettingsService(GlobalStorePath);
            svc.CreateNewProject(name, root, scan);

            AcApp.ShowAlertDialog($"Project '{name}' created and set active.\nRoot: {root}");
        }

        // ---------- small UI helpers ----------
        private static string PromptForProjectName(AcEd.Editor ed, string suggestion)
        {
            var p = new AcEd.PromptStringOptions("\nEnter project name")
            {
                AllowSpaces = true,
                DefaultValue = suggestion
            };
            var r = ed.GetString(p);
            if (r.Status != AcEd.PromptStatus.OK) return null;
            var s = (r.StringResult ?? string.Empty).Trim();
            return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s) ? suggestion : s;
        }

        private static string PromptInput(string message)
        {
            using (var f = new WinForms.Form { Width = 340, Height = 150, Text = "CBI New Project" })
            using (var tb = new WinForms.TextBox { Left = 10, Top = 35, Width = 300 })
            using (var lbl = new WinForms.Label { Left = 10, Top = 10, Width = 300, Text = message })
            using (var ok = new WinForms.Button { Left = 160, Top = 70, Width = 70, Text = "OK", DialogResult = WinForms.DialogResult.OK })
            using (var cancel = new WinForms.Button { Left = 240, Top = 70, Width = 70, Text = "Cancel", DialogResult = WinForms.DialogResult.Cancel })
            {
                f.Controls.Add(lbl); f.Controls.Add(tb); f.Controls.Add(ok); f.Controls.Add(cancel);
                f.AcceptButton = ok; f.CancelButton = cancel;
                return f.ShowDialog() == WinForms.DialogResult.OK ? tb.Text : null;
            }
        }

        private static string PromptFolder(string title)
        {
            using (var dlg = new WinForms.FolderBrowserDialog { Description = title, ShowNewFolderButton = true })
                return dlg.ShowDialog() == WinForms.DialogResult.OK ? dlg.SelectedPath : null;
        }
    }
}

// v2.0.0 (C# 7.3)
using System;
using System.IO;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;
using System.Collections.Generic;

namespace AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore
{
    public static class BindCurrentDrawingCommand
    {
        private const string SupportFolderName = "CBI_Support";
        private const string StoreFileName = "Project_Store.json";

        /// <summary>
        /// Bind the active DWG to the project store in the same folder.
        /// If store doesn't exist, create support folder + new store and add this DWG.
        /// If it exists, append this DWG if missing.
        /// </summary>
        public static void Run()
        {
            var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            // Require saved drawing
            var dwgPath = doc.Name;
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(dwgPath) || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Path.GetDirectoryName(dwgPath)))
            {
                ed.WriteMessage("\nPlease save the drawing first.");
                return;
            }

            var rootDir = Path.GetDirectoryName(dwgPath);
            var supportDir = Path.Combine(rootDir, SupportFolderName);
            var storePath = Path.Combine(supportDir, StoreFileName);

            Directory.CreateDirectory(supportDir);

            var projectKey = Path.GetFileName(rootDir);                 // e.g. folder name
            var projectSvc = new ProjectSettingsService(storePath);

            var created = false;
            if (!File.Exists(storePath))
            {
                // New file on disk with canonical empty snapshot
                projectSvc.Write(new ProjectStoreSnapshot
                {
                    Projects = new Dictionary<string, ProjectEntry>(),
                    ActiveProjectKey = null
                });
                created = true;
            }

            // Ensure a project entry keyed by the folder name, add current DWG
            var added = projectSvc.EnsureProjectAndAddDrawing(projectKey, rootDir, dwgPath);

            // (Optional) Bind NOD so the drawing “knows” which projectId it belongs to.
            try
            {
                var projectId = projectKey; // or a GUID if you prefer; keep consistent with your binder
                ProjectNodBinder.BindProjectToDrawing(doc, projectId, projectKey, storePath);
            }
            catch { /* best-effort; non-fatal */ }

            // Feedback
            if (created)
                ed.WriteMessage($"\nCreated CBI support folder and project store:\n  {storePath}");

            ed.WriteMessage(added
                ? $"\nAdded drawing to project '{projectKey}'."
                : $"\nDrawing already listed in project '{projectKey}'.");

            AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub.CbiPropertiesPalette.RefreshBannerIfOpen();
        }
    }
}
