// File: CbiPropertiesPalette.cs
// v0.3 — Stable palette host with debounced selection refresh
// - Wires selection + command events safely (no double-subscribe / assert on detach)
// - Uses PromptedForSelection so Esc reliably returns to Home
// - Debounces selection chatter via Application.Idle
// - Re-entrancy guard in RefreshFromSelectionSafe()
// - PICKFIRST forced On Show()

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Drawing;
using System.Threading;
using System.Windows.Forms;
using AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Services;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Windows;

namespace AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub
{
    public static class CbiPropertiesPalette
    {
        private const string PaletteTitle = "CBI Properties";
        private static readonly Size InitialSize = new Size(520, 1200);
        private static readonly Size MinSize = new Size(300, 800);

        private static PaletteSet _ps;
        private static PropertiesControl _ui;
        private static bool _hooked;
        private static SelectionContext _lastCtx;

        // Debounce / re-entrancy
        private static int _pendingRefreshFlag = 0;
        private static bool _isRefreshing = false;

        // Track which docs are wired to avoid duplicate subscribe/unsubscribe
        private static readonly HashSet<Document> _wiredDocs = new HashSet<Document>();

        private static bool _projHooked;   // ensure we subscribe once

        // Call this from Show() after you create _ui/_ps and hook doc events
        private static void EnsureProjectChangeHooked()
        {
            if (_projHooked) return;

            AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.ProjectBindingService.StartWatching();
            AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.ProjectBindingService.ProjectChanged += OnProjectChanged;

            _projHooked = true;
        }

        // Handler: refresh only if change pertains to the active doc; also refresh on any binding change
        private static void OnProjectChanged(object sender, AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.ProjectBindingChangedEventArgs e)
        {
            try
            {
                var dm = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager;
                if (e.Document != dm.MdiActiveDocument) return; // ignore background docs

                // Update the banner (project name) and re-bind current selection/tool
                try { _ui?.RefreshProjectBanner(); } catch { }
                RequestRefreshSoon();  // debounce -> re-resolve model for current selection
            }
            catch { /* never explode palette */ }
        }

        private static bool IsUserTyping()
        {
            try { return _ui != null && _ui.ContainsFocus; } catch { return false; }
        }

        // ---------- Commands ----------
        [CommandMethod("CBI_PROP_PALETTE")]
        public static void CmdShow()
        {
            Show();
            ScheduleRefresh(); // ensure UI reflects current selection immediately
        }

        // ---------- Public entry ----------
        public static void Show()
        {
            if (_ps == null)
            {
                _ui = new PropertiesControl();
                //_ui.ApplyRequested += (s, e) => PropertyRouter.ApplyIfPossible(_ui.SelectedModel, _lastCtx);
                _ui.ApplyRequested += (s, e) =>
                {
                    try
                    {
                        // Ensure text boxes / spinners commit edits
                        _ui.CommitPendingEdits();

                        // Save project-level config values
                        _ui.SaveConfigToStore();

                        // Apply in-model edits (the existing logic)
                        if (_ui.SelectedModel is LineTagSettings lt)
                            //ToDo Implement or remove if needed
                            //LineTagService.ApplyFromSettings(lt);
                        //else
                            ApplyEntityEdits(_ui.SelectedModel);
                    }
                    catch (System.Exception ex)
                    {
                        Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.ShowAlertDialog(
                            "Error applying edits:\n" + ex.Message);
                    }
                };

                _ps = new PaletteSet(PaletteTitle)
                {
                    DockEnabled = DockSides.Left | DockSides.Right | DockSides.None,
                    MinimumSize = MinSize,
                    Size = InitialSize,
                    Style = PaletteSetStyles.ShowCloseButton |
                            PaletteSetStyles.ShowAutoHideButton |
                            PaletteSetStyles.Snappable
                };

                _ps.Add("Properties", (Control)_ui);

                try { _ui.RefreshProjectBanner(); } catch { /* ignore */ }
            }

            _ps.Visible = true;

            // Ensure PICKFIRST is on so implied selection works
            try { Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.SetSystemVariable("PICKFIRST", 1); } catch { }

            if (!_hooked)
            {
                var dm = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager;

                if (dm.MdiActiveDocument != null)
                    AttachHandlersTo(dm.MdiActiveDocument);

                dm.DocumentActivated += OnDocumentActivated;
                _hooked = true;
            }
        }

        // ---------- Doc activation ----------
        private static void OnDocumentActivated(object sender, DocumentCollectionEventArgs e)
        {
            var dm = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager;

            // Detach from all wired docs except the newly activated one
            foreach (var d in new List<Document>(_wiredDocs))
            {
                if (e.Document == null || !object.ReferenceEquals(d, e.Document))
                    DetachHandlersFrom(d);
            }

            if (e.Document != null)
                AttachHandlersTo(e.Document);

            ScheduleRefresh();
        }

        // ---------- Hook / Unhook ----------
        private static void AttachHandlersTo(Document d)
        {
            if (d == null || _wiredDocs.Contains(d)) return;

            var ed = d.Editor;

            ed.SelectionAdded += OnSelectionAdded;
            ed.SelectionRemoved += OnSelectionRemoved;
            ed.PromptedForSelection += OnPromptedForSelection; // fires when user finishes selection or Esc

            d.CommandEnded += OnCommandEnded;
            d.CommandCancelled += OnCommandCancelled;
            d.CommandFailed += OnCommandFailed;

            _wiredDocs.Add(d);
        }

        private static void DetachHandlersFrom(Document d)
        {
            if (d == null || !_wiredDocs.Contains(d)) return;

            var ed = d.Editor;

            try { ed.SelectionAdded -= OnSelectionAdded; } catch { }
            try { ed.SelectionRemoved -= OnSelectionRemoved; } catch { }
            try { ed.PromptedForSelection -= OnPromptedForSelection; } catch { }

            try { d.CommandEnded -= OnCommandEnded; } catch { }
            try { d.CommandCancelled -= OnCommandCancelled; } catch { }
            try { d.CommandFailed -= OnCommandFailed; } catch { }

            _wiredDocs.Remove(d);
        }

        // ---------- Event handlers (debounced) ----------
        //private static void OnSelectionAdded(object sender, SelectionAddedEventArgs e) => ScheduleRefresh();
        //private static void OnSelectionRemoved(object sender, SelectionRemovedEventArgs e) => ScheduleRefresh();
        //private static void OnPromptedForSelection(object sender, PromptSelectionResultEventArgs e) => ScheduleRefresh();

        private static void OnSelectionAdded(object s, SelectionAddedEventArgs e)
        {
            if (IsUserTyping()) return;
            ScheduleRefresh();
        }
        private static void OnSelectionRemoved(object s, SelectionRemovedEventArgs e)
        {
            if (IsUserTyping()) return;
            ScheduleRefresh();
        }
        private static void OnPromptedForSelection(object s, PromptSelectionResultEventArgs e)
        {
            // This one is OK to always run (Esc / selection finished)
            ScheduleRefresh();
        }

        private static void OnCommandEnded(object sender, CommandEventArgs e) => ScheduleRefresh();
        private static void OnCommandCancelled(object sender, CommandEventArgs e) => ScheduleRefresh();
        private static void OnCommandFailed(object sender, CommandEventArgs e) => ScheduleRefresh();

        // ---------- Debounce ----------
        private static void ScheduleRefresh()
        {
            // Coalesce bursts to a single refresh on Application.Idle
            if (Interlocked.Exchange(ref _pendingRefreshFlag, 1) == 1)
                return;
            Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.Idle += OnIdleRefreshOnce;
        }

        public static void RequestRefreshSoon() => ScheduleRefresh();

        private static void OnIdleRefreshOnce(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.Idle -= OnIdleRefreshOnce;
            Interlocked.Exchange(ref _pendingRefreshFlag, 0);
            RefreshFromSelectionSafe();
        }

        private static void RefreshFromSelectionSafe()
        {
            if (_isRefreshing) return;
            if (_ui != null && _ui.ContainsFocus) return; // ← guard
            _isRefreshing = true;
            try { RefreshFromSelection(); }
            finally { _isRefreshing = false; }
        }

        // ---------- Core refresh ----------
        private static void RefreshFromSelection()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null || _ui == null) return;

            var ed = doc.Editor;
            var pr = ed.SelectImplied();

            // No selection (Esc/cleared) → show Home
            if (pr.Status != PromptStatus.OK || pr.Value == null || pr.Value.Count == 0)
            {
                _lastCtx = null;
                BindToolHome();
                return;
            }

            // One or more selected → use last picked
            var id = pr.Value[pr.Value.Count - 1].ObjectId;
            _lastCtx = new SelectionContext(id, doc);

            object model = null;
            try
            {
                model = PropertyRouter.Resolve(_lastCtx);
            }
            catch
            {
                _lastCtx = null;
            }

            if (model != null)
                _ui.Bind(model, "Selection");
            else
            {
                _lastCtx = null;
                BindToolHome();
            }
        }

        // ---------- Home / size / docking ----------
        //private static void BindToolHome()
        //{
        //    // If you want preview labels, you can use:
        //    // _ui.ShowHome(MasterProperties.LineTag?.Prefix ?? "PR-");
        //    _ui.Bind(MasterProperties.LineTag, "Tool");
        //}

        public static Size GetSize() => _ps != null ? _ps.Size : InitialSize;

        public static void EnsureFloating()
        {
            if (_ps == null) return;
            if (_ps.Dock != DockSides.None)
            {
                if (_ps.Location.IsEmpty || _ps.Location.X <= 0 || _ps.Location.Y <= 0)
                    _ps.Location = new Point(120, 120);
                _ps.Dock = DockSides.None;
            }
        }

        public static void SetSize(Size size)
        {
            if (_ps == null) return;
            if (_ps.Dock != DockSides.None) EnsureFloating();

            if (size.Width < MinSize.Width) size.Width = MinSize.Width;
            if (size.Height < MinSize.Height) size.Height = MinSize.Height;

            _ps.Size = size;
        }

        [CommandMethod("CBI_PROP_FLOAT")]
        public static void CmdFloat() => FloatAndResize(InitialSize);

        public static void FloatAndResize(Size size)
        {
            Show();
            EnsureFloating();
            SetSize(size);
            _ps.Visible = true;
        }

        [CommandMethod("CBI_PROP_DOCKLEFT")]
        public static void DockLeft()
        {
            Show();
            _ps.Dock = DockSides.Left;
            _ps.Visible = true;
        }

        [CommandMethod("CBI_PROP_DOCKRIGHT")]
        public static void DockRight()
        {
            Show();
            _ps.Dock = DockSides.Right;
            _ps.Visible = true;
        }

        // External hook for project banner refresh
        public static void RefreshBannerIfOpen()
        {
            try { _ui?.RefreshProjectBanner(); } catch { /* ignore */ }
        }

        private static void BindToolHome()
        {
            var settings = MasterProperties.LineTag;

            // 🔹 New unified load path (replaces old _ui.LoadFromStore)
            settings.RefreshFromStore();   // pulls prefix/grace/policy + TagNumbers from Project_Store.json

            // 🔹 Bind the settings object to the property grid
            _ui.Bind(settings, "Tool");
        }

        private static void OnProjectChanged()
        {
            try
            {
                // Pull current palette instance
                if (_ui == null) return;

                // Rebind with fresh project store data
                var settings = MasterProperties.LineTag;
                settings.RefreshFromStore();       // re-loads prefix, grace, next IDs
                _ui.Bind(settings, "Tool");
            }
            catch (System.Exception ex)
            {
                Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.ShowAlertDialog(
                    $"Project refresh failed:\n{ex.Message}");
            }
        }
        private static void ApplyEntityEdits(object model)
        {
            // TODO: Implement if entity editing logic needed
            Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument
                ?.Editor.WriteMessage("\nApplyEntityEdits() called — not yet implemented.");
        }
    }
}

## Response:
10/21/2025, 3:48:32 PM

> **Cleaning up code**
>
> We need to clean up the CbiPropertiesPalette.cs file by including the `RequestRefreshSoon` change and removing unnecessary parts. The user's provided two versions: one with outdated code and one with a newer class. We should ensure that `EnsureProjectChangeHooked()` is included, call it in `Show()`, and resolve any ambiguities around `Application` references. Also, we'll remove unused `Tagging.Services` and confirm that `RequestRefreshSoon` is properly aliased to `ScheduleRefresh`.
>
> Thought for 10s

Got it — here’s a **clean, drop-in** `CbiPropertiesPalette.cs` that:

- Keeps only what’s needed
- Uses a debounced `RequestRefreshSoon()` (backed by `Application.Idle`)
- Hooks/unhooks doc + selection events safely
- Subscribes to project binding changes and refreshes the banner + grid
- Calls `settings.RefreshFromStore()` when showing the Tool/Home view
- Leaves a tiny `ApplyEntityEdits` stub you can flesh out later

Paste this over your existing file.

```csharp
// File: CbiPropertiesPalette.cs
// v0.3.2 — Stable palette host with debounced selection refresh + project-change hook

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Drawing;
using System.Threading;
using System.Windows.Forms;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Windows;

namespace AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub
{
    public static class CbiPropertiesPalette
    {
        private const string PaletteTitle = "CBI Properties";
        private static readonly Size InitialSize = new Size(520, 1200);
        private static readonly Size MinSize = new Size(300, 800);

        private static PaletteSet _ps;
        private static PropertiesControl _ui;
        private static bool _hooked;
        private static SelectionContext _lastCtx;

        // Debounce / re-entrancy
        private static int _pendingRefreshFlag = 0;
        private static bool _isRefreshing = false;

        // Track which docs are wired to avoid duplicate subscribe/unsubscribe
        private static readonly HashSet<Document> _wiredDocs = new HashSet<Document>();

        // Project-change hook (Step 6)
        private static bool _projHooked;

        // ---------------- Commands ----------------
        [CommandMethod("CBI_PROP_PALETTE")]
        public static void CmdShow()
        {
            Show();
            ScheduleRefresh(); // reflect current selection immediately
        }

        // ---------------- Public entry ----------------
        public static void Show()
        {
            if (_ps == null)
            {
                _ui = new PropertiesControl();

                // When PropertiesControl asks to Apply, route to the active provider.
                _ui.ApplyRequested += (s, e) =>
                {
                    try
                    {
                        _ui.CommitPendingEdits();     // ensure editors commit
                        _ui.SaveConfigToStore();      // write project-level config from palette

                        if (_ui.SelectedModel is LineTagSettings lt)
                        {
                            // If you add line-tag specific apply logic in future, put it here.
                            // e.g., LineTagService.ApplyFromSettings(lt);
                        }

                        ApplyEntityEdits(_ui.SelectedModel); // generic entity apply (stub below)
                    }
                    catch (System.Exception ex)
                    {
                        Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.ShowAlertDialog(
                            "Error applying edits:\n" + ex.Message);
                    }
                };

                _ps = new PaletteSet(PaletteTitle)
                {
                    DockEnabled = DockSides.Left | DockSides.Right | DockSides.None,
                    MinimumSize = MinSize,
                    Size = InitialSize,
                    Style = PaletteSetStyles.ShowCloseButton |
                            PaletteSetStyles.ShowAutoHideButton |
                            PaletteSetStyles.Snappable
                };

                _ps.Add("Properties", (Control)_ui);

                // Draw current project name immediately on first open
                try { _ui.RefreshProjectBanner(); } catch { /* ignore */ }
            }

            _ps.Visible = true;

            // Ensure PICKFIRST is on so implied selection works
            try { Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.SetSystemVariable("PICKFIRST", 1); } catch { }

            if (!_hooked)
            {
                var dm = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager;

                if (dm.MdiActiveDocument != null)
                    AttachHandlersTo(dm.MdiActiveDocument);

                dm.DocumentActivated += OnDocumentActivated;
                _hooked = true;

                // Hook project-binding change notifications (Step 6)
                EnsureProjectChangeHooked();
            }
        }

        // ---------------- Project change (Step 6) ----------------
        private static void EnsureProjectChangeHooked()
        {
            if (_projHooked) return;

            AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.ProjectBindingService.StartWatching();
            AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.ProjectBindingService.ProjectChanged += OnProjectChanged;

            _projHooked = true;
        }

        private static void OnProjectChanged(object sender, AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.ProjectBindingChangedEventArgs e)
        {
            try
            {
                var dm = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager;
                if (e.Document != dm.MdiActiveDocument) return; // ignore background docs

                // Update the banner (project name) and re-bind current selection/tool
                try { _ui?.RefreshProjectBanner(); } catch { }
                RequestRefreshSoon();  // debounce → re-resolve model for current selection
            }
            catch { /* never explode palette */ }
        }

        // ---------------- Doc activation ----------------
        private static void OnDocumentActivated(object sender, DocumentCollectionEventArgs e)
        {
            var dm = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager;

            // Detach from all wired docs except the newly activated one
            foreach (var d in new List<Document>(_wiredDocs))
            {
                if (e.Document == null || !object.ReferenceEquals(d, e.Document))
                    DetachHandlersFrom(d);
            }

            if (e.Document != null)
                AttachHandlersTo(e.Document);

            ScheduleRefresh();
        }

        // ---------------- Hook / Unhook ----------------
        private static void AttachHandlersTo(Document d)
        {
            if (d == null || _wiredDocs.Contains(d)) return;

            var ed = d.Editor;

            ed.SelectionAdded += OnSelectionAdded;
            ed.SelectionRemoved += OnSelectionRemoved;
            ed.PromptedForSelection += OnPromptedForSelection; // fires when selection finishes or Esc

            d.CommandEnded += OnCommandEnded;
            d.CommandCancelled += OnCommandCancelled;
            d.CommandFailed += OnCommandFailed;

            _wiredDocs.Add(d);
        }

        private static void DetachHandlersFrom(Document d)
        {
            if (d == null || !_wiredDocs.Contains(d)) return;

            var ed = d.Editor;

            try { ed.SelectionAdded -= OnSelectionAdded; } catch { }
            try { ed.SelectionRemoved -= OnSelectionRemoved; } catch { }
            try { ed.PromptedForSelection -= OnPromptedForSelection; } catch { }

            try { d.CommandEnded -= OnCommandEnded; } catch { }
            try { d.CommandCancelled -= OnCommandCancelled; } catch { }
            try { d.CommandFailed -= OnCommandFailed; } catch { }

            _wiredDocs.Remove(d);
        }

        // ---------------- Event handlers (debounced) ----------------
        private static bool IsUserTyping()
        {
            try { return _ui != null && _ui.ContainsFocus; } catch { return false; }
        }

        private static void OnSelectionAdded(object s, SelectionAddedEventArgs e)
        {
            if (IsUserTyping()) return;
            ScheduleRefresh();
        }
        private static void OnSelectionRemoved(object s, SelectionRemovedEventArgs e)
        {
            if (IsUserTyping()) return;
            ScheduleRefresh();
        }
        private static void OnPromptedForSelection(object s, PromptSelectionResultEventArgs e)
        {
            // This one is OK to always run (Esc / selection finished)
            ScheduleRefresh();
        }

        private static void OnCommandEnded(object sender, CommandEventArgs e) => ScheduleRefresh();
        private static void OnCommandCancelled(object sender, CommandEventArgs e) => ScheduleRefresh();
        private static void OnCommandFailed(object sender, CommandEventArgs e) => ScheduleRefresh();

        // ---------------- Debounce ----------------
        private static void ScheduleRefresh()
        {
            // Coalesce bursts to a single refresh on Application.Idle
            if (Interlocked.Exchange(ref _pendingRefreshFlag, 1) == 1)
                return;
            Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.Idle += OnIdleRefreshOnce;
        }

        // Public alias you can call from elsewhere
        public static void RequestRefreshSoon() => ScheduleRefresh();

        private static void OnIdleRefreshOnce(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.Idle -= OnIdleRefreshOnce;
            Interlocked.Exchange(ref _pendingRefreshFlag, 0);
            RefreshFromSelectionSafe();
        }

        private static void RefreshFromSelectionSafe()
        {
            if (_isRefreshing) return;
            if (_ui != null && _ui.ContainsFocus) return; // don’t clobber user while typing
            _isRefreshing = true;
            try { RefreshFromSelection(); }
            finally { _isRefreshing = false; }
        }

        // ---------------- Core refresh ----------------
        private static void RefreshFromSelection()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null || _ui == null) return;

            var ed = doc.Editor;
            var pr = ed.SelectImplied();

            // No selection (Esc/cleared) → show Home
            if (pr.Status != PromptStatus.OK || pr.Value == null || pr.Value.Count == 0)
            {
                _lastCtx = null;
                BindToolHome();
                return;
            }

            // One or more selected → use last picked
            var id = pr.Value[pr.Value.Count - 1].ObjectId;
            _lastCtx = new SelectionContext(id, doc);

            object model = null;
            try { model = PropertyRouter.Resolve(_lastCtx); }
            catch { _lastCtx = null; }

            if (model != null)
                _ui.Bind(model, "Selection");
            else
            {
                _lastCtx = null;
                BindToolHome();
            }
        }

        // ---------------- Home / size / docking ----------------
        private static void BindToolHome()
        {
            var settings = MasterProperties.LineTag;

            // Unified load path (replaces any old _ui.LoadFromStore usage)
            settings.RefreshFromStore();    // pulls prefix/grace/policy + TagNumbers from Project_Store.json

            // Bind the settings object to the property grid
            _ui.Bind(settings, "Tool");
        }

        public static Size GetSize() => _ps != null ? _ps.Size : InitialSize;

        public static void EnsureFloating()
        {
            if (_ps == null) return;
            if (_ps.Dock != DockSides.None)
            {
                if (_ps.Location.IsEmpty || _ps.Location.X <= 0 || _ps.Location.Y <= 0)
                    _ps.Location = new Point(120, 120);
                _ps.Dock = DockSides.None;
            }
        }

        public static void SetSize(Size size)
        {
            if (_ps == null) return;
            if (_ps.Dock != DockSides.None) EnsureFloating();

            if (size.Width < MinSize.Width) size.Width = MinSize.Width;
            if (size.Height < MinSize.Height) size.Height = MinSize.Height;

            _ps.Size = size;
        }

        [CommandMethod("CBI_PROP_FLOAT")]
        public static void CmdFloat() => FloatAndResize(InitialSize);

        public static void FloatAndResize(Size size)
        {
            Show();
            EnsureFloating();
            SetSize(size);
            _ps.Visible = true;
        }

        [CommandMethod("CBI_PROP_DOCKLEFT")]
        public static void DockLeft()
        {
            Show();
            _ps.Dock = DockSides.Left;
            _ps.Visible = true;
        }

        [CommandMethod("CBI_PROP_DOCKRIGHT")]
        public static void DockRight()
        {
            Show();
            _ps.Dock = DockSides.Right;
            _ps.Visible = true;
        }

        // External hook for project banner refresh
        public static void RefreshBannerIfOpen()
        {
            try { _ui?.RefreshProjectBanner(); } catch { /* ignore */ }
        }

        // ---------------- Apply stub ----------------
        private static void ApplyEntityEdits(object model)
        {
            // TODO: implement if you want the palette to push edits directly to entities.
            Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument
                ?.Editor.WriteMessage("\nApplyEntityEdits() called — not yet implemented.");
        }
    }
}
```

Nice—these are all fixable. Here’s exactly what to change, with drop-in snippets.

---

# 1) CS0229 (Ambiguity on `GraceDays` / `PreferReleasedLowestFirst`)

You’ve got **two definitions** of those properties (likely two partial `LineTagSettings` files or a stale copy you kept when merging). Pick **one** source of truth and delete the duplicates.

**Action:** Search the solution for `class LineTagSettings` and remove any extra/old copy that also declares `GraceDays` or `PreferReleasedLowestFirst`.

If you want a clean, authoritative shape to keep, use this (and delete other duplicates):

```csharp
// LineTagSettings.cs (authoritative shape)
using System.ComponentModel;

namespace AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub
{
    public class LineTagSettings
    {
        [Category("Appearance")]
        [Description("Height of annotation text in drawing units.")]
        public double TextHeight { get; set; } = 0.125;

        [Category("Appearance")]
        [Description("Layer to place tag entities on.")]
        public string Layer { get; set; } = "C-ANNO-TAG";

        [Category("General")]
        [DisplayName("Valve Tag Prefix")]
        [Description("Default project prefix used when generating valve tags (from Project_Store.json).")]
        public string GlobalValvePrefix { get; set; } = "V";

        [Category("Behavior")]
        [Description("If true, increments a counter on each placement.")]
        public bool AutoIncrement { get; set; } = true;

        [Category("Project Policy")]
        [DisplayName("Grace Days")]
        [Description("Days to wait before a released tag becomes eligible for reuse.")]
        public int GraceDays { get; set; } = 7;

        [Category("Project Policy")]
        [DisplayName("Prefer Lowest Released First")]
        [Description("When reusing released tags after grace, choose the lowest number first.")]
        public bool PreferReleasedLowestFirst { get; set; } = true;

        [Category("Tag Numbers")]
        [DisplayName("Tag Numbers")]
        [Description("Per-system next numbers pulled from the current Project Store (read-only).")]
        [TypeConverter(typeof(ExpandableObjectConverter))]
        public TagNumbersView TagNumbers { get; private set; } = new TagNumbersView();

        // ----- Store sync helpers -----
        public void RefreshFromStore()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            if (!AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath)) return;

            // read config
            GlobalValvePrefix = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.ProjectStoreService.ReadGlobalValvePrefix(binding.StorePath);
            GraceDays = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.ProjectStoreService.ReadGraceDays(binding.StorePath);
            PreferReleasedLowestFirst = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.ProjectStoreService.ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(binding.StorePath);

            // read per-system “Next”
            var list = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.ProjectStoreService.GetSystemNextList(binding.StorePath);
            TagNumbers = TagNumbersView.FromList(list);
        }
    }
}
```

> After this, the ambiguity errors on those properties in **PropertyRouter.cs** will disappear.

---

# 2) CS0246 (`LineTagSettingsProvider` not found)

You removed that provider class earlier, but the router still references it.

**Fix:** Edit your provider registry to drop it:

```csharp
// PropertyRouter.cs
private static readonly List<IPropertySourceProvider> _providers = new List<IPropertySourceProvider>
{
    new PipeRunPropertyProvider(),
    new InstrumentPropertyProvider(),
    new ComponentPropertyProvider()
    // (removed) new LineTagSettingsProvider()
};
```

---

# 3) CS0103 (`propertyGrid` and `SelectionManager` unknown) in `PropertiesControl.cs`

You renamed your grid to `_grid`, but two methods still reference `propertyGrid` and a stray `SelectionManager`.

**Fix those methods** to use `_grid` and remove the stray call:

```csharp
// Replace your current RefreshPropertyGrid + LoadFromStore helpers with this pair:

private void RefreshPropertyGrid(object model)
{
    _grid.SelectedObject = model;
    _grid.Refresh();
}

// Optional helper (if you want to reload store values on demand)
public void LoadFromStore()
{
    var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
    if (doc == null) return;

    if (!AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
        string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath)) return;

    var settings = SelectedModel as LineTagSettings ?? MasterProperties.LineTag;
    settings.RefreshFromStore();
    _grid.SelectedObject = settings;
    _grid.Refresh();
}
```

> Also delete any line that mentions `SelectionManager` – it’s not part of this project.

---

# 4) CS0117 (static `ProjectStoreService` methods not found) — sanity check

You already added these earlier, but if the errors reappear anywhere, make sure **these exist** (exact names) in `AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.ProjectStoreService`:

```csharp
public static string ReadGlobalValvePrefix(string storePath) { ... }
public static void   WriteGlobalValvePrefix(string storePath, string prefix) { ... }

public static int    ReadGraceDays(string storePath) { ... }
public static void   WriteGraceDays(string storePath, int days) { ... }

public static bool   ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(string storePath) { ... }
public static void   WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(string storePath, bool value) { ... }

public sealed class SystemNextInfo { public string SystemKey; public string Name; public string Prefix; public long Next; }
public static List<SystemNextInfo> GetSystemNextList(string storePath) { ... }
```

(From your last paste, they’re already present; this is just a cross-check.)

---

# 5) PropertyRouter.cs — keep the tool-model branch

Once the duplicates are gone, this branch compiles fine. Keep it as-is (it persists palette edits back to the store and then refreshes the palette):

```csharp
// inside PropertyRouter.ApplyIfPossible(...)
if (model is LineTagSettings ltSettings)
{
    var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
    if (AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) &&
        !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
    {
        AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.ProjectStoreService.WriteGlobalValvePrefix(binding.StorePath, ltSettings.GlobalValvePrefix);
        AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.ProjectStoreService.WriteGraceDays(binding.StorePath, ltSettings.GraceDays);
        AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.ProjectStoreService.WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(binding.StorePath, ltSettings.PreferReleasedLowestFirst);

        ltSettings.RefreshFromStore();  // pull back persisted values + TagNumbers
    }

    MasterProperties.Save();            // also keep local settings.json in sync
    CbiPropertiesPalette.RequestRefreshSoon();
    return;
}
```

---

2) **Remove** `LineTagSettingsProvider` from the provider registry.  
3) **Fix** `PropertiesControl.RefreshPropertyGrid` and `LoadFromStore` to use `_grid`; **remove** `SelectionManager`.  
4) Ensure the `ProjectStoreService` helper methods exist exactly as referenced.

// v0.2 — adds project-config (GraceDays, PreferReleasedLowestFirst) and JSON sync

using System.ComponentModel;
using System.IO;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;
using AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub
{
    public class LineTagSettings
    {
        // ---------- Appearance ----------
        [Category("Appearance")]
        [Description("Height of annotation text in drawing units.")]
        public double TextHeight { get; set; } = 0.125;

        [Category("Appearance")]
        [Description("Layer to place tag entities on.")]
        public string Layer { get; set; } = "C-ANNO-TAG";

        // ---------- General ----------
        [Category("General")]
        [Description("String prepended to computed valve/line tags (default comes from project JSON).")]
        public string Prefix { get; set; } = "V";

        [Category("Behavior")]
        [Description("If true, increments a counter on each placement.")]
        public bool AutoIncrement { get; set; } = true;

        // ---------- Project Config (from Project_Store.json) ----------
        [Category("Project Config")]
        [DisplayName("Grace Days")]
        [Description("Days before a released tag becomes eligible for reuse.")]
        public int GraceDays { get; set; } = 7;

        [Category("Project Config")]
        [DisplayName("Reuse Lowest Released First")]
        [Description("If true, reuse the lowest available released number before allocating a new one.")]
        public bool PreferReleasedLowestFirst { get; set; } = true;

        // ---------- (Legacy) Tag Numbers view (hidden now) ----------
        [Browsable(false)]
        public TagNumbersView TagNumbers { get; private set; } = new TagNumbersView();

        // ---- Project Configuration (editable) ----
        [Category("Project Configuration")]
        [DisplayName("Global Valve Prefix")]
        [Description("Default valve-tag prefix stored in Project_Store.json (Tagging.GlobalValvePrefix).")]
        public string GlobalValvePrefix { get; set; } = "V";

        [Category("Project Configuration")]
        [DisplayName("Grace Days")]
        [Description("Days a released tag remains reserved before eligible for reuse.")]
        public int GraceDays { get; set; } = 7;

        [Category("Project Configuration")]
        [DisplayName("Prefer Released Lowest First")]
        [Description("If true, allocator prefers the lowest available released tag first.")]
        public bool PreferReleasedLowestFirst { get; set; } = true;

        /// <summary>Reads Prefix/Grace/Policy + TagNumbers from the bound Project_Store.json (if any).</summary>
        public void RefreshFromStore()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                return;

            // read config
            GlobalValvePrefix = ProjectStoreService.ReadGlobalValvePrefix(binding.StorePath);
            GraceDays = ProjectStoreService.ReadGraceDays(binding.StorePath);
            PreferReleasedLowestFirst = ProjectStoreService.ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(binding.StorePath);

            // read tag numbers (systems → next)
            var systems = ProjectStoreService.GetSystemNextList(binding.StorePath);
            TagNumbers = TagNumbersView.FromList(systems);
        }

/// <summary>Loads Prefix + project config from the bound Project_Store.json (no UI calls here).</summary>
        public void LoadProjectConfig()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                return;

            // Read from JSON store
            Prefix = ProjectStoreService.ReadGlobalValvePrefix(binding.StorePath);
            GraceDays = ProjectStoreService.ReadGraceDays(binding.StorePath);
            PreferReleasedLowestFirst = ProjectStoreService.ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(binding.StorePath);
        }

        /// <summary>Writes Prefix + project config back to Project_Store.json.</summary>
        public void SaveProjectConfig()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                return;

            ProjectStoreService.WriteGlobalValvePrefix(binding.StorePath, Prefix);
            ProjectStoreService.WriteGraceDays(binding.StorePath, GraceDays);
            ProjectStoreService.WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(binding.StorePath, PreferReleasedLowestFirst);
        }

        /// <summary>(Optional) Legacy: if you still need numbers in the grid, repoint to GetSystemNextList.</summary>
        public void RefreshTagNumbersFromStore()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) { TagNumbers = new TagNumbersView(); return; }

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
            {
                TagNumbers = new TagNumbersView();
                return;
            }

            //// If you keep the numbers property: use the newer list API
            //var list = ProjectStoreService.GetSystemNextList(binding.StorePath);
            //// Convert to TagNumbersView (if you still show it anywhere)
            //TagNumbers = TagNumbersView.FromPairs_V2(list); // Helper provided below

            var list = ProjectStoreService.GetSystemNextList(binding.StorePath);
            TagNumbers = TagNumbersView.FromList(list);
        }
    }

    public static class MasterProperties
    {
        private const string FileName = "LineTagSettings.json";
        private static LineTagSettings _lineTag;
        public static LineTagSettings LineTag
            => _lineTag ?? (_lineTag = Load() ?? new LineTagSettings());

        public static void Save()
        {
            var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(LineTag, Formatting.Indented);
            File.WriteAllText(FileName, json);
        }

        private static LineTagSettings Load()
        {
            if (!File.Exists(FileName)) return null;
            var json = File.ReadAllText(FileName);
            return JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<LineTagSettings>(json);
        }
    }
}

> **Clarifying prefix handling**

In earlier conversations, we decided that `GlobalValvePrefix` should be the project-level property, and `Prefix` might be legacy. To avoid confusion, I'll keep `Prefix` as an alias for `GlobalValvePrefix` in the code to avoid breaking it.

// v0.2 — adds project-config (GraceDays, PreferReleasedLowestFirst) and JSON sync

using System.ComponentModel;
using System.IO;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;
using AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub
{
    public class LineTagSettings
    {
        // ---------- Appearance ----------
        [Category("Appearance")]
        [Description("Height of annotation text in drawing units.")]
        public double TextHeight { get; set; } = 0.125;

        [Category("Appearance")]
        [Description("Layer to place tag entities on.")]
        public string Layer { get; set; } = "C-ANNO-TAG";

        // ---------- General ----------
        [Category("General")]
        [Description("String prepended to computed valve/line tags (default comes from project JSON).")]
        public string Prefix { get; set; } = "V";

        [Category("Behavior")]
        [Description("If true, increments a counter on each placement.")]
        public bool AutoIncrement { get; set; } = true;

        // ---------- Project Config (from Project_Store.json) ----------
        [Category("Project Config")]
        [DisplayName("Grace Days")]
        [Description("Days before a released tag becomes eligible for reuse.")]
        public int GraceDays { get; set; } = 7;

        [Category("Project Config")]
        [DisplayName("Reuse Lowest Released First")]
        [Description("If true, reuse the lowest available released number before allocating a new one.")]
        public bool PreferReleasedLowestFirst { get; set; } = true;

        // ---------- (Legacy) Tag Numbers view (hidden now) ----------
        [Browsable(false)]
        public TagNumbersView TagNumbers { get; private set; } = new TagNumbersView();

        // ---- Project Configuration (editable) ----
        [Category("Project Configuration")]
        [DisplayName("Global Valve Prefix")]
        [Description("Default valve-tag prefix stored in Project_Store.json (Tagging.GlobalValvePrefix).")]
        public string GlobalValvePrefix { get; set; } = "V";

        [Category("Project Configuration")]
        [DisplayName("Grace Days")]
        [Description("Days a released tag remains reserved before eligible for reuse.")]
        public int GraceDays { get; set; } = 7;

        [Category("Project Configuration")]
        [DisplayName("Prefer Released Lowest First")]
        [Description("If true, allocator prefers the lowest available released tag first.")]
        public bool PreferReleasedLowestFirst { get; set; } = true;

        /// <summary>Reads Prefix/Grace/Policy + TagNumbers from the bound Project_Store.json (if any).</summary>
        public void RefreshFromStore()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                return;

            // read config
            GlobalValvePrefix = ProjectStoreService.ReadGlobalValvePrefix(binding.StorePath);
            GraceDays = ProjectStoreService.ReadGraceDays(binding.StorePath);
            PreferReleasedLowestFirst = ProjectStoreService.ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(binding.StorePath);

            // read tag numbers (systems → next)
            var systems = ProjectStoreService.GetSystemNextList(binding.StorePath);
            TagNumbers = TagNumbersView.FromList(systems);
        }

/// <summary>Loads Prefix + project config from the bound Project_Store.json (no UI calls here).</summary>
        public void LoadProjectConfig()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                return;

            // Read from JSON store
            Prefix = ProjectStoreService.ReadGlobalValvePrefix(binding.StorePath);
            GraceDays = ProjectStoreService.ReadGraceDays(binding.StorePath);
            PreferReleasedLowestFirst = ProjectStoreService.ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(binding.StorePath);
        }

        /// <summary>Writes Prefix + project config back to Project_Store.json.</summary>
        public void SaveProjectConfig()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                return;

            ProjectStoreService.WriteGlobalValvePrefix(binding.StorePath, Prefix);
            ProjectStoreService.WriteGraceDays(binding.StorePath, GraceDays);
            ProjectStoreService.WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(binding.StorePath, PreferReleasedLowestFirst);
        }

        /// <summary>(Optional) Legacy: if you still need numbers in the grid, repoint to GetSystemNextList.</summary>
        public void RefreshTagNumbersFromStore()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) { TagNumbers = new TagNumbersView(); return; }

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
            {
                TagNumbers = new TagNumbersView();
                return;
            }

            //// If you keep the numbers property: use the newer list API
            //var list = ProjectStoreService.GetSystemNextList(binding.StorePath);
            //// Convert to TagNumbersView (if you still show it anywhere)
            //TagNumbers = TagNumbersView.FromPairs_V2(list); // Helper provided below

            var list = ProjectStoreService.GetSystemNextList(binding.StorePath);
            TagNumbers = TagNumbersView.FromList(list);
        }
    }

    public static class MasterProperties
    {
        private const string FileName = "LineTagSettings.json";
        private static LineTagSettings _lineTag;
        public static LineTagSettings LineTag
            => _lineTag ?? (_lineTag = Load() ?? new LineTagSettings());

        public static void Save()
        {
            var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(LineTag, Formatting.Indented);
            File.WriteAllText(FileName, json);
        }

        private static LineTagSettings Load()
        {
            if (!File.Exists(FileName)) return null;
            var json = File.ReadAllText(FileName);
            return JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<LineTagSettings>(json);
        }
    }
}

## Response:
10/21/2025, 4:00:23 PM

> **Resolving configuration inconsistencies**
>
> It looks like there are duplicate properties like `GraceDays` and `PreferReleasedLowestFirst`, defined both under "Project Config" and "Project Configuration" — which might cause confusion. I’ll unify them, likely keeping one. Also, there’s inconsistency with `Prefix` vs. `GlobalValvePrefix`; I should use `GlobalValvePrefix` consistently and drop `Prefix` for valves to avoid mismatches.
>
> Thought for 10s

You're seeing the ambiguity because `GraceDays` and `PreferReleasedLowestFirst` are each defined **twice** in your class (two different categories). Also, `Prefix` vs `GlobalValvePrefix` were being mixed inconsistently (read into `GlobalValvePrefix` but written from `Prefix`).

Here’s a clean, drop-in `LineTagSettings.cs` that fixes the duplicates and keeps the “global prefix” consistent. I kept `Prefix` as a *runtime mirror* of `GlobalValvePrefix` so older UI/preview code that reads `Prefix` still works, but only **one** source of truth (GlobalValvePrefix) gets written to the JSON.

```csharp
// v0.3 — cleaned: no duplicate properties; consistent prefix handling

using System.ComponentModel;
using System.IO;
using AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub
{
    public class LineTagSettings
    {
        // ---------- Appearance ----------
        [Category("Appearance")]
        [Description("Height of annotation text in drawing units.")]
        public double TextHeight { get; set; } = 0.125;

        [Category("Appearance")]
        [Description("Layer to place tag entities on.")]
        public string Layer { get; set; } = "C-ANNO-TAG";

        // ---------- Behavior ----------
        [Category("Behavior")]
        [Description("If true, increments a counter on each placement.")]
        public bool AutoIncrement { get; set; } = true;

        // ---------- Project Configuration (persisted in Project_Store.json) ----------
        [Category("Project Configuration")]
        [DisplayName("Global Valve Prefix")]
        [Description("Default valve-tag prefix stored in Project_Store.json (Tagging.GlobalValvePrefix).")]
        public string GlobalValvePrefix { get; set; } = "V";

        [Category("Project Configuration")]
        [DisplayName("Grace Days")]
        [Description("Days a released tag remains reserved before eligible for reuse.")]
        public int GraceDays { get; set; } = 7;

        [Category("Project Configuration")]
        [DisplayName("Prefer Released Lowest First")]
        [Description("If true, allocator prefers the lowest available released tag first.")]
        public bool PreferReleasedLowestFirst { get; set; } = true;

        // ---------- Compatibility: in-memory mirror used by older code/preview ----------
        [Browsable(false)]
        public string Prefix { get; set; } = "V";

        // ---------- (Optional) Read-only numbers snapshot for the palette ----------
        [Browsable(false)]
        public TagNumbersView TagNumbers { get; private set; } = new TagNumbersView();

        /// <summary>
        /// Reads GlobalValvePrefix/GraceDays/PreferReleasedLowestFirst + TagNumbers
        /// from the bound Project_Store.json (if any), and mirrors Prefix.
        /// </summary>
        public void RefreshFromStore()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                return;

            // read config
            GlobalValvePrefix = ProjectStoreService.ReadGlobalValvePrefix(binding.StorePath);
            GraceDays = ProjectStoreService.ReadGraceDays(binding.StorePath);
            PreferReleasedLowestFirst = ProjectStoreService.ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(binding.StorePath);

            // keep legacy Prefix in sync for any preview/UI that still uses it
            Prefix = GlobalValvePrefix;

            // read tag numbers (systems → next)
            var systems = ProjectStoreService.GetSystemNextList(binding.StorePath);
            TagNumbers = TagNumbersView.FromList(systems);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Loads only the project config (no TagNumbers); mirrors Prefix.
        /// </summary>
        public void LoadProjectConfig()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                return;

            GlobalValvePrefix = ProjectStoreService.ReadGlobalValvePrefix(binding.StorePath);
            GraceDays = ProjectStoreService.ReadGraceDays(binding.StorePath);
            PreferReleasedLowestFirst = ProjectStoreService.ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(binding.StorePath);

            Prefix = GlobalValvePrefix;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Writes GlobalValvePrefix/GraceDays/PreferReleasedLowestFirst back to Project_Store.json.
        /// (Prefix is a mirror and is not persisted directly.)
        /// </summary>
        public void SaveProjectConfig()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                return;

            // persist from GlobalValvePrefix (single source of truth)
            ProjectStoreService.WriteGlobalValvePrefix(binding.StorePath, GlobalValvePrefix);
            ProjectStoreService.WriteGraceDays(binding.StorePath, GraceDays);
            ProjectStoreService.WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(binding.StorePath, PreferReleasedLowestFirst);

            // keep mirror in sync after save
            Prefix = GlobalValvePrefix;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Optional: refresh only the TagNumbers snapshot from the store.
        /// </summary>
        public void RefreshTagNumbersFromStore()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) { TagNumbers = new TagNumbersView(); return; }

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
            {
                TagNumbers = new TagNumbersView();
                return;
            }

            var list = ProjectStoreService.GetSystemNextList(binding.StorePath);
            TagNumbers = TagNumbersView.FromList(list);
        }
    }

    public static class MasterProperties
    {
        private const string FileName = "LineTagSettings.json";
        private static LineTagSettings _lineTag;
        public static LineTagSettings LineTag
            => _lineTag ?? (_lineTag = Load() ?? new LineTagSettings());

        public static void Save()
        {
            var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(LineTag, Formatting.Indented);
            File.WriteAllText(FileName, json);
        }

        private static LineTagSettings Load()
        {
            if (!File.Exists(FileName)) return null;
            var json = File.ReadAllText(FileName);
            return JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<LineTagSettings>(json);
        }
    }
}
```

### What changed / why this fixes your errors
- Removed the **duplicate** `GraceDays` and `PreferReleasedLowestFirst` properties so there’s only one of each → resolves **CS0229** ambiguity.
- Made `GlobalValvePrefix` the **only persisted** prefix. `Prefix` now mirrors it for compatibility (no confusion about which one gets saved).
- `RefreshFromStore()` now sets both `GlobalValvePrefix` and `Prefix` and refreshes `TagNumbers`.
- `SaveProjectConfig()` writes **GlobalValvePrefix** (not `Prefix`) to JSON and then mirrors `Prefix` to stay consistent.

This should clear the item 1 error in your list. If anything else still complains, tell me the file/line and I’ll patch those next.

## Response:
10/21/2025, 4:05:47 PM

> **Advising on code fix**
>
> I need to suggest that the user removes the reference to SelectionManager and instead passes null or builds the SelectionContext from the current selection. Instead of directly calling PropertyRouter.ApplyIfPossible, they should wire the Apply button to the ApplyRequested event. I’ll provide a concise patch for this adjustment.
>
> Thought for 17s

You don’t need `SelectionManager` at all. That was from an older draft. You’ve got two clean ways to fix this:

---

## Option A (recommended): let the **palette** supply the context

The `PropertiesControl` shouldn’t know about selection. Just raise your existing event and let `CbiPropertiesPalette` call `PropertyRouter.ApplyIfPossible(_ui.SelectedModel, _lastCtx)`.

**PropertiesControl.cs**
```csharp
// constructor wiring (you already have this in our cleaned version)
_btnApply.Click += (s, e) => ApplyRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);
```

Delete the whole `OnApplyButtonClick(...)` method (and any hookup to it). Nothing else to do—the palette subscriber already passes the correct `SelectionContext`.

---

## Option B: build the context locally (if you prefer to call router here)

If you want to keep the button handler inside `PropertiesControl`, replace the `SelectionManager` line with a tiny helper that reads the current implied selection:

```csharp
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;

private static SelectionContext TryBuildCurrentContext()
{
    var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
    if (doc == null) return null;

    var pr = doc.Editor.SelectImplied();
    if (pr.Status != PromptStatus.OK || pr.Value == null || pr.Value.Count == 0)
        return null;

    var id = pr.Value[pr.Value.Count - 1].ObjectId; // last-picked entity
    return new SelectionContext(id, doc);
}

private void OnApplyButtonClick(object sender, EventArgs e)
{
    if (_grid.SelectedObject == null) return;

    var ctx = TryBuildCurrentContext();   // <- replaces SelectionManager.TryGetCurrentContext()
    PropertyRouter.ApplyIfPossible(_grid.SelectedObject, ctx);
}
```

(Use the fully-qualified `Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application` to avoid the `Application` ambiguity.)

---

Pick A or B (not both). A keeps responsibilities clean (UI raises event; palette knows selection). B is a quick drop-in if you want to keep the call in the control.
