>
> Thought for 8s

Great question—here’s where we stand and what’s left, all under the **V5 primary** branch.

# What’s done (and unblocked)
- **LineTagSettings.cs** is now **one clean class** (no nested/partial duplicates).  
  - Has `Prefix`, `RefreshFromStore()`, `RefreshTagNumbersFromStore()`.  
  - Shows the **Tags** header in the property grid with **Next Line** / **Next Valve** (read-only).  
  - Mirrors `GlobalValvePrefix → Prefix` for older UI hooks.
- **PropertiesControl.cs** can bind `MasterProperties.LineTag` and display the **Tags** section in the grid.  
  - The banner logic (`RefreshProjectBanner`) is present and safe if no project is bound.

# What you still need to do (quick checklist)
1. **Deduplicate `ProjectStoreService`** (the CS0121/CS0111 errors you saw earlier):
   - Ensure there’s only **one** copy of each of these in the file/project:
     - `TryLoadOrNew(string)`, `Save(string,JObject)`,  
       `GetEligibleReleased(JObject,string,DateTime)`, `RemoveReleased(JObject,string,long)`,  
       `PeekLineTagString(string,string)`, `PeekValveTagString(string,string)`,  
       `AllocateValveTagString(...)`, `AllocateLineTagString(...)`.
   - If you pasted two “allocator blocks”, **keep one** (prefer the newer V5 one) and delete the other.  
   - After this, the **ambiguous call** errors will disappear.

2. **Palette project-name auto refresh** (when opening/switching drawings):
   - In your **palette host** (e.g., `CbiPropertiesPalette`), wire these events once (when palette initializes):
     ```csharp
     var dm = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager;
     dm.DocumentActivated += (s, e) => _control?.RefreshProjectBanner();
     dm.DocumentCreated += (s, e) => _control?.RefreshProjectBanner();
     dm.DocumentDestroyed += (s, e) => _control?.RefreshProjectBanner();
     ```
   - Also call `_control.RefreshProjectBanner()` after you initially show the palette.

3. **XData write not sticking (polyline)**:
   - You already have `PipeRunPropertyProvider.Apply(...)` calling `XDataHelpers.Write(...)`.  
   - Make sure the **provider is actually invoked** by your router:
     - Your `PropertyRouter.ApplyIfPossible(model, ctx)` (or equivalent) must map:
       - `PipeRunProperties ↔ PipeRunPropertyProvider`
     - And `SelectionContext` must provide `Id` + `Doc` for the selected entity (polyline).
   - Quick sanity test command (optional):
     ```csharp
     // Temporary debug: stamp current selection to prove writes work
     [Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime.CommandMethod("CBI_TEST_STAMP")]
     public static void TestStamp()
     {
         var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
         var ed = doc.Editor;
         var per = ed.GetEntity(new Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput.PromptEntityOptions("\nSelect entity: "));
         if (per.Status != Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput.PromptStatus.OK) return;

         var map = new XDataMap { ["TestKey"] = "TestValue" };
         XDataHelpers.Write(per.ObjectId, "CBI_PIPE_RUN", map);

         ed.WriteMessage("\nWrote CBI_PIPE_RUN XData with TestKey=TestValue.");
     }
     ```
     - After running, use `XDataHelpers.Read(per.ObjectId,"CBI_PIPE_RUN")` or your provider to confirm.

4. **Toolbar tag preview vs. grid preview** (your preference was grid-only):
   - Right now your toolbar still shows `Line:`/`Valve:` (the V5 header cluster).  
   - If you want **only** the property-grid **Tags** section, remove those toolstrip labels:
     - Delete `_lblTagHeader/_lblLineNext/_lblValveNext` fields **and** the code that adds them to `_bar.Items`.  
     - Keep `RefreshHomePreview` if you still want it for future use, or remove it too.

5. **Home → Tags preview system**
   - The grid uses `PreviewSystem` (default “GENERAL”).  
   - If you want the two “next” values to update when user changes `PreviewSystem` in the grid:
     - In `PropertiesControl._grid.PropertyValueChanged`, when name == `PreviewSystem`, call:
       ```csharp
       if (_currentModel is LineTagSettings lt) { lt.RefreshFromStore(); _grid.Refresh(); }
       ```

# Quick test script (end-to-end)
1. Open a DWG **with a bound project**.  
2. Open the CBI Properties palette → **Home** shows:
   - Project banner with correct project name (after Step 2 wiring).
   - Property grid shows **Tags** with Next Line / Next Valve populated.
3. Select a polyline:
   - The grid shows `PipeRunProperties`. Edit a field (e.g., `FluidCode`) and click **Apply** (or rely on Auto-apply).  
   - Re-select the polyline: values persist → confirms **XData write** works.
4. Switch to another DWG **without a project**:
   - Banner updates to “(no project bound)”.

# If anything still fails
- Send me the **current** `ProjectStoreService.cs` (after your dedupe pass).  
- If XData still won’t save, share your **PropertyRouter / SelectionContext** code so I can ensure the provider pipeline fires.

Once you’ve done the 5 items above, V5 is solid. Then we can jump to the next feature (line-tagging button with **AutoIncrement** control) without regressions.

// File: AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreService.cs
// Version: v0.4.2 — unified configuration I/O and system list helpers
// Purpose: Central JSON project store read/write utilities

using System;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Newtonsoft.Json;
using Newtonsoft.Json.Linq;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static partial class ProjectStoreService
    {
        // --------------------------------------------------------------------
        //  CONFIGURATION READ / WRITE
        // --------------------------------------------------------------------

        // -------- Global Valve Prefix --------
        public static string ReadGlobalValvePrefix(string storePath)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(storePath) || !File.Exists(storePath))
                return "V";
            try
            {
                var root = JObject.Parse(File.ReadAllText(storePath));
                return (string)(root["Tagging"]?["GlobalValvePrefix"]) ?? "V";
            }
            catch { return "V"; }
        }

        public static void WriteGlobalValvePrefix(string storePath, string prefix)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(storePath) || !File.Exists(storePath)) return;
            var root = JObject.Parse(File.ReadAllText(storePath));
            var tag = (JObject)(root["Tagging"] ?? (root["Tagging"] = new JObject()));
            tag["GlobalValvePrefix"] = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(prefix) ? "V" : prefix.Trim();
            File.WriteAllText(storePath, root.ToString(Formatting.Indented));
        }

        // -------- GraceDays --------
        public static int ReadGraceDays(string storePath)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(storePath) || !File.Exists(storePath))
                return 7;
            try
            {
                var root = JObject.Parse(File.ReadAllText(storePath));
                return (int?)(root["Config"]?["GraceDays"]) ?? 7;
            }
            catch { return 7; }
        }

        public static void WriteGraceDays(string storePath, int days)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(storePath) || !File.Exists(storePath)) return;
            var root = JObject.Parse(File.ReadAllText(storePath));
            var cfg = (JObject)(root["Config"] ?? (root["Config"] = new JObject()));
            cfg["GraceDays"] = Math.Max(0, days);
            File.WriteAllText(storePath, root.ToString(Formatting.Indented));
        }

        // -------- PreferReleasedLowestFirst --------
        public static bool ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(string storePath)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(storePath) || !File.Exists(storePath))
                return true;
            try
            {
                var root = JObject.Parse(File.ReadAllText(storePath));
                return (bool?)(root["Config"]?["PreferReleasedLowestFirst"]) ?? true;
            }
            catch { return true; }
        }

        public static void WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(string storePath, bool prefer)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(storePath) || !File.Exists(storePath)) return;
            var root = JObject.Parse(File.ReadAllText(storePath));
            var cfg = (JObject)(root["Config"] ?? (root["Config"] = new JObject()));
            cfg["PreferReleasedLowestFirst"] = prefer;
            File.WriteAllText(storePath, root.ToString(Formatting.Indented));
        }

        // --------------------------------------------------------------------
        //  SYSTEM NEXT LIST
        // --------------------------------------------------------------------

        public sealed class SystemNextInfo
        {
            public string SystemKey { get; set; } = "";
            public string Name { get; set; } = "";
            public string Prefix { get; set; } = "";
            public long Next { get; set; } = 0;
        }

        public static List<SystemNextInfo> GetSystemNextList(string storePath)
        {
            var list = new List<SystemNextInfo>();
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(storePath) || !File.Exists(storePath))
                return list;

            var root = JObject.Parse(File.ReadAllText(storePath));

            // v0.4 schema: "Systems" object
            var systemsV04 = root["Systems"] as JObject;
            if (systemsV04 != null)
            {
                foreach (var p in systemsV04.Properties())
                {
                    var o = p.Value as JObject; if (o == null) continue;
                    list.Add(new SystemNextInfo
                    {
                        SystemKey = p.Name,
                        Name = (string)(o["System"] ?? p.Name) ?? p.Name,
                        Prefix = (string)(o["Prefix"] ?? ""),
                        Next = (long?)(o["Next"]) ?? 0L
                    });
                }
                return list.OrderBy(x => x.SystemKey).ToList();
            }

            // legacy variants
            var sysObj = root["systems"] as JObject;
            if (sysObj != null)
            {
                foreach (var prop in sysObj.Properties())
                {
                    var o = prop.Value as JObject; if (o == null) continue;
                    list.Add(new SystemNextInfo
                    {
                        SystemKey = prop.Name,
                        Name = (string)(o["name"] ?? prop.Name),
                        Prefix = (string)(o["prefix"] ?? o["Prefix"] ?? ""),
                        Next = (long?)(o["next"] ?? o["Next"]) ?? 0L
                    });
                }
            }

            var sysArr = root["systems"] as JArray;
            if (sysArr != null)
            {
                foreach (var tok in sysArr.OfType<JObject>())
                {
                    list.Add(new SystemNextInfo
                    {
                        SystemKey = (string)(tok["key"] ?? tok["systemKey"] ?? tok["name"] ?? ""),
                        Name = (string)(tok["name"] ?? tok["key"] ?? ""),
                        Prefix = (string)(tok["prefix"] ?? tok["Prefix"] ?? ""),
                        Next = (long?)(tok["next"] ?? tok["Next"]) ?? 0L
                    });
                }
            }

            return list
                .GroupBy(x => x.SystemKey ?? x.Name ?? "")
                .Select(g => g.OrderByDescending(x => x.Next).First())
                .OrderBy(x => x.SystemKey)
                .ToList();
        }

        // --------------------------------------------------------------------
        //  STORE CREATION (SEED)
        // --------------------------------------------------------------------

        public static void CreateNewStore(string projectId, string projectName, string storePath, string manifestPath)
        {
            Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(storePath) ?? ".");

            var root = new JObject
            {
                ["Version"] = "0.4",
                ["Config"] = new JObject
                {
                    ["GraceDays"] = 7,
                    ["PreferReleasedLowestFirst"] = true
                },
                ["Project"] = new JObject
                {
                    ["Name"] = projectName ?? "New Project",
                    ["RootHint"] = null,
                    ["Drawings"] = new JArray()
                },
                ["Tagging"] = new JObject
                {
                    ["GlobalValvePrefix"] = "V",
                    ["Pad"] = 4
                },
                ["Systems"] = new JObject
                {
                    ["GENERAL"] = new JObject
                    {
                        ["System"] = "GENERAL",
                        ["Start"] = 1,
                        ["End"] = 999,
                        ["Next"] = 1
                    }
                },
                ["Released"] = new JObject(),
                ["Tags"] = new JArray(),
                ["History"] = new JArray()
            };

            File.WriteAllText(storePath, root.ToString(Formatting.Indented));

            // Optional manifest append
            try
            {
                Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(manifestPath) ?? ".");
                if (!File.Exists(manifestPath)) File.WriteAllText(manifestPath, "[]");
                var arr = JArray.Parse(File.ReadAllText(manifestPath));
                arr.Add(new JObject
                {
                    ["projectId"] = projectId ?? Guid.NewGuid().ToString("D"),
                    ["name"] = projectName ?? "New Project",
                    ["storePath"] = storePath,
                    ["updatedUtc"] = DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o")
                });
                File.WriteAllText(manifestPath, arr.ToString(Formatting.Indented));
            }
            catch { /* non-fatal */ }
        }

        // ======================== V5 Primary: Tag allocator + peek ========================

        // PEEK (strings formatted as Prefix + zero-padded number)
        public static string PeekValveTagString(string storePath, string systemKey)
            => PeekTagString(storePath, systemKey, isValve: true);

        public static string PeekLineTagString(string storePath, string systemKey)
            => PeekTagString(storePath, systemKey, isValve: false);

        private static string PeekTagString(string storePath, string systemKey, bool isValve)
        {
            long n;
            return AllocateTagString(storePath, systemKey, isValve, commit: false, out n);
        }

        // ALLOCATE (with released-tag re-use and grace policy). Returns formatted string.
        public static string AllocateValveTagString(string storePath, string systemKey, bool commit, out long number)
            => AllocateTagString(storePath, systemKey, isValve: true, commit, out number);

        public static string AllocateLineTagString(string storePath, string systemKey, bool commit, out long number)
            => AllocateTagString(storePath, systemKey, isValve: false, commit, out number);

        // --------------- internals ----------------
        private static string AllocateTagString(string storePath, string systemKey, bool isValve, bool commit, out long number)
        {
            number = 0;
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(storePath) || !File.Exists(storePath))
                return isValve ? "V0000" : "L0000";

            var root = TryLoadOrNew(storePath);

            // Config & tagging
            var cfg = (JObject)(root["Config"] ?? (root["Config"] = new JObject()));
            var tag = (JObject)(root["Tagging"] ?? (root["Tagging"] = new JObject()));

            int graceDays = (int?)cfg["GraceDays"] ?? 7;
            bool preferLowest = (bool?)cfg["PreferReleasedLowestFirst"] ?? true;
            int pad = (int?)tag["Pad"] ?? 4;

            // Prefix: valves use GlobalValvePrefix; lines reuse for now
            string prefix = (string)tag["GlobalValvePrefix"] ?? "V";
            // if (!isValve) { /* add GlobalLinePrefix later if desired */ }

            // System range
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(systemKey)) systemKey = "GENERAL";
            var systems = (JObject)(root["Systems"] ?? (root["Systems"] = new JObject()));
            var sys = systems[systemKey] as JObject;
            if (sys == null)
            {
                sys = new JObject { ["System"] = systemKey, ["Start"] = 1, ["End"] = 999, ["Next"] = 1 };
                systems[systemKey] = sys;
            }

            long start = (long?)sys["Start"] ?? 1;
            long end = (long?)sys["End"] ?? (start + 999);
            long next = (long?)sys["Next"] ?? start;

            // 1) Prefer eligible released numbers (older than grace)
            var cutoff = DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(-Math.Max(0, graceDays));
            var eligible = GetEligibleReleased(root, systemKey, cutoff);

            if (eligible.Count > 0)
            {
                number = preferLowest
                    ? eligible.OrderBy(x => x.n).First().n
                    : eligible.OrderBy(x => x.releasedUtc).First().n;

                if (commit)
                {
                    RemoveReleased(root, systemKey, number);
                    Save(storePath, root);
                }
                return FormatTag(prefix, number, pad);
            }

            // 2) Use Next
            if (next < start) next = start;
            if (next > end) throw new InvalidOperationException($"No tags available in system '{systemKey}'.");

            number = next;
            if (commit)
            {
                sys["Next"] = number + 1;
                Save(storePath, root);
            }
            return FormatTag(prefix, number, pad);
        }

        private static string FormatTag(string prefix, long n, int pad)
        {
            var safe = n < 0 ? 0 : n; // fix CS0173 (avoid string/long conditional)
            return (prefix ?? "").Trim() + safe.ToString().PadLeft(Math.Max(1, pad), '0');
        }

        // ---- minimal helpers used above ----
        private static JObject TryLoad(string storePath)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(storePath) || !File.Exists(storePath)) return null;
            try { return JObject.Parse(File.ReadAllText(storePath)); } catch { return null; }
        }

        private static JObject TryLoadOrNew(string storePath)
        {
            return TryLoad(storePath) ?? new JObject
            {
                ["Version"] = "0.4",
                ["Config"] = new JObject { ["GraceDays"] = 7, ["PreferReleasedLowestFirst"] = true },
                ["Tagging"] = new JObject { ["GlobalValvePrefix"] = "V", ["Pad"] = 4 },
                ["Systems"] = new JObject(),
                ["Released"] = new JObject(),
                ["Project"] = new JObject { ["Name"] = "New Project", ["Drawings"] = new JArray() }
            };
        }

        private static void Save(string storePath, JObject root)
        {
            Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(storePath) ?? ".");
            File.WriteAllText(storePath, root.ToString(Formatting.Indented));
        }

        private static List<(long n, DateTime releasedUtc)> GetEligibleReleased(JObject root, string systemKey, DateTime cutoffUtc)
        {
            var rel = root["Released"] as JObject;
            var arr = rel?[systemKey] as JArray;
            var list = new List<(long, DateTime)>();
            if (arr == null) return list;

            foreach (var t in arr)
            {
                if (t is JValue v && v.Type == JTokenType.Integer)
                {
                    list.Add(((long)v, DateTime.MinValue)); // legacy entries
                }
                else if (t is JObject o)
                {
                    long? n = (long?)o["n"];
                    DateTime dt;
                    if (!DateTime.TryParse((string)o["releasedUtc"], out dt)) dt = DateTime.MinValue;
                    if (n.HasValue && dt <= cutoffUtc) list.Add((n.Value, dt));
                }
            }
            return list;
        }

        private static void RemoveReleased(JObject root, string systemKey, long number)
        {
            var rel = (JObject)(root["Released"] ?? (root["Released"] = new JObject()));
            var arr = (JArray)(rel[systemKey] ?? (rel[systemKey] = new JArray()));
            var keep = new JArray();
            foreach (var t in arr)
            {
                if (t is JValue v && (long?)v == number) continue;
                if (t is JObject o && (long?)o["n"] == number) continue;
                keep.Add(t);
            }
            rel[systemKey] = keep;
        }

    }
}

// File: AutoCAD2020/PropertiesHub/PropertyRouter.cs
// v0.2 — Provider registry + routing + tool-settings persistence

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;

namespace AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub
{
    public sealed class SelectionContext
    {
        public ObjectId Id { get; }
        public Document Doc { get; }
        public SelectionContext(ObjectId id, Document doc)
        {
            Id = id;
            Doc = doc;
        }
    }

    public interface IPropertySourceProvider
    {
        bool CanProvideFor(SelectionContext ctx);
        object GetSelectedObject(SelectionContext ctx);
        void Apply(object editedModel, SelectionContext ctx);
    }

    public static class PropertyRouter
    {
        // Order matters a bit: entity-backed providers first; tool-only (settings) last.
        private static readonly List<IPropertySourceProvider> _providers = new List<IPropertySourceProvider>
        {
            new PipeRunPropertyProvider(),
            new InstrumentPropertyProvider(),
            new ComponentPropertyProvider(),
            //new LineTagSettingsProvider() // CanProvideFor == false (tool-only)
        };

        public static object Resolve(SelectionContext ctx)
        {
            if (ctx == null) return ResolveForTool();

            foreach (var p in _providers)
            {
                try
                {
                    if (p.CanProvideFor(ctx))
                        return p.GetSelectedObject(ctx);
                }
                catch
                {
                    // keep palette resilient
                }
            }

            // Fallback: show tool settings “Home”
            return ResolveForTool();
        }

        public static object ResolveForTool() => MasterProperties.LineTag;

        private static bool _isApplying;

        /// <summary>
        /// Applies changes either to the selected entity (provider-backed) or,
        /// if the model is <see cref="LineTagSettings"/>, persists to the Project Store (JSON)
        /// and to the local settings file (MasterProperties).
        /// </summary>
        public static void ApplyIfPossible(object model, SelectionContext ctx)
        {
            if (model == null) return;

            // ---- Tool model path (palette "Home"): persist to Project_Store.json + local json ----
            if (model is LineTagSettings ltSettings)
            {
                // Prefer the context doc if present; otherwise MDI
                var doc = ctx?.Doc ?? Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;

                if (doc != null &&
                    ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) &&
                    !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                {
                    // Persist store-backed knobs
                    ProjectStoreService.WriteGlobalValvePrefix(binding.StorePath, ltSettings.GlobalValvePrefix);
                    ProjectStoreService.WriteGraceDays(binding.StorePath, ltSettings.GraceDays);
                    ProjectStoreService.WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(binding.StorePath, ltSettings.PreferReleasedLowestFirst);

                    // Re-hydrate so the grid reflects the file-of-record
                    ltSettings.RefreshFromStore();
                }

                // Also keep tool-only locals (layer, text height, etc.) in sync
                MasterProperties.Save();

                // Ask the palette to re-read and rebind on idle (prevents stale echo)
                CbiPropertiesPalette.RequestRefreshSoon();
                return;
            }

            // ---- Entity-backed path (providers) ----
            if (ctx == null) return;
            if (_isApplying) return;

            _isApplying = true;
            try
            {
                foreach (var p in _providers)
                {
                    try
                    {
                        if (!p.CanProvideFor(ctx)) continue;

                        var current = p.GetSelectedObject(ctx);
                        if (current != null && current.GetType() == model.GetType())
                        {
                            p.Apply(model, ctx);

                            // Re-resolve on the next idle tick to avoid racing stale grid data
                            CbiPropertiesPalette.RequestRefreshSoon();
                            return;
                        }
                    }
                    catch
                    {
                        // swallow provider exceptions to keep UI stable
                    }
                }

                // Legacy fallback: if someone passed the same instance we keep locally
                if (ReferenceEquals(model, MasterProperties.LineTag))
                    MasterProperties.Save();
            }
            finally
            {
                _isApplying = false;
            }
        }
    }
}

using AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using static AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub.PipeRunProperties;

namespace AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub
{
    public sealed class PipeRunPropertyProvider : IPropertySourceProvider
    {
        private const string AppName = "CBI_PIPE_RUN";

        public bool CanProvideFor(SelectionContext ctx)
        {
            // If already stamped, definitely ours
            if (XDataHelpers.HasAppName(ctx.Id, AppName)) return true;

            // Otherwise, claim common pipe geometry so first Apply can stamp XData
            using (var tr = ctx.Doc.TransactionManager.StartOpenCloseTransaction())
            {
                var ent = tr.GetObject(ctx.Id, OpenMode.ForRead) as Entity;
                if (ent == null) return false;

                return ent is Polyline || ent is Polyline2d || ent is Polyline3d;
            }
        }

        public object GetSelectedObject(SelectionContext ctx)
        {
            var map = XDataHelpers.Read(ctx.Id, AppName);
            var p = new PipeRunProperties();

            // Layer (prefer XData, else actual entity layer)
            using (var tr = ctx.Doc.TransactionManager.StartOpenCloseTransaction())
            {
                var ent = (Entity)tr.GetObject(ctx.Id, OpenMode.ForRead);
                p.LayerName = map.Get("LayerName") ?? ent.Layer;
            }

            // Identification
            p.FluidCode = map.Get("FluidCode");
            p.FluidSystem = map.Get("FluidSystem");
            p.PlantGroupName = map.Get("PlantGroupName");
            p.PlantGroupType = map.Get("PlantGroupType");
            p.PlantItemType = map.Get("PlantItemType");
            p.TagSeqNo = map.Get("TagSeqNo");
            p.TagSuffix = map.Get("TagSuffix");
            p.UnitNumber = map.Get("UnitNumber");

            // Piping Run Type (string → enum)
            var prt = map.Get("PipingRunType");
            PipeRunKind kindVal;
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(prt))
            {
                if (System.Enum.TryParse(prt, true, out kindVal))
                    p.PipingRunType = kindVal;
                else
                    p.PipingRunType = null; // unknown/legacy
            }

            // Physical
            p.InsulationPurpose = map.Get("InsulationPurpose");
            p.NominalDiameter = map.Get("NominalDiameter");
            p.PipingMaterialClass = map.Get("PipingMaterialClass");

            return p;
        }

        public void Apply(object editedModel, SelectionContext ctx)
        {
            var m = (PipeRunProperties)editedModel;

            var itemTag = PipeRunProperties.BuildItemTag(
                m.NominalDiameter, m.FluidCode, m.TagSeqNo, m.PipingMaterialClass, m.InsulationPurpose);

            EnsureRegApp(ctx.Doc.Database, AppName);

            var map = new XDataMap
            {
                ["SchemaVersion"] = "1.0",
                ["LayerName"] = m.LayerName,
                ["FluidCode"] = m.FluidCode,
                ["FluidSystem"] = m.FluidSystem,
                ["PlantGroupName"] = m.PlantGroupName,
                ["PlantGroupType"] = m.PlantGroupType,
                ["PlantItemType"] = m.PlantItemType,
                ["TagSeqNo"] = m.TagSeqNo,
                ["TagSuffix"] = m.TagSuffix,
                ["UnitNumber"] = m.UnitNumber,

                // write enum as string ("Primary" / "Secondary")
                ["PipingRunType"] = m.PipingRunType?.ToString(),

                ["InsulationPurpose"] = m.InsulationPurpose,
                ["NominalDiameter"] = m.NominalDiameter,
                ["PipingMaterialClass"] = m.PipingMaterialClass,
                ["ItemTag"] = itemTag
            };
            XDataHelpers.Write(ctx.Id, AppName, map);

            // Decide target layer: user-specified wins; else CAD standard from enum
            var targetLayer = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(m.LayerName)
                                ? m.LayerName
                                : LayerRules.LayerForPipeRun(m.PipingRunType);

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(targetLayer))
            {
                EnsureLayerExists(ctx.Doc.Database, targetLayer);
                using (var tr = ctx.Doc.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
                {
                    var ent = (Entity)tr.GetObject(ctx.Id, OpenMode.ForWrite);
                    if (ent != null && !ent.IsErased) ent.Layer = targetLayer;
                    tr.Commit();
                }
            }
        }

        // helper (drop at bottom of file or into XDataHelpers if you prefer)
        private static void EnsureRegApp(Database db, string appName)
        {
            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var rat = (RegAppTable)tr.GetObject(db.RegAppTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                if (!rat.Has(appName))
                {
                    rat.UpgradeOpen();
                    var rec = new RegAppTableRecord { Name = appName };
                    rat.Add(rec);
                    tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(rec, true);
                }
                tr.Commit();
            }
        }

        private static void EnsureLayerExists(Database db, string layerName)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(layerName)) return;

            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var lt = (LayerTable)tr.GetObject(db.LayerTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                if (!lt.Has(layerName))
                {
                    lt.UpgradeOpen();
                    var rec = new LayerTableRecord { Name = layerName };
                    lt.Add(rec);
                    tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(rec, true);
                }
                tr.Commit();
            }
        }

}
}

// v0.1.1 (C# 7.3) — Example entity-backed provider using simple XData helpers

using System.ComponentModel;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using DocumentFormat.OpenXml.Drawing.Diagrams;

namespace AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub
{
    public class PipeRunProperties
    {
        // -------- Acad Properties --------
        [Category("Acad Properties")]
        [DisplayName("Layer Name")]
        public string LayerName { get; set; }

        // -------- Identification --------
        [Category("Identification")]
        [DisplayName("Fluid Code")]
        public string FluidCode { get; set; }

        [Category("Identification")]
        [DisplayName("Fluid System")]
        public string FluidSystem { get; set; }

        [Category("Identification")]
        [DisplayName("Piping Run Type")]
        public PipeRunKind? PipingRunType { get; set; }   // <-- shared enum

        [Category("Identification")]
        [DisplayName("Plant Group Name")]
        public string PlantGroupName { get; set; }

        [Category("Identification")]
        [DisplayName("Plant Group Type")]
        public string PlantGroupType { get; set; }

        [Category("Identification")]
        [DisplayName("Plant Item Type")]
        public string PlantItemType { get; set; }

        [Category("Identification")]
        [DisplayName("Tag Seq No")]
        public string TagSeqNo { get; set; }

        [Category("Identification")]
        [DisplayName("Tag Suffix")]
        public string TagSuffix { get; set; }

        [Category("Identification")]
        [DisplayName("Unit Number")]
        public string UnitNumber { get; set; }

        // Computed ItemTag (read-only)
        [Category("Identification")]
        [DisplayName("Item Tag")]
        [ReadOnly(true)]
        [Description("Auto-generated: NominalDiameter-FluidCode-TagSeqNo-PipingMaterialClass-InsulationPurpose")]
        public string ItemTag
        {
            get { return BuildItemTag(NominalDiameter, FluidCode, TagSeqNo, PipingMaterialClass, InsulationPurpose); }
        }

        // -------- Physical --------
        [Category("Physical")]
        [DisplayName("Insulation Purpose")]
        public string InsulationPurpose { get; set; }

        [Category("Physical")]
        [DisplayName("Nominal Diameter")]
        public string NominalDiameter { get; set; }

        [Category("Physical")]
        [DisplayName("Piping Material Class")]
        public string PipingMaterialClass { get; set; }

        // -------- Helper --------
        public static string BuildItemTag(string nominalDiameter, string fluidCode, string tagSeqNo, string pipingMaterialClass, string insulationPurpose)
        {
            var parts = new[]
            {
                (nominalDiameter ?? "").Trim(),
                (fluidCode ?? "").Trim(),
                (tagSeqNo ?? "").Trim(),
                (pipingMaterialClass ?? "").Trim(),
                (insulationPurpose ?? "").Trim()
            };

            var list = new System.Collections.Generic.List<string>();
            foreach (var p in parts) if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(p)) list.Add(p);
            return string.Join("-", list);
        }
    }
}

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using System.Globalization;

namespace AutoCAD2020.NOD_X_Data
{
    public static class NODTypeValidator
    {
        // Overloads for specific property names
        public static bool IsValidLayerName(string layerName) => IsValidType("LayerName", layerName);
        public static bool IsValidColorIndex(string colorIndex) => IsValidType("ColorIndex", colorIndex);
        public static bool IsValidLinetype(string linetype) => IsValidType("Linetype", linetype);
        public static bool IsValidLineweight(double lineweight) => IsValidType("Lineweight", lineweight);
        public static bool IsValidPlot(bool plot) => IsValidType("Plot", plot);
        public static bool IsValidDescription(string description) => IsValidType("Description", description);

        // --- General validation method for typed validation ---
        public static bool IsValidType(string typeName, object value)
        {
            if (value == null)
                return false;

            switch (typeName)
            {
                case "LayerName":
                case "Name":
                    return value is string s && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s);

                case "DiciplineKey":
                    return value is string dk && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(dk);

                case "ColorIndex":
                    return TryParseInt(value, out int colorIndex) && colorIndex >= 1 && colorIndex <= 255;

                case "Linetype":
                    return value is string lt && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(lt);

                case "Lineweight":
                    return TryParseDouble(value, out double lw) && lw >= 0;

                case "Plot":
                    return TryParseBool(value, out _);

                case "Description":
                    // optional: null/empty is OK; enforce a max length if you want
                    if (value == null) return true;
                    if (value is string d) return d.Length <= 1024;  // pick a limit
                    return false;

                default:
                    return false;
            }
        }

        private static bool TryParseInt(object value, out int result)
        {
            if (value is int i)
            {
                result = i;
                return true;
            }

            if (value is double d)
            {
                // If it's a whole number like 62.0, accept it
                if (d % 1 == 0)
                {
                    result = (int)d;
                    return true;
                }
            }

            if (value is string s)
                return int.TryParse(s.Trim(), out result);

            result = 0;
            return false;
        }

        private static bool TryParseDouble(object value, out double result)
        {
            if (value is double d)
            {
                result = d;
                return true;
            }

            if (value is string s)
                return double.TryParse(s.Trim(), NumberStyles.Float, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, out result);

            result = 0;
            return false;
        }

        private static bool TryParseBool(object value, out bool result)
        {
            if (value is bool b)
            {
                result = b;
                return true;
            }

            if (value is string s)
            {
                s = s.Trim().ToLowerInvariant();
                if (s == "true" || s == "yes" || s == "1")
                {
                    result = true;
                    return true;
                }
                if (s == "false" || s == "no" || s == "0")
                {
                    result = false;
                    return true;
                }
            }

            result = false;
            return false;
        }
    }
}

using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using DocumentFormat.OpenXml.Bibliography;
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

namespace AutoCAD2020.NOD_X_Data
{
    public static class NODWriter
    {
        public static void WriteTypedValuesToNOD(string nodKey, ResultBuffer buffer)
        {
            var db = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument.Database;
            using (var trans = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var nod = (DBDictionary)trans.GetObject(db.NamedObjectsDictionaryId, OpenMode.ForWrite);

                // If the record exists, replace it
                if (nod.Contains(nodKey))
                {
                    var existing = (Xrecord)trans.GetObject(nod.GetAt(nodKey), OpenMode.ForWrite);
                    existing.Data = buffer;
                }
                else
                {
                    var xrec = new Xrecord { Data = buffer };
                    nod.SetAt(nodKey, xrec);
                    trans.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(xrec, true);
                }

                trans.Commit();
            }
        }

private static DxfCode GetDxfCode(object value)
        {
            if (value is string)
                return DxfCode.ExtendedDataAsciiString;
            else if (value is int)
                return DxfCode.ExtendedDataInteger32;
            else if (value is double)
                return DxfCode.ExtendedDataReal;
            else if (value is bool)
                return DxfCode.Bool;
            else
                return DxfCode.Text;
        }
    }
}

using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;

namespace AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore
{
    public static class ProjectNodBinder
    {
        // Writes: NOD["CBI"]["Project"] = Xrecord( Id, Name, StorePath )
        public static void BindProjectToDrawing(Document doc, string projectId, string name, string storePath)
        {
            if (doc == null) return;
            var db = doc.Database;

            using (doc.LockDocument())
            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var nod = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(db.NamedObjectsDictionaryId, OpenMode.ForRead);

                DBDictionary cbi;
                if (nod.Contains("CBI"))
                {
                    cbi = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(nod.GetAt("CBI"), OpenMode.ForWrite);
                }
                else
                {
                    nod.UpgradeOpen();
                    cbi = new DBDictionary();
                    nod.SetAt("CBI", cbi);
                    tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(cbi, true);
                }

                var data = new ResultBuffer(
                    new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Text, projectId ?? string.Empty),
                    new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Text, name ?? string.Empty),
                    new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Text, storePath ?? string.Empty)
                );

                if (cbi.Contains("Project"))
                {
                    var xr = (Xrecord)tr.GetObject(cbi.GetAt("Project"), OpenMode.ForWrite);
                    xr.Data = data;
                }
                else
                {
                    var xr = new Xrecord { Data = data };
                    cbi.SetAt("Project", xr);
                    tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(xr, true);
                }

                tr.Commit();
            }
        }
    }
}

using System.ComponentModel;
using System.IO;
using AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub
{
    public class LineTagSettings
    {
        // ---------- Appearance ----------
        [Category("Appearance")]
        [Description("Height of annotation text in drawing units.")]
        public double TextHeight { get; set; } = 0.125;

        [Category("Appearance")]
        [Description("Layer to place tag entities on.")]
        public string Layer { get; set; } = "C-ANNO-TAG";

        // ---------- Behavior ----------
        [Category("Behavior")]
        [Description("If true, increments the counter when using the Line Tagging tool.")]
        public bool AutoIncrement { get; set; } = true;

        // ---------- Project Configuration ----------
        [Category("Project Configuration")]
        [DisplayName("Preview System")]
        [Description("System used for previewing the next line/valve numbers.")]
        public string PreviewSystem { get; set; } = "GENERAL";

        [Category("Project Configuration")]
        [DisplayName("Global Valve Prefix")]
        [Description("Default valve-tag prefix stored in Project_Store.json (Tagging.GlobalValvePrefix).")]
        public string GlobalValvePrefix { get; set; } = "V";

        [Category("Project Configuration")]
        [DisplayName("Grace Days")]
        [Description("Days a released tag remains reserved before eligible for reuse.")]
        public int GraceDays { get; set; } = 7;

        [Category("Project Configuration")]
        [DisplayName("Prefer Released Lowest First")]
        [Description("If true, allocator prefers the lowest available released tag first.")]
        public bool PreferReleasedLowestFirst { get; set; } = true;

        // ---------- Compatibility: mirror used by older UI hooks ----------
        [Browsable(false)]
        public string Prefix { get; set; } = "V";

        // ---------- (Optional) Read-only numbers snapshot (if shown elsewhere) ----------
        [Browsable(false)]
        public TagNumbersView TagNumbers { get; private set; } = new TagNumbersView();

        // ---------- Tags (expandable preview group) ----------
        [Category("Tags")]
        [DisplayName("Tags")]
        [Description("Preview of next available tag numbers from the Project Store.")]
        [TypeConverter(typeof(ExpandableObjectConverter))]
        public TagsPreview Tags { get; private set; } = new TagsPreview();

        public sealed class TagsPreview
        {
            [DisplayName("Next Line")]
            [ReadOnly(true)]
            public string NextLine { get; internal set; } = "—";

            [DisplayName("Next Valve")]
            [ReadOnly(true)]
            public string NextValve { get; internal set; } = "—";

            public override string ToString() => "(preview)";
        }

        // ---------- Store sync ----------
        /// <summary>Reads config + TagNumbers and updates the Tags preview.</summary>
        public void RefreshFromStore()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                return;

            // config
            GlobalValvePrefix = ProjectStoreService.ReadGlobalValvePrefix(binding.StorePath);
            GraceDays = ProjectStoreService.ReadGraceDays(binding.StorePath);
            PreferReleasedLowestFirst = ProjectStoreService.ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(binding.StorePath);

            // mirror for legacy UI
            Prefix = GlobalValvePrefix;

            // per-system list snapshot (if you render it elsewhere)
            var systems = ProjectStoreService.GetSystemNextList(binding.StorePath);
            TagNumbers = TagNumbersView.FromList(systems);

            // preview next numbers
            RefreshTagsPreviewFromStore();
        }

        /// <summary>Loads only the project config; mirrors Prefix.</summary>
        public void LoadProjectConfig()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                return;

            GlobalValvePrefix = ProjectStoreService.ReadGlobalValvePrefix(binding.StorePath);
            GraceDays = ProjectStoreService.ReadGraceDays(binding.StorePath);
            PreferReleasedLowestFirst = ProjectStoreService.ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(binding.StorePath);

            Prefix = GlobalValvePrefix;
        }

        /// <summary>Writes project config back to Project_Store.json and keeps mirror in sync.</summary>
        public void SaveProjectConfig()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                return;

            ProjectStoreService.WriteGlobalValvePrefix(binding.StorePath, GlobalValvePrefix);
            ProjectStoreService.WriteGraceDays(binding.StorePath, GraceDays);
            ProjectStoreService.WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(binding.StorePath, PreferReleasedLowestFirst);

            Prefix = GlobalValvePrefix;
        }

        /// <summary>Refresh only the TagNumbers snapshot.</summary>
        public void RefreshTagNumbersFromStore()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) { TagNumbers = new TagNumbersView(); return; }

            if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
            {
                TagNumbers = new TagNumbersView();
                return;
            }

            var list = ProjectStoreService.GetSystemNextList(binding.StorePath);
            TagNumbers = TagNumbersView.FromList(list);
        }

        /// <summary>Hydrates the expandable Tags preview (Next Line / Next Valve).</summary>
        private void RefreshTagsPreviewFromStore()
        {
            try
            {
                var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
                if (doc == null) { Tags = new TagsPreview(); return; }

                if (!ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                    string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                {
                    Tags = new TagsPreview();
                    return;
                }

                var system = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(PreviewSystem) ? "GENERAL" : PreviewSystem;
                var line = ProjectStoreService.PeekLineTagString(binding.StorePath, system);
                var valve = ProjectStoreService.PeekValveTagString(binding.StorePath, system);

                Tags = new TagsPreview { NextLine = line, NextValve = valve };
            }
            catch
            {
                Tags = new TagsPreview();
            }
        }
    }

    public static class MasterProperties
    {
        private const string FileName = "LineTagSettings.json";
        private static LineTagSettings _lineTag;

        public static LineTagSettings LineTag
            => _lineTag ?? (_lineTag = Load() ?? new LineTagSettings());

        public static void Save()
        {
            var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(LineTag, Formatting.Indented);
            File.WriteAllText(FileName, json);
        }

        private static LineTagSettings Load()
        {
            if (!File.Exists(FileName)) return null;
            var json = File.ReadAllText(FileName);
            return JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<LineTagSettings>(json);
        }
    }
}

// File: PipeRunAssociationCommands.cs
// C# 7.3 – AutoCAD 2020

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Geometry;

namespace AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub
{
    public static class PipeRunAssociationCommands
    {
        private const string RunApp = "CBI_PIPE_RUN";
        private const string CompApp = "CBI_COMPONENT";
        private const double NearTol = 0.75; // drawing units – tweak for your scale

        // ---------------- Commands ----------------

        /// <summary>
        /// Refresh component blocks associated with the selected pipe run:
        /// - copies NominalDiameter/FluidCode/PipingMaterialClass from run to component XData,
        /// - updates block attribute or dynamic property named "SIZE" if present.
        /// </summary>

        public static void RefreshAssociated()
        {
            var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            try
            {
                // Pick a polyline (pipe run)
                var peo = new PromptEntityOptions("\nSelect PIPE RUN (polyline): ");
                peo.SetRejectMessage("\nMust be a polyline.");
                peo.AddAllowedClass(typeof(Polyline), true);
                peo.AddAllowedClass(typeof(Polyline2d), true);
                peo.AddAllowedClass(typeof(Polyline3d), true);

                var per = ed.GetEntity(peo);
                if (per.Status != PromptStatus.OK) return;

                int updated = RefreshFromRun(doc, per.ObjectId);
                ed.WriteMessage($"\nRefreshed {updated} component(s) from the selected run.");
            }
            catch (System.Exception ex)
            {
                ed.WriteMessage($"\n[CBI] Refresh failed: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Attach selected blocks to a selected run (stores OwnerRunHandle on components).
        /// </summary>
        [CommandMethod("CBI_ATTACH_TO_RUN")]
        public static void AttachToRun()
        {
            var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            try
            {
                // 1) Pick run
                var peo = new PromptEntityOptions("\nSelect PIPE RUN (polyline): ");
                peo.SetRejectMessage("\nMust be a polyline.");
                peo.AddAllowedClass(typeof(Polyline), true);
                peo.AddAllowedClass(typeof(Polyline2d), true);
                peo.AddAllowedClass(typeof(Polyline3d), true);

                var perRun = ed.GetEntity(peo);
                if (perRun.Status != PromptStatus.OK) return;

                string runHandle;
                using (var tr = doc.TransactionManager.StartOpenCloseTransaction())
                {
                    runHandle = perRun.ObjectId.Handle.ToString();
                }

                // 2) Pick blocks to attach
                var pso = new PromptSelectionOptions { MessageForAdding = "\nSelect COMPONENT blocks:" };
                var filter = new SelectionFilter(new[]
                {
                    new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Start, "INSERT")
                });
                var psr = ed.GetSelection(pso, filter);
                if (psr.Status != PromptStatus.OK) return;

                int attached = 0;
                foreach (SelectedObject so in psr.Value)
                {
                    if (so?.ObjectId.IsNull != false) continue;

                    var map = XDataHelpers.Read(so.ObjectId, CompApp);
                    map["OwnerRunHandle"] = runHandle;
                    XDataHelpers.Write(so.ObjectId, CompApp, map);
                    attached++;
                }

                ed.WriteMessage($"\nAttached {attached} block(s) to the run.");
            }
            catch (System.Exception ex)
            {
                ed.WriteMessage($"\n[CBI] Attach failed: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        // ---------------- Core logic ----------------

        /// <summary>
        /// Reads run XData and pushes mapped fields to all associated component blocks.
        /// </summary>
        public static int RefreshFromRun(Document doc, ObjectId runId)
        {
            var db = doc.Database;

            var runMap = XDataHelpers.Read(runId, RunApp);
            if (runMap == null || runMap.Count == 0) return 0;

            // Fields we propagate
            var size = runMap.Get("NominalDiameter");
            var fluid = runMap.Get("FluidCode");
            var pmc = runMap.Get("PipingMaterialClass");

            // Gather targets: first by explicit association; if none, fallback to proximity
            var targets = FindAssociatedBlocks(db, runId);
            if (targets.Count == 0)
                targets = FindBlocksNearRun(db, runId, NearTol);

            int updated = 0;

            using (doc.LockDocument())
            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                foreach (var id in targets)
                {
                    var br = tr.GetObject(id, OpenMode.ForRead) as BlockReference;
                    if (br == null || br.IsErased) continue;

                    // Update component XData
                    var map = XDataHelpers.Read(id, CompApp);
                    map["OwnerRunHandle"] = runId.Handle.ToString();
                    if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(size)) map["Size"] = size;
                    if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(fluid)) map["FluidCode"] = fluid;
                    if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(pmc)) map["PipingMaterialClass"] = pmc;
                    XDataHelpers.Write(id, CompApp, map);

                    // Push to attribute or dynamic prop named "SIZE"
                    br.UpgradeOpen();
                    bool touched = TrySetAttribute(br, tr, "SIZE", size) | TrySetDynProp(br, "SIZE", size);
                    if (touched) br.RecordGraphicsModified(true);

                    updated++;
                }
                tr.Commit();
            }

            return updated;
        }

        // ---- finders ----

        private static List<ObjectId> FindAssociatedBlocks(Database db, ObjectId runId)
        {
            var list = new List<ObjectId>();
            string handle = runId.Handle.ToString();

            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartOpenCloseTransaction())
            {
                var bt = (BlockTable)tr.GetObject(db.BlockTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                var ms = (BlockTableRecord)tr.GetObject(bt[BlockTableRecord.ModelSpace], OpenMode.ForRead);

                foreach (ObjectId id in ms)
                {
                    var br = tr.GetObject(id, OpenMode.ForRead) as BlockReference;
                    if (br == null) continue;

                    var map = XDataHelpers.Read(id, CompApp);
                    if (string.Equals(map.Get("OwnerRunHandle"), handle, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                        list.Add(id);
                }
            }
            return list;
        }

        private static List<ObjectId> FindBlocksNearRun(Database db, ObjectId runId, double tol)
        {
            var list = new List<ObjectId>();

            // Get curve geometry of the run
            Curve runCurve = null;
            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartOpenCloseTransaction())
            {
                runCurve = tr.GetObject(runId, OpenMode.ForRead) as Curve;
                if (runCurve == null) return list;

                var bt = (BlockTable)tr.GetObject(db.BlockTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                var ms = (BlockTableRecord)tr.GetObject(bt[BlockTableRecord.ModelSpace], OpenMode.ForRead);

                foreach (ObjectId id in ms)
                {
                    var br = tr.GetObject(id, OpenMode.ForRead) as BlockReference;
                    if (br == null) continue;

                    // quick reject: only consider blocks that look like components
                    var hasCompX = XDataHelpers.HasAppName(id, CompApp);
                    if (!hasCompX) continue;

                    var pt = br.Position;
                    try
                    {
                        var param = runCurve.GetParameterAtPoint(runCurve.GetClosestPointTo(pt, extend: false));
                        var onCurve = runCurve.GetPointAtParameter(param);
                        if (pt.DistanceTo(onCurve) <= tol)
                            list.Add(id);
                    }
                    catch { /* ignore geometry edge-cases */ }
                }
            }
            return list;
        }

        // ---- writers to block content ----

        private static bool TrySetAttribute(BlockReference br, Transaction tr, string tag, string value)
        {
            if (br == null || tr == null || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(tag)) return false;

            var ac = br.AttributeCollection;
            if (ac == null || ac.Count == 0) return false;

            bool changed = false;

            foreach (ObjectId arId in ac)
            {
                var ar = tr.GetObject(arId, OpenMode.ForWrite, openErased: false) as AttributeReference;
                if (ar == null || ar.IsErased) continue;

                if (string.Equals(ar.Tag, tag, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                {
                    ar.TextString = value ?? string.Empty;
                    changed = true;
                    // break; // uncomment if you only ever want to update the first match
                }
            }

            return changed;
        }

private static bool TrySetDynProp(BlockReference br, string propName, string value)
        {
            try
            {
                var props = br.DynamicBlockReferencePropertyCollection;
                if (props == null) return false;

                foreach (DynamicBlockReferenceProperty p in props)
                {
                    if (string.Equals(p.PropertyName, propName, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) &&
                        !p.ReadOnly)
                    {
                        // attempt numeric first, else set string
                        double d; object toSet = (double.TryParse(value, out d)) ? (object)d : (object)(value ?? "");
                        p.Value = toSet;
                        return true;
                    }
                }
            }
            catch { }
            return false;
        }
    }
}

## Response:
10/22/2025, 1:33:26 PM

Got it—thanks for the full dump. Your XData write path *should* work, so when it doesn’t, it’s almost always one of these three things:

1) the **Apply** never fires (palette → router wiring),  
2) the **router skips your provider** (type check too strict), or  
3) you’re **selecting something unwritable** (xref, paper-space viewport selection, etc.).

Below are the quickest fixes + two tiny diagnostic commands you can drop in to prove each stage.

---

# 1) Make sure Apply is actually called
Your `PropertiesControl` raises `ApplyRequested`, but the host must call the router with the current selection context.

**In your palette host** (e.g., `CbiPropertiesPalette`), make sure you have something like:

```csharp
// When palette is constructed:
_propertiesControl.ApplyRequested += (s, e) =>
{
    // Pull the model currently shown in the grid
    var model = _propertiesControl.SelectedModel;

    // Build a fresh selection context
    var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
    var id = SelectionManager.TryGetCurrentObjectId(); // <- whatever you already use
    var ctx = (id.IsNull || doc == null) ? null : new SelectionContext(id, doc);

    PropertyRouter.ApplyIfPossible(model, ctx);
};
```

If this hook is missing, nothing is ever written.

---

# 2) Relax the router’s type check (avoid false negatives)
Right now:

```csharp
if (current != null && current.GetType() == model.GetType())
{
    p.Apply(model, ctx);
    ...
}
```

If `model` ever becomes a wrapped/derived type, this **equality** check will fail and your provider is silently skipped.

**Swap it to an assignable check** (either direction is fine—this one is least surprising):

```csharp
if (current != null && model != null && current.GetType().IsAssignableFrom(model.GetType()))
{
    p.Apply(model, ctx);
    CbiPropertiesPalette.RequestRefreshSoon();
    return;
}
```

This single line is the #1 cause I see when “saving doesn’t stick”.

---

# 3) Quick sanity: are you writing to an XREF?
If the user is picking geometry inside an attached XREF, your provider won’t claim it (it’s a BlockReference, not a Polyline) and the router will fall back to “Home”. Result: no write.

Try once on a **simple model-space polyline in the active DWG** to rule this out.

---

# 4) Two tiny debug commands (copy/paste)
Drop these anywhere in your plugin to prove the pipeline.

**A) Force-write test XData on any picked entity**

```csharp
[Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime.CommandMethod("CBI_TEST_STAMP")]
public static void CbiTestStamp()
{
    var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
    if (doc == null) return;
    var ed = doc.Editor;

    var per = ed.GetEntity(new Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput.PromptEntityOptions("\nSelect entity: "));
    if (per.Status != Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput.PromptStatus.OK) return;

    var map = new AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub.XDataMap { ["TestKey"] = "TestValue" };
    AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub.XDataHelpers.Write(per.ObjectId, "CBI_PIPE_RUN", map);

    ed.WriteMessage("\n[CBI] Wrote XData: app=CBI_PIPE_RUN, TestKey=TestValue");
}
```

**B) Dump XData back to the command line**

```csharp
[Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime.CommandMethod("CBI_DUMP_XDATA")]
public static void CbiDumpXdata()
{
    var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
    if (doc == null) return;
    var ed = doc.Editor;

    var per = ed.GetEntity(new Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput.PromptEntityOptions("\nSelect entity: "));
    if (per.Status != Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput.PromptStatus.OK) return;

    var map = AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub.XDataHelpers.Read(per.ObjectId, "CBI_PIPE_RUN");
    if (map.Count == 0) { ed.WriteMessage("\n[CBI] No XData for CBI_PIPE_RUN."); return; }

    foreach (var kv in map)
        ed.WriteMessage($"\n[CBI] {kv.Key} = {kv.Value}");
}
```

- If **TEST_STAMP** + **DUMP_XDATA** work, your **XDataHelpers** are fine, and the issue is *Apply not being called* or the *router type check*.  
- If **TEST_STAMP** fails, we’ll look at `XDataHelpers.Write` (doc-lock, regapp, force open). Your helper already handles: doc-lock, RegApp creation in same TX, and `forceOpenOnLockedLayer:true`, so it should pass on local model-space entities.

---

# 5) (Optional) Add one-line logging to prove each stage
Sprinkle these temporarily:

- In `PropertyRouter.ApplyIfPossible(...)`, right before calling `p.Apply(...)`:
  ```csharp
  Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument.Editor
      ?.WriteMessage($"\n[CBI] Applying via {p.GetType().Name}");
  ```

- In `PipeRunPropertyProvider.Apply(...)`, after `XDataHelpers.Write(...)`:
  ```csharp
  Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument.Editor
      ?.WriteMessage("\n[CBI] XData written to entity.");
  ```

If you don’t see those messages, it’s wiring or type-check.

---

# 6) Minor but helpful: commit pending UI edits
Before you call `ApplyIfPossible`, make sure the grid commits in-place editors:

```csharp
_propertiesControl.CommitPendingEdits();
```

(You already have that method on the control—just call it inside your Apply button/auto-apply path.)

---

# 7) Known-good prerequisites you already meet
- RegApp ensured in the same transaction ✅  
- Force-open on locked layer ✅  
- Document lock when possible ✅

---

## TL;DR fix order
1) **Relax the router type check** (== → IsAssignableFrom).  
2) **Verify host subscribes** palette’s `ApplyRequested` → router with a live `SelectionContext`.  
3) Run **CBI_TEST_STAMP** + **CBI_DUMP_XDATA** once on a simple polyline in the current DWG.  
4) If still stuck, tell me what you see in the command line logs and whether TEST_STAMP/DUMP_XDATA succeed—I’ll zero in from there.

## Prompt:
10/22/2025, 1:36:53 PM

![Image](https://chatgpt.com/backend-api/estuary/content?id=file_0000000005a461f68e032b39bcae6a08&ts=495743&p=fs&cid=1&sig=45a6434935a33b4c172127f46271d06fd77685165f0ba28538b670d41500deda&v=0)

Item 1, see image for current code.

## Response:
10/22/2025, 1:36:59 PM

> **Analyzing code behavior**
>
> Their code shows the use of `ed.SelectImplied()` to build the selection context, and it seems like it's working fine. The potential issue could be with implied selection not being set properly when a polyline is selected and Apply is clicked. Also, if the palette is clicked, could it clear the selection context in a similar way to AutoCAD's behavior?
>
> **Addressing potential issues**
>
> The main issue seems to be with writing XData, possibly because EnsureRegApp isn’t being called properly. I suggested using `SelectionManager.TryGetCurrentContext` or falling back to the last selected ID. It might also help to review how the context is stored and reused when the palette is populated. Additionally, debugging with `CBI_TEST_STAMP` and `CBI_DUMP_XDATA` could provide more insight.
>
> **Addressing specific issues**
>
> The code looks correct overall, but there are a few tweaks. We need to ensure that `PICKFIRST` implies selection always returns, and that when nothing’s selected, the context remains null. If that happens, `ApplyIfPossible` should save the settings instead of writing to the entity. Also, ensure that selection is present when editing entity properties, especially for auto-apply from grid changes. Regarding polyline issues, confirm that the provider's `CanProvideFor` function checks if the polyline is already stamped.
>
> Thought for 29s

Perfect—thanks for the screenshot. Your `ApplyRequested` hook is wired correctly and you’re already calling `CommitPendingEdits()`. Two small tweaks will make this rock-solid and will likely fix the “nothing writes” symptom:

---

## 1) Make sure we always have a live `SelectionContext`
`SelectImplied()` can be empty (e.g., PICKFIRST off, or AutoCAD dropped the set after you click the palette). When that happens you pass `ctx = null`, so the router treats the model as “tool settings” and never calls your provider.

Add a quick fallback prompt if nothing is implied:

```csharp
_ui.ApplyRequested += (s, e) =>
{
    try
    {
        _ui.CommitPendingEdits();

        SelectionContext ctx = null;
        var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
        var ed  = doc?.Editor;

        if (ed != null)
        {
            var pr = ed.SelectImplied();
            if (pr.Status == PromptStatus.OK && pr.Value != null && pr.Value.Count > 0)
                ctx = new SelectionContext(pr.Value[pr.Value.Count - 1].ObjectId, doc);

            // Fallback: ask for an entity if none implied
            if (ctx == null)
            {
                var peo = new Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput.PromptEntityOptions("\nSelect entity to apply:");
                var per = ed.GetEntity(peo);
                if (per.Status == Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput.PromptStatus.OK)
                    ctx = new SelectionContext(per.ObjectId, doc);
            }
        }

        PropertyRouter.ApplyIfPossible(_ui.SelectedModel, ctx);
    }
    catch (System.Exception ex)
    {
        Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.ShowAlertDialog(
            "Error applying edits:\n" + ex.Message);
    }
};
```

Now even if pickfirst is empty, you still get a `ctx` and your provider can write XData.

---

## 2) Relax the router’s type check (prevents silent skips)
If your palette model and provider model types aren’t exactly the same (e.g., same shape via partials/derivation), the strict equality will skip the provider. Change:

```csharp
// BEFORE
if (current != null && current.GetType() == model.GetType())
```

to:

```csharp
// AFTER
if (current != null && model != null && current.GetType().IsAssignableFrom(model.GetType()))
```

This single line is the most common reason “Apply did nothing”.

---

## 3) (Optional) Tiny log to prove the path
Drop this line right before calling `p.Apply(model, ctx)` in `PropertyRouter.ApplyIfPossible`:

```csharp
Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument?.Editor?
    .WriteMessage($"\n[CBI] Applying via {p.GetType().Name}");
```

If you see the message, your provider is being called; if you don’t, it’s selection/ctx.

---

If you add (1) and (2), you should be able to select a polyline, edit fields in the palette, click Apply (or rely on auto-apply) and then run `LIST`/`DXFOUT`/your `CBI_DUMP_XDATA` helper to see `CBI_PIPE_RUN` XData present. If it still doesn’t write after these changes, tell me exactly what the command line prints—we’ll zero in fast.
