        //    else
        //    {
        //        splitContainer1.SplitterDistance = originalPanelWidth;
        //        animationTimer.Stop();
        //        isCollapsed = false;
        //        btnShow.Text = "<--{"; // Indicate collapse
        //    }
        //}

private void BtnShow_Click(object sender, EventArgs e) 
        {
            if (!isCollapsed && originalPanelWidth == 0) originalPanelWidth = splitContainer1.SplitterDistance;
            {
                // Store the original width only once before the first collapse
                if (!isCollapsed && originalPanelWidth == 0)
                    originalPanelWidth = splitContainer1.SplitterDistance;

                isCollapsed = !isCollapsed;
                BeginFadeTransition(
                    isCollapsed ? grpCurrentDrawingOptions : grpBatchDrawingOptions,
                    isCollapsed ? grpBatchDrawingOptions : grpCurrentDrawingOptions
                    );

                animationTimer.Start(); // Let the timer handle toggling isCollapsed
            }
        }

        private void BeginFadeTransition(System.Windows.Forms.Control from, System.Windows.Forms.Control to)
        { 
            fadingOutGroup = from;
            fadingInGroup = to;
            fadingInGroup.Visible = true;
            currentAlpha = 1f;
            fadingOutCurrent = true;
        }

        private void SetGroupOpacity(System.Windows.Forms.Control control, float opacity)
        {

            int alpha = (int)(255 * opacity);
            alpha = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(255, alpha)); // Clamp to valid range

            foreach (System.Windows.Forms.Control child in control.Controls)
            {
                child.ForeColor = System.Drawing.Color.FromArgb(alpha, child.ForeColor);
                if (child is GroupBox || child is Panel)
                {
                    SetGroupOpacity(child, opacity); // Recursive for nested controls
                }
            }

            control.Refresh();

            //// Clamp opacity to 0–1 range
            //opacity = Math.Max(0, Math.Min(1, opacity));

            //int alpha = (int)(255 * opacity);

            //control.ForeColor = Color.FromArgb(alpha, control.ForeColor.R, control.ForeColor.G, control.ForeColor.B);

            //foreach (System.Windows.Forms.Control child in control.Controls)
            //{
            //    child.ForeColor = Color.FromArgb(alpha, child.ForeColor.R, child.ForeColor.G, child.ForeColor.B);
            //}

            ////control.ForeColor = Color.FromArgb((int)(255 * opacity), control.ForeColor);
            ////foreach (System.Windows.Forms.Control child in control.Controls)
            ////{
            ////    child.ForeColor = Color.FromArgb((int)(255 * opacity), child.ForeColor);
            ////}

            //////foreach (System.Windows.Forms.Control c in ctrl.Controls)
            //////{
            //////    if (c is Label || c is Button || c is ComboBox || c is TextBox || c is CheckBox)
            //////    {
            //////        Color baseColor = Color.Black; // default fallback if (c.ForeColor != Color.Empty) baseColor = Color.FromArgb(255, c.ForeColor.R, c.ForeColor.G, c.ForeColor.B);

            //////        c.ForeColor = Color.FromArgb((int)(alpha * 255), baseColor);
            //////    }
            //////}
        }

        private void selectSheetSetToolStripMenuItem_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            using (var openDialog = new System.Windows.Forms.OpenFileDialog())
            {
                openDialog.Filter = "Sheet Set Files (*.dst)|*.dst";
                openDialog.Title = "Select a Sheet Set File";

                if (openDialog.ShowDialog() == DialogResult.OK)
                {
                    LoadSheetSet(openDialog.FileName);
                }
            }
        }

        private void IndividualFileToolStripMenuItem_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            using (var openDialog = new System.Windows.Forms.OpenFileDialog())
            {
                openDialog.Filter = "AutoCAD Drawings (*.dwg)|*.dwg";
                openDialog.Multiselect = true;
                openDialog.Title = "Select Drawing Files";

                if (openDialog.ShowDialog() == DialogResult.OK)
                {
                    LoadIndividualDrawings(openDialog.FileNames);
                }
            }
        }

        private void LoadIndividualDrawings(string[] drawingPaths)
        {
            trvDrawings.Nodes.Clear();

            foreach (string path in drawingPaths)
            {
                TreeNode node = new TreeNode(System.IO.Path.GetFileName(path))
                {
                    Tag = path
                };
                trvDrawings.Nodes.Add(node);
            }

            trvDrawings.ExpandAll();
        }

        private void LoadSheetSet(string dstPath)
        {
            trvDrawings.Nodes.Clear(); // Clear old data

            try
            {
                // ✅ Get the AutoCAD Sheet Set Manager
                IAcSmSheetSetMgr sheetSetMgr = new AcSmSheetSetMgr();

                // ✅ Open the Sheet Set
                _currentDatabase = sheetSetMgr.OpenDatabase(dstPath, false); // Save the database reference

                if (_currentDatabase == null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("Failed to open the Sheet Set.");
                    return;
                }

                IAcSmSheetSet sheetSet = _currentDatabase.GetSheetSet();
                if (sheetSet == null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("Invalid Sheet Set File.");
                    return;
                }

                TreeNode sheetSetNode = new TreeNode(sheetSet.GetName());
                trvDrawings.Nodes.Add(sheetSetNode);

                IAcSmEnumComponent sheetEnum = sheetSet.GetSheetEnumerator() as IAcSmEnumComponent;
                if (sheetEnum == null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("Failed to get sheet enumerator.");
                    return;
                }

                IAcSmSheet sheet;
                while ((sheet = sheetEnum.Next() as IAcSmSheet) != null)
                {
                    TreeNode sheetNode = new TreeNode(sheet.GetName())
                    {
                        Tag = sheet // Store the actual sheet object, not just its name
                    };
                    sheetSetNode.Nodes.Add(sheetNode);
                }

                trvDrawings.ExpandAll();
            }
            catch (Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime.Exception acadEx)
            {
                MessageBox.Show($"AutoCAD Error: {acadEx.Message}");
            }
            catch (System.Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show($"General Error: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

private void trvDrawings_NodeMouseDoubleClick(object sender, TreeNodeMouseClickEventArgs e)
        {
            if (e.Node.Tag is IAcSmSheet sheet)
            {
                if (_currentDatabase == null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("Database reference lost. Please reload the sheet set.");
                    return;
                }

                try
                {
                    IAcSmObjectId2 layoutId = sheet.GetLayout() as IAcSmObjectId2;
                    if (layoutId == null)
                    {
                        MessageBox.Show("No layout associated with this sheet or sheet is not properly initialized.");
                        return;
                    }

                    //IAcSmPersist layoutPersist = layoutId.GetObject() as IAcSmPersist;
                    layoutId.GetObject(out IAcSmPersist layoutPersist);
                    if (layoutPersist is IAcSmAcDbLayoutReference layoutRef)
                    {
                        string filePath = layoutRef.GetFileName();

                        if (File.Exists(filePath))
                        {
                            MessageBox.Show($"File path: {filePath}");
                            Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.Open(filePath, true);
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            MessageBox.Show("Drawing file not found.");
                        }
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        MessageBox.Show("Layout reference is not valid.");
                    }
                }
                catch (System.Exception ex)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show($"Error accessing sheet layout: {ex.Message}");
                }
            }
        }

        private void btnApplyIndividual_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            try
            {
                ApplyChangesIndividually();
            }
            catch (System.Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show($"Error applying changes: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

private void btnApplyGlobal_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            //try
            //{
            //    // Logic for applying attribute changes globally or individually
            //    ApplyChangesGlobally(); // Or ApplyChangesIndividually(), based on user choice
            //}
            //catch (Exception ex)
            //{
            //    MessageBox.Show($"Error applying changes: {ex.Message}");
            //}

            try
            {
                if (trvDrawings.Nodes.Count == 0)
                {
                    // Apply to current drawing
                    ApplyChangesToDrawing(Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument);
                }
                else
                {
                    // Apply to checked drawings in the tree
                    var checkedNodes = GetCheckedDrawings();

                    if (!checkedNodes.Any())
                    {
                        MessageBox.Show("No drawings selected. Please check the drawings you want to update.");
                        return;
                    }

                    foreach (var sheet in checkedNodes)
                    {
                        string filePath = GetFilePathFromSheet(sheet);
                        if (File.Exists(filePath))
                        {
                            Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Document doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.Open(filePath, false);
                            ApplyChangesToDrawing(doc);
                            doc.CloseAndSave(filePath);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            catch (System.Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show($"Error applying changes: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }

        private string GetFilePathFromSheet(IAcSmSheet sheet)
        {
            //var layoutId = sheet.GetLayout() as IAcSmObjectId;
            //if (layoutId == null) return null;

            //var layoutPersist = layoutId as IAcSmAcDbLayoutReference;
            //if (layoutPersist is IAcSmAcDbLayoutReference layoutRef)
            //{
            //    return layoutPersist?.GetFileName();
            //}

            var layoutId = sheet.GetLayout() as IAcSmObjectId;
            if (layoutId == null)
                return null;

            var layoutPersist = layoutId as IAcSmAcDbLayoutReference;
            if (layoutPersist != null)
            {
                return layoutPersist.GetFileName();
            }

            return null; // <-- Ensure return value on all paths
        }

        private System.Collections.Generic.List<IAcSmSheet> GetCheckedDrawings()
        {
            var sheets = new System.Collections.Generic.List<IAcSmSheet>();

            foreach (TreeNode parentNode in trvDrawings.Nodes)
            {
                foreach (TreeNode child in parentNode.Nodes)
                {
                    if (child.Checked && child.Tag is IAcSmSheet sheet)
                        sheets.Add(sheet);
                }
            }

            return sheets;
        }

        private void ApplyChangesToDrawing(Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Document doc)
        {

            //this.Hide();

            //Document doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            Database db = doc.Database;
            Editor ed = doc.Editor;
            int blocksModified = 0;

double newScale = 1.0;
            if (chkScale.Checked && (!double.TryParse(txtScale.Text, out newScale) || newScale <= 0))
            {
                MessageBox.Show("Please enter a valid scale value.");
                return;
            }

            int newColor = -1;
            if (chkColor.Checked && (!int.TryParse(cmbColor.Text, out newColor) || newColor < 0 || newColor > 256))
            {
                MessageBox.Show("Please enter a valid color index (0-256).");
                return;
            }

            string newLayer = cmbLayers.SelectedItem?.ToString();
            string newLinetype = cmbLinetypes.SelectedItem?.ToString();

            while (true)
            {
                PromptEntityOptions peo = new PromptEntityOptions("\nSelect a block reference (ESC to stop):");
                peo.SetRejectMessage("\nOnly block references allowed.");
                peo.AddAllowedClass(typeof(BlockReference), true);
                PromptEntityResult per = ed.GetEntity(peo);

                if (per.Status == PromptStatus.Cancel) break;
                if (per.Status != PromptStatus.OK) continue;

                using (Transaction tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
                {
                    BlockReference blkRef = tr.GetObject(per.ObjectId, OpenMode.ForWrite) as BlockReference;
                    if (blkRef == null) continue;

                    //if (chkScale.Checked)
                    //    blkRef.ScaleFactors = new Scale3d(newScale); // Uniform scaling

                    //if (chkColor.Checked)
                    //    blkRef.ColorIndex = newColor; // Change color

                    //if (chkAttLayer.Checked && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(newLayer))
                    //    blkRef.Layer = newLayer; // Assign new layer

                    //if (chkLinetype.Checked && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(newLinetype))
                    //    blkRef.Linetype = newLinetype; // Assign new linetype

                    ApplyBlockChanges(blkRef, tr, db);
                    blocksModified++;

                    tr.Commit();
                    ed.Regen();
                }

                // Update StatusStrip with live count
                statusLabel.Text = $"Modified {blocksModified} block(s)...";
                System.Windows.Forms.Application.DoEvents(); // Allows UI to update
            }

            //MessageBox.Show("Block properties updated successfully.");
            statusLabel.Text = $"Completed! {blocksModified} block(s) modified.";

            //this.Show();

// Logic to apply the global changes to the document
            // This mirrors the functionality from the original TextStyleForm.cs logic

            // Example placeholder:
            //Editor ed = doc.Editor;
            ed.WriteMessage("Changes applied to: " + doc.Name);
        }

        private ObjectId GetTextStyleId(Database db, Transaction tr, string textStyleName)
        {
            TextStyleTable textStyleTable = tr.GetObject(db.TextStyleTableId, OpenMode.ForRead) as TextStyleTable;

            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(textStyleName) && textStyleTable.Has(textStyleName))
            {
                return textStyleTable[textStyleName];
            }

            return db.Textstyle; // Default text style
        }

        private void ProcessBlockReferences(BlockTableRecord space, ObjectId blockId, Transaction tr, Database db, string selectedTextStyle, double newHeight, double newWidthFactor)
        {
            foreach (ObjectId objId in space)
            {
                BlockReference blkRef = tr.GetObject(objId, OpenMode.ForWrite) as BlockReference;
                if (blkRef != null && blkRef.BlockTableRecord == blockId)
                {
                    foreach (ObjectId attId in blkRef.AttributeCollection)
                    {
                        AttributeReference attRef = tr.GetObject(attId, OpenMode.ForWrite) as AttributeReference;
                        if (attRef != null)
                        {
                            if (chkStyleName.Checked)
                                attRef.TextStyleId = GetTextStyleId(db, tr, selectedTextStyle);

                            if (chkTextHeight.Checked)
                                attRef.Height = newHeight;

                            if (chkTextWidth.Checked)
                                attRef.WidthFactor = newWidthFactor;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        private void ApplyBlockChanges(BlockReference blkRef, Transaction tr, Database db)
        {
            // Apply scale if selected
            if (chkScale.Checked && double.TryParse(txtScale.Text, out double newScale) && newScale > 0)
            {
                blkRef.ScaleFactors = new Scale3d(newScale);
            }

            // Apply color if selected
            if (chkColor.Checked && int.TryParse(cmbColor.Text, out int newColor) && newColor >= 0 && newColor <= 256)
            {
                blkRef.ColorIndex = newColor;
            }

            // Apply layer if selected
            if (chkLayer.Checked && cmbLayers.SelectedItem != null)
            {
                blkRef.Layer = cmbLayers.SelectedItem.ToString();
            }

            // Apply linetype if selected
            if (chkLinetype.Checked && cmbLinetypes.SelectedItem != null)
            {
                blkRef.Linetype = cmbLinetypes.SelectedItem.ToString();
            }

            // Modify block attributes if they exist
            foreach (ObjectId attId in blkRef.AttributeCollection)
            {
                AttributeReference attRef = tr.GetObject(attId, OpenMode.ForWrite) as AttributeReference;
                if (attRef != null)
                {
                    if (chkStyleName.Checked && cmbTextStyles.SelectedItem != null)
                        attRef.TextStyleId = GetTextStyleId(db, tr, cmbTextStyles.SelectedItem.ToString());

                    if (chkTextHeight.Checked && double.TryParse(txtHeight.Text, out double newHeight) && newHeight > 0)
                        attRef.Height = newHeight;

                    if (chkTextWidth.Checked && double.TryParse(txtWidthFactor.Text, out double newWidthFactor) && newWidthFactor > 0)
                        attRef.WidthFactor = newWidthFactor;

                    if (chkAttLayer.Checked && cmbAttLayer.SelectedItem != null)
                        attRef.Layer = cmbAttLayer.SelectedItem.ToString();
                }
            }
        }

        private void LoadTextStyles()
        {
            Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Document doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            Database db = doc.Database;
            List<string> textStyles = new List<string>();

            using (Transaction tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                TextStyleTable textStyleTable = tr.GetObject(db.TextStyleTableId, OpenMode.ForRead) as TextStyleTable;

                foreach (ObjectId textStyleId in textStyleTable)
                {
                    TextStyleTableRecord textStyleRecord = tr.GetObject(textStyleId, OpenMode.ForRead) as TextStyleTableRecord;
                    textStyles.Add(textStyleRecord.Name);
                }

                tr.Commit();
            }

            // Sort text styles alphabetically before adding them to the ComboBox
            textStyles.Sort();
            cmbTextStyles.Items.Clear();
            cmbTextStyles.Items.AddRange(textStyles.ToArray());

            if (cmbTextStyles.Items.Count > 0)
                cmbTextStyles.SelectedIndex = 0; // Default selection
        }

        // **************************************** Layers in a ComboBox ****************************************************************

        private void LoadLayers()
        {
            Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Document doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            Database db = doc.Database;
            List<string> layerNames = new List<string>();

            using (Transaction tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                LayerTable layerTable = tr.GetObject(db.LayerTableId, OpenMode.ForRead) as LayerTable;
                foreach (ObjectId layerId in layerTable)
                {
                    LayerTableRecord layerRecord = tr.GetObject(layerId, OpenMode.ForRead) as LayerTableRecord;
                    layerNames.Add(layerRecord.Name);
                }
                tr.Commit();
            }

            layerNames.Sort();
            cmbLayers.Items.Clear();
            cmbLayers.Items.AddRange(layerNames.ToArray());

            if (cmbLayers.Items.Count > 0)
                cmbLayers.SelectedIndex = 0;
        }

        // **************************************** Linetypes in a ComboBox ****************************************************************

        private void LoadLinetypes()
        {
            Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Document doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            Database db = doc.Database;
            List<string> linetypeNames = new List<string>();

            using (Transaction tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                LinetypeTable linetypeTable = tr.GetObject(db.LinetypeTableId, OpenMode.ForRead) as LinetypeTable;
                foreach (ObjectId linetypeId in linetypeTable)
                {
                    LinetypeTableRecord linetypeRecord = tr.GetObject(linetypeId, OpenMode.ForRead) as LinetypeTableRecord;
                    linetypeNames.Add(linetypeRecord.Name);
                }
                tr.Commit();
            }

            linetypeNames.Sort();
            cmbLinetypes.Items.Clear();
            cmbLinetypes.Items.AddRange(linetypeNames.ToArray());

            if (cmbLinetypes.Items.Count > 0)
                cmbLinetypes.SelectedIndex = 0;
        }

private void ApplyChangesIndividually()
        {
            Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Document doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            Database db = doc.Database;
            Editor ed = doc.Editor;

            int blocksModified = 0;

            // Focus back to drawing canvas before prompt
            Autodesk.AutoCAD.Internal.Utils.SetFocusToDwgView();

            while (true)
            {
                PromptEntityOptions peo = new PromptEntityOptions("\nSelect a block reference (ESC to stop):");
                peo.SetRejectMessage("\nOnly block references allowed.");
                peo.AddAllowedClass(typeof(BlockReference), true);
                PromptEntityResult per = ed.GetEntity(peo);

                if (per.Status == PromptStatus.Cancel) break;
                if (per.Status != PromptStatus.OK) continue;

                using (DocumentLock docLock = doc.LockDocument())
                using (Transaction tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
                {
                    BlockReference blkRef = tr.GetObject(per.ObjectId, OpenMode.ForWrite) as BlockReference;
                    if (blkRef == null) continue;

                    ApplyBlockChanges(blkRef, tr, db);
                    blocksModified++;

                    tr.Commit();
                    ed.Regen();
                }

                statusLabel.Text = $"Modified {blocksModified} block(s)...";
                //Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DoEvents(); // Refresh palette UI while looping
            }

                //Document doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
                //Database db = doc.Database;

                //    {
                //        BlockTableRecord btr = tr.GetObject(btrId, OpenMode.ForRead) as BlockTableRecord;

                //        if (btr == null || btr.IsLayout || btr.IsAnonymous)
                //            continue;

                //        btr.UpgradeOpen(); // Only now escalate access

                //        foreach (ObjectId entId in btr)
                //        {
                //            Entity ent = tr.GetObject(entId, OpenMode.ForRead) as Entity;
                //            if (ent is BlockReference blkRef)
                //            {
                //                blkRef.UpgradeOpen(); // Only escalate after confirming type
                //                ApplyBlockChanges(blkRef, tr, db);
                //                blocksModified++;
                //            }
                //        }
                //    }

                //    tr.Commit();
                //    ed.Regen();
                //}

                //statusLabel.Text = $"Completed! {blocksModified} block(s) modified.";

//if (trvDrawings.SelectedNode == null)
                //{
                //    MessageBox.Show("Please select a drawing or sheet to apply changes.");
                //    return;
                //}

                //var selectedNode = trvDrawings.SelectedNode;

                //if (selectedNode.Tag is IAcSmSheet selectedSheet)
                //{
                //    string filePath = selectedSheet.GetLayout().GetFileName();

                //    if (!File.Exists(filePath))
                //    {
                //        MessageBox.Show("Drawing file not found.");

                //    // Open the drawing for editing

                //    using (DocumentLock docLock = doc.LockDocument())

                //        using (Transaction tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())

                //            MessageBox.Show("Changes applied to individual drawing.");
                //            tr.Commit();
                //        }
                //    }

            }

        private void ApplyChangesGlobally()
        {
            foreach (TreeNode node in trvDrawings.Nodes)
            {
                if (node.Tag is IAcSmSheet sheet)
                {
                    string filePath = sheet.GetLayout().GetFileName();

                    if (!File.Exists(filePath))
                        continue;

                    Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Document doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.Open(filePath, false);

                    using (DocumentLock docLock = doc.LockDocument())
                    {
                        Database db = doc.Database;

                        using (Transaction tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
                        {
                            // Your logic to apply changes to blocks or attributes goes here
                            tr.Commit();
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            MessageBox.Show("Changes applied to all drawings in the sheet set.");
        }

    }

}

        protected override void OnShown(EventArgs e)
        {
            base.OnShown(e);
            BeginInvoke((Action)(ReloadData));  // this now locks internally
        }

        private void ReloadWithLock()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            using (doc.LockDocument())
            {
                TrySafe(ReloadData);
            }
        }

        private static void TrySafe(Action action)
        {
            try { action(); }
            catch (System.Exception ex)
            {
                System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox.Show(ex.ToString(), "Tag Manager");
            }
        }

        private void ReloadData()
        {
            _loading = true;
            try
            {
                // Controls created?
                if (cboScope == null || numNext == null || grid == null) return;

                var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
                if (doc == null) { MessageBox.Show("No active document."); return; }

                using (doc.LockDocument())
                {
                    var db = doc.Database;
                    if (db == null) return;

                    var scopes = new HashSet<string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

                    using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
                    {
                        // EnumerateSequences is safe even if the Xrecord doesn't exist (returns empty)
                        foreach (var (Scope, Next) in AutoCAD2020.Block_Operations.TagIndexUtil.EnumerateSequences(tr))
                            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Scope))
                                scopes.Add(Scope);
                        tr.Commit();
                    }

                    if (scopes.Count == 0) scopes.Add("GLOBAL");

                    var remembered = (cboScope.Text ?? "").Trim();
                    cboScope.BeginUpdate();
                    cboScope.Items.Clear();
                    foreach (var s in scopes.OrderBy(s => s, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                        cboScope.Items.Add(s);
                    cboScope.EndUpdate();

                    cboScope.Text = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(remembered) ? "GLOBAL" : remembered;

                    // Now load the grid
                    LoadGrid();       // this function should also lock & transact as you already do
                    RefreshNext();    // after scopes are set
                }
            }
            finally
            {
                _loading = false;
            }
        }

        private void RefreshNext()
        {
            if (cboScope == null || numNext == null) return;

            var scope = (cboScope.Text ?? "").Trim();
            if (scope.Length == 0) scope = "GLOBAL";

            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            using (doc.LockDocument())
            {
                var db = doc.Database;
                if (db == null) return;

                using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
                {
                    var next = AutoCAD2020.Block_Operations.TagIndexUtil.PeekNext(tr, scope);
                    if (next < (int)numNext.Minimum) next = (int)numNext.Minimum;
                    if (next > (int)numNext.Maximum) next = (int)numNext.Maximum;
                    numNext.Value = next;
                    tr.Commit();
                }
            }
        }

        private void SetNext()
        {
            var scope = GetScope();
            var next = (int)numNext.Value;
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            var db = doc.Database;

            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                TagIndexUtil.SetNext(tr, scope, next);
                tr.Commit();
            }
            MessageBox.Show($"Set next number for scope '{scope}' to {next}.", "Tag Manager");
        }

        private void AllocateToSelection()
        {
            // Use existing service to allocate on selected valves
            AutoCAD2020.Services.TagNumberingService.AutoNumberSelection(txtPrefix.Text.Trim(), (int)numPad.Value, GetScope());
            LoadGrid();
            RefreshNext();
        }

        private void ValidateIds()
        {
            AutoCAD2020.Services.TagValidationService.ValidateValveIds();
            LoadGrid();
        }

        private string GetScope()
        {
            var s = (cboScope.Text ?? "").Trim();
            return s.Length == 0 ? "GLOBAL" : s;
        }

        private void LoadGrid()
        {
            var rows = new List<Row>();
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            var db = doc.Database;

            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                // Build quick lookup: handle -> relation text
                var relMap = new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

                var bt = (BlockTable)tr.GetObject(db.BlockTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                foreach (ObjectId btrId in bt)
                {
                    var btr = (BlockTableRecord)tr.GetObject(btrId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                    if (!btr.IsLayout) continue;

                    foreach (ObjectId id in btr)
                    {
                        if (!id.ObjectClass.DxfName.Equals("INSERT", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) continue;
                        var br = tr.GetObject(id, OpenMode.ForRead) as BlockReference;
                        if (br == null) continue;

                        // if block is a valve (has VALVE_ID), capture children
                        var valveId = ValveBubbleLinkUtil.GetAttribute(br, tr, ValveBubbleLinkUtil.ValveIdTag);
                        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(valveId))
                        {
                            var children = ValveBubbleLinkUtil.GetChildrenHandles(br, tr);
                            relMap[br.Handle.ToString()] = children.Count == 0
                                ? "Parent (no children)"
                                : "Parent → [" + string.Join(", ", children) + "]";
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            // maybe a bubble: show parent
                            var parentHex = GetRelKey(br, tr, "PARENT_HANDLE");
                            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(parentHex))
                                relMap[br.Handle.ToString()] = "Child of " + parentHex;
                        }
                    }
                }

                // Fill grid from index
                foreach (var (Id, HandleHex) in TagIndexUtil.EnumerateIndex(tr).OrderBy(t => t.Id, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                {
                    relMap.TryGetValue(HandleHex, out var rel);
                    rows.Add(new Row { Id = Id, Handle = HandleHex, Relation = rel ?? "" });
                }

                tr.Commit();
            }

            grid.DataSource = rows;
            grid.AutoResizeColumns();
        }

        private static void ZoomToHandle(string hex)
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            var db = doc.Database;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                if (!long.TryParse(hex, System.Globalization.NumberStyles.HexNumber, null, out var h)) return;
                var handle = new Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices.Handle(h);
                if (!db.TryGetObjectId(handle, out var id)) return;

                var ent = (Entity)tr.GetObject(id, OpenMode.ForRead);
                var ext = ent.GeometricExtents;
                tr.Commit();

                ed.ZoomToExtents(ext); // simple helper; if you don’t have an extension, implement window zoom
            }
        }

        private static string GetRelKey(BlockReference br, Transaction tr, string key)
        {
            // peek specific key from CBI_REL Xrecord
            try
            {
                var t = typeof(ValveBubbleLinkUtil);
                var mi = t.GetMethod("ReadKey", System.Reflection.BindingFlags.NonPublic | System.Reflection.BindingFlags.Static);
                return (string)mi.Invoke(null, new object[] { br, tr, key });
            }
            catch { return null; }
        }

        private class Row
        {
            public string Id { get; set; }
            public string Handle { get; set; }
            public string Relation { get; set; }
        }

        private void cboScope_SelectedIndexChanged(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_loading) return;
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            using (doc.LockDocument())
                RefreshNext();
        }

        private void btnAllocate_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            using (doc.LockDocument())
                TrySafe(AllocateToSelection);
        }

        private void btnRefresh_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            using (doc.LockDocument())
                ReloadData();
        }

        private void btnValidate_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            using (doc.LockDocument())
                TrySafe(ValidateIds);
        }

        private void grid_CellDoubleClick(object sender, DataGridViewCellEventArgs e)
        {
            if (e.RowIndex < 0) return;
            if (grid.Rows[e.RowIndex].DataBoundItem is Row row)
            {
                var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
                using (doc.LockDocument())
                    TrySafe(() => ZoomToHandle(row.Handle));
            }
        }

        private void btnSetNext_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (_loading) return;
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            using (doc.LockDocument())
            {
                var scope = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(cboScope.Text) ? "GLOBAL" : cboScope.Text.Trim();
                using (var tr = doc.Database.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
                {
                    AutoCAD2020.Block_Operations.TagIndexUtil.SetNext(tr, scope, (int)numNext.Value);
                    tr.Commit();
                }
            }
            MessageBox.Show($"Set next number for '{cboScope.Text}' to {numNext.Value}.");
        }
    }
}

// File: AutoCAD2020/PropertiesHub/TagNumbersDynamic.cs
// Purpose: Dynamic, expandable groups for PropertyGrid
// Target:  C# 7.3

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.ComponentModel;
using System.Linq;
using SysPair = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.ProjectStoreService.SystemNextPair;
using PSI = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.ProjectStoreService;

namespace AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Wraps a name→number map so each key appears as a read-only property in a PropertyGrid.
    /// </summary>
    [TypeConverter(typeof(ExpandableObjectConverter))]
    public sealed class DynamicNumberGroup : ICustomTypeDescriptor
    {
        private readonly Dictionary<string, long> _values;
        private readonly string _display; // used for ToString()

        public DynamicNumberGroup(Dictionary<string, long> values, string display)
        {
            _values = values ?? new Dictionary<string, long>();
            _display = display ?? string.Empty;
        }

        public override string ToString() => _display;

        #region ICustomTypeDescriptor
        AttributeCollection ICustomTypeDescriptor.GetAttributes() => AttributeCollection.Empty;
        string ICustomTypeDescriptor.GetClassName() => GetType().Name;
        string ICustomTypeDescriptor.GetComponentName() => null;
        TypeConverter ICustomTypeDescriptor.GetConverter() => new TypeConverter();
        EventDescriptor ICustomTypeDescriptor.GetDefaultEvent() => null;
        PropertyDescriptor ICustomTypeDescriptor.GetDefaultProperty() => null;
        object ICustomTypeDescriptor.GetEditor(Type editorBaseType) => null;
        EventDescriptorCollection ICustomTypeDescriptor.GetEvents(Attribute[] attributes) => EventDescriptorCollection.Empty;
        EventDescriptorCollection ICustomTypeDescriptor.GetEvents() => EventDescriptorCollection.Empty;

        PropertyDescriptorCollection ICustomTypeDescriptor.GetProperties(Attribute[] attributes)
            => ((ICustomTypeDescriptor)this).GetProperties();

        PropertyDescriptorCollection ICustomTypeDescriptor.GetProperties()
        {
            // one read-only PropertyDescriptor per system
            var props = _values.Keys
                .OrderBy(k => k, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                .Select(k => new NumberPropDescriptor(k, _values[k]))
                .ToArray();

            return new PropertyDescriptorCollection(props, readOnly: true);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Required by ICustomTypeDescriptor — return the object that owns the properties.
        /// </summary>
        object ICustomTypeDescriptor.GetPropertyOwner(PropertyDescriptor pd) => this;
        #endregion

        private sealed class NumberPropDescriptor : PropertyDescriptor
        {
            private readonly long _value;

            public NumberPropDescriptor(string name, long value)
                : base(name, null) => _value = value;

            public override Type ComponentType => typeof(DynamicNumberGroup);
            public override bool IsReadOnly => true;
            public override Type PropertyType => typeof(long);

            public override bool CanResetValue(object component) => false;
            public override object GetValue(object component) => _value;
            public override void ResetValue(object component) { }
            public override void SetValue(object component, object value) { }
            public override bool ShouldSerializeValue(object component) => false;
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Container shown under "Tag Numbers" category in LineTagSettings.
    /// Holds two expandable read-only groups: Line IDs and Tag IDs.
    /// </summary>
    public sealed class TagNumbersView
    {
        [DisplayName("Line ID's")]
        [Description("Next line numbers per system (read-only).")]
        [TypeConverter(typeof(ExpandableObjectConverter))]
        public DynamicNumberGroup LineIds { get; private set; }
            = new DynamicNumberGroup(null, "(none)");

        [DisplayName("Tag ID's")]
        [Description("Next tag numbers per system (read-only).")]
        [TypeConverter(typeof(ExpandableObjectConverter))]
        public DynamicNumberGroup TagIds { get; private set; }
            = new DynamicNumberGroup(null, "(none)");

        // === OLD FACTORY (optional, can stay commented) ===
        // public static TagNumbersView FromPairs(IEnumerable<SysPair> pairs) { ... }

        // === NEW FACTORY (the ONLY FromList inside the class) ===
        public static TagNumbersView FromList(IEnumerable<PSI.SystemNextInfo> systems)
        {
            var tag = (systems ?? Enumerable.Empty<PSI.SystemNextInfo>())
                .ToDictionary(
                    s => s.Name ?? s.SystemKey ?? string.Empty,
                    s => s.Next
                );

            var view = new TagNumbersView();
            view.LineIds = new DynamicNumberGroup(new Dictionary<string, long>(), "(none)");
            view.TagIds = new DynamicNumberGroup(tag, tag.Count == 0 ? "(none)" : $"{tag.Count} system(s)");
            return view;
        }
    }
}

The simpler approach is to use Editor.SelectionAdded and SelectionRemoved, ensuring the editor gets reattached when the document activates. I'll provide code that attaches, listens for events, and handles selection changes. I'll use the data to fill in selection details.

Awesome—this is exactly what I needed. You already have `TryLoadCurrentDrawingStore()` in `TagManagerControl`. We just need to (1) wire document/selection events to your control and (2) add a tiny public method so the control can react to selection.

Below are drop-in additions (no churn to your Commands or FormLauncher one-liners).

---

# 1) Add a wiring helper (new file)

**File:** `Services/TagManagerWiring.cs`

```csharp
// v1.0.0 (C# 7.3)
using System;
using System.Linq;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;

namespace AutoCAD2020.Services
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Attaches TagManagerControl to doc lifecycle + selection.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TagManagerWiring
    {
        private static AutoCAD2020.Forms.TagManager.TagManagerControl _ui;
        private static Document _doc;
        private static Editor _ed;

        public static void Attach(AutoCAD2020.Forms.TagManager.TagManagerControl ui)
        {
            Detach();
            _ui = ui;

            Application.DocumentManager.DocumentActivated += OnDocActivated;
            Application.DocumentManager.DocumentCreated   += OnDocActivated;
            Application.DocumentManager.DocumentToBeDestroyed += OnDocToBeDestroyed;

            HookEditor(Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument);
            // Initial load
            _ui.TryLoadCurrentDrawingStore();
        }

        public static void Detach()
        {
            UnhookEditor();

            Application.DocumentManager.DocumentActivated -= OnDocActivated;
            Application.DocumentManager.DocumentCreated   -= OnDocActivated;
            Application.DocumentManager.DocumentToBeDestroyed -= OnDocToBeDestroyed;

            _ui = null;
        }

        private static void OnDocActivated(object s, DocumentCollectionEventArgs e)
        {
            HookEditor(e.Document);
            _ui?.TryLoadCurrentDrawingStore();
        }

        private static void OnDocToBeDestroyed(object s, DocumentCollectionEventArgs e)
        {
            if (_doc == e.Document) UnhookEditor();
        }

        private static void HookEditor(Document doc)
        {
            if (doc == null) return;
            if (_doc == doc) return;

            UnhookEditor();
            _doc = doc;
            _ed  = _doc.Editor;

            if (_ed != null)
            {
                _ed.SelectionAdded   += Ed_SelectionChanged;
                _ed.SelectionRemoved += Ed_SelectionChanged;
            }
        }

        private static void UnhookEditor()
        {
            if (_ed != null)
            {
                _ed.SelectionAdded   -= Ed_SelectionChanged;
                _ed.SelectionRemoved -= Ed_SelectionChanged;
            }
            _ed  = null;
            _doc = null;
        }

        private static void Ed_SelectionChanged(object sender, SelectionAddedEventArgs e)
        {
            if (_ui == null || _ed == null) return;

            // Get current selection (robust across add/remove)
            var sel = _ed.SelectImplied();
            ObjectId[] ids = null;
            if (sel.Status == PromptStatus.OK && sel.Value != null)
                ids = sel.Value.GetObjectIds();

            _ui.ShowForSelection(ids);
        }
    }
}
```

---

# 2) Call the wiring from your palette host

In **`TagManagerPaletteHost.Open()`** (or wherever you create the control), call `TagManagerWiring.Attach(_ui)` right after you instantiate the control:

```csharp
// after: _ui = new TagManagerControl { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };
AutoCAD2020.Services.TagManagerWiring.Attach(_ui);
```

(Leave your `FormLauncher.ShowTagManager()` as the one-liner calling `TagManagerPaletteHost.Open()`.)

---

# 3) Add a public selection entry point to your control

In **`TagManagerControl`**, add this method + a tiny helper. It matches the selected block(s) to your tag store by reading the `VALVE_ID` attribute and selecting the matching row + showing details.

```csharp
// using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
// using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
// using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;

public void ShowForSelection(ObjectId[] ids)
{
    if (_store == null || ids == null || ids.Length == 0)
    {
        propDetails.SelectedObject = null;
        return;
    }

    var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
    if (doc == null) return;

    var db = doc.Database;
    using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
    {
        foreach (var id in ids)
        {
            var br = tr.GetObject(id, OpenMode.ForRead) as BlockReference;
            if (br == null) continue;

            // read the valve id tag (adjust tag name if yours differs)
            var tagId = ReadTagId(br, tr);
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(tagId)) continue;

            var rec = _store.Tags.FirstOrDefault(t => string.Equals(t.Id, tagId, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
            if (rec != null)
            {
                SelectRow(rec);
                propDetails.SelectedObject = rec;
                break;
            }
        }
        tr.Commit();
    }
}

private static string ReadTagId(BlockReference br, Transaction tr)
{
    foreach (ObjectId attId in br.AttributeCollection)
    {
        var ar = tr.GetObject(attId, OpenMode.ForRead) as AttributeReference;
        if (ar == null) continue;
        if (string.Equals(ar.Tag, "VALVE_ID", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            return (ar.TextString ?? string.Empty).Trim();
    }
    return null;
}

private void SelectRow(AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.ProjectTagStore.TagRecord rec)
{
    if (rec == null) return;

    // Find matching projected row in the grid
    var idx = _rows
        .Select((r, i) => new { r, i })
        .FirstOrDefault(x =>
            string.Equals(x.r.Id,          rec.Id,          StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) &&
            string.Equals(x.r.DrawingPath, rec.DrawingPath, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) &&
            x.r.Number == rec.Number)
        ?.i ?? -1;

    if (idx >= 0 && idx < dgvTags.Rows.Count)
    {
        dgvTags.ClearSelection();
        dgvTags.Rows[idx].Selected = true;
        dgvTags.CurrentCell = dgvTags.Rows[idx].Cells[0];
        dgvTags.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex = Math.Max(0, idx - 3);
    }
}
```

> If your attribute tag isn’t `VALVE_ID`, swap it to the correct tag (e.g., `VALVE_TAG`, `TAG_ID`, etc.).

---

## That’s it

- `FormLauncher.ShowTagManager()` stays a one-liner.
- `TagManagerPaletteHost.Open()` creates the palette, adds the control, then calls `TagManagerWiring.Attach(_ui)`.
- `TagManagerControl` already loads the project; now it also reacts to selection via `ShowForSelection`.

This restores the “auto-load project” and “click a valve → show its record” behaviors without touching your other modules. If the selection should also filter the left list to that system/status, we can add a quick optional filter toggle—but the core functionality above should bring the brains back.

- ❌ You **don’t** have the *selection change → show details* wiring. That’s the missing half that makes clicking a valve update the right-hand details.

If you don’t want a new helper file, you can wire it inline where you create the control:

```csharp

if (ed != null)
{

{

{
```

Totally get it. You’ve got a lot of history across threads, and little divergences add up. Let’s lock this down with a **tight, repeatable patch** that restores the working behavior without spawning new duplicates.

Here’s exactly what to add/edit—file by file.

# 1) TagManagerControl.cs — expose a single “show by selection” entry
Add this **public** method to the class (near your other public methods):

```csharp
// v1.0.0 — selection → details bridge
using AcDb = Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using AcApp = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application;

public void ShowForSelection(AcDb.ObjectId[] ids)
{
    if (_store == null || ids == null || ids.Length == 0)
    {
        propDetails.SelectedObject = null;
        return;
    }

    var doc = AcApp.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
    if (doc == null) return;

    using (var tr = doc.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
    {
        foreach (var id in ids)
        {
            var br = tr.GetObject(id, AcDb.OpenMode.ForRead) as AcDb.BlockReference;
            if (br == null) continue;

            // Find a tag record by the same DWG + handle (your store fields)
            var h = br.Handle.ToString();
            var path = doc.Name;

            var rec = _store.Tags.FirstOrDefault(t =>
                string.Equals(t.DrawingPath, path, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) &&
                string.Equals(t.HandleHex, h, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));

            if (rec != null)
            {
                // Focus the row in the grid
                var row = _rows.FirstOrDefault(r => r.Id == rec.Id && r.DrawingPath == rec.DrawingPath && r.Number == rec.Number);
                if (row != null)
                {
                    var idx = _rows.IndexOf(row);
                    if (idx >= 0)
                    {
                        dgvTags.ClearSelection();
                        dgvTags.Rows[idx].Selected = true;
                        dgvTags.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex = Math.Max(0, idx - 3);
                    }
                }

                propDetails.SelectedObject = rec;
                btnRelease.Enabled = rec.Status == "MissingInDWG";
                tr.Commit();
                return;
            }
        }
        tr.Commit();
    }

    // fallback if nothing matched
    propDetails.SelectedObject = null;
    btnRelease.Enabled = false;
}
```

> If your `ProjectTagStore.TagRecord` doesn’t have `HandleHex`, swap that lookup for whatever you stored (e.g., attribute `VALVE_ID`, etc.). The rest can stay.

# 2) TagManagerPaletteHost.cs — centralize palette and wire events
Keep your static `Open()` and add selection/document wiring right there so we don’t duplicate logic elsewhere.

```csharp
// v1.0.0 — single palette host with wiring
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Windows;
using System.Windows.Forms;

namespace AutoCAD2020.Forms.TagManager
{
    public partial class TagManagerPaletteHost : UserControl
    {
        private static PaletteSet _ps;
        private static TagManagerControl _ui;
        private static bool _eventsHooked;

        public static void Open()
        {
            if (_ps == null)
            {
                _ui = new TagManagerControl { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };

                _ps = new PaletteSet("CBI Tag Manager")
                {
                    Style = PaletteSetStyles.Snappable |
                            PaletteSetStyles.ShowAutoHideButton |
                            PaletteSetStyles.ShowCloseButton,
                    DockEnabled = DockSides.Left | DockSides.Right
                };
                _ps.Add("Home", _ui);

                // Restore persisted palette state if you have it
                AutoCAD2020.Utilities.PaletteStateManager.LoadState(_ps, "CBI Tag Manager");
                AutoCAD2020.Utilities.PaletteStateManager.AttachAutoSave(_ps, "CBI Tag Manager");
            }

            _ps.Visible = true;
            _ps.Activate(0);

            // Ensure project store for current drawing is loaded
            _ui.TryLoadCurrentDrawingStore();

            // Hook selection + doc-activated once
            if (!_eventsHooked)
            {
                var dm = Application.DocumentManager;
                dm.DocumentActivated += (s, e) =>
                {
                    _ui?.TryLoadCurrentDrawingStore();
                };

                TryHookEditor(dm.MdiActiveDocument);
                dm.DocumentCreated += (s, e) => TryHookEditor(e.Document);
                _eventsHooked = true;
            }
        }

        private static void TryHookEditor(Document doc)
        {
            var ed = doc?.Editor;
            if (ed == null) return;

            // Remove then add to avoid double-subscription if editor changes
            ed.SelectionAdded -= OnSelectionMutated;
            ed.SelectionRemoved -= OnSelectionMutated;
            ed.SelectionAdded += OnSelectionMutated;
            ed.SelectionRemoved += OnSelectionMutated;
        }

        private static void OnSelectionMutated(object sender, SelectionAddedEventArgs e)
        {
            var ed = (sender as Editor);
            var res = ed?.SelectImplied();
            var ids = (res != null && res.Status == PromptStatus.OK) ? res.Value.GetObjectIds() : null;
            _ui?.ShowForSelection(ids);
        }
    }
}
```

# 3) Commands & FormLauncher (you already have this)
You’re good here:

```csharp
// Commands.cs
[CommandMethod("CBI_TagManager")]
public static void CBI_TagManager()
    => AutoCAD2020.Services.FormLauncher.ShowTagManager();

// Services/FormLauncher.cs
namespace AutoCAD2020.Services
{
    public static class FormLauncher
    {
        public static void ShowTagManager()
            => AutoCAD2020.Forms.TagManager.TagManagerPaletteHost.Open();
    }
}
```

# 4) Project store auto-load (you already have this)
Your `TryLoadCurrentDrawingStore()` is fine—this is what populates the header/filters from the DWG’s Project_Store path.

---

## Why this cures the “UI shows but nothing reacts”
- The palette opens and loads the store ✔️
- When you **click a valve**, we now **listen to editor selection** and call `ShowForSelection()` ✔️
- `ShowForSelection()` locates the backing record and **selects the row + fills PropertyGrid** ✔️

---

## Quick duplicate check (optional)
Search your solution for old wiring to avoid double-subscription:

- `SelectionAdded +=`
- `DocumentActivated +=`
- `TryLoadCurrentDrawingStore(`
- any older `Open()` or palette hosts

If you find previous versions still attached, delete or comment them out so the **only** selection → details bridge is the one above.

---

If you paste these exact bits in, you’ll get the “click valve → details populate” behavior back, plus the project header auto-load—without spreading code into Commands or new services.
