// NOD_X_Data/ProjectTagStore.cs
// C# 7.3 compatible

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore
{
    /// <summary>
    /// JSON-backed project store: Systems (ranges), Released pool, Tags (allocations),
    /// History, and Project metadata. Authoritative schema v0.4.
    /// </summary>
    public class ProjectTagStore
    {
        public const string CurrentVersion = "0.4";

        // -------- Root --------
        public string Version { get; set; } = CurrentVersion;
        public ConfigBlock Config { get; set; } = new ConfigBlock();
        public ProjectMetadata Project { get; set; } = new ProjectMetadata();

        // system key -> range config
        public Dictionary<string, SystemConfig> Systems { get; set; }
            = new Dictionary<string, SystemConfig>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        // system key -> released numbers (available for reuse; lowest-first)
        public Dictionary<string, SortedSet<int>> Released { get; set; }
            = new Dictionary<string, SortedSet<int>>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

        // all tag assignments
        public List<TagRecord> Tags { get; set; } = new List<TagRecord>();

        // append-only audit log
        public List<HistoryEvent> History { get; set; } = new List<HistoryEvent>();

        // -------- Blocks --------
        public class ConfigBlock
        {
            public int GraceDays { get; set; } = 7;
            public bool PreferReleasedLowestFirst { get; set; } = true;
        }

        public class ProjectMetadata
        {
            public string Name { get; set; }
            public DateTime CreatedUtc { get; set; }
            public string Engineer { get; set; }
            public string Notes { get; set; }
            public List<ProjectDrawingInfo> Drawings { get; set; } = new List<ProjectDrawingInfo>();
        }

        public class ProjectDrawingInfo
        {
            public string Path { get; set; }
            public string Name { get; set; }
            public DateTime? LastSeenUtc { get; set; }
            public string DbGuid { get; set; } // optional
        }

        public class SystemConfig
        {
            public string System { get; set; }
            public string Prefix { get; set; } = "V"; // e.g. "V"
            public int Pad { get; set; } = 4;         // digits for numeric part
            public int Start { get; set; }
            public int End { get; set; }
            public int Next { get; set; }             // next candidate in range
        }

        public class TagRecord
        {
            // identity
            public string Id { get; set; }            // e.g. "V-2001"
            public string System { get; set; }
            public int Number { get; set; }
            public string Prefix { get; set; }
            public int Pad { get; set; }

            // context
            public string DrawingPath { get; set; }
            public string DrawingName { get; set; }
            public string Layout { get; set; } = "Model";

            // links (parent valve / child bubble)
            public string ParentHandle { get; set; }
            public string ChildHandle { get; set; }
            public string ChildBlock { get; set; }
            public string ChildVisState { get; set; }

            // lifecycle
            public string Status { get; set; } = "Active"; // Active | MissingInDWG | Released | Reserved | Superseded
            public DateTime? LastSeenUtc { get; set; }
            public DateTime? MissingSinceUtc { get; set; }
            public DateTime? ReleasedUtc { get; set; }
            public string ReleasedBy { get; set; }

            // edit hints
            public EditedHints Edited { get; set; } = new EditedHints();

            // provenance
            public DateTime? WhenUtc { get; set; }
            public string By { get; set; }

            public string DrawingFingerprint { get; set; }  // unique to each DWG
            public string CBIValveKey { get; set; }          // <FingerprintGuid>:<Handle>
        }

        public class EditedHints
        {
            public bool NumberTextEdited { get; set; }
            public bool FuncTextEdited { get; set; }
            public string Note { get; set; }
        }

        public class HistoryEvent
        {
            public DateTime WhenUtc { get; set; }
            public string Who { get; set; }
            public string Action { get; set; } // ALLOCATE | REUSE | RELEASE | MISSING | SEEN | REATTACH | JUMP_NEXT | RESERVE
            public string System { get; set; }
            public int Number { get; set; }
            public string Id { get; set; }
            public string DrawingPath { get; set; }
            public string Handle { get; set; }
            public string Notes { get; set; }
        }

        // -------- Load / Save --------
        public static ProjectTagStore LoadOrCreate(string path)
        {
            ProjectTagStore store;

            if (File.Exists(path))
            {
                var json = File.ReadAllText(path);
                store = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<ProjectTagStore>(json) ?? new ProjectTagStore();
            }
            else
            {
                store = new ProjectTagStore();
            }

            // upgrade / hydrate defaults
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(store.Version)) store.Version = CurrentVersion;
            if (store.Config == null) store.Config = new ConfigBlock();

            if (store.Project == null) store.Project = new ProjectMetadata();
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(store.Project.Name))
                store.Project.Name = Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(path);
            if (store.Project.CreatedUtc == default(DateTime))
                store.Project.CreatedUtc = DateTime.UtcNow;
            if (store.Project.Drawings == null) store.Project.Drawings = new List<ProjectDrawingInfo>();

            if (store.Systems == null)
                store.Systems = new Dictionary<string, SystemConfig>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
            if (store.Tags == null) store.Tags = new List<TagRecord>();
            if (store.Released == null)
                store.Released = new Dictionary<string, SortedSet<int>>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
            if (store.History == null) store.History = new List<HistoryEvent>();

            return store;
        }

        public void Save(string path)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Version)) Version = CurrentVersion;
            if (Project == null) Project = new ProjectMetadata();
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(Project.Name))
                Project.Name = Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(path);
            if (Project.CreatedUtc == default(DateTime))
                Project.CreatedUtc = DateTime.UtcNow;

            var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(this, Formatting.Indented);
            File.WriteAllText(path, json);
        }

        // -------- Allocation / Reuse --------
        private SortedSet<int> GetReleasedSet(string system)
        {
            SortedSet<int> set;
            if (!Released.TryGetValue(system, out set))
            {
                set = new SortedSet<int>();
                Released[system] = set;
            }
            return set;
        }

        public static string FormatId(string prefix, int number, int pad)
        {
            var n = number.ToString().PadLeft(Math.Max(0, pad), '0');
            return string.IsNullOrEmpty(prefix) ? n : $"{prefix}-{n}";
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Allocate next number for a system. Reuse released numbers first (lowest).
        /// Appends a History event (ALLOCATE or REUSE). Returns the number (not the Id).
        /// </summary>
        public int AllocateNextInSystem(string system)
        {
            SystemConfig cfg;
            if (!Systems.TryGetValue(system, out cfg))
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"System '{system}' is not defined.");

            var pool = GetReleasedSet(system);
            if (Config.PreferReleasedLowestFirst && pool.Count > 0)
            {
                var n = pool.Min;
                pool.Remove(n);

                History.Add(new HistoryEvent
                {
                    WhenUtc = DateTime.UtcNow,
                    Who = Environment.UserName,
                    Action = "REUSE",
                    System = system,
                    Number = n,
                    Id = FormatId(cfg.Prefix, n, cfg.Pad)
                });
                return n;
            }

            if (cfg.Next <= 0) cfg.Next = Math.Max(cfg.Start, 1);
            if (cfg.Next < cfg.Start) cfg.Next = cfg.Start;
            if (cfg.Next > cfg.End)
                throw new InvalidOperationException(
                    $"System '{system}' is out of numbers (Next={cfg.Next}, Range={cfg.Start}..{cfg.End}).");

            var alloc = cfg.Next;
            cfg.Next = (alloc + 1 <= cfg.End) ? alloc + 1 : cfg.End + 1;
            Systems[system] = cfg;

            History.Add(new HistoryEvent
            {
                WhenUtc = DateTime.UtcNow,
                Who = Environment.UserName,
                Action = "ALLOCATE",
                System = system,
                Number = alloc,
                Id = FormatId(cfg.Prefix, alloc, cfg.Pad)
            });

            return alloc;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Release a specific number back to the pool. Idempotent. Leaves TagRecord for audit.
        /// </summary>
        public void ReleaseNumber(string system, int number, string note = null)
        {
            SystemConfig cfg;
            if (!Systems.TryGetValue(system, out cfg))
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"System '{system}' is not defined.");

            if (number < cfg.Start || number > cfg.End)
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Number {number} is outside {system} range {cfg.Start}..{cfg.End}.");

            var pool = GetReleasedSet(system);
            pool.Add(number);

            History.Add(new HistoryEvent
            {
                WhenUtc = DateTime.UtcNow,
                Who = Environment.UserName,
                Action = "RELEASE",
                System = system,
                Number = number,
                Id = FormatId(cfg.Prefix, number, cfg.Pad),
                Notes = note
            });
        }

        // -------- Convenience for reconcile/viewer --------
        public void MarkSeen(TagRecord rec)
        {
            if (rec == null) return;
            rec.Status = "Active";
            rec.LastSeenUtc = DateTime.UtcNow;

            History.Add(new HistoryEvent
            {
                WhenUtc = rec.LastSeenUtc.Value,
                Who = Environment.UserName,
                Action = "SEEN",
                System = rec.System,
                Number = rec.Number,
                Id = rec.Id,
                DrawingPath = rec.DrawingPath,
                Handle = rec.ChildHandle
            });
        }

        public void MarkMissing(TagRecord rec)
        {
            if (rec == null) return;
            var now = DateTime.UtcNow;
            rec.Status = "MissingInDWG";
            if (!rec.MissingSinceUtc.HasValue) rec.MissingSinceUtc = now;

            History.Add(new HistoryEvent
            {
                WhenUtc = now,
                Who = Environment.UserName,
                Action = "MISSING",
                System = rec.System,
                Number = rec.Number,
                Id = rec.Id,
                DrawingPath = rec.DrawingPath,
                Handle = rec.ChildHandle
            });
        }

        public TagRecord FindTag(string id, string drawingPath, int number)
        {
            return Tags.FirstOrDefault(t =>
                string.Equals(t.Id, id, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) &&
                string.Equals(t.DrawingPath, drawingPath, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) &&
                t.Number == number);
        }

        /// <summary>Globally unique identifier for this drawing (db.FingerprintGuid).</summary>
        public string DrawingFingerprint { get; set; }

        /// <summary>Stable unique cross-DWG identity for this valve (FingerprintGuid:Handle).</summary>
        public string CBIValveKey { get; set; }
    }
}

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.ComponentModel;
using System.Linq;
using WinForms = System.Windows.Forms;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using AutoCAD2020.CBI_Data_Explorer.Collectors;
using AutoCAD2020.CBI_Data_Explorer.Models;
using AcApp = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Geometry;
using DocumentFormat.OpenXml.Spreadsheet;

namespace AutoCAD2020.CBI_Data_Explorer.UI
{
    public partial class CBIDataExplorerControl : WinForms.UserControl
    {
        private bool _isFiltering;
        private readonly List<IPropertyCollector> _collectors;
        private BindingList<PropertyItem> _allItems = new BindingList<PropertyItem>();
        private readonly System.Collections.Generic.List<ObjectId> _highlighted = new System.Collections.Generic.List<ObjectId>();

public CBIDataExplorerControl()
        {
            InitializeComponent();

            _collectors = new List<IPropertyCollector>
            {
                new XDataCollector(),
                new XRecordCollector(),
                new NODCollector()
            };

            _grid.DataSource = _allItems;

            _tree.AfterSelect += (_, __) => RefreshGridFromFilters(); // keep your unified filter
            _tree.NodeMouseClick += Tree_NodeMouseClick;              // NEW

            _miZoomTo.Click += (_, __) => ActOnSelectedTreeNode(TreeAction.ZoomTo);
            _miSelectInDwgs.Click += (_, __) => ActOnSelectedTreeNode(TreeAction.SelectInDrawing);
            _miCopyHandle.Click += (_, __) => ActOnSelectedTreeNode(TreeAction.CopyHandle);

            HookEditorSelectionEvents();
        }

        private void HookEditorSelectionEvents()
        {
            var doc = AcApp.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            var ed = doc.Editor;
            ed.SelectionAdded += (_, __) => RefreshFromSelection();
            ed.SelectionRemoved += (_, __) => RefreshFromSelection();
        }

        private void RefreshFromSelection()
        {
            var doc = AcApp.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            var newItems = new List<PropertyItem>();

            using (doc.LockDocument())
            using (var tr = doc.Database.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var ed = doc.Editor;
                var psr = ed.SelectImplied();
                if (psr.Status == PromptStatus.OK && psr.Value != null)
                {
                    foreach (SelectedObject so in psr.Value)
                    {
                        if (so?.ObjectId.IsValid != true) continue;
                        var obj = tr.GetObject(so.ObjectId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                        foreach (var c in _collectors)
                            newItems.AddRange(c.CollectForObject(tr, obj));
                    }
                }
                tr.Commit();
            }

            UpdateItemsAndTree(newItems);
        }

        private void RefreshFromNod()
        {
            var doc = AcApp.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            var newItems = new List<PropertyItem>();
            using (doc.LockDocument())
            using (var tr = doc.Database.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                foreach (var c in _collectors)
                    newItems.AddRange(c.CollectForDrawing(tr, doc.Database));
                tr.Commit();
            }

            UpdateItemsAndTree(newItems);
        }

        private void UpdateItemsAndTree(List<PropertyItem> items)
        {
            _allItems = new BindingList<PropertyItem>(items);
            _grid.DataSource = _allItems;

            _tree.BeginUpdate();
            _tree.Nodes.Clear();

            var bySource = items.GroupBy(i => i.Source).OrderBy(g => g.Key);
            foreach (var src in bySource)
            {
                var srcNode = new WinForms.TreeNode(src.Key);
                var byKey = src.GroupBy(i => i.Key).OrderBy(g => g.Key);
                foreach (var key in byKey)
                {
                    var keyNode = new WinForms.TreeNode(key.Key);
                    var byScope = key.GroupBy(i => i.Scope).OrderBy(g => g.Key);
                    foreach (var scope in byScope)
                        keyNode.Nodes.Add(new WinForms.TreeNode(scope.Key));
                    srcNode.Nodes.Add(keyNode);
                }
                _tree.Nodes.Add(srcNode);
            }

            _tree.ExpandAll();
            _tree.EndUpdate();

            RefreshGridFromFilters();
        }

        private IEnumerable<PropertyItem> ApplyTreeOnly(IEnumerable<PropertyItem> source)
        {
            if (_tree.SelectedNode == null) return source;

            var path = _tree.SelectedNode.FullPath.Split('\\');
            var filtered = source;

            if (path.Length >= 1)
                filtered = filtered.Where(i => i.Source == path[0]);
            if (path.Length >= 2)
                filtered = filtered.Where(i => i.Key == path[1]);
            if (path.Length >= 3)
                filtered = filtered.Where(i => i.Scope == path[2]);

            return filtered;
        }

        private IEnumerable<PropertyItem> ApplyTextOnly(IEnumerable<PropertyItem> source)
        {
            var txt = _txtFilter.Text?.Trim();
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(txt)) return source;

            return source.Where(i =>
                (i.Source?.IndexOf(txt, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ?? -1) >= 0 ||
                (i.Scope?.IndexOf(txt, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ?? -1) >= 0 ||
                (i.Key?.IndexOf(txt, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ?? -1) >= 0 ||
                (i.Type?.IndexOf(txt, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ?? -1) >= 0 ||
                (i.DxfCode?.IndexOf(txt, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ?? -1) >= 0 ||
                (i.Value?.IndexOf(txt, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ?? -1) >= 0
            );
        }

        private void RefreshGridFromFilters()
        {
            if (_isFiltering) return;
            _isFiltering = true;
            try
            {
                // Start from all items
                IEnumerable<PropertyItem> data = _allItems;

                // 1) Apply tree selection
                data = ApplyTreeOnly(data);

                // 2) Apply text filter
                data = ApplyTextOnly(data);

                _grid.DataSource = new BindingList<PropertyItem>(data.ToList());
            }
            finally
            {
                _isFiltering = false;
            }
        }

        private void Tree_NodeMouseClick(object sender, WinForms.TreeNodeMouseClickEventArgs e)
        {
            _tree.SelectedNode = e.Node; // make right-click also select the node

            // We only act on SCOPE-level nodes (Source -> Key -> Scope)
            var depth = e.Node.FullPath.Split('\\').Length;
            var isScopeNode = depth >= 3;

            if (e.Button == WinForms.MouseButtons.Right && isScopeNode)
            {
                _treeMenu.Show(_tree, e.Location);
            }
            else if (e.Button == WinForms.MouseButtons.Left && isScopeNode)
            {
                // Left-click: just highlight
                if (TryResolveObjectIdFromScopeNode(e.Node, out var id))
                    HighlightOnly(id);
            }
        }

        private bool TryResolveObjectIdFromScopeNode(WinForms.TreeNode node, out ObjectId id)
        {
            id = ObjectId.Null;
            if (node == null) return false;

            var parts = node.Text.Split(' ');
            if (parts.Length == 0) return false;

            var hex = parts[0]; // HANDLE in hex
            try
            {
                var doc = AcApp.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
                var db = doc.Database;
                var h = new Handle(Convert.ToInt64(hex, 16));

                // TryGetObjectId is available; if not in your ref, use GetObjectId(false, h, 0)
                if (db.TryGetObjectId(h, out id)) return true;

                id = db.GetObjectId(false, h, 0); // fallback
                return id.IsValid;
            }
            catch { return false; }
        }

        private enum TreeAction { ZoomTo, SelectInDrawing, CopyHandle }

        private void ActOnSelectedTreeNode(TreeAction action)
        {
            var node = _tree.SelectedNode;
            if (!TryResolveObjectIdFromScopeNode(node, out var id)) return;

            switch (action)
            {
                case TreeAction.ZoomTo:
                    ZoomToEntity(id, 1.2); // 20% padding
                    HighlightOnly(id);
                    break;

                case TreeAction.SelectInDrawing:
                    SelectInDrawing(id);
                    HighlightOnly(id);
                    break;

                case TreeAction.CopyHandle:
                    var handleText = node.Text.Split(' ')[0];
                    WinForms.Clipboard.SetText(handleText);
                    break;
            }
        }

        private void HighlightOnly(ObjectId id)
        {
            UnhighlightAll();

            var doc = AcApp.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            using (doc.LockDocument())
            using (var tr = doc.Database.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var ent = tr.GetObject(id, OpenMode.ForRead) as Entity;
                if (ent != null)
                {
                    ent.Highlight();
                    _highlighted.Add(id);
                }
                tr.Commit();
            }
        }

        private void UnhighlightAll()
        {
            if (_highlighted.Count == 0) return;

            var doc = AcApp.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            using (doc.LockDocument())
            using (var tr = doc.Database.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                foreach (var oid in _highlighted.ToArray())
                {
                    if (!oid.IsValid) continue;
                    var ent = tr.GetObject(oid, OpenMode.ForRead) as Entity;
                    ent?.Unhighlight();
                }
                _highlighted.Clear();
                tr.Commit();
            }
        }

private void SelectInDrawing(ObjectId id)
        {
            var ed = AcApp.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument.Editor;
            ed.SetImpliedSelection(new[] { id });
        }

private void ZoomToEntity(ObjectId id, double padFactor)
        {
            var doc = AcApp.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            using (doc.LockDocument())
            using (var tr = doc.Database.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var ent = tr.GetObject(id, OpenMode.ForRead) as Entity;
                if (ent == null) return;

                var ext = ent.GeometricExtents;

                // Transform WCS → DCS based on current view
                var view = ed.GetCurrentView();
                var mat = Matrix3d.Identity;
                mat = Matrix3d.PlaneToWorld(view.ViewDirection);
                mat = Matrix3d.Displacement(view.Target - Point3d.Origin) * mat;
                mat = Matrix3d.Rotation(-view.ViewTwist, view.ViewDirection, view.Target) * mat;
                var wcs2dcs = mat.Inverse();

                var dcsExt = new Extents3d(ext.MinPoint, ext.MaxPoint);
                dcsExt.TransformBy(wcs2dcs);

                var min = dcsExt.MinPoint;
                var max = dcsExt.MaxPoint;
                var center = new Point2d((min.X + max.X) * 0.5, (min.Y + max.Y) * 0.5);
                var width = (max.X - min.X) * padFactor;
                var height = (max.Y - min.Y) * padFactor;

                if (width <= 0 || height <= 0) { width = height = 5.0; } // tiny/degenerate safety

                view.CenterPoint = center;
                view.Width = width;
                view.Height = height;
                ed.SetCurrentView(view);

                tr.Commit();
            }
        }

        public void RefreshAll()
        {
            var doc = AcApp.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            var newItems = new List<PropertyItem>();

            using (doc.LockDocument())
            using (var tr = doc.Database.TransactionManager.StartOpenCloseTransaction())
            {
                // Drawing-scope collectors (NOD etc.)
                foreach (var c in _collectors)
                    newItems.AddRange(c.CollectForDrawing(tr, doc.Database));

                // Entity-scope collectors over ModelSpace
                var bt = (BlockTable)tr.GetObject(doc.Database.BlockTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                var ms = (BlockTableRecord)tr.GetObject(bt[BlockTableRecord.ModelSpace], OpenMode.ForRead);

                foreach (ObjectId id in ms)
                {
                    try
                    {
                        var obj = tr.GetObject(id, OpenMode.ForRead);
                        foreach (var c in _collectors)
                            newItems.AddRange(c.CollectForObject(tr, obj));
                    }
                    catch
                    {
                        // swallow per-entity issues (proxies/xrefs/erased)
                    }
                }

                tr.Commit();
            }

            UpdateItemsAndTree(newItems);
        }
    }
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// File: AutoCAD2020/ProjectStore/ProjectBindingService.cs
// Purpose: Resolve current project binding and raise ProjectChanged when the
//          active document's bound project/store changes.
// Target : C# 7.3 / AutoCAD 2020
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;

namespace AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore
{
    public struct ProjectBinding
    {
        public string ProjectId;
        public string Name;
        public string StorePath;
        public bool IsValid => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(StorePath);
    }

    public sealed class ProjectBindingChangedEventArgs : EventArgs
    {
        public Document Document { get; }
        public ProjectBinding Binding { get; }
        public string OldStorePath { get; }
        public string NewStorePath { get; }

        public ProjectBindingChangedEventArgs(Document doc, ProjectBinding binding, string oldPath, string newPath)
        {
            Document = doc;
            Binding = binding;
            OldStorePath = oldPath;
            NewStorePath = newPath;
        }
    }

    public static class ProjectBindingService
    {
        /// <summary>Raised when the binding (store path) for a document changes.</summary>
        public static event EventHandler<ProjectBindingChangedEventArgs> ProjectChanged;

        // Track last-known store path per document so we can detect changes.
        private static readonly Dictionary<Document, string> _lastStoreByDoc = new Dictionary<Document, string>();

        // Ensure we hook DM events once.
        private static bool _watching;

        /// <summary>
        /// Try to get the bound project from NOD["CBI"]["Project"] XRecord(Id, Name, StorePath).
        /// </summary>
        public static bool TryGetBoundProject(Document doc, out ProjectBinding binding)
        {
            binding = default(ProjectBinding);
            if (doc == null) return false;

            var db = doc.Database;
            try
            {
                using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartOpenCloseTransaction())
                {
                    var nod = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(db.NamedObjectsDictionaryId, OpenMode.ForRead, false, true);
                    if (nod == null || !nod.Contains("CBI")) return false;

                    var cbi = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(nod.GetAt("CBI"), OpenMode.ForRead);
                    if (cbi == null) return false;

                    // Primary key "Project" (modern)
                    if (cbi.Contains("Project"))
                    {
                        var xr = (Xrecord)tr.GetObject(cbi.GetAt("Project"), OpenMode.ForRead);
                        var data = xr.Data?.AsArray();
                        if (data != null && data.Length >= 3)
                        {
                            binding.ProjectId = data[0].Value as string ?? string.Empty;
                            binding.Name = data[1].Value as string ?? string.Empty;
                            binding.StorePath = data[2].Value as string ?? string.Empty;
                            return binding.IsValid;
                        }
                    }

                    // (Optional) If you ever migrate to "ProjectStore" dictionary, read it here.
                    // Keeping this block as a safe noop for now.
                }
            }
            catch
            {
                // swallow — we just report "no binding"
            }

            // Optional legacy fallback (if you still have this helper in your codebase)
            try
            {
                var tx = db.TransactionManager.StartOpenCloseTransaction();
                using (tx)
                {
                    var maybePath = ProjectTagPath.GetPath(db, tx);
                    if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(maybePath))
                    {
                        binding = new ProjectBinding
                        {
                            ProjectId = string.Empty,
                            Name = string.Empty,
                            StorePath = maybePath
                        };
                        return true;
                    }
                }
            }
            catch { /* ignore */ }

            return false;
        }

        /// <summary>Convenience overload for current MDI doc.</summary>
        public static bool TryGetBoundProject(out ProjectBinding binding)
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            return TryGetBoundProject(doc, out binding);
        }

        // ------------------- Step 6: watch & notify on changes -------------------

        /// <summary>
        /// Start watching DocumentManager for activation/create/destroy to detect binding changes.
        /// Safe to call multiple times.
        /// </summary>
        public static void StartWatching()
        {
            if (_watching) return;
            var dm = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager;
            dm.DocumentActivated += OnDocumentActivated;
            dm.DocumentCreated += OnDocumentCreated;
            dm.DocumentDestroyed += OnDocumentDestroyed;

            // Seed any currently-open docs
            foreach (Document d in dm)
            {
                CacheCurrentBinding(d);
            }

            _watching = true;
        }

        private static void OnDocumentCreated(object sender, DocumentCollectionEventArgs e)
        {
            CacheCurrentBinding(e.Document);
        }

        private static void OnDocumentDestroyed(object sender, DocumentDestroyedEventArgs e)
        {
            // We no longer have the Document instance, but we can prune stale entries later.
            // For safety, clear all dead docs.
            var dm = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager;
            var live = new HashSet<Document>();
            foreach (Document d in dm) live.Add(d);

            var toRemove = new List<Document>();
            foreach (var kv in _lastStoreByDoc)
                if (!live.Contains(kv.Key)) toRemove.Add(kv.Key);

            foreach (var d in toRemove) _lastStoreByDoc.Remove(d);
        }

        private static void OnDocumentActivated(object sender, DocumentCollectionEventArgs e)
        {
            NotifyIfChanged(e.Document);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Public helper — call after your commands (bind/new/repair) to force a re-check.
        /// </summary>
        public static void NotifyIfChanged(Document doc)
        {
            if (doc == null) return;

            string oldPath = GetCached(doc);
            TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding);
            var newPath = binding.StorePath ?? string.Empty;

            if (!StringEquals(oldPath, newPath))
            {
                _lastStoreByDoc[doc] = newPath;
                RaiseProjectChanged(doc, binding, oldPath, newPath);
            }
        }

        // Cache current binding (used at startup/creation)
        private static void CacheCurrentBinding(Document doc)
        {
            if (doc == null) return;
            TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding);
            _lastStoreByDoc[doc] = binding.StorePath ?? string.Empty;
        }

        private static string GetCached(Document doc)
        {
            if (doc != null && _lastStoreByDoc.TryGetValue(doc, out var s)) return s ?? string.Empty;
            return string.Empty;
        }

        private static void RaiseProjectChanged(Document doc, ProjectBinding binding, string oldPath, string newPath)
        {
            try { ProjectChanged?.Invoke(null, new ProjectBindingChangedEventArgs(doc, binding, oldPath, newPath)); }
            catch { /* never propagate */ }
        }

        private static bool StringEquals(string a, string b)
            => string.Equals(a ?? string.Empty, b ?? string.Empty, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    }
}

using System.IO;
using AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore;
using AutoCAD2020.Services;
using DocumentFormat.OpenXml;
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.ComponentModel;
using System.Data;
using System.Drawing;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

using System.Windows.Forms;

namespace AutoCAD2020.Forms.TagManager
{
    public partial class TagManagerControl : System.Windows.Forms.UserControl
    {
        private ProjectTagStore _store;
        private BindingList<TagRow> _rows = new BindingList<TagRow>();
        private string _storePath;

        public TagManagerControl()
        {
            InitializeComponent();

            // Make the grid columns once
            if (dgvTags.Columns.Count == 0)
            {
                dgvTags.AutoGenerateColumns = false;

                dgvTags.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn
                {
                    Name = "colId",
                    HeaderText = "Id",
                    DataPropertyName = "Id",
                    AutoSizeMode = DataGridViewAutoSizeColumnMode.Fill,
                    FillWeight = 40
                });
                dgvTags.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn
                {
                    Name = "colSystem",
                    HeaderText = "System",
                    DataPropertyName = "System",
                    Width = 120
                });
                dgvTags.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn
                {
                    Name = "colStatus",
                    HeaderText = "Status",
                    DataPropertyName = "Status",
                    Width = 120
                });
                dgvTags.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn
                {
                    Name = "colDrawing",
                    HeaderText = "Drawing",
                    DataPropertyName = "DrawingName",
                    AutoSizeMode = DataGridViewAutoSizeColumnMode.Fill,
                    FillWeight = 35
                });
                dgvTags.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn
                {
                    Name = "colLastSeen",
                    HeaderText = "Last Seen (UTC)",
                    DataPropertyName = "LastSeenUtc",
                    Width = 150
                });
            }

            dgvTags.AutoGenerateColumns = false;
            // Define a few columns: Id, System, Status, DrawingName, LastSeenUtc
            dgvTags.DataSource = _rows;

            dgvTags.SelectionChanged += (s, e) => ShowSelectionDetails();
            btnLoadJson.Click += (s, e) => BrowseAndLoad();
            btnOpenFolder.Click += (s, e) => OpenFolder();
            btnReconcile.Click += (s, e) => ReconcileCurrentDwg();
            btnRelease.Click += (s, e) => ReleaseSelected();
            cboSystem.SelectedIndexChanged += (s, e) => ApplyFilters();
            cboStatus.SelectedIndexChanged += (s, e) => ApplyFilters();
            txtSearch.TextChanged += (s, e) => ApplyFilters();
        }

        public void TryLoadCurrentDrawingStore()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;

            using (var tr = doc.Database.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                _storePath = ProjectTagPath.GetPath(doc.Database, tr);
                tr.Commit();
            }

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_storePath) && File.Exists(_storePath))
            {
                LoadStore(_storePath);
            }
            else
            {
                SetHeader("No project loaded", "");
                _rows.Clear();
            }
        }

        private void BrowseAndLoad()
        {
            using (var ofd = new OpenFileDialog { Filter = "JSON files|*.json" })
            {
                if (ofd.ShowDialog() != DialogResult.OK) return;
                LoadStore(ofd.FileName);
            }
        }

        private void LoadStore(string path)
        {
            try
            {
                _storePath = path;
                _store = ProjectTagStore.LoadOrCreate(path);

                var projName = _store?.Project?.Name ?? System.IO.Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(path);
                SetHeader(projName, path);

                // Populate filters
                var systems = _store.Systems.Keys.OrderBy(x => x).ToList();
                systems.Insert(0, "(All)");
                cboSystem.ComboBox.DataSource = systems;    // <-- note ComboBox

                var statuses = new[] { "(All)", "Active", "MissingInDWG", "Released", "Reserved", "Superseded" };
                cboStatus.ComboBox.DataSource = statuses;   // <-- note ComboBox

                // (optional) lock editing
                cboSystem.ComboBox.DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList;
                cboStatus.ComboBox.DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList;

                // Project to grid rows
                _rows.Clear();
                foreach (var t in _store.Tags)
                    _rows.Add(TagRow.From(t));

                ApplyFilters();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show($"Failed to load tag store:\n{ex.Message}", "CBI Tag Manager");
            }
        }

        private void SetHeader(string projectName, string path)
        {
            lblProjectName.Text = projectName;
            lblPath.Text = path;
        }

        private void ApplyFilters()
        {
            if (_store == null) return;
            var sys = cboSystem.SelectedItem as string;
            var st = cboStatus.SelectedItem as string;
            var q = txtSearch.Text?.Trim();

            var filtered = _store.Tags.AsEnumerable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(sys) && sys != "(All)")
                filtered = filtered.Where(t => string.Equals(t.System, sys, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));

            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(st) && st != "(All)")
                filtered = filtered.Where(t => string.Equals(t.Status, st, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));

            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(q))
                filtered = filtered.Where(t => (t.Id ?? "").IndexOf(q, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0
                                             || (t.DrawingName ?? "").IndexOf(q, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0);

            _rows.RaiseListChangedEvents = false;
            _rows.Clear();
            foreach (var t in filtered)
                _rows.Add(TagRow.From(t));
            _rows.RaiseListChangedEvents = true;
            _rows.ResetBindings();
        }

        private void ShowSelectionDetails()
        {
            if (dgvTags.CurrentRow?.DataBoundItem is TagRow r)
            {
                // You can show a PropertyGrid bound to the original TagRecord for rich view:
                var rec = _store.Tags.FirstOrDefault(t => t.Id == r.Id && t.DrawingPath == r.DrawingPath && t.Number == r.Number);
                propDetails.SelectedObject = rec; // or populate a details panel
                btnRelease.Enabled = (rec != null && rec.Status == "MissingInDWG");
            }
            else
            {
                propDetails.SelectedObject = null;
                btnRelease.Enabled = false;
            }
        }

        private void OpenFolder()
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_storePath)) return;
            var folder = Path.GetDirectoryName(_storePath);
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(folder))
                System.Diagnostics.Process.Start(new System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo { FileName = folder, UseShellExecute = true });
        }

        private void ReconcileCurrentDwg()
        {
            // v1: keep it simple. Call your existing reconcile service here if you want,
            // or stub: mark MissingInDWG for any tag whose DrawingPath == current doc and handles not found.
            // After reconcile, reload store:
            // AutoCAD2020.Services.TagReclaimService.ReconcileCurrentDwg();  (you can make this)
            // For now:
            MessageBox.Show("Reconcile pass not wired yet in MVP.\nWe’ll hook this to TagReclaimService next.", "CBI");
        }

        private void ReleaseSelected()
        {
            if (_store == null) return;
            if (!(dgvTags.CurrentRow?.DataBoundItem is TagRow r)) return;

            var rec = _store.Tags.FirstOrDefault(t => t.Id == r.Id && t.DrawingPath == r.DrawingPath && t.Number == r.Number);
            if (rec == null) return;

            // Minimal release UX
            var confirm = MessageBox.Show($"Release {rec.Id} in system {rec.System} back to pool?",
                                          "CBI", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo);
            if (confirm != DialogResult.Yes) return;

            _store.ReleaseNumber(rec.System, rec.Number, "Manual release from Tag Manager");
            rec.Status = "Released";
            _store.Save(_storePath);
            LoadStore(_storePath); // refresh
        }

        // Row projection (keeps the grid light)
        private class TagRow
        {
            public string Id { get; set; }
            public string System { get; set; }
            public string Status { get; set; }
            public string DrawingName { get; set; }
            public string DrawingPath { get; set; }
            public string LastSeenUtc { get; set; }
            public int Number { get; set; }

            public static TagRow From(AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.ProjectTagStore.TagRecord t) => new TagRow
            {
                Id = t.Id,
                System = t.System,
                Status = t.Status,
                DrawingName = t.DrawingName ?? Path.GetFileName(t.DrawingPath),
                DrawingPath = t.DrawingPath,
                LastSeenUtc = t.LastSeenUtc?.ToString("u"),
                Number = t.Number
            };
        }
    }
}

using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Geometry;
using Newtonsoft.Json;
using System;
using System.IO;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using System.Windows.Forms;
using static AutoCAD2020.Drawing_Operations.DrawingManager;
using System.Diagnostics;

namespace AutoCAD2020.Drawing_Operations
{
    public class DrawingManager
    {
        public static bool IsDrawingOpen(string drawingPath)
        {
            var docs = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager;
            foreach (Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Document doc in docs)
            {
                if (doc.Name.Equals(drawingPath, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                {
                    return true;
                }
            }
            return false;
        }

        public static void OpenDrawingFile(string drawingPath)
        {
            var docMgr = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager;
            if (!IsDrawingOpen(drawingPath))
            {
                docMgr.Open(drawingPath, false);
            }
        }

        public static void SwitchToModelSpace(Database db, Transaction transaction)
        {
            // Check if TileMode is set to paper space, and switch to model space if needed
            if (!db.TileMode)
            {
                db.TileMode = true;
            }

            // Ensure all entities in model space are accessible
            var blockTable = (BlockTable)transaction.GetObject(db.BlockTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
            var modelSpace = (BlockTableRecord)transaction.GetObject(blockTable[BlockTableRecord.ModelSpace], OpenMode.ForWrite);
        }

private static IEnumerable<ObjectId> GetAllEntitiesInModelSpace(Database db, Transaction transaction)
        {
            BlockTable bt = (BlockTable)transaction.GetObject(db.BlockTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
            BlockTableRecord modelSpace = (BlockTableRecord)transaction.GetObject(bt[BlockTableRecord.ModelSpace], OpenMode.ForRead);

            return modelSpace.Cast<ObjectId>();
        }

        private static void EnsureWriteAccess(Transaction transaction, Entity entity)
        {
            // Check if the entity is open for writing, and upgrade if necessary
            if (!entity.IsWriteEnabled)
            {
                try
                {
                    entity.UpgradeOpen();
                }
                catch (Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime.Exception ex) when (ex.ErrorStatus == Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime.ErrorStatus.LockViolation)
                {
                    // Handle lock violation case
                    Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.ShowAlertDialog($"Unable to access entity {entity.ObjectId} for writing.");
                }
            }
        }

        public static void SaveAndCloseDrawing(string drawingPath)
        {
            var docMgr = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager;
            var doc = docMgr.MdiActiveDocument;

            if (doc != null && doc.Name.Equals(drawingPath, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                // Save the changes
                doc.Database.SaveAs(drawingPath, true, DwgVersion.Current, doc.Database.SecurityParameters);

                // Close the document
                docMgr.MdiActiveDocument.CloseAndDiscard();
            }
        }

        public static Entity FindClosestEntity(Transaction trans, Database db, Point3d searchPoint, double searchRadius = 0.1)
        {
            // Get the BlockTableRecord for model space
            BlockTable bt = (BlockTable)trans.GetObject(db.BlockTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
            BlockTableRecord modelSpace = (BlockTableRecord)trans.GetObject(bt[BlockTableRecord.ModelSpace], OpenMode.ForRead);

            Entity closestEntity = null;
            double closestDistance = double.MaxValue;

            // Iterate through entities in model space
            foreach (ObjectId id in modelSpace)
            {
                Entity entity = trans.GetObject(id, OpenMode.ForRead) as Entity;
                if (entity == null) continue;

                Point3d entityPosition;
                // Determine the position based on entity type
                if (entity is DBText dbText)
                {
                    entityPosition = dbText.Position;
                }
                else if (entity is MText mText)
                {
                    entityPosition = mText.Location;
                }
                else if (entity is AttributeReference attribute)
                {
                    entityPosition = attribute.Position;
                }
                else
                {
                    continue; // Skip unsupported entity types
                }

                // Calculate the distance between the entity and the search point
                double distance = searchPoint.DistanceTo(entityPosition);
                if (distance < searchRadius && distance < closestDistance)
                {
                    closestEntity = entity;
                    closestDistance = distance;
                }
            }

            return closestEntity; // Returns the closest matching entity, or null if none found
        }

        public static class LockingValidation
        {
            public static bool ValidateLock(Transaction transaction, Entity entity)
            {
                if (!entity.IsWriteEnabled)
                {
                    try
                    {
                        entity.UpgradeOpen();
                        return true; // Locking succeeded
                    }
                    catch (Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime.Exception ex) when (ex.ErrorStatus == Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime.ErrorStatus.LockViolation)
                    {
                        MessageBox.Show($"Unable to lock entity: {entity.ObjectId}. It may be in use.");
                        return false; // Locking failed
                    }
                }
                return true; // Already open for writing
            }
            public static void ExecuteWithDocumentLock(Action<Database, Transaction> action)
            {
                var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
                var db = doc.Database;

                // Lock the document for editing
                using (DocumentLock docLock = doc.LockDocument())
                {
                    // Start a transaction
                    using (var transaction = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
                    {
                        try
                        {
                            // Execute the provided action, passing the database and transaction
                            action(db, transaction);

                            // Commit the transaction if no errors occurred
                            transaction.Commit();
                        }
                        catch (Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime.Exception ex) when (ex.ErrorStatus == Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime.ErrorStatus.LockViolation)
                        {
                            MessageBox.Show($"Lock violation occurred: {ex.Message}", "Lock Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
                        }
                        catch (Exception ex)
                        {
                            MessageBox.Show($"An error occurred: {ex.Message}", "Error", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        public class ChangeLog
        {
            public string DateTime { get; set; } // Top-level datetime for the change log
            public List<ChangeRecord> Changes { get; set; } = new List<ChangeRecord>(); // List of individual change records
        }

        public class ChangeRecord
        {
            public string EntityId { get; set; }
            public string EntityType { get; set; }
            public string OldValue { get; set; }
            public string NewValue { get; set; }
            public Coordinates Coordinates { get; set; }
            public DateTime ChangeDate { get; set; }
            public string DrawingPath { get; set; }
        }

        public class ChangeHistoryEntry
        {
            public string DateTime { get; set; } // Date of the session
            public List<ChangeRecord> Changes { get; set; } = new List<ChangeRecord>(); // List of individual change records

            public ChangeHistoryEntry()
            {
                DateTime = System.DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss");
            }
        }

        public class ChangeHistory
        {
            public string DrawingPath { get; set; } // Path of the drawing where the change was made
            public string ObjectHandle { get; set; } // Handle or unique identifier of the modified entity
            public string EntityType { get; set; } // Type of the entity (e.g., DBText, MText, AttributeReference)
            public string PreviousValue { get; set; } // The original value before the change
            public string NewValue { get; set; } // The new value applied to the entity
            public DateTime ChangeTime { get; set; } // Timestamp of when the change was made

            public List<ChangeHistoryEntry> ChangeHistoryList { get; set; } = new List<ChangeHistoryEntry>();

            public ChangeHistory(string drawingPath, string objectHandle, string entityType, string previousValue, string newValue)
            {
                DrawingPath = drawingPath;
                ObjectHandle = objectHandle;
                EntityType = entityType;
                PreviousValue = previousValue;
                NewValue = newValue;
                ChangeTime = DateTime.Now;
            }
        }

        public class ChangeHistoryManager
        {
            private List<ChangeHistoryEntry> _changeHistoryEntries = new List<ChangeHistoryEntry>();

            public List<string> GetSessionDates()
            {
                // Select the DateTime of each session and return as a list of strings
                return _changeHistoryEntries.Select(entry => entry.DateTime).Distinct().OrderBy(date => date).ToList();
            }
            
            // Start a new session and return it
            public ChangeHistoryEntry StartNewSession()
            {
                var newSession = new ChangeHistoryEntry();
                _changeHistoryEntries.Add(newSession);
                return newSession;
            }

            // Add a change to the most recent session
            public void AddChange(ChangeRecord changeEntry)
            {
                if (_changeHistoryEntries.Count == 0)
                {
                    StartNewSession();
                }

                // Add the change entry to the most recent session's Changes list
                _changeHistoryEntries.Last().Changes.Add(changeEntry);
            }

            // Serialize all change sessions to JSON with the correct structure
            public void SerializeToJSON(string filePath)
            {
                try
                {
                    string jsonOutput = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(new { changesLog = _changeHistoryEntries }, Formatting.Indented);
                    File.WriteAllText(filePath, jsonOutput);
                    Debug.WriteLine("Change history successfully serialized to JSON.");
                }
                catch (Exception ex)
                {
                    Debug.WriteLine($"Error serializing change history: {ex.Message}");
                }
            }

            public List<ChangeRecord> GetChangesByDate(string date, string drawingPath)
            {
                // Find the ChangeHistoryEntry for the specified date
                var entry = _changeHistoryEntries.FirstOrDefault(e => e.DateTime == date);

                if (entry != null)
                {
                    // Filter changes to only include those for the specified drawing path
                    return entry.Changes.Where(change => change.DrawingPath == drawingPath).ToList();
                }

                return new List<ChangeRecord>();
            }

}

        public class Coordinates
        {
            public double X { get; set; }
            public double Y { get; set; }
        }

        // Example function to record a change
        public static void RecordChange(ChangeHistoryManager changeHistoryManager, string drawingPath, string objectHandle, string entityType, string oldValue, string newValue, double x, double y)
        {
            // Create a new entry for the change
            var changeEntry = new ChangeRecord
            {
                EntityId = objectHandle,
                EntityType = entityType,
                OldValue = oldValue,
                NewValue = newValue,
                Coordinates = new Coordinates { X = x, Y = y },
                ChangeDate = DateTime.Now, // Timestamp for record-keeping
                DrawingPath = drawingPath
            };

            // Add the change entry to the current session in the change history
            changeHistoryManager.AddChange(changeEntry);

            Console.WriteLine($"Recorded Change for {objectHandle} in ({drawingPath} at {DateTime.Now})");
        }

        public static string GetActiveDrawingPath()
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            return doc?.Name;
        }
    }
}

// Services/FormLauncher.cs

        // --- TEMP stubs to satisfy Commands.cs ---

        public static void ShowCBISearch()
