// v2.0.0 (C# 7.3)
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Geometry;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.Valves;

namespace AutoCAD2020.Valves
{
    public interface IBlockInsertService
    {
        ObjectId EnsureAndInsert(BlockDefinitionRef def, Point3d position, double rotationRad,
                                 IDictionary<string, string> dynPropsOrAtts);
    }

    public sealed class BlockInsertService : IBlockInsertService
    {
        public ObjectId EnsureAndInsert(BlockDefinitionRef def, Point3d position, double rotationRad,
                                        IDictionary<string, string> dynPropsOrAtts)
        {
            var db = HostApplicationServices.WorkingDatabase;
            ObjectId brefId = ObjectId.Null;

            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                // TODO: ensure block definition exists; if not, wblock insert from def.Path
                // var btrId = BlockDefUtil.Ensure(def.Name, def.Path, tr);

                // Minimal placeholder: assume definition exists
                var bt = (BlockTable)tr.GetObject(db.BlockTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                if (!bt.Has(def.Name)) throw new System.Exception("Block def not found: " + def.Name);
                var msId = bt[BlockTableRecord.ModelSpace];
                var ms = (BlockTableRecord)tr.GetObject(msId, OpenMode.ForWrite);

                var br = new BlockReference(position, bt[def.Name]);
                br.Rotation = rotationRad;
                brefId = ms.AppendEntity(br);
                tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(br, true);

                // TODO: set dynamic properties/attributes from dynPropsOrAtts

                tr.Commit();
            }
            return brefId;
        }
    }
}

// File: ValveInsertService.cs
// Project: AutoCAD2020
// Namespace: AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Services
// LanguageVersion: 9.0 (C# 7.3 target ok)
// SemVer: 0.1.0
//
// Summary:
//   Single-document, interactive valve insertion flow.
//   - Optional: select polyline for line context (XData keys under "CBI").
//   - Insert block "CBI_VALVE" at picked point (and rotation).
//   - Allocate next Valve Tag by scope (AREA-SERVICE) via NOD sequence.
//   - Write XData (CBI_UID, CBI_KIND=Valve, mirror props) to block.
//   - Persist cross-ref to NOD: CBI/ProjectStore/Valves/{UID} as XRecord.
//   - Select the newly inserted block so the CBI Properties Palette shows it.
//
// Integration points (non-breaking):
//   - Uses existing NOD helpers if available (NODWriter, etc.) but contains safe fallbacks.
//   - Emits a simple ChangeHistory hook (no-throw) you can wire into your existing manager.
//
// Notes:
//   - Attribute names assumed: TAG, LINE_NO, SERVICE, SIZE, SPEC, AREA, UNIT, CBI_UID
//     (extra attributes in the block are ignored; missing ones are skipped).
//   - Block name assumed: "CBI_VALVE" (change in Constants if needed).

using System;
using System.IO;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Geometry;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime;

namespace AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Services
{
    internal static class ValveInsertService
    {
        private static class Constants
        {
            public const string BlockName = "CBI_VALVE";

            // XData
            public const string AppName = "CBI";
            public const string XdKindKey = "CBI_KIND";
            public const string XdKindValve = "Valve";
            public const string XdUidKey = "CBI_UID";

            // Common property keys
            public const string KeyTag = "TAG";
            public const string KeyLineNo = "LINE_NO";
            public const string KeyService = "SERVICE";
            public const string KeySize = "SIZE";
            public const string KeySpec = "SPEC";
            public const string KeyArea = "AREA";
            public const string KeyUnit = "UNIT";

            // NOD tree
            public const string NodRoot = "CBI";
            public const string NodProjectStore = "ProjectStore";
            public const string NodValves = "Valves";
            public const string NodSequences = "Sequences";
            public const string NodValveSeq = "ValveTag";
        }

        // Add near the top of the class:
        internal sealed class ValveInsertOptions
        {
            public string BlockName { get; set; } = "INST_BALL-VALVE"; // default
            public string LayerName { get; set; } = "";          // optional
                                                                 // future: symbol scale, attr map overrides, etc.
        }

        internal static class BlockLoadConfig
        {
            // Add/adjust to your environment
            public static readonly string[] BlockSearchDirs = new[]
            {
                @"C:\CBICAD\AutoCAD\Blocks\Instrumentation",
                @"C:\CbiCAD\Blocks",
                @"C:\CBICAD" // fallback
            };
        }

        // --- ONLY ONE no-arg wrapper (keeps old callers working) ---
        public static void PlaceValveInteractive()
        {
            PlaceValveInteractive(new ValveInsertOptions()); // defaults to CBI_VALVE
        }

        // --- NEW overload that accepts options (Ball, Butterfly, etc.) ---
        public static void PlaceValveInteractive(ValveInsertOptions options)
        {
            var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            var db = doc.Database;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            // 1) Optional: pick a polyline to inherit context
            var context = TryGetLineContextFromPick(ed, db);

            // 2) Ask for insertion point
            var ppr = ed.GetPoint("\nSpecify valve insertion point: ");
            if (ppr.Status != PromptStatus.OK) return;
            var insPt = ppr.Value;

            // 3) Ask for rotation (relative to current UCS)
            var par = ed.GetAngle("\nSpecify rotation angle <0>: ");
            var rotation = (par.Status == PromptStatus.OK) ? par.Value : 0.0;

            // 4) Place valve (NOTE: PlaceValveCore must have the new options param)
            PlaceValveCore(db, ed, insPt, rotation, context, options);
        }

        private static IDictionary<string, string> TryGetLineContextFromPick(Editor ed, Database db)
        {
            var result = new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

            var peo = new PromptEntityOptions("\nSelect source polyline for context or <Enter> to skip: ");
            peo.SetRejectMessage("\nMust be a polyline.");
            peo.AddAllowedClass(typeof(Polyline), exactMatch: false);

            var per = ed.GetEntity(peo);
            if (per.Status != PromptStatus.OK) return result;

            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var pline = tr.GetObject(per.ObjectId, OpenMode.ForRead) as Entity;
                if (pline != null)
                {
                    var xdata = ReadXDataPairs(pline, Constants.AppName);
                    CopyIfPresent(xdata, Constants.KeyLineNo, result);
                    CopyIfPresent(xdata, Constants.KeyService, result);
                    CopyIfPresent(xdata, Constants.KeySize, result);
                    CopyIfPresent(xdata, Constants.KeySpec, result);
                    CopyIfPresent(xdata, Constants.KeyArea, result);
                    CopyIfPresent(xdata, Constants.KeyUnit, result);
                }
                tr.Commit();
            }

            return result;

}

        //private static void PlaceValveCore(Database db, Editor ed, Point3d insPt, double rotation, IDictionary<string, string> context)
        private static void PlaceValveCore(Database db, Editor ed, Point3d insPt, double rotation, IDictionary<string, string> context, ValveInsertOptions options)
        {
            {
                using (var docLock = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument.LockDocument())
                using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
                {
                    // Ensure RegApp exists for XData
                    EnsureRegAppRecord(tr, db, Constants.AppName);

                    // --- Determine which block to use ---
                    var blockName = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(options?.BlockName)
                        ? Constants.BlockName
                        : options.BlockName;

                    // --- Ensure definition exists (load from drawing or external folder) ---
                    if (!EnsureBlockDefinition(db, blockName, ed))
                    {
                        tr.Abort();
                        return; // bail if we still couldn’t load it
                    }

                    // --- Re-open tables after possible insert (after EnsureBlockDefinition) ---
                    BlockTable bt = (BlockTable)tr.GetObject(db.BlockTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                    BlockTableRecord btr = (BlockTableRecord)tr.GetObject(bt[blockName], OpenMode.ForRead);

                    // Compose valve metadata
                    var uid = Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N").ToUpperInvariant();

                    // Determine sequence scope and get next tag
                    var scope = ComputeValveScope(context);
                    var tag = NodSequenceManager.GetNext(tr, db, Constants.NodValveSeq, scope);

                    // Build final property bag (context + computed tag + identity)
                    var meta = new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                    {
                        [Constants.KeyTag] = tag,
                        [Constants.KeyLineNo] = context.TryGetValue(Constants.KeyLineNo, out var ln) ? ln : string.Empty,
                        [Constants.KeyService] = context.TryGetValue(Constants.KeyService, out var sv) ? sv : string.Empty,
                        [Constants.KeySize] = context.TryGetValue(Constants.KeySize, out var sz) ? sz : string.Empty,
                        [Constants.KeySpec] = context.TryGetValue(Constants.KeySpec, out var sp) ? sp : string.Empty,
                        [Constants.KeyArea] = context.TryGetValue(Constants.KeyArea, out var ar) ? ar : string.Empty,
                        [Constants.KeyUnit] = context.TryGetValue(Constants.KeyUnit, out var un) ? un : string.Empty,
                        [Constants.XdUidKey] = uid
                    };

// --- Insert the block reference ---
                    ObjectId msId = SymbolUtilityServices.GetBlockModelSpaceId(db);
                    BlockTableRecord ms = (BlockTableRecord)tr.GetObject(msId, OpenMode.ForWrite);

                    using (var br = new BlockReference(insPt, btr.ObjectId))
                    {
                        br.Rotation = rotation;
                        br.SetDatabaseDefaults();
                        var brId = ms.AppendEntity(br);
                        tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(br, true);

                        // --- Create attribute references for any matching attributes ---
                        if (btr.HasAttributeDefinitions)
                        {
                            foreach (ObjectId id in btr)
                            {
                                var obj = tr.GetObject(id, OpenMode.ForRead);
                                var ad = obj as AttributeDefinition;
                                if (ad != null && !ad.Constant)
                                {
                                    using (var attRef = new AttributeReference())
                                    {
                                        attRef.SetAttributeFromBlock(ad, br.BlockTransform);

                                        var key = ad.Tag != null ? ad.Tag.Trim() : null;
                                        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(key) && meta.TryGetValue(key, out var value))
                                            attRef.TextString = value ?? string.Empty;

                                        br.AttributeCollection.AppendAttribute(attRef);
                                        tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(attRef, true);
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }

                        // Write XData to the block (CBI_KIND, CBI_UID + mirrored props)
                        WriteXDataPairs(br, Constants.AppName, meta, tr);

                        // Ensure must-have identity keys present as XData scalars
                        AppendXDataScalar(br, Constants.AppName, Constants.XdKindKey, Constants.XdKindValve, tr);
                        AppendXDataScalar(br, Constants.AppName, Constants.XdUidKey, uid, tr);

                        // Persist cross-ref in NOD (Valves/{UID})
                        NodValveRegistry.UpsertValve(tr, db, uid, br, meta);

                        //// Select it so Properties Palette updates
                        //ed.SetImpliedSelection(new[] { brId });

                        // ChangeHistory hook (no-throw)
                        ChangeHistoryHook.TryRecordInsert(uid, br.Handle, meta);
                    }

                    tr.Commit();
                    try
                    {
                        // If you previously selected the new valve, consider not doing that anymore.
                        // Either way, reset implied selection so the palette’s reactors see the next click.
                        ed.SetImpliedSelection(Array.Empty<ObjectId>());
                        ed.Regen();
                    }
                    catch { /* ignore */ }
                }
            }
        }

        private static void CopyIfPresent(IDictionary<string, string> src, string key, IDictionary<string, string> dst)
        {
            if (src != null && dst != null && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(key))
            {
                string v;
                if (src.TryGetValue(key, out v) && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(v))
                    dst[key] = v;
            }
        }

        private static string ComputeValveScope(IDictionary<string, string> ctx)
        {
            var area = ctx.TryGetValue(Constants.KeyArea, out var a) ? a : string.Empty;
            var service = ctx.TryGetValue(Constants.KeyService, out var s) ? s : string.Empty;

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(area) && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(service))
                return $"{area}-{service}";

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(area))
                return area;

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(service))
                return service;

            return "GLOBAL";
        }

        #region XData helpers

        private static void EnsureRegAppRecord(Transaction tr, Database db, string appName)
        {
            var reg = (RegAppTable)tr.GetObject(db.RegAppTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
            if (!reg.Has(appName))
            {
                reg.UpgradeOpen();
                var rec = new RegAppTableRecord { Name = appName };
                reg.Add(rec);
                tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(rec, add: true);
            }
        }

        private static IDictionary<string, string> ReadXDataPairs(Entity ent, string appName)
        {
            var result = new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
            var rb = ent.GetXDataForApplication(appName);
            if (rb == null) return result;

            var tv = rb.AsArray();
            // Expected format: (app name), then repeated (key, value) pairs as strings.
            for (int i = 1; i + 1 < tv.Length; i += 2)
            {
                var key = tv[i].Value as string;
                var val = tv[i + 1].Value as string;
                if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(key))
                    result[key] = val ?? string.Empty;
            }
            return result;
        }

        private static void WriteXDataPairs(Entity ent, string appName, IDictionary<string, string> kv, Transaction tr)
        {
            var rb = new ResultBuffer();
            rb.Add(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataRegAppName, appName));
            foreach (var pair in kv)
            {
                rb.Add(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataAsciiString, pair.Key));
                rb.Add(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataAsciiString, pair.Value ?? string.Empty));
            }
            ent.XData = rb;
        }

        private static void AppendXDataScalar(Entity ent, string appName, string key, string value, Transaction tr)
        {
            var existing = ReadXDataPairs(ent, appName);
            existing[key] = value ?? string.Empty;
            WriteXDataPairs(ent, appName, existing, tr);
        }

        #endregion

        #region NOD helpers (Sequences + Valve registry)

        /// <summary>
        /// Simple sequence manager stored under NOD: CBI/ProjectStore/Sequences/{seqName}/{scope}
        /// </summary>
        private static class NodSequenceManager
        {
            public static string GetNext(Transaction tr, Database db, string seqName, string scope)
            {
                // Fallback starts at 1; stored as XRecord with a single int.
                var (dict, created) = EnsureNestedDict(tr, db, new[]
                {
                    Constants.NodRoot, Constants.NodProjectStore, Constants.NodSequences, seqName
                });

                var scopeKey = scope ?? "GLOBAL";
                var nextVal = 1;

                if (dict.Contains(scopeKey))
                {
                    var xr = (Xrecord)tr.GetObject(dict.GetAt(scopeKey), OpenMode.ForWrite);
                    var vals = xr.Data?.AsArray();
                    if (vals != null && vals.Length > 0 && vals[0].TypeCode == (int)DxfCode.Int32)
                        nextVal = (int)vals[0].Value + 1;

                    xr.Data = new ResultBuffer(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Int32, nextVal));
                }
                else
                {
                    dict.UpgradeOpen();
                    var xr = new Xrecord
                    {
                        Data = new ResultBuffer(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Int32, nextVal))
                    };
                    dict.SetAt(scopeKey, xr);
                    tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(xr, true);
                }

                // Return a formatted tag string; change format to your standard if needed.
                return $"{scopeKey}-{nextVal:000}";
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Stores a cross-reference for each valve under: CBI/ProjectStore/Valves/{UID}
        /// Data: flattened key/value strings + Handle.
        /// </summary>
        private static class NodValveRegistry
        {
            public static void UpsertValve(Transaction tr, Database db, string uid, BlockReference br, IDictionary<string, string> meta)
            {
                var (dict, _) = EnsureNestedDict(tr, db, new[]
                {
                    Constants.NodRoot, Constants.NodProjectStore, Constants.NodValves
                });

                dict.UpgradeOpen();
                var key = uid;

                Xrecord xr;
                if (dict.Contains(key))
                {
                    xr = (Xrecord)tr.GetObject(dict.GetAt(key), OpenMode.ForWrite);
                }
                else
                {
                    xr = new Xrecord();
                    dict.SetAt(key, xr);
                    tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(xr, true);
                }

                var flat = new List<TypedValue>
                {
                    new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Text, "HANDLE"),
                    new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Text, br.Handle.ToString())
                };

                foreach (var kv in meta)
                {
                    flat.Add(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Text, kv.Key));
                    flat.Add(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Text, kv.Value ?? string.Empty));
                }

                xr.Data = new ResultBuffer(flat.ToArray());
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Ensures a chain of nested dictionaries exists beneath NamedObjectsDictionary. Returns the leaf.
        /// </summary>
        private static (DBDictionary dict, bool created) EnsureNestedDict(Transaction tr, Database db, string[] path)
        {
            var nod = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(db.NamedObjectsDictionaryId, OpenMode.ForRead);
            DBDictionary current = nod;
            bool createdAny = false;

            foreach (var name in path)
            {
                if (!current.Contains(name))
                {
                    current.UpgradeOpen();
                    var child = new DBDictionary();
                    current.SetAt(name, child);
                    tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(child, true);
                    current = child;
                    createdAny = true;
                }
                else
                {
                    current = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(current.GetAt(name), OpenMode.ForRead);
                }
            }
            return (current, createdAny);
        }

        #endregion

        private static class ChangeHistoryHook
        {
            // Non-throwing placeholder; wire to your existing ChangeHistoryManager if present.
            public static void TryRecordInsert(string uid, Handle handle, IDictionary<string, string> meta)
            {
                try
                {
                    // Example pseudo-call (adjust to your manager):
                    // ChangeHistoryManager.Record("InsertValve", new { UID = uid, Handle = handle.ToString(), Meta = meta });
                }
                catch
                {
                    // Intentionally swallow to avoid impacting production work.
                }
            }
        }

        private static bool EnsureBlockDefinition(Database db, string blockName, Editor ed)
        {
            // Already present?
            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var bt = (BlockTable)tr.GetObject(db.BlockTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                if (bt.Has(blockName)) { tr.Commit(); return true; }
                tr.Commit();
            }

            // Try AutoCAD support paths first
            string dwgPath = null;
            try
            {
                dwgPath = HostApplicationServices.Current.FindFile(blockName + ".dwg", db, FindFileHint.Default);
            }
            catch { /* ignore */ }

            // If not found, try our custom directories
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(dwgPath))
            {
                foreach (var dir in BlockLoadConfig.BlockSearchDirs)
                {
                    var cand = Path.Combine(dir, blockName + ".dwg");
                    if (File.Exists(cand)) { dwgPath = cand; break; }
                }
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(dwgPath))
            {
                ed.WriteMessage($"\nBlock \"{blockName}\" not found in drawing or search paths. " +
                                $"Add it to a support path or to one of: {string.Join("; ", BlockLoadConfig.BlockSearchDirs)}");
                return false;
            }

            // Import the block definition from DWG
            using (var srcDb = new Database(false, true))
            {
                srcDb.ReadDwgFile(dwgPath, FileOpenMode.OpenForReadAndAllShare, true, "");
                // This imports/merges the definition named blockName into current db
                db.Insert(blockName, srcDb, false);
            }
            return true;
        }
    }
}

// v2.0.0 (C# 7.3)
using System.Collections.Generic;
using AcApp = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application;
using AcDoc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Document;
using AcEd = Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using AcDb = Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using AcGeom = Autodesk.AutoCAD.Geometry;

using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.Valves;
using AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Services;

namespace AutoCAD2020.Valves
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Minimal valve insert flow:
    /// - optional host pipe → size + tangent
    /// - resolve block def from Project_Store
    /// - insert
    /// - read valve tag; if missing allocate & write back
    /// </summary>
    public static class InsertValveCommand
    {
        public static void Run()
        {
            var doc = AcApp.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            // 1) Pick type
            var typeOpt = PromptValveType(ed);
            if (!typeOpt.HasValue) return;
            var valveType = typeOpt.Value;

            // 2) Optional host polyline
            AcDb.ObjectId? hostPolyId = PromptPolylineOptional(ed, "\nSelect host pipe polyline (ESC to skip): ");

            // 3) Insertion point
            var ppr = ed.GetPoint("\nPick valve insertion point: ");
            if (ppr.Status != AcEd.PromptStatus.OK) return;
            var insPt = ppr.Value;

            // 4) Resolve services
            var settings = new ProjectSettingsService(@"C:\CBICAD\Project_Store.json");
            var resolver = new ValveDefinitionResolver(settings);
            var blockDef = resolver.Resolve(valveType);
            var sizeMap = resolver.GetSizeMap();

            var blockSvc = new BlockInsertService();
            var metaLink = new ValveMetadataLinker();
            var pipeRead = new PipeReader();
            var tags = new TagAllocator_V2(settings);
            var history = new ChangeHistoryService();

            // 5) Derive size + rotation from host
            string hostHandle = null;
            string nominalDia = null;
            double rotation = 0.0;

            if (hostPolyId.HasValue)
            {
                var info = pipeRead.ReadFromPolyline(hostPolyId.Value, insPt);
                hostHandle = info?.HandleString;
                nominalDia = info?.NominalDiameter;
                if (info != null && info.TangentRotation.HasValue)
                    rotation = info.TangentRotation.Value;
            }

            // Dyn props payload (SIZE or scale)
            IDictionary<string, string> dynProps = ValveDynPropUtil.Build(sizeMap, nominalDia);

            // 6) Insert
            AcDb.ObjectId newValveId;
            using (doc.LockDocument())
            using (var tr = doc.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                newValveId = blockSvc.EnsureAndInsert(blockDef, insPt, rotation, dynProps);
                tr.Commit();
            }

            // 7) Tag handling: read first; if none, allocate
            var meta = metaLink.ReadValveMetadata(newValveId) ?? new ValveMetadata();
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(meta.ValveTag))
            {
                meta.ValveTag = tags.AllocateValveTag(); // increments store
            }

            meta.ValveType = valveType.ToString();
            meta.Size = nominalDia;
            meta.HostLineHandle = hostHandle;
            meta.ProjectKey = settings.Read().ActiveProjectKey;

            using (doc.LockDocument())
            using (var tr = doc.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                metaLink.WriteValveMetadata(newValveId, meta);
                tr.Commit();
            }

            // 8) Log
            history.RecordValveInsert(doc.Name, newValveId.Handle.ToString(), meta);
            ed.WriteMessage($"\nValve inserted [{meta.ValveTag ?? "(untagged)"}].");
        }

        // ---------- prompts ----------
        private static ValveType? PromptValveType(AcEd.Editor ed)
        {
            var pko = new AcEd.PromptKeywordOptions("\nValve type");
            pko.Keywords.Add("Ball");
            pko.Keywords.Add("Butterfly");
            pko.Keywords.Add("Check");
            pko.AllowNone = false;
            var res = ed.GetKeywords(pko);
            if (res.Status != AcEd.PromptStatus.OK) return null;
            switch (res.StringResult)
            {
                case "Ball": return ValveType.Ball;
                case "Butterfly": return ValveType.Butterfly;
                case "Check": return ValveType.Check;
                default: return null;
            }
        }

        private static AcDb.ObjectId? PromptPolylineOptional(AcEd.Editor ed, string prompt)
        {
            var peo = new AcEd.PromptEntityOptions(prompt);
            peo.SetRejectMessage("\nMust be a polyline.");
            peo.AddAllowedClass(typeof(AcDb.Polyline), true);
            var per = ed.GetEntity(peo);
            if (per.Status != AcEd.PromptStatus.OK) return null;
            return per.ObjectId;
        }
    }
}

// File: ValveInsertService.cs
// Project: AutoCAD2020
// Namespace: AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Services
// LanguageVersion: 9.0 (C# 7.3 target ok)
// SemVer: 0.1.0
//
// Summary:
//   Single-document, interactive valve insertion flow.
//   - Optional: select polyline for line context (XData keys under "CBI").
//   - Insert block "CBI_VALVE" at picked point (and rotation).
//   - Allocate next Valve Tag by scope (AREA-SERVICE) via NOD sequence.
//   - Write XData (CBI_UID, CBI_KIND=Valve, mirror props) to block.
//   - Persist cross-ref to NOD: CBI/ProjectStore/Valves/{UID} as XRecord.
//   - Select the newly inserted block so the CBI Properties Palette shows it.
//
// Integration points (non-breaking):
//   - Uses existing NOD helpers if available (NODWriter, etc.) but contains safe fallbacks.
//   - Emits a simple ChangeHistory hook (no-throw) you can wire into your existing manager.
//
// Notes:
//   - Attribute names assumed: TAG, LINE_NO, SERVICE, SIZE, SPEC, AREA, UNIT, CBI_UID
//     (extra attributes in the block are ignored; missing ones are skipped).
//   - Block name assumed: "CBI_VALVE" (change in Constants if needed).

using System;
using System.IO;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Geometry;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime;

namespace AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Services
{
    internal static class ValveInsertService
    {
        private static class Constants
        {
            public const string BlockName = "CBI_VALVE";

            // XData
            public const string AppName = "CBI";
            public const string XdKindKey = "CBI_KIND";
            public const string XdKindValve = "Valve";
            public const string XdUidKey = "CBI_UID";

            // Common property keys
            public const string KeyTag = "TAG";
            public const string KeyLineNo = "LINE_NO";
            public const string KeyService = "SERVICE";
            public const string KeySize = "SIZE";
            public const string KeySpec = "SPEC";
            public const string KeyArea = "AREA";
            public const string KeyUnit = "UNIT";

            // NOD tree
            public const string NodRoot = "CBI";
            public const string NodProjectStore = "ProjectStore";
            public const string NodValves = "Valves";
            public const string NodSequences = "Sequences";
            public const string NodValveSeq = "ValveTag";
        }

        // Add near the top of the class:
        internal sealed class ValveInsertOptions
        {
            public string BlockName { get; set; } = "INST_BALL-VALVE"; // default
            public string LayerName { get; set; } = "";          // optional
                                                                 // future: symbol scale, attr map overrides, etc.
        }

        internal static class BlockLoadConfig
        {
            // Add/adjust to your environment
            public static readonly string[] BlockSearchDirs = new[]
            {
                @"C:\CBICAD\AutoCAD\Blocks\Instrumentation",
                @"C:\CbiCAD\Blocks",
                @"C:\CBICAD" // fallback
            };
        }

        // --- ONLY ONE no-arg wrapper (keeps old callers working) ---
        public static void PlaceValveInteractive()
        {
            PlaceValveInteractive(new ValveInsertOptions()); // defaults to CBI_VALVE
        }

        // --- NEW overload that accepts options (Ball, Butterfly, etc.) ---
        public static void PlaceValveInteractive(ValveInsertOptions options)
        {
            var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            var db = doc.Database;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            // 1) Optional: pick a polyline to inherit context
            var context = TryGetLineContextFromPick(ed, db);

            // 2) Ask for insertion point
            var ppr = ed.GetPoint("\nSpecify valve insertion point: ");
            if (ppr.Status != PromptStatus.OK) return;
            var insPt = ppr.Value;

            // 3) Ask for rotation (relative to current UCS)
            var par = ed.GetAngle("\nSpecify rotation angle <0>: ");
            var rotation = (par.Status == PromptStatus.OK) ? par.Value : 0.0;

            // 4) Place valve (NOTE: PlaceValveCore must have the new options param)
            PlaceValveCore(db, ed, insPt, rotation, context, options);
        }

        private static IDictionary<string, string> TryGetLineContextFromPick(Editor ed, Database db)
        {
            var result = new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

            var peo = new PromptEntityOptions("\nSelect source polyline for context or <Enter> to skip: ");
            peo.SetRejectMessage("\nMust be a polyline.");
            peo.AddAllowedClass(typeof(Polyline), exactMatch: false);

            var per = ed.GetEntity(peo);
            if (per.Status != PromptStatus.OK) return result;

            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var pline = tr.GetObject(per.ObjectId, OpenMode.ForRead) as Entity;
                if (pline != null)
                {
                    var xdata = ReadXDataPairs(pline, Constants.AppName);
                    CopyIfPresent(xdata, Constants.KeyLineNo, result);
                    CopyIfPresent(xdata, Constants.KeyService, result);
                    CopyIfPresent(xdata, Constants.KeySize, result);
                    CopyIfPresent(xdata, Constants.KeySpec, result);
                    CopyIfPresent(xdata, Constants.KeyArea, result);
                    CopyIfPresent(xdata, Constants.KeyUnit, result);
                }
                tr.Commit();
            }

            return result;

}

        //private static void PlaceValveCore(Database db, Editor ed, Point3d insPt, double rotation, IDictionary<string, string> context)
        private static void PlaceValveCore(Database db, Editor ed, Point3d insPt, double rotation, IDictionary<string, string> context, ValveInsertOptions options)
        {
            {
                using (var docLock = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument.LockDocument())
                using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
                {
                    // Ensure RegApp exists for XData
                    EnsureRegAppRecord(tr, db, Constants.AppName);

                    // --- Determine which block to use ---
                    var blockName = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(options?.BlockName)
                        ? Constants.BlockName
                        : options.BlockName;

                    // --- Ensure definition exists (load from drawing or external folder) ---
                    if (!EnsureBlockDefinition(db, blockName, ed))
                    {
                        tr.Abort();
                        return; // bail if we still couldn’t load it
                    }

                    // --- Re-open tables after possible insert (after EnsureBlockDefinition) ---
                    BlockTable bt = (BlockTable)tr.GetObject(db.BlockTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                    BlockTableRecord btr = (BlockTableRecord)tr.GetObject(bt[blockName], OpenMode.ForRead);

                    // Compose valve metadata
                    var uid = Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N").ToUpperInvariant();

                    // Determine sequence scope and get next tag
                    var scope = ComputeValveScope(context);
                    var tag = NodSequenceManager.GetNext(tr, db, Constants.NodValveSeq, scope);

                    // Build final property bag (context + computed tag + identity)
                    var meta = new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                    {
                        [Constants.KeyTag] = tag,
                        [Constants.KeyLineNo] = context.TryGetValue(Constants.KeyLineNo, out var ln) ? ln : string.Empty,
                        [Constants.KeyService] = context.TryGetValue(Constants.KeyService, out var sv) ? sv : string.Empty,
                        [Constants.KeySize] = context.TryGetValue(Constants.KeySize, out var sz) ? sz : string.Empty,
                        [Constants.KeySpec] = context.TryGetValue(Constants.KeySpec, out var sp) ? sp : string.Empty,
                        [Constants.KeyArea] = context.TryGetValue(Constants.KeyArea, out var ar) ? ar : string.Empty,
                        [Constants.KeyUnit] = context.TryGetValue(Constants.KeyUnit, out var un) ? un : string.Empty,
                        [Constants.XdUidKey] = uid
                    };

// --- Insert the block reference ---
                    ObjectId msId = SymbolUtilityServices.GetBlockModelSpaceId(db);
                    BlockTableRecord ms = (BlockTableRecord)tr.GetObject(msId, OpenMode.ForWrite);

                    using (var br = new BlockReference(insPt, btr.ObjectId))
                    {
                        br.Rotation = rotation;
                        br.SetDatabaseDefaults();
                        var brId = ms.AppendEntity(br);
                        tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(br, true);

                        // --- Create attribute references for any matching attributes ---
                        if (btr.HasAttributeDefinitions)
                        {
                            foreach (ObjectId id in btr)
                            {
                                var obj = tr.GetObject(id, OpenMode.ForRead);
                                var ad = obj as AttributeDefinition;
                                if (ad != null && !ad.Constant)
                                {
                                    using (var attRef = new AttributeReference())
                                    {
                                        attRef.SetAttributeFromBlock(ad, br.BlockTransform);

                                        var key = ad.Tag != null ? ad.Tag.Trim() : null;
                                        if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(key) && meta.TryGetValue(key, out var value))
                                            attRef.TextString = value ?? string.Empty;

                                        br.AttributeCollection.AppendAttribute(attRef);
                                        tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(attRef, true);
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }

                        // Write XData to the block (CBI_KIND, CBI_UID + mirrored props)
                        WriteXDataPairs(br, Constants.AppName, meta, tr);

                        // Ensure must-have identity keys present as XData scalars
                        AppendXDataScalar(br, Constants.AppName, Constants.XdKindKey, Constants.XdKindValve, tr);
                        AppendXDataScalar(br, Constants.AppName, Constants.XdUidKey, uid, tr);

                        // Persist cross-ref in NOD (Valves/{UID})
                        NodValveRegistry.UpsertValve(tr, db, uid, br, meta);

                        //// Select it so Properties Palette updates
                        //ed.SetImpliedSelection(new[] { brId });

                        // ChangeHistory hook (no-throw)
                        ChangeHistoryHook.TryRecordInsert(uid, br.Handle, meta);
                    }

                    tr.Commit();
                    try
                    {
                        // If you previously selected the new valve, consider not doing that anymore.
                        // Either way, reset implied selection so the palette’s reactors see the next click.
                        ed.SetImpliedSelection(Array.Empty<ObjectId>());
                        ed.Regen();
                    }
                    catch { /* ignore */ }
                }
            }
        }

        private static void CopyIfPresent(IDictionary<string, string> src, string key, IDictionary<string, string> dst)
        {
            if (src != null && dst != null && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(key))
            {
                string v;
                if (src.TryGetValue(key, out v) && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(v))
                    dst[key] = v;
            }
        }

        private static string ComputeValveScope(IDictionary<string, string> ctx)
        {
            var area = ctx.TryGetValue(Constants.KeyArea, out var a) ? a : string.Empty;
            var service = ctx.TryGetValue(Constants.KeyService, out var s) ? s : string.Empty;

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(area) && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(service))
                return $"{area}-{service}";

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(area))
                return area;

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(service))
                return service;

            return "GLOBAL";
        }

        #region XData helpers

        private static void EnsureRegAppRecord(Transaction tr, Database db, string appName)
        {
            var reg = (RegAppTable)tr.GetObject(db.RegAppTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
            if (!reg.Has(appName))
            {
                reg.UpgradeOpen();
                var rec = new RegAppTableRecord { Name = appName };
                reg.Add(rec);
                tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(rec, add: true);
            }
        }

        private static IDictionary<string, string> ReadXDataPairs(Entity ent, string appName)
        {
            var result = new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
            var rb = ent.GetXDataForApplication(appName);
            if (rb == null) return result;

            var tv = rb.AsArray();
            // Expected format: (app name), then repeated (key, value) pairs as strings.
            for (int i = 1; i + 1 < tv.Length; i += 2)
            {
                var key = tv[i].Value as string;
                var val = tv[i + 1].Value as string;
                if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(key))
                    result[key] = val ?? string.Empty;
            }
            return result;
        }

        private static void WriteXDataPairs(Entity ent, string appName, IDictionary<string, string> kv, Transaction tr)
        {
            var rb = new ResultBuffer();
            rb.Add(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataRegAppName, appName));
            foreach (var pair in kv)
            {
                rb.Add(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataAsciiString, pair.Key));
                rb.Add(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataAsciiString, pair.Value ?? string.Empty));
            }
            ent.XData = rb;
        }

        private static void AppendXDataScalar(Entity ent, string appName, string key, string value, Transaction tr)
        {
            var existing = ReadXDataPairs(ent, appName);
            existing[key] = value ?? string.Empty;
            WriteXDataPairs(ent, appName, existing, tr);
        }

        #endregion

        #region NOD helpers (Sequences + Valve registry)

        /// <summary>
        /// Simple sequence manager stored under NOD: CBI/ProjectStore/Sequences/{seqName}/{scope}
        /// </summary>
        private static class NodSequenceManager
        {
            public static string GetNext(Transaction tr, Database db, string seqName, string scope)
            {
                // Fallback starts at 1; stored as XRecord with a single int.
                var (dict, created) = EnsureNestedDict(tr, db, new[]
                {
                    Constants.NodRoot, Constants.NodProjectStore, Constants.NodSequences, seqName
                });

                var scopeKey = scope ?? "GLOBAL";
                var nextVal = 1;

                if (dict.Contains(scopeKey))
                {
                    var xr = (Xrecord)tr.GetObject(dict.GetAt(scopeKey), OpenMode.ForWrite);
                    var vals = xr.Data?.AsArray();
                    if (vals != null && vals.Length > 0 && vals[0].TypeCode == (int)DxfCode.Int32)
                        nextVal = (int)vals[0].Value + 1;

                    xr.Data = new ResultBuffer(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Int32, nextVal));
                }
                else
                {
                    dict.UpgradeOpen();
                    var xr = new Xrecord
                    {
                        Data = new ResultBuffer(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Int32, nextVal))
                    };
                    dict.SetAt(scopeKey, xr);
                    tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(xr, true);
                }

                // Return a formatted tag string; change format to your standard if needed.
                return $"{scopeKey}-{nextVal:000}";
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Stores a cross-reference for each valve under: CBI/ProjectStore/Valves/{UID}
        /// Data: flattened key/value strings + Handle.
        /// </summary>
        private static class NodValveRegistry
        {
            public static void UpsertValve(Transaction tr, Database db, string uid, BlockReference br, IDictionary<string, string> meta)
            {
                var (dict, _) = EnsureNestedDict(tr, db, new[]
                {
                    Constants.NodRoot, Constants.NodProjectStore, Constants.NodValves
                });

                dict.UpgradeOpen();
                var key = uid;

                Xrecord xr;
                if (dict.Contains(key))
                {
                    xr = (Xrecord)tr.GetObject(dict.GetAt(key), OpenMode.ForWrite);
                }
                else
                {
                    xr = new Xrecord();
                    dict.SetAt(key, xr);
                    tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(xr, true);
                }

                var flat = new List<TypedValue>
                {
                    new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Text, "HANDLE"),
                    new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Text, br.Handle.ToString())
                };

                foreach (var kv in meta)
                {
                    flat.Add(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Text, kv.Key));
                    flat.Add(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Text, kv.Value ?? string.Empty));
                }

                xr.Data = new ResultBuffer(flat.ToArray());
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Ensures a chain of nested dictionaries exists beneath NamedObjectsDictionary. Returns the leaf.
        /// </summary>
        private static (DBDictionary dict, bool created) EnsureNestedDict(Transaction tr, Database db, string[] path)
        {
            var nod = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(db.NamedObjectsDictionaryId, OpenMode.ForRead);
            DBDictionary current = nod;
            bool createdAny = false;

            foreach (var name in path)
            {
                if (!current.Contains(name))
                {
                    current.UpgradeOpen();
                    var child = new DBDictionary();
                    current.SetAt(name, child);
                    tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(child, true);
                    current = child;
                    createdAny = true;
                }
                else
                {
                    current = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(current.GetAt(name), OpenMode.ForRead);
                }
            }
            return (current, createdAny);
        }

        #endregion

        private static class ChangeHistoryHook
        {
            // Non-throwing placeholder; wire to your existing ChangeHistoryManager if present.
            public static void TryRecordInsert(string uid, Handle handle, IDictionary<string, string> meta)
            {
                try
                {
                    // Example pseudo-call (adjust to your manager):
                    // ChangeHistoryManager.Record("InsertValve", new { UID = uid, Handle = handle.ToString(), Meta = meta });
                }
                catch
                {
                    // Intentionally swallow to avoid impacting production work.
                }
            }
        }

        private static bool EnsureBlockDefinition(Database db, string blockName, Editor ed)
        {
            // Already present?
            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var bt = (BlockTable)tr.GetObject(db.BlockTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                if (bt.Has(blockName)) { tr.Commit(); return true; }
                tr.Commit();
            }

            // Try AutoCAD support paths first
            string dwgPath = null;
            try
            {
                dwgPath = HostApplicationServices.Current.FindFile(blockName + ".dwg", db, FindFileHint.Default);
            }
            catch { /* ignore */ }

            // If not found, try our custom directories
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(dwgPath))
            {
                foreach (var dir in BlockLoadConfig.BlockSearchDirs)
                {
                    var cand = Path.Combine(dir, blockName + ".dwg");
                    if (File.Exists(cand)) { dwgPath = cand; break; }
                }
            }

            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(dwgPath))
            {
                ed.WriteMessage($"\nBlock \"{blockName}\" not found in drawing or search paths. " +
                                $"Add it to a support path or to one of: {string.Join("; ", BlockLoadConfig.BlockSearchDirs)}");
                return false;
            }

            // Import the block definition from DWG
            using (var srcDb = new Database(false, true))
            {
                srcDb.ReadDwgFile(dwgPath, FileOpenMode.OpenForReadAndAllShare, true, "");
                // This imports/merges the definition named blockName into current db
                db.Insert(blockName, srcDb, false);
            }
            return true;
        }
    }
}

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

// Version: 1.0.0
namespace AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Parsers
{
    public struct ValveTagParts
    {
        public string Prefix;   // e.g., "V" or "VALVE"
        public int Number;      // parsed integer (unpadded)
        public int Pad;         // desired left pad for formatting (optional; not required to parse)
        public string Raw;
    }
}

// Version: 1.0.0
// Changelog: 1.0.0 initial valve tag parser/formatter
using System;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.Tagging; // TagIdParser

namespace AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Parsers
{
    public static class ValveTagParser
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Parses "PREFIX-0012" into { Prefix="PREFIX", Number=12 }.
        /// If the string has more segments, we take the first two as prefix/number and ignore the rest.
        /// If no dash is present, we try to parse trailing digits as Number and the rest as Prefix.
        /// </summary>
        public static ValveTagParts Parse(string raw)
        {
            raw = raw ?? string.Empty;
            var g = TagIdParser.Parse(raw);
            var s = g.Segments ?? Array.Empty<string>();

            if (s.Length >= 2)
            {
                var prefix = s[0];
                var numStr = s[1];
                return new ValveTagParts
                {
                    Prefix = prefix,
                    Number = TryParseInt(numStr),
                    Pad = numStr.Length,
                    Raw = raw
                };
            }

            // Fallback: no dash → split trailing digits
            var (prefix2, number2) = SplitTrailingDigits(raw);
            return new ValveTagParts
            {
                Prefix = prefix2,
                Number = number2,
                Pad = 0,
                Raw = raw
            };
        }

        /// <summary>Formats a valve tag as "PREFIX-<number with pad>". If pad &lt;= 0, no padding.</summary>
        public static string Format(string prefix, int number, int pad = 0)
        {
            var num = pad > 0 ? number.ToString().PadLeft(pad, '0') : number.ToString();
            return TagIdParser.Format(prefix ?? string.Empty, num);
        }

        private static int TryParseInt(string s) => int.TryParse(s, out var n) ? n : 0;

        private static (string prefix, int number) SplitTrailingDigits(string input)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(input)) return (string.Empty, 0);
            int i = input.Length - 1;
            while (i >= 0 && char.IsDigit(input[i])) i--;
            var digits = input.Substring(i + 1);
            var prefix = input.Substring(0, i + 1).TrimEnd('-');
            return (prefix, TryParseInt(digits));
        }
    }
}

// Version: 1.0.0
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.Tagging;

namespace AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Parsers
{
    /// <summary>Thin wrapper over Shared.TagIdParser for your existing block/valve tag syntax.</summary>
    public static class BlockTagParser
    {
        public static BlockTagParts Parse(string raw)
        {
            var g = TagIdParser.Parse(raw ?? string.Empty);
            var s = g.Segments ?? System.Array.Empty<string>();

            return new BlockTagParts
            {
                Prefix = s.Length > 0 ? s[0] : "",
                Area = s.Length > 1 ? s[1] : "",
                Sequence = s.Length > 2 ? s[2] : "",
                Raw = raw ?? string.Empty
            };
        }

        public static string Format(BlockTagParts x)
            => TagIdParser.Format(x.Prefix ?? "", x.Area ?? "", x.Sequence ?? "");
    }
}

    {
        public string Prefix;   // e.g., "V" or "VALVE"
        public string Area;     // e.g., "2554"
        public string Sequence; // e.g., "0012" (as text)
        public string Raw;
    }
}

// NEW: InstrumentPropertyProvider.cs
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;

namespace AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub
{
    public sealed class InstrumentPropertyProvider : IPropertySourceProvider
    {
        private const string AppName = "CBI_INSTRUMENT";

        internal static class ProviderUtil
        {
            public static string GetEffectiveBlockName(BlockReference br, Transaction tr)
            {
                if (br == null) return string.Empty;
                // Prefer dynamic effective record when available
                ObjectId btrId = br.DynamicBlockTableRecord.IsNull ? br.BlockTableRecord : br.DynamicBlockTableRecord;
                var btr = (BlockTableRecord)tr.GetObject(btrId, OpenMode.ForRead, false);
                return (btr?.Name ?? string.Empty);
            }

            public static bool IsValidId(ObjectId id) => !id.IsNull && id.IsValid;
        }

        public bool CanProvideFor(SelectionContext ctx)
        {
            try
            {
                if (ctx == null || !ProviderUtil.IsValidId(ctx.Id)) return false;

                // Fast path: explicit XData signature
                if (XDataHelpers.HasAppName(ctx.Id, AppName)) return true;

                // Robust open using the entity's own Database
                var db = ctx.Id.Database;
                if (db == null) return false;

                using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartOpenCloseTransaction())
                {
                    var br = tr.GetObject(ctx.Id, OpenMode.ForRead, false) as BlockReference;
                    if (br == null) return false;

                    var name = ProviderUtil.GetEffectiveBlockName(br, tr).ToUpperInvariant();

                    // Heuristic for instruments (tune as you like)
                    return name.Contains("INST") || name.Contains("PSV") || name.Contains("TT") || name.Contains("PT");
                }
            }
            catch
            {
                return false; // fail-safe → lets palette go Home instead of sticking
            }
        }

        public object GetSelectedObject(SelectionContext ctx)
        {
            var map = XDataHelpers.Read(ctx.Id, AppName);
            return new InstrumentProperties
            {
                InstrTag = map.Get("InstrTag"),
                LoopTag = map.Get("LoopTag"),
                DeviceType = map.Get("DeviceType"),
                Location = map.Get("Location"),
                SignalType = map.Get("SignalType"),
                RangeLow = TryD(map.Get("RangeLow")),
                RangeHigh = TryD(map.Get("RangeHigh")),
                Setpoint = TryD(map.Get("Setpoint")),
                Owner = map.Get("Owner"),
                CalibrationDue = map.Get("CalibrationDue"),
            };
        }

        //public void Apply(object editedModel, SelectionContext ctx)
        //{
        //    var m = (InstrumentProperties)editedModel;
        //    var map = new XDataMap
        //    {
        //        ["SchemaVersion"] = "1.0",
        //        ["InstrTag"] = m.InstrTag,
        //        ["LoopTag"] = m.LoopTag,
        //        ["DeviceType"] = m.DeviceType,
        //        ["Location"] = m.Location,
        //        ["SignalType"] = m.SignalType,
        //        ["RangeLow"] = m.RangeLow?.ToString(),
        //        ["RangeHigh"] = m.RangeHigh?.ToString(),
        //        ["Setpoint"] = m.Setpoint?.ToString(),
        //        ["Owner"] = m.Owner,
        //        ["CalibrationDue"] = m.CalibrationDue
        //    };
        //    XDataHelpers.Write(ctx.Id, AppName, map);

        public void Apply(object editedModel, SelectionContext ctx)
        {
            var m = (InstrumentProperties)editedModel;
            var map = new XDataMap
            {
                ["SchemaVersion"] = "1.0",
                ["InstrTag"] = m.InstrTag,
                ["LoopTag"] = m.LoopTag,
                ["DeviceType"] = m.DeviceType,
                ["Location"] = m.Location,
                ["SignalType"] = m.SignalType,
                ["RangeLow"] = m.RangeLow?.ToString(),
                ["RangeHigh"] = m.RangeHigh?.ToString(),
                ["Setpoint"] = m.Setpoint?.ToString(),
                ["Owner"] = m.Owner,
                ["CalibrationDue"] = m.CalibrationDue
            };

            // 🟢 OPTIONAL safety addition:
            try { XDataHelpers.EnsureRegApp(ctx.Id.Database, AppName); } catch { }

            XDataHelpers.Write(ctx.Id, AppName, map);

}

        private static double? TryD(string s)
        {
            double d; return double.TryParse(s, out d) ? (double?)d : null;
        }
    }
}

// v2.0.0 (C# 7.3)
using System.Collections.Generic;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.Valves
{
    public enum ValveType { Ball, Butterfly, Check }

    public sealed class BlockDefinitionRef { public string Name; public string Path; }

    public sealed class ValveSizeMapInfo
    {
        public string DynamicPropName;
        public string Units; // "in" or "mm"
        public Dictionary<string, double> NominalToScale = new Dictionary<string, double>();
    }

    public sealed class ValveDefinitionResolver
    {
        private readonly ProjectSettingsService _svc;
        public ValveDefinitionResolver(ProjectSettingsService svc) { _svc = svc; }

        public BlockDefinitionRef Resolve(ValveType type)
        {
            var s = _svc.Read(); var k = s.ActiveProjectKey;
            var v = s.Projects[k].Blocks.Valve;

            var key = type.ToString(); // "Ball","Butterfly","Check"
            if (!v.Types.ContainsKey(key)) return new BlockDefinitionRef { Name = key, Path = null };
            var t = v.Types[key];
            return new BlockDefinitionRef { Name = t.Name, Path = t.Path };
        }

        public ValveSizeMapInfo GetSizeMap()
        {
            var s = _svc.Read(); var k = s.ActiveProjectKey;
            var m = s.Projects[k].Blocks.Valve.SizeMap;
            return new ValveSizeMapInfo
            {
                DynamicPropName = m.DynamicProperty,
                Units = m.Units,
                NominalToScale = new Dictionary<string, double>(m.NominalToBlockScale)
            };
        }
    }
}

// v2.0.0 (C# 7.3)
using System.Collections.Generic;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.Valves
{
    public static class ValveDynPropUtil
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Produces a payload for dynamic properties/attributes when inserting.
        /// For now returns a string dictionary: key = dyn prop name; value = value text/scale.
        /// </summary>
        public static IDictionary<string, string> Build(ValveSizeMapInfo map, string nominalDiameter)
        {
            var dict = new Dictionary<string, string>();
            if (map == null || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(map.DynamicPropName)) return dict;
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(nominalDiameter)) return dict;

            // Normalize ND like "2", "2.0", "2in", "DN50" — minimal first pass:
            var key = nominalDiameter.Trim();
            double scale;
            if (map.NominalToScale.TryGetValue(key, out scale))
            {
                dict[map.DynamicPropName] = scale.ToString(); // consumer may parse as double
            }
            else
            {
                // Fallback: write ND as-is; insert service can decide how to map
                dict[map.DynamicPropName] = key;
            }
            return dict;
        }
    }
}

using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.Interfaces;
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Text.RegularExpressions;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.Utilities
{
    public static class AutoCADUtility
    {
        public static List<SearchResult> SearchDrawings(IDrawingSearcher searcher, string searchString, Dictionary<string, string> drawingPaths)
        {
            if (searcher == null)
            { 
                throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(searcher), "The Search instance cannot be null.");
            }

            return searcher.SearchDrawings(searchString, drawingPaths);
            
        }

        // New method to handle wildcard text search
        public static bool TextContains(string sourceText, string searchPattern)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(sourceText) || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchPattern))
                return false;

            // Escape any special characters and replace * with .*
            //string pattern = "^" + Regex.Escape(searchPattern).Replace(@"\*", ".*") + "$";
            string pattern = Regex.Escape(searchPattern).Replace(@"\*", ".*");

            // Perform the regex search
            return Regex.IsMatch(sourceText, pattern, RegexOptions.IgnoreCase);
        }
    }

// Define SearchResult here or in its own file in the same namespace
    public class SearchResult
    {
        public string TagName { get; set; } // TagNage is the name of the Attribute tag
        public string StringResult { get; set; } // StringName is the string value stored from the Attribute
        public string ObjectType { get; set; } // Object type is defining the object, mtext, text or block
        public string BlockName { get; set; }  // BlockNmae is the name of the block
        public long CreationId { get; set; } // CreationId is supposed to be the creation order the object was created. {To be verified}
        public string DrawingName { get; set; } // Name of the Autocad Drawing
        public string DrawingPath { get; set; } // Path to the drawing
        public string ObjectHandle { get; set; } // I believe this is the Object ID. {To be verified}
        public double X { get; set; } // the X coordinate of the Object
        public double Y { get; set; } // the Y coordinate of the Object
    }
}

## Response:
11/3/2025, 2:26:16 PM

> **Analyzing code for error**
>
> The user is asking about the "block def" error with the name "Valve_Ball." It seems that the name is likely being pulled from a JSON project store, specifically from the ProjectSettingsService. The issue may stem from the way the "Valve_Ball" is defined or mapped. I'll trace it through the relevant classes like `BlockInsertService`, `ValveDefinitionResolver`, and `InsertValveCommand`.
>
> **Identifying the mismatch**
>
> In the provided code, there's no direct reference to "Valve_Ball," but the naming mismatch could stem from the JSON configuration. The JSON under `Projects.<Active>.Blocks.Valve.Types.Ball.Name` likely has a variant like "Valve_Ball". I’ll need to either update this JSON or adjust the resolver to allow for variations like this, stripping out punctuation or underscores.
>
> **Fixing the block definition issue**
>
> In the `db.Insert` function, it looks like when specifying `blockName`, the method imports all block definitions with matching names. To resolve the mismatch, I'll follow these steps: 1) Update `Project_Store.json` to set `Ball.Name` to 'INST_BALL_VALVE' and set the correct DWG path. 2) Ensure that the `CBI_PlaceValve_Ball` command triggers `InsertValveCommand.Run()`. 3) Log `def.Name` and `def.Path` before `EnsureAndInsert` and address the hyphen vs underscore issue by correcting file names.
>
> **Proposing code fixes**
>
> The name isn’t being concatenated—it's either from the `BlockName` in options or from the JSON via the resolver. To resolve the issues, I'll suggest the following changes: update the `BlockName` default to "INST_BALL_VALVE" in `ValveInsertOptions`, make sure the `Commands` map correctly, and modify `EnsureAndInsert` to load from `def.Path` if `bt.Has(def.Name)` is false. I'll also include a trace for better debugging.
>
> Thought for 41s

Short answer: yes—your block name comes from **one of two places**, not from string concatenation.

## Where the name actually comes from

You have **two different valve insert paths** in the solution:

1) **Project-Store driven path** (the one `InsertValveCommand.Run()` uses)  
- `ValveDefinitionResolver.Resolve(ValveType.Ball)`  
  → reads `Project_Store.json` → `Blocks.Valve.Types.Ball.Name` and `.Path`  
- That value becomes `BlockDefinitionRef.Name`, which `BlockInsertService.EnsureAndInsert(...)` uses:
  ```csharp
  if (!bt.Has(def.Name)) throw new Exception("Block def not found: " + def.Name);
  ```
  If your JSON says `"Name": "Valve_Ball"`, that’s exactly what will be looked up.

2) **Legacy direct inserter** (older `ValveInsertService`)  
- Defaults come from:
  ```csharp
  private static class Constants { public const string BlockName = "CBI_VALVE"; }
  internal sealed class ValveInsertOptions { public string BlockName { get; set; } = "INST_BALL-VALVE"; }
  ```
  Note your default has a **hyphen**: `"INST_BALL-VALVE"` (typo) while your DWG is `INST_BALL_VALVE.dwg` (underscore).

So, the “`Valve_Ball` not found” message almost certainly came from **your `Project_Store.json`** (path #1), not from concatenation.

---

## Fixes (do these and you’ll be good)

### A) JSON: make the names match your library
Open `Project_Store.json` and set the active project’s valve mapping:

```json
{
  "Projects": {
    "<YourActiveKey>": {
      "Blocks": {
        "Valve": {
          "Types": {
            "Ball": {
              "Name": "INST_BALL_VALVE",
              "Path": "C:\\CBICAD\\AutoCAD\\Blocks\\Instrumentation\\INST_BALL_VALVE.dwg"
            },
            "Butterfly": {
              "Name": "INST_BUTTERFLY_VALVE",
              "Path": "C:\\CBICAD\\AutoCAD\\Blocks\\Instrumentation\\INST_BUTTERFLY_VALVE.dwg"
            },
            "Check": {
              "Name": "INST_CHECK_VALVE",
              "Path": "C:\\CBICAD\\AutoCAD\\Blocks\\Instrumentation\\INST_CHECK_VALVE.dwg"
            }
          },
          "SizeMap": {
            "DynamicProperty": "SIZE",
            "Units": "in",
            "NominalToBlockScale": { }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```

> Important: the **internal block definition name inside the DWG** should also be `INST_BALL_VALVE`. If the definition inside the file is different, `bt.Has(def.Name)` will still fail after import.

### B) Code: fix the hyphen typo in the legacy path
In the older `ValveInsertService`:

```csharp
internal sealed class ValveInsertOptions
{
    public string BlockName { get; set; } = "INST_BALL_VALVE"; // underscore, not hyphen
}
```

If you’re not using this class anymore, that’s fine—but change it anyway to avoid future confusion.

### C) Make sure the command routes to the new path
In `Commands.cs`, wire `CBI_PlaceValve_Ball` to the **Project-Store** path:

```csharp
[CommandMethod("CBI_PlaceValve_Ball")]
public static void CBI_PlaceValve_Ball()
    => AutoCAD2020.Valves.InsertValveCommand.Run();
```

(Your `Run()` already prompts for Ball/Butterfly/Check, which is fine. If you want one-click Ball, add a param overload that forces `ValveType.Ball`.)

### D) Add one line of trace to prove the name being used
Drop this into `InsertValveCommand.Run()` **before** calling `EnsureAndInsert`:

```csharp
ed.WriteMessage($"\n[CBI] Valve type={valveType}  name={blockDef.Name}  path={blockDef.Path}");
```

Now you’ll see exactly which name/path your code is trying.

### E) (Optional but recommended) actually **use** `def.Path` to load the block if missing
Your `BlockInsertService` still has a TODO. Replace that section so it imports from the configured DWG when the definition isn’t present:

```csharp
public ObjectId EnsureAndInsert(BlockDefinitionRef def, Point3d position, double rotationRad,
                                IDictionary<string, string> dynPropsOrAtts)
{
    var db = HostApplicationServices.WorkingDatabase;
    ObjectId brefId = ObjectId.Null;

    using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
    {
        var bt = (BlockTable)tr.GetObject(db.BlockTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);

        if (!bt.Has(def.Name))
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(def.Path) || !System.IO.File.Exists(def.Path))
                throw new System.Exception($"Block def not found in drawing and no valid Path provided for '{def.Name}'.");

            using (var src = new Database(false, true))
            {
                src.ReadDwgFile(def.Path, FileOpenMode.OpenForReadAndAllShare, true, "");
                // Import/merge by name into current database
                db.Insert(def.Name, src, false);
            }

            // refresh block table after insert
            bt = (BlockTable)tr.GetObject(db.BlockTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
            if (!bt.Has(def.Name))
                throw new System.Exception($"After import, block def still not found: {def.Name}. " +
                                           "Verify the internal definition name matches.");
        }

        var msId = bt[BlockTableRecord.ModelSpace];
        var ms = (BlockTableRecord)tr.GetObject(msId, OpenMode.ForWrite);

        var br = new BlockReference(position, bt[def.Name]) { Rotation = rotationRad };
        brefId = ms.AppendEntity(br);
        tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(br, true);

        // TODO: set dyn props / atts from dynPropsOrAtts

        tr.Commit();
    }
    return brefId;
}
```

---

## Why you saw `Valve_Ball`
That string isn’t in the code you pasted, which means it likely came from:  
**`Project_Store.json → Blocks.Valve.Types.Ball.Name = "Valve_Ball"`** (or from an older JSON you tested earlier). Updating the JSON (Fix A) will align everything with your real block `INST_BALL_VALVE`.

If you want, paste your `Project_Store.json` `Blocks.Valve` section and your `Commands.cs` snippet for the valve commands; I’ll patch them so they’re 100% in sync and add a tiny alias resolver (so `"INST_BALL_VALVE"`, `"INST-BALL-VALVE"`, `"Valve_Ball"` all map to the existing definition automatically).

11/3/2025, 2:33:40 PM

> **Reviewing JSON formatting**
>
> I need to confirm that the JSON looks correct, particularly with names that include hyphens. Earlier code required exact matches for internal block definitions. There might have been some confusion with backslash escaping in the screenshot, but it should be fine. Also, we need to make sure definitions are imported properly using `db.Insert`.
>
> **Checking AutoCAD block name**
>
> I need to make sure the block definition in the .dwg file matches the expected name, since sometimes AutoCAD uses different internal names. A quick test is to use the Insert command or DesignCenter to check the block's name. Also, we should check if the file path is accessible in the CITRIX environment.
>
> **Checking block name match**
>
> I need to check whether there's a mismatch in the internal block name. If the name doesn't match, I can open the DWG and use commands like `BMAKE` or `BLOCK`. Alternatively, I can query the block names programmatically by iterating the BlockTable in the source database and checking how the name is mapped when inserted.
>
> Thought for 26s

Perfect—thanks for the screenshot. Two quick confirmations and a tiny patch:

## What you’ve set
- JSON now maps:
  - **Ball** → `"Name": "INST_BALL-VALVE"` with `Path` to `…\Instrumentation\INST_BALL-VALVE.dwg`
  - **Butterfly** → `"INST_BFLY-VALVE"`
  - **Check** → your library path (make sure the file exists)
- Filenames **use a hyphen** (`-`). That’s fine—as long as the code asks for the same name.

## Why it still might fail
Your `BlockInsertService.EnsureAndInsert(...)` currently **assumes the block definition is already in the drawing** and throws:
```csharp
if (!bt.Has(def.Name)) throw new Exception("Block def not found: " + def.Name);
```
So even with correct JSON, the first time you place a valve in a new DWG it will fail unless the definition is already loaded.

## Patch (drop-in)
Replace the TODO section in `BlockInsertService.EnsureAndInsert` with this (imports from `def.Path` if missing):

```csharp
// v2.0.1 — load block def from def.Path when absent
public ObjectId EnsureAndInsert(BlockDefinitionRef def, Point3d position, double rotationRad,
                                IDictionary<string, string> dynPropsOrAtts)
{
    var db = HostApplicationServices.WorkingDatabase;
    ObjectId brefId = ObjectId.Null;

    using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
    {
        var bt = (BlockTable)tr.GetObject(db.BlockTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);

        if (!bt.Has(def.Name))
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(def.Path) || !System.IO.File.Exists(def.Path))
                throw new System.Exception(
                    $"Block def '{def.Name}' not found in drawing and no valid Path provided.\nPath: {def.Path ?? "(null)"}");

            using (var src = new Database(false, true))
            {
                src.ReadDwgFile(def.Path, FileOpenMode.OpenForReadAndAllShare, true, "");
                // Create/import a block definition named def.Name from the source ModelSpace
                db.Insert(def.Name, src, false);
            }

            // refresh handle to BlockTable after insert
            bt = (BlockTable)tr.GetObject(db.BlockTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
            if (!bt.Has(def.Name))
                throw new System.Exception($"After import, block def still not present: {def.Name}");
        }

        var msId = bt[BlockTableRecord.ModelSpace];
        var ms = (BlockTableRecord)tr.GetObject(msId, OpenMode.ForWrite);

        var br = new BlockReference(position, bt[def.Name]) { Rotation = rotationRad };
        brefId = ms.AppendEntity(br);
        tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(br, true);

        // TODO: apply dyn props/atts from dynPropsOrAtts (safe to leave for later)

        tr.Commit();
    }
    return brefId;
}
```

## One-line trace (super helpful)
Add this before calling `EnsureAndInsert` in `InsertValveCommand.Run()`:
```csharp
ed.WriteMessage($"\n[CBI] Using block: {blockDef.Name} | {blockDef.Path}");
```
Now you’ll see exactly which name/path are being used.

## Quick sanity checks
1) Open `INST_BALL-VALVE.dwg` and confirm the geometry you expect is in **Model Space** (the `db.Insert(name, src, …)` call clones Model Space into a block definition named `name`).
2) Make sure your **Check** valve `Path` points to a real DWG (your screenshot shows `C:\\Libraries\\valves.dwg`; verify it exists).
3) Keep the hyphenated names consistent everywhere (your JSON and filenames already are).

Do those and `CBI_PlaceValve_Ball` → pick “Ball” should insert `INST_BALL-VALVE` on first use, even in a fresh drawing.
