```csharp
// IO + factory helpers for ProjectStoreService (v1)
// ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
using System;
using System.IO;
using System.Text;
using Newtonsoft.Json;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static partial class ProjectStoreService
    {
        private static readonly JsonSerializerSettings Json =
            new JsonSerializerSettings { Formatting = Formatting.Indented, NullValueHandling = NullValueHandling.Ignore };

        // ---------- Factory ----------
        public static V1.ProjectStoreV1 CreateNewStore(string projectName = "New Project")
        {
            return new V1.ProjectStoreV1
            {
                Version = "1.0",
                Project = new V1.ProjectInfoV1 { Name = projectName },
                Config = new V1.StoreConfigV1
                {
                    GlobalValvePrefix = "V",
                    GraceDays = 7,
                    PreferReleasedLowestFirst = true
                },
                Systems = new System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, V1.SystemCounterV1>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                {
                    { "GENERAL", new V1.SystemCounterV1 { Prefix = "INST", Pad = 4, Start = 1, End = 9999, Next = 1 } }
                },
                Tags = new System.Collections.Generic.List<V1.TagRecordV1>(),
                Released = new System.Collections.Generic.List<V1.TagReleaseRecordV1>(),
                History = new System.Collections.Generic.List<V1.HistoryEntryV1>()
            };
        }

        // ---------- IO ----------
        public static V1.ProjectStoreV1 Load(string path)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(path)) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(path));
            var json = File.ReadAllText(path, Encoding.UTF8);
            var store = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<V1.ProjectStoreV1>(json, Json);
            if (store == null) throw new InvalidOperationException("Failed to deserialize ProjectStore.");
            ProjectStoreValidator.ValidateOrThrow(store);
            return store;
        }

        public static void SaveAtomic(string path, V1.ProjectStoreV1 store)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(path)) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(path));
            if (store == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(store));
            ProjectStoreValidator.ValidateOrThrow(store);

            var tmp = path + ".tmp";
            var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(store, Json);
            File.WriteAllText(tmp, json, Encoding.UTF8);

            if (File.Exists(path)) File.Replace(tmp, path, null);
            else File.Move(tmp, path);
        }

        // ---------- Convenience path overloads (used by LineTagSettings) ----------
        public static string ReadGlobalValvePrefix(string path) => ReadGlobalValvePrefix(Load(path));
        public static int ReadGraceDays(string path) => ReadGraceDays(Load(path));
        public static bool ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(string path) => ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(Load(path));

        public static void WriteGlobalValvePrefix(string path, string prefix)
        { var s = Load(path); WriteGlobalValvePrefix(s, prefix); SaveAtomic(path, s); }

        public static void WriteGraceDays(string path, int days)
        { var s = Load(path); WriteGraceDays(s, days); SaveAtomic(path, s); }

        public static void WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(string path, bool value)
        { var s = Load(path); WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(s, value); SaveAtomic(path, s); }

        // ---------- DTO used by TagNumbersDynamic ----------
        // NOTE: TagNumbersDynamic expects Name/SystemKey/Next.
        public sealed class SystemNextInfo
        {
            public string Name { get; set; }       // display-friendly name (optional)
            public string SystemKey { get; set; }  // dictionary key in store.Systems
            public string Prefix { get; set; }
            public long   Next { get; set; }       // long for safety; UI casts to long
            public int    End  { get; set; }
        }
    }
}
```

### 2) `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/TagStoreV1.cs`

```csharp
// v1.0 Tag logic helpers (allocation, orphan/release, reassign)
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class TagStoreV1
    {
        // ---------------- helpers ----------------
        private static string FormatId(V1.SystemCounterV1 sys, int number)
            => $"{sys.Prefix}-{number.ToString().PadLeft(sys.Pad, '0')}";

        private static bool TryParseNumericSuffix(string id, out int n)
        {
            n = 0;
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(id)) return false;
            var dash = id.LastIndexOf('-');
            if (dash < 0 || dash == id.Length - 1) return false;
            return int.TryParse(id.Substring(dash + 1), out n);
        }

        // Find a tag record (case-insensitive)
        public static V1.TagRecordV1 Find(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string id)
            => s?.Tags?.Find(t => string.Equals(t.Id, id, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));

        // ---------------- Allocate (full) ----------------
        public static V1.TagRecordV1 AllocateNext(
            V1.ProjectStoreV1 store,
            string systemKey,
            string drawing,
            string entityHandle,
            string reason,
            string by,
            string source,
            string note)
        {
            if (store is null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(store));
            if (!store.Systems.TryGetValue(systemKey, out var sys))
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"System '{systemKey}' not found.");

            // Prefer released pool first (lowest numeric in this system/prefix)
            if (store.Config?.PreferReleasedLowestFirst == true && store.Released.Count > 0)
            {
                var candidate = store.Released
                    .Where(r => r.Id.StartsWith(sys.Prefix + "-", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                    .OrderBy(r => TryParseNumericSuffix(r.Id, out var num) ? num : int.MaxValue)
                    .ThenBy(r => r.Id, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                    .FirstOrDefault();

                if (candidate != null)
                {
                    store.Released.Remove(candidate);

                    var rec = new V1.TagRecordV1
                    {
                        Id = candidate.Id,
                        System = systemKey,
                        Drawing = drawing ?? string.Empty,
                        EntityHandle = entityHandle ?? string.Empty,
                        Status = V1.TagStatusV1.Active,
                        By = by ?? string.Empty,
                        Notes = note ?? string.Empty
                    };

                    rec.History.Add(new V1.TagHistoryV1
                    {
                        Action = "AllocatedFromReleased",
                        By = by ?? string.Empty,
                        Details = $"{reason ?? "Reused"} (source: {source ?? "n/a"})"
                    });

                    store.Tags.Add(rec);
                    store.History.Add(new V1.HistoryEntryV1
                    {
                        Action = "AllocateFromReleased",
                        By = by ?? string.Empty,
                        Details = rec.Id
                    });

                    return rec;
                }
            }

            // Normal allocation from counter
            if (sys.Next < sys.Start) sys.Next = sys.Start;
            if (sys.Next > sys.End)
                throw new InvalidOperationException(
                    $"System '{systemKey}' exhausted (Next={sys.Next}, End={sys.End}).");

            var id = FormatId(sys, sys.Next);
            sys.Next++; // advance counter

            var record = new V1.TagRecordV1
            {
                Id = id,
                System = systemKey,
                Drawing = drawing ?? string.Empty,
                EntityHandle = entityHandle ?? string.Empty,
                Status = V1.TagStatusV1.Active,
                By = by ?? string.Empty,
                Notes = note ?? string.Empty
            };

            record.History.Add(new V1.TagHistoryV1
            {
                Action = "Allocated",
                By = by ?? string.Empty,
                Details = $"{reason ?? "Allocated"} (source: {source ?? "n/a"})"
            });

            store.Tags.Add(record);
            store.History.Add(new V1.HistoryEntryV1
            {
                Action = "Allocate",
                By = by ?? string.Empty,
                Details = id
            });

            return record;
        }

        // ---------------- Allocate (compat overloads) ----------------
        // 6-arg: reason + by (defaults source/note)
        public static V1.TagRecordV1 AllocateNext(
            V1.ProjectStoreV1 store,
            string systemKey,
            string drawing,
            string entityHandle,
            string reason,
            string by)
            => AllocateNext(store, systemKey, drawing, entityHandle, reason, by, "CBI_AddTag", null);

        // 4-arg: most relaxed
        public static V1.TagRecordV1 AllocateNext(
            V1.ProjectStoreV1 store,
            string systemKey,
            string drawing,
            string entityHandle)
            => AllocateNext(store, systemKey, drawing, entityHandle,
                            "Manual allocation", Environment.UserName ?? "unknown",
                            "CBI_AddTag", null);

        // ---------------- Status changes ----------------
        public static bool MarkOrphan(V1.ProjectStoreV1 store, string id, string by, string details = null)
        {
            var rec = store.Tags.FirstOrDefault(t => string.Equals(t.Id, id, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
            if (rec == null) return false;

            rec.Status = V1.TagStatusV1.Orphan;
            rec.OrphanedAtUtc = DateTime.UtcNow;
            rec.History.Add(new V1.TagHistoryV1 { Action = "MarkedOrphan", By = by ?? string.Empty, Details = details ?? string.Empty });
            store.History.Add(new V1.HistoryEntryV1 { Action = "MarkedOrphan", By = by ?? string.Empty, Details = id });
            return true;
        }

        public static bool Release(V1.ProjectStoreV1 store, string id, string reason, string by)
        {
            var rec = store.Tags.FirstOrDefault(t => string.Equals(t.Id, id, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
            if (rec == null) return false;

            if (rec.Status != V1.TagStatusV1.Orphan)
                throw new InvalidOperationException($"Tag '{id}' is not an Orphan.");

            var grace = Math.Max(0, store.Config?.GraceDays ?? 0);
            var ok = !rec.OrphanedAtUtc.HasValue || (DateTime.UtcNow - rec.OrphanedAtUtc.Value).TotalDays >= grace;
            if (!ok) return false;

            store.Released.Add(new V1.TagReleaseRecordV1
            {
                Id = rec.Id,
                Reason = reason ?? string.Empty,
                By = by ?? string.Empty
            });

            rec.Status = V1.TagStatusV1.Released;
            rec.History.Add(new V1.TagHistoryV1 { Action = "Released", By = by ?? string.Empty, Details = reason ?? string.Empty });
            store.History.Add(new V1.HistoryEntryV1 { Action = "Released", By = by ?? string.Empty, Details = id });
            return true;
        }

        public static V1.TagRecordV1 Reassign(V1.ProjectStoreV1 store, string id, string newEntityHandle, string newDrawing, string by)
        {
            var rec = store.Tags.FirstOrDefault(t => string.Equals(t.Id, id, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
            if (rec == null) return null;

            var from = $"{rec.Drawing}:{rec.EntityHandle}";
            rec.EntityHandle = newEntityHandle ?? string.Empty;
            rec.Drawing = newDrawing ?? rec.Drawing;
            rec.History.Add(new V1.TagHistoryV1 { Action = "Reassigned", By = by ?? string.Empty, Details = $"{from} → {rec.Drawing}:{rec.EntityHandle}" });
            store.History.Add(new V1.HistoryEntryV1 { Action = "Reassigned", By = by ?? string.Empty, Details = id });
            return rec;
        }

        // ---------------- queries ----------------
        public static IEnumerable<V1.TagRecordV1> FindOrphans(V1.ProjectStoreV1 store)
            => store.Tags.Where(t => t.Status == V1.TagStatusV1.Orphan);

        public static bool Exists(V1.ProjectStoreV1 store, string id)
            => store.Tags.Any(t => string.Equals(t.Id, id, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
    }
}
```

// ============================================================================
// Project   : CBI Tools – AutoCAD 2020
// Module    : TagManagerService.cs
// Purpose   : Core service for valve tag allocation, release, and orphan cleanup.
// Author    : Brian Ranstead / ChatGPT CoDev
// Created   : 2025-11-04
// Version   : v0.9.0 (C# 7.3 compatible)
//
// Summary   :
//  - Integrates TagStoreV1 and ProjectStoreV1 logic into AutoCAD.
//  - Handles allocation/release of tag IDs directly from valve blocks.
//  - Reads/writes ProjectStore.json path from NOD (CBI/ProjectStore/Path).
//  - Adds/Removes XData and InstrTag attributes on valve entities.
//  - Provides 3 routed commands: Add, Release, and Sweep.
//
// Dependencies:
//  - AutoCAD2020.Block_Operations.XDataLinkUtil
//  - AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.TagStoreV1
//  - AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1.ProjectStoreV1
//
// Notes:
//  - This class follows the CBI standard “service-layer” design (no UI).
//  - All entry points are static and callable via Commands.cs.
//
// Change Log:
//  v0.9.0  Initial integration for Tag Manager – added AddTag, ReleaseTag, Sweep commands.
// ============================================================================

using System;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;

using AutoCAD2020.Block_Operations; // XDataLinkUtil
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;       // TagStoreV1
//using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;    // ProjectStoreV1, TagStatusV1
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;
using StoreSvc = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.ProjectStoreService;
using TagStore = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.TagStoreV1;
using StoreGuards = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.StoreGuards;

namespace AutoCAD2020.Tagging.services
{
    public static class TagManagerService
    {
        // ---- Public entry points (call these from Commands.cs) ----------------

        // Allocate a new tag ID to a selected valve block (and stamp XData)
        public static void AddTagToSelectedValve()
        {
            var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            if (!TryLoadStoreForActiveDoc(doc, ed, out var storePath, out var store))
                return;

            // Pick a block
            var br = PromptForBlockReference(ed, "Select valve block to tag");
            if (br == null) return;

            // Choose a system (keywords from JSON Systems)
            var systemKey = PromptForSystemKey(ed, store);
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(systemKey)) return;

            using (var tr = doc.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var brObj = (BlockReference)tr.GetObject(br.ObjectId, OpenMode.ForWrite);
                var handleHex = brObj.Handle.ToString();

                // Allocate — prefer released pool if configured
                var rec = TagStoreV1.AllocateNext(
                    store,
                    systemKey,
                    drawing: doc.Name ?? "",
                    entityHandle: handleHex,
                    by: Environment.UserName ?? "unknown",
                    note: "TagManagerService.AddTagToSelectedValve");

                // XDATA: add ID, make it primary, also mirror visible attribute
                XDataLinkUtil.AddValveTagId(tr, brObj, rec.Id);
                XDataLinkUtil.MakePrimaryValveTagId(tr, brObj, rec.Id);
                XDataLinkUtil.SetInstrTag(tr, brObj, rec.Id);

                tr.Commit();
            }

            // Persist JSON
            ProjectStoreService.Save(storePath, store);
            ed.WriteMessage($"\nTag allocated and applied.");
        }

        // Mark current ID on a selected valve as orphan, then try to release
        public static void ReleaseTagFromSelectedValve()
        {
            var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            if (!TryLoadStoreForActiveDoc(doc, ed, out var storePath, out var store))
                return;

            var br = PromptForBlockReference(ed, "Select valve block to release its primary tag");
            if (br == null) return;

            string idToRelease = null;
            using (var tr = doc.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var brObj = (BlockReference)tr.GetObject(br.ObjectId, OpenMode.ForWrite);
                var ids = XDataLinkUtil.GetValveTagIds(tr, brObj);
                if (ids != null && ids.Count > 0)
                    idToRelease = ids[0];

                if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(idToRelease))
                {
                    ed.WriteMessage("\nNo valve tag IDs found on selection.");
                    return;
                }

                // Mark orphan (so grace logic is respected)
                TagStoreV1.MarkOrphan(store, idToRelease, Environment.UserName, "User requested release");

                // Attempt immediate release (will respect grace days > 0)
                var ok = TagStoreV1.Release(store, idToRelease, "User release", Environment.UserName);
                if (!ok)
                    ed.WriteMessage($"\nRelease deferred (within grace period of {store.Config?.GraceDays ?? 0} days).");

                // Remove from XDATA list and visible attr
                XDataLinkUtil.RemoveValveTagId(tr, brObj, idToRelease);
                // If it was primary, the MakePrimary step is skipped—list is already rewritten without it
                XDataLinkUtil.SetInstrTag(tr, brObj, ids.Count > 1 ? ids[1] : string.Empty);

                tr.Commit();
            }

            ProjectStoreService.Save(storePath, store);
            ed.WriteMessage("\nTag unlinked from block and store updated.");
        }

        // Sweep-orphan → release any eligible IDs across the whole store
        public static void SweepAutoReleaseOrphans()
        {
            var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            if (!TryLoadStoreForActiveDoc(doc, ed, out var storePath, out var store))
                return;

            var count = StoreGuards.AutoReleaseAllEligible(store, "AutoSweep", Environment.UserName ?? "unknown");
            if (count > 0)
            {
                ProjectStoreService.Save(storePath, store);
                ed.WriteMessage($"\nAuto-released {count} orphaned tag(s).");
            }
            else
            {
                ed.WriteMessage("\nNo eligible orphaned tags to release.");
            }
        }

        // ---- Helpers ----------------------------------------------------------

        private static BlockReferencePromptResult PromptForBlockReference(Editor ed, string msg)
        {
            var po = new PromptEntityOptions($"\n{msg}:");
            po.SetRejectMessage("\n…must be a block reference.");
            po.AddAllowedClass(typeof(BlockReference), exactMatch: false);
            var pr = ed.GetEntity(po);
            if (pr.Status != PromptStatus.OK) return null;
            return new BlockReferencePromptResult(pr.ObjectId);
        }

        private static string PromptForSystemKey(Editor ed, V1.ProjectStoreV1 store)
        {
            var keys = (store.Systems ?? new Dictionary<string, V1.SystemCounterV1>()).Keys.ToList();
            if (keys.Count == 0)
            {
                ed.WriteMessage("\nNo Systems defined in Project Store.");
                return null;
            }

            // If there’s only one, use it silently
            if (keys.Count == 1) return keys[0];

            var pko = new PromptKeywordOptions("\nSelect System");
            pko.AllowNone = false;
            foreach (var k in keys) pko.Keywords.Add(k);
            var r = ed.GetKeywords(pko);
            return (r.Status == PromptStatus.OK) ? r.StringResult : null;
        }

        // Load store by reading the NOD pointer "CBI/ProjectStore/Path"; prompt if missing.
        private static bool TryLoadStoreForActiveDoc(
            Document doc,
            Editor ed,
            out string storePath,
            out V1.ProjectStoreV1 store)
        {
            storePath = null;
            store = null;

            // 1) Try NOD
            storePath = TryReadStorePathFromNod(doc.Database);
            // 2) If missing, prompt user once
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(storePath))
            {
                var ps = new PromptOpenFileOptions("\nSelect ProjectStore.json");
                ps.Filter = "JSON (*.json)|*.json|All Files (*.*)|*.*";
                var pr = ed.GetFileNameForOpen(ps);
                if (pr.Status != PromptStatus.OK) return false;
                storePath = pr.StringResult;

                // (Optional) persist to NOD so next time it just works
                TryWriteStorePathToNod(doc.Database, storePath);
            }

            // Load or initialize file
            if (File.Exists(storePath))
            {
                store = ProjectStoreService.Load(storePath);
            }
            else
            {
                store = ProjectStoreService.CreateDefault();
                ProjectStoreService.Save(storePath, store);
            }

            return store != null;
        }

        private static string TryReadStorePathFromNod(Database db)
        {
            const string nodKey = "CBI/ProjectStore/Path";
            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var nod = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(db.NamedObjectsDictionaryId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                if (!nod.Contains(nodKey)) return null;
                var xr = (Xrecord)tr.GetObject(nod.GetAt(nodKey), OpenMode.ForRead);
                var data = xr?.Data?.AsArray();
                if (data != null && data.Length > 0 && data[0].TypeCode == (int)DxfCode.Text)
                    return data[0].Value as string;
                tr.Commit();
            }
            return null;
        }

        private static void TryWriteStorePathToNod(Database db, string path)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(path)) return;
            const string nodKey = "CBI/ProjectStore/Path";

            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var nod = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(db.NamedObjectsDictionaryId, OpenMode.ForWrite);
                Xrecord xr;
                if (nod.Contains(nodKey))
                {
                    xr = (Xrecord)tr.GetObject(nod.GetAt(nodKey), OpenMode.ForWrite);
                }
                else
                {
                    xr = new Xrecord();
                    nod.SetAt(nodKey, xr);
                    tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(xr, true);
                }

                xr.Data = new ResultBuffer(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Text, path ?? ""));
                tr.Commit();
            }
        }

        // Small holder so PromptEntity result is easy to pass around
        private sealed class BlockReferencePromptResult
        {
            public ObjectId ObjectId { get; }
            public BlockReferencePromptResult(ObjectId id) { ObjectId = id; }
        }
    }
}

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static class StoreGuards
    {
        private const string NodKey = "CBI/ProjectStore/Path";

        public static bool TryResolvePath(Database db, Editor ed, out string path)
        {
            path = TryReadPath(db);
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(path)) return true;

            var p = new PromptOpenFileOptions("\nSelect ProjectStore.json")
            {
                Filter = "JSON (*.json)|*.json|All Files (*.*)|*.*"
            };
            var r = ed.GetFileNameForOpen(p);
            if (r.Status != PromptStatus.OK) return false;

            path = r.StringResult;
            TryWritePath(db, path);
            return true;
        }

        public static V1.ProjectStoreV1 OpenReadOnly(string path)
            => ProjectStoreService.Load(path);

        public static string PromptForSystemKey(Editor ed, V1.ProjectStoreV1 store)
        {
            var keys = (store?.Systems != null) ? new List<string>(store.Systems.Keys) : new List<string>();
            if (keys.Count == 0) return null;
            if (keys.Count == 1) return keys[0];

            var p = new PromptKeywordOptions("\nSelect System") { AllowNone = false };
            foreach (var k in keys) p.Keywords.Add(k);
            var r = ed.GetKeywords(p);
            return r.Status == PromptStatus.OK ? r.StringResult : null;
        }

        public static bool SafeSave(string path, V1.ProjectStoreV1 store, Editor ed = null)
        {
            try
            {
                ProjectStoreService.Save(path, store);
                return true;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                ed?.WriteMessage($"\nFailed to save ProjectStore: {ex.Message}");
                return false;
            }
        }

        private static string TryReadPath(Database db)
        {
            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var nod = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(db.NamedObjectsDictionaryId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                if (!nod.Contains(NodKey)) return null;
                var xr = (Xrecord)tr.GetObject(nod.GetAt(NodKey), OpenMode.ForRead);
                var data = xr?.Data?.AsArray();
                if (data != null && data.Length > 0 && data[0].TypeCode == (int)DxfCode.Text)
                    return data[0].Value as string;
                tr.Commit();
            }
            return null;
        }

        private static void TryWritePath(Database db, string path)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(path)) return;
            using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var nod = (DBDictionary)tr.GetObject(db.NamedObjectsDictionaryId, OpenMode.ForWrite);
                Xrecord xr;
                if (nod.Contains(NodKey))
                {
                    xr = (Xrecord)tr.GetObject(nod.GetAt(NodKey), OpenMode.ForWrite);
                }
                else
                {
                    xr = new Xrecord();
                    nod.SetAt(NodKey, xr);
                    tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(xr, true);
                }

                xr.Data = new ResultBuffer(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.Text, path));
                tr.Commit();
            }
        }

        public static int AutoReleaseAllEligible(V1.ProjectStoreV1 store, string reason, string by)
        {
            if (store == null) return 0;
            var orphans = store.Tags.Where(t => t.Status == V1.TagStatusV1.Orphan).ToList();
            var count = 0;
            foreach (var t in orphans)
            {
                try
                {
                    if (TagStoreV1.Release(store, t.Id, reason ?? "AutoRelease", by ?? Environment.UserName))
                        count++;
                }
                catch { /* ignore invalid states */ }
            }
            return count;
        }
    }
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// File: AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/NextReaders.cs
// Extends ProjectStoreService with “peek / next” helpers used by UI panes.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public static partial class ProjectStoreService
    {
        // ---------- READ helpers (used by LineTagSettings etc.) ----------------

        public static string ReadGlobalValvePrefix(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
            => s?.Config?.GlobalValvePrefix ?? "V";

        public static int ReadGraceDays(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
            => Math.Max(0, s?.Config?.GraceDays ?? 0);

        public static bool ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
            => s?.Config?.PreferReleasedLowestFirst ?? false;

        // ---------- WRITE helpers (mirror of the READs above) ------------------

        public static void WriteGlobalValvePrefix(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string prefix)
        {
            if (s == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(s));
            s.Config = s.Config ?? new V1.StoreConfigV1();
            s.Config.GlobalValvePrefix = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(prefix) ? "V" : prefix.Trim();
        }

        public static void WriteGraceDays(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, int days)
        {
            if (s == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(s));
            s.Config = s.Config ?? new V1.StoreConfigV1();
            s.Config.GraceDays = Math.Max(0, days);
        }

        public static void WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, bool value)
        {
            if (s == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(s));
            s.Config = s.Config ?? new V1.StoreConfigV1();
            s.Config.PreferReleasedLowestFirst = value;
        }

        // ---------- “Next/Peek” helpers ---------------------------------------

        /// <summary>
        /// Returns a list of systems and their current Next/End counters for display.
        /// </summary>
        public static IList<SystemNextInfo> GetSystemNextList(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)
        {
            var list = new List<SystemNextInfo>();
            if (s?.Systems == null || s.Systems.Count == 0) return list;

            foreach (var kv in s.Systems)
            {
                var c = kv.Value ?? new V1.SystemCounterV1();
                var next = Math.Max(c.Start, c.Next);
                list.Add(new SystemNextInfo
                {
                    System = kv.Key,
                    Prefix = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(c.Prefix) ? "X" : c.Prefix,
                    Next = next,
                    End = c.End
                });
            }
            return list.OrderBy(x => x.System, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase).ToList();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Preview the next Line Tag (uses the system’s own Prefix/Pad and Next).
        /// </summary>
        public static string PeekLineTagString(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string systemKey = null)
        {
            var sys = ResolveSystem(s, systemKey);
            if (sys == null) return string.Empty;
            return FormatId(sys);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Preview the next Valve Tag (uses Config.GlobalValvePrefix with system Pad/Next).
        /// </summary>
        public static string PeekValveTagString(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string systemKey = null)
        {
            var sys = ResolveSystem(s, systemKey);
            if (sys == null) return string.Empty;
            var prefix = ReadGlobalValvePrefix(s);
            return FormatId(sys, prefixOverride: prefix);
        }

        // ---------- internal helpers ------------------------------------------

        private static V1.SystemCounterV1 ResolveSystem(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s, string key)
        {
            if (s?.Systems == null || s.Systems.Count == 0) return null;

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(key) && s.Systems.TryGetValue(key, out var exact) && exact != null)
                return exact;

            // Fallback to first system deterministically
            var first = s.Systems.FirstOrDefault().Value;
            return first ?? new V1.SystemCounterV1 { Prefix = "X", Pad = 4, Start = 1, End = 9999, Next = 1 };
        }

        private static string FormatId(V1.SystemCounterV1 sys, string prefixOverride = null, int? numberOverride = null)
        {
            if (sys == null) return string.Empty;
            var pad = sys.Pad > 0 ? sys.Pad : 1;
            var n = numberOverride ?? Math.Max(sys.Start, sys.Next);
            var pfx = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(prefixOverride) ? prefixOverride.Trim()
                      : (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(sys.Prefix) ? sys.Prefix : "X");
            return $"{pfx}-{n.ToString().PadLeft(pad, '0')}";
        }
    }
}

// ============================================================================
// File: AutoCAD2020/Valves/InsertValveCommand.cs
// Version: v0.9.0  (C# 7.3)
// Author: CBI Tools
// Purpose: Unified valve insertion entrypoint (Ball/Butterfly/Check)
// Notes:
//  - Prompts for valve type (unless pre-specified by CommandParameter).
//  - Resolves block name via ProjectStore v1.0 (Blocks.Valve.Types map).
//  - Inserts block and stamps XData links we rely on later.
//  - Delegates visible tag text to ValveTagCommand after insert.
// Dependencies:
//  - AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1
//  - AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.StoreGuards + ProjectStoreValidator
//  - XData helpers in AutoCAD2020.Block_Operations.XDataLinkUtil
// ============================================================================
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Geometry;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;
using AutoCAD2020.Block_Operations;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;   // for ProjectStoreService, ProjectStoreValidator, StoreGuards
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD2020.Valves
{
    public static class InsertValveCommand
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Interactive insert. If typeHint is null, user is prompted (Ball/Butterfly/Check).
        /// </summary>
        public static void Run(string typeHint = null)
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            // Type selection
            var type = typeHint;
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(type))
            {
                var op = new PromptKeywordOptions("\nValve type")
                {
                    AllowArbitraryInput = false,
                    Message = "\nSelect valve type"
                };
                op.Keywords.Add("Ball");
                op.Keywords.Add("Butterfly");
                op.Keywords.Add("Check");
                op.Keywords.Default = "Ball";
                var kres = ed.GetKeywords(op);
                if (kres.Status != PromptStatus.OK) return;
                type = kres.StringResult;
            }

            // Pick insert point
            var ppr = ed.GetPoint("\nPick insertion point: ");
            if (ppr.Status != PromptStatus.OK) return;

            // Load store + resolve block name
            V1.ProjectStoreV1 store;
            string storePath;
            using (var tr0 = doc.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                if (!ProjectStore.StoreGuards.TryResolvePath(doc.Database, tr0, out storePath))
                {
                    ed.WriteMessage("\nCBI: This drawing is not bound to a Project Store (CBI/ProjectStore/Path).");
                    tr0.Commit();
                    return;
                }
                tr0.Commit();
            }
            store = ProjectStore.StoreGuards.OpenReadOnly(storePath);
            ProjectStore.ProjectStoreValidator.ValidateOrThrow(store);

            string blockName = "";
            if (store.Blocks == null || store.Blocks.Valve == null || store.Blocks.Valve.Types == null
                || !store.Blocks.Valve.Types.TryGetValue(type, out blockName) || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(blockName))
            {
                ed.WriteMessage($"\nCBI: Block mapping for valve type '{type}' not found in Project Store.");
                return;
            }

            // Insert the block
            ObjectId brId = ObjectId.Null;
            using (var tr = doc.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var db = doc.Database;
                var bt = (BlockTable)tr.GetObject(db.BlockTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);

                // Ensure the block is present (user handles missing definition/import outside MVP)
                if (!bt.Has(blockName))
                {
                    ed.WriteMessage($"\nCBI: Block '{blockName}' not found in drawing. Import it and try again.");
                    tr.Commit();
                    return;
                }

                var btr = (BlockTableRecord)tr.GetObject(bt[blockName], OpenMode.ForRead);
                var ms = (BlockTableRecord)tr.GetObject(SymbolUtilityServices.GetBlockModelSpaceId(db), OpenMode.ForWrite);

                var br = new BlockReference(ppr.Value, btr.ObjectId);
                ms.AppendEntity(br);
                tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(br, true);

                // Stamp origin + linkage app
                XDataLinkUtil.EnsureRegApp(db, tr, TagConstants.LinkRegApp);
                XDataLinkUtil.StampOrigin(tr, br);

                // Record a parent-handle (self for parent) so child bubbles can link later
                XDataLinkUtil.SetXDataString(tr, br, TagConstants.LinkRegApp, "PARENT_HANDLE", br.Handle.ToString());

                brId = br.ObjectId;
                tr.Commit();
            }

            if (brId.IsNull) return;

            // Delegate to tag command to place visible tag (or attach later)
            ValveTagCommand.Run(brId);
        }
    }
}

// Project: CBI Tools
// Module : XDataLinkUtil.cs
// Notes  : Helpers for reading/writing XData links on valves/bubbles.
// Target : C# 7.3
using System;
using System.Linq;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;          // ProjectStoreService, StoreGuards
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;  // models
// assumes TagConstants.LinkRegApp & TagConstants.XdKeyValveId exist in your codebase

namespace AutoCAD2020.Block_Operations
{
    public static class XDataLinkUtil
    {
        // ---------------- RegApp ----------------
        public static void EnsureRegApp(Database db, Transaction tr, string appName)
        {
            var reg = (RegAppTable)tr.GetObject(db.RegAppTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
            if (!reg.Has(appName))
            {
                reg.UpgradeOpen();
                var rec = new RegAppTableRecord { Name = appName };
                reg.Add(rec);
                tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(rec, true);
            }
        }

        // ---------------- tiny helpers ----------------
        private static ResultBuffer BuildXDataTuple(string key, string value) =>
            new ResultBuffer(
                new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataRegAppName, TagConstants.LinkRegApp),
                new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataAsciiString, key ?? string.Empty),
                new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataAsciiString, value ?? string.Empty));

        // ---------------- Map helpers ----------------
        public sealed class XMap
        {
            private readonly Dictionary<string, string> _data =
                new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

            public string Get(string key) => _data.TryGetValue(key ?? "", out var v) ? v : null;
            public int GetInt(string key, int def = 0) => int.TryParse(Get(key), out var n) ? n : def;
            public void Set(string key, object value) => _data[key ?? ""] = value?.ToString() ?? "";

            internal void LoadFrom(ResultBuffer rb)
            {
                _data.Clear();
                if (rb == null) return;
                var arr = rb.AsArray();
                var i = 0;
                if (i < arr.Length && arr[i].TypeCode == (int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataRegAppName) i++;
                while (i + 1 < arr.Length)
                {
                    if (arr[i].TypeCode != (int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataAsciiString) { i++; continue; }
                    var key = arr[i++].Value as string ?? "";
                    if (i >= arr.Length || arr[i].TypeCode != (int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataAsciiString) break;
                    var val = arr[i++].Value as string ?? "";
                    if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(key)) _data[key] = val;
                }
            }

            internal ResultBuffer ToResultBuffer(string appName)
            {
                var list = new List<TypedValue> { new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataRegAppName, appName) };
                foreach (var kv in _data)
                {
                    list.Add(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataAsciiString, kv.Key));
                    list.Add(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataAsciiString, kv.Value ?? ""));
                }
                return new ResultBuffer(list.ToArray());
            }
        }

        public static XMap ReadMap(Transaction tr, DBObject obj, string appName)
        {
            var map = new XMap();
            var rb = (obj as Entity)?.GetXDataForApplication(appName) ?? obj?.XData;
            map.LoadFrom(rb);
            return map;
        }

        public static void WriteMap(Transaction tr, DBObject obj, string appName, XMap map)
        {
            if (obj == null || map == null) return;
            obj.UpgradeOpen();
            obj.XData = map.ToResultBuffer(appName);
        }

        // Convenience wrappers
        public static string GetXDataString(Transaction tr, DBObject obj, string appName, string key)
            => ReadMap(tr, obj, appName).Get(key);

        public static int GetXDataIntSafe(Transaction tr, DBObject obj, string appName, string key, int def = 0)
            => ReadMap(tr, obj, appName).GetInt(key, def);

        public static void SetXDataValue(Transaction tr, DBObject obj, string appName, string key, object value)
        {
            var map = ReadMap(tr, obj, appName);
            map.Set(key, value);
            WriteMap(tr, obj, appName, map);
        }

        // ---------------- Parent/Child links ----------------
        private const string ChildParentKey = "PARENT_HANDLE";
        private const string ParentChildrenKey = "CHILD_HANDLES";

        public static void SetChildParentLink(Transaction tr, DBObject child, string parentHandle)
        {
            var map = ReadMap(tr, child, TagConstants.LinkRegApp);
            map.Set(ChildParentKey, parentHandle ?? "");
            WriteMap(tr, child, TagConstants.LinkRegApp, map);
        }

        public static bool HasChildParentLink(Transaction tr, DBObject child, out string parentHandle)
        {
            parentHandle = GetXDataString(tr, child, TagConstants.LinkRegApp, ChildParentKey);
            return !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(parentHandle);
        }

        public static bool ParentHasChild(Transaction tr, DBObject parent, string childHandle)
        {
            var list = GetParentChildren(tr, parent);
            return list.Any(h => string.Equals(h, childHandle, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
        }

        public static void AddParentChildLink(Transaction tr, DBObject parent, string childHandle)
        {
            var map = ReadMap(tr, parent, TagConstants.LinkRegApp);
            var list = GetParentChildren(tr, parent);
            if (!list.Any(h => string.Equals(h, childHandle, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)))
            {
                list.Add(childHandle ?? "");
                map.Set(ParentChildrenKey, string.Join("|", list));
                WriteMap(tr, parent, TagConstants.LinkRegApp, map);
            }
        }

        private static List<string> GetParentChildren(Transaction tr, DBObject parent)
        {
            var raw = GetXDataString(tr, parent, TagConstants.LinkRegApp, ParentChildrenKey);
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(raw)) return new List<string>();
            return raw.Split(new[] { '|' }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries)
                      .Select(s => s.Trim()).Where(s => s.Length > 0).ToList();
        }

        // ---------------- Valve tag list ----------------
        private const string ValveTagsKey = "VALVE_TAGS";

        public static void AddValveTagId(Transaction tr, DBObject valve, string id)
        {
            if (valve == null || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(id)) return;

            var list = GetValveTagIds(tr, valve);
            if (!list.Any(s => string.Equals(s, id, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)))
            {
                list.Add(id);
                var map = ReadMap(tr, valve, TagConstants.LinkRegApp);
                map.Set(ValveTagsKey, string.Join("|", list));
                WriteMap(tr, valve, TagConstants.LinkRegApp, map);
            }
        }

        public static List<string> GetValveTagIds(Transaction tr, DBObject valve)
        {
            var raw = GetXDataString(tr, valve, TagConstants.LinkRegApp, ValveTagsKey);
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(raw)) return new List<string>();
            return raw.Split(new[] { '|' }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries)
                      .Select(s => s.Trim()).Where(s => s.Length > 0).ToList();
        }

        public static void RemoveValveTagId(Transaction tr, DBObject valve, string id)
        {
            if (valve == null || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(id)) return;
            var map = ReadMap(tr, valve, TagConstants.LinkRegApp);
            var raw = map.Get(ValveTagsKey);
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(raw)) return;

            var list = raw.Split(new[] { '|' }, StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries)
                          .Select(s => s.Trim())
                          .Where(s => !string.Equals(s, id, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                          .ToList();

            map.Set(ValveTagsKey, string.Join("|", list));
            WriteMap(tr, valve, TagConstants.LinkRegApp, map);
        }

        // Replace entire list (keeps other keys)
        public static void SetValveTagIds(Transaction tr, DBObject valve, IEnumerable<string> ids)
        {
            if (valve == null) return;
            EnsureRegApp(valve.Database, tr, TagConstants.LinkRegApp);

            var keepIds = (ids ?? Enumerable.Empty<string>())
                          .Where(s => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s))
                          .Select(s => s.Trim())
                          .ToList();

            var arr = valve.XData?.AsArray() ?? Array.Empty<TypedValue>();
            var list = new List<TypedValue>(arr);

            if (list.Count == 0 || list[0].TypeCode != (int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataRegAppName)
                list.Insert(0, new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataRegAppName, TagConstants.LinkRegApp));

            for (int i = 1; i + 1 < list.Count;)
            {
                bool isValveIdPair =
                    list[i].TypeCode == (int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataAsciiString &&
                    (list[i].Value as string) == TagConstants.XdKeyValveId &&
                    list[i + 1].TypeCode == (int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataAsciiString;

                if (isValveIdPair)
                {
                    list.RemoveAt(i + 1);
                    list.RemoveAt(i);
                }
                else i++;
            }

            foreach (var id in keepIds)
            {
                list.Add(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataAsciiString, TagConstants.XdKeyValveId));
                list.Add(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataAsciiString, id));
            }

            valve.UpgradeOpen();
            valve.XData = new ResultBuffer(list.ToArray());
        }

        /// Keep only IDs that JSON says belong to this parent.
        public static void PurgeForeignValveTagIds(Transaction tr, DBObject valve, string storePath, string parentHandle)
        {
            if (valve == null) return;

            var all = GetValveTagIds(tr, valve);
            if (all == null || all.Count == 0) return;

            // ✅ Load the store and validate parent ownership against it
            var store = ProjectStoreService.Load(storePath);
            var keep = all.Where(id => StoreGuards.TagIdOwnedByParent(store, id, parentHandle)).ToList();

            SetValveTagIds(tr, valve, keep);
        }

        public static void MakePrimaryValveTagId(Transaction tr, DBObject valve, string id)
        {
            if (valve == null || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(id)) return;

            var all = GetValveTagIds(tr, valve) ?? new List<string>();
            all = all.Where(s => !string.Equals(s, id, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)).ToList();
            all.Insert(0, id.Trim());

            SetValveTagIds(tr, valve, all);
        }

        public static void ClearValveTagIds(Transaction tr, DBObject valve)
        {
            if (valve == null) return;
            SetValveTagIds(tr, valve, Array.Empty<string>());
        }

        // Attribute helpers
        public static void ClearAttribute(Transaction tr, BlockReference br, string tag)
        {
            if (br == null) return;
            foreach (ObjectId aid in br.AttributeCollection)
            {
                var ar = tr.GetObject(aid, OpenMode.ForWrite) as AttributeReference;
                if (ar == null) continue;
                if (string.Equals(ar.Tag, tag, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                {
                    ar.TextString = string.Empty;
                    ar.AdjustAlignment(HostApplicationServices.WorkingDatabase);
                }
            }
        }

        // Small string/int XData helpers (kept for convenience)
        public static void SetXDataString(Transaction tr, DBObject obj, string appName, string key, string value)
        {
            if (obj == null) return;
            EnsureRegApp(obj.Database, tr, appName);

            var rb = obj.XData?.AsArray() ?? Array.Empty<TypedValue>();
            var list = new List<TypedValue>(rb);

            if (list.Count == 0 || list[0].TypeCode != (int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataRegAppName)
                list.Insert(0, new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataRegAppName, appName));

            for (int i = list.Count - 2; i >= 1; i--)
            {
                if (list[i].TypeCode == (int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataAsciiString &&
                    string.Equals(list[i].Value as string, key, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                {
                    list.RemoveAt(i + 1);
                    list.RemoveAt(i);
                }
            }

            list.Add(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataAsciiString, key ?? string.Empty));
            list.Add(new TypedValue((int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataAsciiString, value ?? string.Empty));

            obj.UpgradeOpen();
            obj.XData = new ResultBuffer(list.ToArray());
        }

        public static int GetXDataInt(Transaction tr, DBObject obj, string appName, string key, int defaultValue = 0)
        {
            if (obj == null) return defaultValue;
            var rb = obj.XData;
            if (rb == null) return defaultValue;
            var arr = rb.AsArray();

            for (int i = 1; i + 1 < arr.Length; i++)
            {
                if (arr[i].TypeCode == (int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataAsciiString &&
                    string.Equals(arr[i].Value as string, key, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) &&
                    arr[i + 1].TypeCode == (int)DxfCode.ExtendedDataAsciiString)
                {
                    var s = arr[i + 1].Value as string;
                    return int.TryParse(s, out var n) ? n : defaultValue;
                }
            }
            return defaultValue;
        }

        // Stamp origin (copy detection)
        public static void StampOrigin(Transaction tr, BlockReference br)
        {
            if (br == null) return;
            var pt = br.Position;
            var origin = $"{Math.Round(pt.X, 6)},{Math.Round(pt.Y, 6)},{Math.Round(pt.Z, 6)}";
            SetXDataString(tr, br, TagConstants.LinkRegApp, "CBI_ORIGIN", origin);
        }

        // Palette-friendly mirror
        public static void SetInstrTag(Transaction tr, DBObject valve, string idText)
        {
            SetXDataString(tr, valve, TagConstants.LinkRegApp, "InstrTag", idText ?? string.Empty);
            SetXDataString(tr, valve, TagConstants.LinkRegApp, "INSTR_TAG", idText ?? string.Empty);
        }
    }
}

// ============================================================================
// File: AutoCAD2020/Valves/ValveTagCommand.cs
// Version: v0.9.0  (C# 7.3)
// Author: CBI Tools
// Purpose: Show/attach the visible valve tag for a valve BlockReference.
// Notes:
//  - Accepts optional preselected valve (ObjectId). If null, asks user to pick.
//  - Allocates next ID (via TagStoreV1) and stamps XData + writes visible attribute.
//  - Primary ID becomes first in XData list, additional bubbles can mirror via XData.
// Dependencies:
//  - AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1 + TagStoreV1 helpers
//  - AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.StoreGuards + ProjectStoreValidator
//  - AutoCAD2020.Block_Operations.XDataLinkUtil
// ============================================================================
using System;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;   // TagStoreV1 (note: not .V1)
using AutoCAD2020.Block_Operations;
using AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;
using TagStore = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.TagStoreV1;
using StoreGuards = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.StoreGuards;
using StoreSvc = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.ProjectStoreService;

namespace AutoCAD2020.Valves
{
    public static class ValveTagCommand
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Attach/ensure a primary valve tag to a valve entity.
        /// </summary>
        public static void Run(ObjectId preselectedValve = default(ObjectId))
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            ObjectId valveId = preselectedValve;
            if (valveId.IsNull)
            {
                var peo = new PromptEntityOptions("\nSelect valve block:")
                {
                    AllowObjectOnLockedLayer = true
                };
                peo.SetRejectMessage("\nOnly block references, please.");
                peo.AddAllowedClass(typeof(BlockReference), exactMatch: false);

                var per = ed.GetEntity(peo);
                if (per.Status != PromptStatus.OK) return;
                valveId = per.ObjectId;
            }

            // Resolve store
            string storePath;
            V1.ProjectStoreV1 store;
            using (var tr0 = doc.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                if (!StoreGuards.TryResolvePath(doc.Database, tr0, out storePath))
                {
                    ed.WriteMessage("\nCBI: This drawing is not bound to a Project Store.");
                    tr0.Commit();
                    return;
                }
                tr0.Commit();
            }
            store = StoreGuards.OpenReadOnly(storePath);
            ProjectStoreValidator.ValidateOrThrow(store);

            // Choose system
            var systemKey = StoreGuards.PromptForSystemKey(ed, store);
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(systemKey)) return;

            string allocatedId = null;

            using (var tr = doc.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var br = tr.GetObject(valveId, OpenMode.ForRead) as BlockReference;
                if (br == null) { tr.Commit(); return; }

                // Allocate next ID via TagStoreV1
                var rec = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.TagStoreV1.AllocateNext(
                    store,
                    systemKey,
                    drawing: doc.Name,
                    entityHandle: br.Handle.ToString(),
                    by: Environment.UserName ?? "unknown",
                    note: "ValveTagCommand");

                allocatedId = rec != null ? rec.Id : null;

                // Stamp XData ownership
                XDataLinkUtil.AddValveTagId(tr, br, allocatedId);
                XDataLinkUtil.MakePrimaryValveTagId(tr, br, allocatedId);
                XDataLinkUtil.SetInstrTag(tr, br, allocatedId);

                tr.Commit();
            }

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(allocatedId))
            {
                // Save back to disk (atomic)
                StoreGuards.SafeSave(storePath, store);
                ed.WriteMessage($"\nCBI: Assigned {allocatedId}.");
            }
        }
    }
}

// File: TagAddService.cs
// Namespace: AutoCAD2020.Services
// Purpose : Add valve tag bubbles; reuse owned ID or allocate new once, then loop placement.

using System;
using System.Linq;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Geometry;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime;

using AutoCAD2020.Block_Operations;  // XDataLinkUtil, TagConstants, TagIndexUtil
using AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore;      // ProjectTagPath, ProjectTagStore
using AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Parsers;   // ValveTagParser

namespace AutoCAD2020.Services
{
    public static class TagAddService
    {
        [CommandMethod("CBI_AddTag")]
        public static void CBI_AddTag()
        {
            var doc = Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null)
            {
                Application.ShowAlertDialog("No active drawing.");
                return;
            }

            var ed = doc.Editor;
            var db = doc.Database;

            // Resolve Project_Store.json path from NOD
            string storePath;
            using (var tr0 = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                storePath = ProjectTagPath.GetPath(db, tr0);
                tr0.Commit();
            }
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(storePath))
            {
                ed.WriteMessage("\nNo Project_Store.json bound to this drawing. Run CBI_NewProjectStore first.");
                return;
            }

            // Ask for system key
            var pSys = ed.GetString("\nSystem name (as defined in Project_Store.json): ");
            if (pSys.Status != PromptStatus.OK || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(pSys.StringResult)) return;
            var systemKey = pSys.StringResult.Trim();

            // Pick parent valve
            var peValve = new PromptEntityOptions("\nSelect PARENT valve block: ");
            peValve.SetRejectMessage("\nMust be a block reference.");
            peValve.AddAllowedClass(typeof(BlockReference), false);
            var perValve = ed.GetEntity(peValve);
            if (perValve.Status != PromptStatus.OK) return;

            // Load store & system config
            var store = ProjectTagStore.LoadOrCreate(storePath);
            if (!store.Systems.TryGetValue(systemKey, out var cfg))
            {
                ed.WriteMessage($"\nSystem '{systemKey}' not found. Available: {string.Join(", ", store.Systems.Keys)}");
                return;
            }

            // Lock doc for edits
            using (doc.LockDocument())
            {
                // Decide the valve ID ONCE (reuse if owned; otherwise allocate new)
                string idText;

                using (var tr = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
                {
                    XDataLinkUtil.EnsureRegApp(db, tr, TagConstants.LinkRegApp);

                    var parentBr = (BlockReference)tr.GetObject(perValve.ObjectId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                    var parentHandle = parentBr.Handle.ToString();

                    var existingIds = XDataLinkUtil.GetValveTagIds(tr, parentBr);

                    string candidateOwned = existingIds?.FirstOrDefault(id =>
                        AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.StoreGuards.TagIdOwnedByParent(storePath, id, parentHandle));

                    if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(candidateOwned))
                    {
                        // Reuse the ID that actually belongs to THIS valve
                        idText = candidateOwned;
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        // Allocate a new ID and stamp it once on the valve
                        int nextNumber;
                        try { nextNumber = store.AllocateNextInSystem(systemKey); }
                        catch (System.Exception ex)
                        {
                            ed.WriteMessage($"\n{ex.Message}");
                            tr.Commit();
                            return;
                        }

                        idText = ValveTagParser.Format(cfg.Prefix, nextNumber, cfg.Pad);

                        XDataLinkUtil.AddValveTagId(tr, parentBr, idText);
                        XDataLinkUtil.PurgeForeignValveTagIds(tr, parentBr, storePath, parentHandle);
                        XDataLinkUtil.MakePrimaryValveTagId(tr, parentBr, idText);
                    }

                    // Project-wide guard (allow same-valve reuse)
                    if (AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.StoreGuards.TagIdExists(storePath, idText) &&
                        !AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.StoreGuards.TagIdOwnedByParent(storePath, idText, parentHandle))
                    {
                        ed.WriteMessage($"\nConflict: Id '{idText}' already exists in this project (different valve). Aborted.");
                        tr.Commit();
                        return;
                    }

                    tr.Commit();
                }

                // Placement loop: place as many bubbles as user wants, all with the SAME idText
                int placed = 0;

                while (true)
                {
                    var pPt = ed.GetPoint("\nPick bubble location (Enter to finish): ");
                    if (pPt.Status != PromptStatus.OK) break;

                    using (var tr2 = db.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
                    {
                        var parentBr = (BlockReference)tr2.GetObject(perValve.ObjectId, OpenMode.ForRead);
                        if (parentBr == null) { tr2.Commit(); break; }

                        var parentHandle = parentBr.Handle.ToString();

                        // Insert bubble block
                        var childBr = InsertBlockReference(tr2, db, TagConstants.BubbleBlockName, pPt.Value, 1.0, 0.0);
                        if (childBr == null)
                        {
                            ed.WriteMessage($"\nBlock '{TagConstants.BubbleBlockName}' not found in this drawing.");
                            tr2.Commit();
                            break;
                        }

                        var childHandle = childBr.Handle.ToString();
                        var childBlockName = GetEffectiveName(tr2, childBr);

                        // Avoid duplicate record of the exact same bubble
                        if (AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.StoreGuards.ChildHandleExists(storePath, childHandle))
                        {
                            ed.WriteMessage("\nThis bubble is already recorded in the store. Skipping.");
                            tr2.Commit();
                            continue;
                        }

                        // Stamp attribute with the SAME idText
                        TrySetAttribute(childBr, tr2, TagConstants.BubbleNumberTag, idText);

                        // Link parent ↔ child (guarded)
                        if (!XDataLinkUtil.HasChildParentLink(tr2, childBr, out _))
                            XDataLinkUtil.SetChildParentLink(tr2, childBr, parentHandle);
                        if (!XDataLinkUtil.ParentHasChild(tr2, parentBr, childHandle))
                            XDataLinkUtil.AddParentChildLink(tr2, parentBr, childHandle);

                        // Mirror to valve XData so Properties can show it as InstrTag
                        XDataLinkUtil.SetInstrTag(tr2, parentBr, idText);

                        // Optional NOD index
                        TagIndexUtil.TryRegisterId(tr2, idText, parentHandle, out _);

                        // Record JSON for this bubble
                        int numberForRecord = ValveTagParser.Parse(idText).Number;
                        var rec = new ProjectTagStore.TagRecord
                        {
                            Id = idText,
                            System = systemKey,
                            Number = numberForRecord,
                            Prefix = cfg.Prefix,
                            Pad = cfg.Pad,
                            DrawingName = System.IO.Path.GetFileName(doc.Name),
                            DrawingPath = doc.Name,
                            Layout = db.TileMode ? "Model" : "Paper",
                            ParentHandle = parentHandle,
                            ChildHandle = childHandle,
                            ChildBlock = childBlockName,
                            Status = "Active",
                            LastSeenUtc = DateTime.UtcNow,
                            WhenUtc = DateTime.UtcNow,
                            By = Environment.UserName
                        };
                        store.Tags.Add(rec);
                        store.Save(storePath);

                        tr2.Commit();
                        placed++;
                    }
                }

                if (placed > 0)
                    ed.WriteMessage($"\nPlaced {placed} bubble(s) for {idText}.");
                else
                    ed.WriteMessage("\nNo bubbles placed.");

                AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub.CbiPropertiesPalette.RefreshBannerIfOpen();
            }
        }

        // ---------------------- helpers ----------------------

        private static BlockReference InsertBlockReference(
            Transaction tr, Database db, string blockName,
            Point3d insPt, double scale, double rotation)
        {
            var bt = (BlockTable)tr.GetObject(db.BlockTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);
            if (!bt.Has(blockName)) return null;

            var btrDef = (BlockTableRecord)tr.GetObject(bt[blockName], OpenMode.ForRead);
            var br = new BlockReference(insPt, btrDef.ObjectId)
            {
                ScaleFactors = new Scale3d(scale),
                Rotation = rotation
            };

            var space = (BlockTableRecord)tr.GetObject(db.CurrentSpaceId, OpenMode.ForWrite);
            space.AppendEntity(br);
            tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(br, true);

            // Add attribute refs
            if (btrDef.HasAttributeDefinitions)
            {
                foreach (ObjectId id in btrDef)
                {
                    var ad = tr.GetObject(id, OpenMode.ForRead) as AttributeDefinition;
                    if (ad == null || ad.Constant) continue;

                    var ar = new AttributeReference();
                    ar.SetAttributeFromBlock(ad, br.BlockTransform);
                    ar.Position = ad.Position.TransformBy(br.BlockTransform);
                    ar.Tag = ad.Tag;
                    ar.TextString = ad.TextString;

                    br.AttributeCollection.AppendAttribute(ar);
                    tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(ar, true);
                    ar.AdjustAlignment(HostApplicationServices.WorkingDatabase);
                }
            }

            br.RecordGraphicsModified(true);
            return br;
        }

        private static void TrySetAttribute(BlockReference br, Transaction tr, string tag, string value)
        {
            if (br == null || br.AttributeCollection == null) return;

            foreach (ObjectId aid in br.AttributeCollection)
            {
                var ar = tr.GetObject(aid, OpenMode.ForRead) as AttributeReference;
                if (ar == null) continue;

                if (string.Equals(ar.Tag, tag, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                {
                    ar.UpgradeOpen();
                    ar.TextString = value ?? "";
                    ar.AdjustAlignment(HostApplicationServices.WorkingDatabase);
                    br.RecordGraphicsModified(true);
                    break;
                }
            }
        }

        private static string GetEffectiveName(Transaction tr, BlockReference br)
        {
            if (br == null) return string.Empty;
            if (br.DynamicBlockTableRecord.IsValid)
            {
                var btr = (BlockTableRecord)tr.GetObject(br.DynamicBlockTableRecord, OpenMode.ForRead);
                return btr.Name;
            }
            return br.Name;
        }
    }
}
