// File: PropertiesControl.cs
// v0.3.0 — PropertyGrid UI with Project banner + collapsible "Tag Numbers" tree
// Notes:
//  - Removed the previous top ListView/grid entirely.
//  - Added a TreeView that collapses as: Tag Numbers -> (Line ID's, Tag ID's) -> per-system rows.

// File: PropertiesControl.cs

using System;
using System.ComponentModel;
using System.IO;
using System.Windows.Forms;
using System.Drawing;                                   // Point/Size/Color/Cursors
using Newtonsoft.Json;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;             // Document, Application
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;              // ProjectStoreService
using AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore;                         // ProjectBindingService, ProjectContextBridge, ProjectTagStore

namespace AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub
{
    // IMPORTANT: partial + inherits UserControl
    public partial class PropertiesControl : UserControl
    {
        // UI
        private readonly PropertyGrid _grid = new PropertyGrid();
        private readonly ToolStrip _bar = new ToolStrip();
        private readonly ToolStripLabel _lbl = new ToolStripLabel("Source:");
        private readonly ToolStripLabel _lblSource = new ToolStripLabel("—");
        private readonly ToolStripButton _btnApply = new ToolStripButton("Apply");
        private readonly ToolStripButton _btnRevert = new ToolStripButton("Revert");
        private readonly ToolStripButton _btnSave = new ToolStripButton("Save");
        private readonly ToolStripButton _btnLoad = new ToolStripButton("Load");
        private readonly ToolStripSeparator _sep = new ToolStripSeparator();
        private readonly ToolStripControlHost _chkAutoHost;
        private readonly CheckBox _chkAuto = new CheckBox { Text = "Auto-apply", Checked = true };
        // V5 Primary — Home tag preview labels
        private readonly ToolStripLabel _lblTagHeader = new ToolStripLabel("Tags:");
        private readonly ToolStripLabel _lblLineNext = new ToolStripLabel();
        private readonly ToolStripLabel _lblValveNext = new ToolStripLabel();

        // Project banner (below toolbar)
        private readonly Label lblProjectBanner = new Label
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Top,
            Height = 24,
            TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft,
            Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 9F, FontStyle.Bold),
            ForeColor = Color.DodgerBlue,
            Padding = new Padding(6, 0, 0, 0),
            Text = "Project: (none)"
        };

        // State
        private object _currentModel;
        private object _snapshot;

        // resize grip
        private readonly Panel _grip = new Panel();
        private bool _dragging;
        private Point _dragStartScreen;
        private Size _startSize;

        // Editing focus hint (so the palette host can debounce refresh while user is typing)
        public bool IsEditing { get; private set; }
        public event EventHandler EditingStateChanged;

        public event EventHandler ApplyRequested;      // host subscribes
        public object SelectedModel => _currentModel;  // host reads

        public PropertiesControl()
        {
            InitializeComponent();  // minimal designer stub

            Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            // ----- PropertyGrid -----
            _grid.Dock = DockStyle.Fill;
            _grid.PropertyValueChanged += (s, e) =>
            {
                // 1) Keep the preview labels in sync if LineTagSettings.Prefix changed
                var name = e.ChangedItem?.PropertyDescriptor?.Name;
                if (string.Equals(name, nameof(LineTagSettings.Prefix), StringComparison.Ordinal))
                    if (_currentModel is LineTagSettings lt) RefreshHomePreview(lt.Prefix);

                // 2) Force-apply on fields that must immediately push to DWG (layer/kind)
                bool forceApply =
                    string.Equals(name, nameof(PipeRunProperties.LayerName), StringComparison.Ordinal) ||
                    string.Equals(name, nameof(PipeRunProperties.PipingRunType), StringComparison.Ordinal);

                if (_chkAuto.Checked || forceApply)
                    ApplyRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);

                // Refresh grid to reflect any formatting/read-only changes
                _grid.Refresh();
            };

            // ----- Toolbar -----
            _chkAutoHost = new ToolStripControlHost(_chkAuto) { Margin = new Padding(8, 2, 4, 2) };
            _btnApply.Click += (s, e) => ApplyRequested?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);
            _btnRevert.Click += (s, e) => Rebind(_snapshot);
            _btnSave.Click += (s, e) => SavePreset();
            _btnLoad.Click += (s, e) => LoadPreset();

            _bar.Items.Add(_lbl);
            _bar.Items.Add(_lblSource);
            _bar.Items.Add(new ToolStripLabel("   "));
            _bar.Items.Add(_btnApply);
            _bar.Items.Add(_btnRevert);
            _bar.Items.Add(_sep);
            _bar.Items.Add(_btnSave);
            _bar.Items.Add(_btnLoad);
            _bar.Items.Add(new ToolStripLabel("   "));
            _bar.Items.Add(_chkAutoHost);

            // Right-aligned preview labels
            //_lblLineNext.Alignment = ToolStripItemAlignment.Right;
            //_lblTagNext.Alignment = ToolStripItemAlignment.Right;

            // V5 Primary — right-aligned preview cluster
            _lblTagHeader.Alignment = ToolStripItemAlignment.Right;
            _lblLineNext.Alignment = ToolStripItemAlignment.Right;
            _lblValveNext.Alignment = ToolStripItemAlignment.Right;
            _lblTagHeader.Font = new Font(_lblTagHeader.Font, FontStyle.Bold);
            _lblLineNext.Text = "Line: —";
            _lblValveNext.Text = "Valve: —";

            _bar.Items.Add(_lblValveNext);
            _bar.Items.Add(new ToolStripLabel("  ") { Alignment = ToolStripItemAlignment.Right });
            _bar.Items.Add(_lblLineNext);
            _bar.Items.Add(new ToolStripLabel("  ") { Alignment = ToolStripItemAlignment.Right });
            _bar.Items.Add(_lblTagHeader);
            _bar.Dock = DockStyle.Top;

            // ----- Stack: toolbar (top), banner (top), grid (fill) -----
            Controls.Add(_grid);
            Controls.Add(lblProjectBanner);
            Controls.Add(_bar);

            // ----- Resize grip (bottom-right) -----
            _grip.Size = new Size(14, 14);
            _grip.Anchor = AnchorStyles.Bottom | AnchorStyles.Right;
            _grip.Cursor = Cursors.SizeNWSE;
            _grip.BackColor = Color.Transparent;
            _grip.Location = new Point(Width - _grip.Width - 2, Height - _grip.Height - 2);
            _grip.MouseDown += (s, e) =>
            {
                if (e.Button != MouseButtons.Left) return;
                CbiPropertiesPalette.EnsureFloating();
                _dragging = true;
                _dragStartScreen = Cursor.Position;
                _startSize = CbiPropertiesPalette.GetSize();
                _grip.Capture = true;
            };
            _grip.MouseMove += (s, e) =>
            {
                if (!_dragging) return;
                var cur = Cursor.Position;
                int dx = cur.X - _dragStartScreen.X;
                int dy = cur.Y - _dragStartScreen.Y;
                var newSize = new Size(_startSize.Width + dx, _startSize.Height + dy);
                CbiPropertiesPalette.SetSize(newSize);
            };
            _grip.MouseUp += (s, e) =>
            {
                _dragging = false;
                _grip.Capture = false;
            };
            this.Resize += (s, e) =>
            {
                _grip.Location = new Point(Width - _grip.Width - 2, Height - _grip.Height - 2);
            };
            Controls.Add(_grip);

            // Editing state tracking (optional signal to the host)
            WireEditingState();

            // Initial banner + preview
            this.Load += (s, e) =>
            {
                RefreshProjectBanner();
                RefreshHomePreview("(init)");
            };
        }

        // ---------- Editing state helpers ----------
        private void SetEditing(bool editing)
        {
            if (IsEditing == editing) return;
            IsEditing = editing;
            EditingStateChanged?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty);
        }

        private void WireEditingState()
        {
            foreach (Control c in GetAllInputs(this))
            {
                c.Enter += (s, e) => SetEditing(true);
                c.Leave += (s, e) => SetEditing(false);
            }
        }

        private IEnumerable<Control> GetAllInputs(Control root)
        {
            foreach (Control c in root.Controls)
            {
                if (c is TextBoxBase || c is ComboBox || c is CheckBox || c is NumericUpDown)
                    yield return c;
                foreach (var child in GetAllInputs(c)) yield return child;
            }
        }

        // ---------- Public API used by host ----------
        public void Clear()
        {
            _currentModel = null;
            _snapshot = null;
            _grid.SelectedObject = null;
            _lblSource.Text = "—";
            lblProjectBanner.Text = "Project: (none)";
        }

        public void ShowHome(string _)
        {
            // Bind tool/home model and let it fetch preview fields from the store
            var settings = MasterProperties.LineTag;
            settings.RefreshFromStore();
            Bind(settings, "Tool");
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Refreshes the two preview labels at the top using the bound store (v0.4).
        /// </summary>
        public void RefreshHomePreview(string _)
        {
            try
            {
                var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
                if (doc == null) { _lblLineNext.Text = "Line: —"; _lblValveNext.Text = "Valve: —"; return; }

                if (!AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) ||
                    string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                {
                    _lblLineNext.Text = "Line: —";
                    _lblValveNext.Text = "Valve: —";
                    return;
                }

                // Use store peek (GENERAL by default)
                var line = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.ProjectStoreService.PeekLineTagString(binding.StorePath, "GENERAL");
                var valve = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.ProjectStoreService.PeekValveTagString(binding.StorePath, "GENERAL");

                _lblLineNext.Text = $"Line: {line}";
                _lblValveNext.Text = $"Valve: {valve}";
            }
            catch
            {
                _lblLineNext.Text = "Line: —";
                _lblValveNext.Text = "Valve: —";
            }
        }

        public void Bind(object model, string sourceLabel)
        {
            if (model == null) model = new Placeholder();
            _currentModel = model;

            // If it's the home model, hydrate from store first so the grid shows NextLine/NextValve
            if (_currentModel is LineTagSettings lt)
            {
                try { lt.RefreshFromStore(); } catch { }
            }

            _snapshot = DeepClone(_currentModel);
            _grid.SelectedObject = _currentModel;
            _lblSource.Text = string.IsNullOrEmpty(sourceLabel) ? InferLabel(model) : sourceLabel;

            _grid.Refresh();
        }

        /// <summary>Let host call this prior to Apply to ensure editors commit pending values.</summary>
        public void CommitPendingEdits()
        {
            try { this.ValidateChildren(); } catch { }
        }

        // ---------- Store sync helpers ----------
        /// <summary>
        /// Pull a couple of store-driven values into the home settings model and refresh the grid.
        /// </summary>
        public void LoadFromStore(Document _)
        {
            var settings = MasterProperties.LineTag;

            // Sync store-based values (global prefix, and per-system numbers if you keep the expandable group)
            try
            {
                var storePath = ProjectContextBridge.GetStorePathOrNull();
                settings.Prefix = ProjectStoreService.ReadGlobalValvePrefix(storePath);
                settings.RefreshTagNumbersFromStore();
            }
            catch { /* ignore UI sync errors */ }

            RefreshPropertyGrid(settings);
        }

        private void RefreshPropertyGrid(object model)
        {
            _grid.SelectedObject = model;
            _grid.Refresh();
        }

        // ---------- Internals ----------
        private void Rebind(object snap)
        {
            _currentModel = DeepClone(snap ?? new Placeholder());
            _grid.SelectedObject = _currentModel;
            if (_currentModel is LineTagSettings lt) RefreshHomePreview(lt.Prefix);
        }

        private static object DeepClone(object instance)
        {
            if (instance == null) return null;
            var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(instance);
            return JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(json, instance.GetType());
        }

        private string InferLabel(object model) => model == null ? "—" : model.GetType().Name;

        private void SavePreset()
        {
            if (_currentModel == null) return;
            using (var sfd = new SaveFileDialog
            {
                Filter = "JSON (*.json)|*.json",
                FileName = _currentModel.GetType().Name + ".json"
            })
            {
                if (sfd.ShowDialog(this) != DialogResult.OK) return;
                var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(_currentModel, Formatting.Indented);
                File.WriteAllText(sfd.FileName, json);
            }
        }

        private void LoadPreset()
        {
            if (_currentModel == null) return;
            using (var ofd = new OpenFileDialog { Filter = "JSON (*.json)|*.json" })
            {
                if (ofd.ShowDialog(this) != DialogResult.OK) return;
                var json = File.ReadAllText(ofd.FileName);
                var loaded = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject(json, _currentModel.GetType());
                if (loaded != null) Bind(loaded, _lblSource.Text);
            }
        }

        private sealed class Placeholder
        {
            [Category("Info")]
            [DisplayName("Tip")]
            public string Message => "Select an entity or run a tool to see its properties here.";
        }

        // -------------------------------------------------------------
        // Project Config I/O  (writes back palette config edits)
        // -------------------------------------------------------------
        public void SaveConfigToStore()
        {
            try
            {
                var storePath = ProjectContextBridge.GetStorePathOrNull();
                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(storePath))
                    return;

                // Retrieve current model (LineTagSettings or home model)
                var settings = MasterProperties.LineTag;

                // Example variables you might later expose as controls in palette:
                int graceDays = ProjectStoreService.ReadGraceDays(storePath);
                bool preferLowest = ProjectStoreService.ReadPreferReleasedLowestFirst(storePath);
                string valvePrefix = ProjectStoreService.ReadGlobalValvePrefix(storePath);

                // If you later add NumericUpDown or CheckBox fields in palette, 
                // replace the read lines with their live values:
                // graceDays = (int)numGrace.Value;
                // preferLowest = chkPreferLowest.Checked;
                // valvePrefix = txtPrefix.Text;

                ProjectStoreService.WriteGraceDays(storePath, graceDays);
                ProjectStoreService.WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(storePath, preferLowest);
                ProjectStoreService.WriteGlobalValvePrefix(storePath, valvePrefix);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show($"Failed to save project configuration:\n{ex.Message}",
                    "Properties Palette", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
            }
        }

        public void RefreshProjectBanner()
        {
            try
            {
                var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
                if (doc == null)
                {
                    lblProjectBanner.Text = "Project: (no document)";
                    return;
                }

                if (AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.ProjectBindingService.TryGetBoundProject(doc, out var binding) &&
                    !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.StorePath))
                {
                    // Show project name if present; otherwise show the store file as a hint
                    var name = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(binding.Name) ? "(unnamed project)" : binding.Name;
                    lblProjectBanner.Text = $"Project: {name}";
                }
                else
                {
                    lblProjectBanner.Text = "Project: (no project bound)";
                }
            }
            catch
            {
                lblProjectBanner.Text = "Project: (unavailable)";
            }
        }

        //private void OnApplyButtonClick(object sender, EventArgs e)
        //{
        //    if (_grid.SelectedObject == null) return;

        //    var ctx = SelectionManager.TryGetCurrentContext();
        //    PropertyRouter.ApplyIfPossible(_grid.SelectedObject, ctx);
        //}

    }
}

// File: Commands_ProjectRepair.cs
// v2.0.0 (C# 7.3)
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;

namespace AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore
{
    public static class ProjectRepairCommands
    {
        private static readonly string StorePath = @"C:\CBICAD\Project_Store.json";

public static void CBI_RepairProjectStore()
        {
            try
            {
                var svc = new ProjectSettingsService(StorePath);
                var snap = svc.Read();
                var changed = ProjectStoreValidator.RepairCommon(snap);

                // Optional: if RootHint empty but ActiveProjectKey known, prompt to set it.
                if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(snap.ActiveProjectKey) &&
                    snap.Projects.ContainsKey(snap.ActiveProjectKey))
                {
                    var p = snap.Projects[snap.ActiveProjectKey];
                    if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(p.RootHint))
                    {
                        // You could reuse the folder prompt here to set RootHint.
                    }
                }

                if (changed) svc.Write(snap);
                Application.ShowAlertDialog("Project store repair completed.");
            }
            catch (System.Exception ex)
            {
                Application.ShowAlertDialog("Repair failed: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }
    }
}

// File: AutoCAD2020/ProjectStore/NewProjectCommands.cs
// v2.0.0 (C# 7.3)

using System;
using System.IO;
using AcApp = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application;
using AcDoc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Document;
using AcEd = Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using WinForms = System.Windows.Forms;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;

namespace AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore
{
    /// <summary>Centralized "new project" flows.</summary>
    public static class NewProjectCommands
    {
        private static readonly string GlobalStorePath = @"C:\CBICAD\Project_Store.json";

        /// <summary>
        /// Ribbon-friendly flow: builds support folder next to the active DWG,
        /// seeds Project_Store.json, binds NOD, and refreshes the palette banner.
        /// </summary>
        public static void CreateFromActiveDrawing()
        {
            var doc = AcApp.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            // 1) Require saved drawing
            var dwgPath = doc.Name;
            var root = Path.GetDirectoryName(dwgPath);
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(root))
            {
                ed.WriteMessage("\nPlease save the drawing first.");
                return;
            }

            // 2) Project name default from DWG
            var defaultName = Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(dwgPath);
            var name = PromptForProjectName(ed, defaultName);
            if (name == null) return; // cancel

            // 3) Support folder + local store path
            var supportDir = Path.Combine(root, "CBI_Support");
            Directory.CreateDirectory(supportDir);
            var localStorePath = Path.Combine(supportDir, "Project_Store.json");

            // 4) Create/seed store (Shared service owns shape & validation)
            var projectId = Guid.NewGuid().ToString("D");
            var manifestPath = ProjectStorePaths.GetManifestPath(); // your shared resolver
            ProjectStoreService.CreateNewStore(projectId, name, localStorePath, manifestPath);

            // 5) Bind to drawing via NOD (your AutoCAD side binder)
            ProjectNodBinder.BindProjectToDrawing(doc, projectId, name, localStorePath);

            // 6) Optional readme/changelog (idempotent)
            var readme = Path.Combine(supportDir, "Readme.txt");
            if (!File.Exists(readme))
            {
                File.WriteAllText(readme,
@"CBI Support Folder

- Project_Store.json   : Systems, counters, entities, links (schema v1)
- Changelog.txt        : High-level project log (append-only)
");
            }
            var changelog = Path.Combine(supportDir, "Changelog.txt");
            if (!File.Exists(changelog)) File.WriteAllText(changelog, string.Empty);

            // 7) UI feedback + palette banner refresh
            ed.WriteMessage($"\nCBI Project created at:\n  {localStorePath}");
            AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub.CbiPropertiesPalette.RefreshBannerIfOpen();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Interactive flow: user picks project name and a root folder anywhere
        /// (also initializes global Project_Store.json if you use one).
        /// </summary>
        public static void CreateInteractive()
        {
            var name = PromptInput("Enter Project Name:");
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name)) return;

            var root = PromptFolder("Select Project Root Folder:");
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(root)) return;

            var scan = WinForms.DialogResult.Yes ==
                       WinForms.MessageBox.Show("Scan root for DWGs and seed the drawing list?",
                                                "Seed Drawings",
                                                WinForms.MessageBoxButtons.YesNo);

            var svc = new ProjectSettingsService(GlobalStorePath);
            svc.CreateNewProject(name, root, scan);

            AcApp.ShowAlertDialog($"Project '{name}' created and set active.\nRoot: {root}");
        }

        // ---------- small UI helpers ----------
        private static string PromptForProjectName(AcEd.Editor ed, string suggestion)
        {
            var p = new AcEd.PromptStringOptions("\nEnter project name")
            {
                AllowSpaces = true,
                DefaultValue = suggestion
            };
            var r = ed.GetString(p);
            if (r.Status != AcEd.PromptStatus.OK) return null;
            var s = (r.StringResult ?? string.Empty).Trim();
            return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s) ? suggestion : s;
        }

        private static string PromptInput(string message)
        {
            using (var f = new WinForms.Form { Width = 340, Height = 150, Text = "CBI New Project" })
            using (var tb = new WinForms.TextBox { Left = 10, Top = 35, Width = 300 })
            using (var lbl = new WinForms.Label { Left = 10, Top = 10, Width = 300, Text = message })
            using (var ok = new WinForms.Button { Left = 160, Top = 70, Width = 70, Text = "OK", DialogResult = WinForms.DialogResult.OK })
            using (var cancel = new WinForms.Button { Left = 240, Top = 70, Width = 70, Text = "Cancel", DialogResult = WinForms.DialogResult.Cancel })
            {
                f.Controls.Add(lbl); f.Controls.Add(tb); f.Controls.Add(ok); f.Controls.Add(cancel);
                f.AcceptButton = ok; f.CancelButton = cancel;
                return f.ShowDialog() == WinForms.DialogResult.OK ? tb.Text : null;
            }
        }

        private static string PromptFolder(string title)
        {
            using (var dlg = new WinForms.FolderBrowserDialog { Description = title, ShowNewFolderButton = true })
                return dlg.ShowDialog() == WinForms.DialogResult.OK ? dlg.SelectedPath : null;
        }
    }
}

Got it — thanks for the full dump. I’m not going to guess. Below are **surgical fixes** for the exact compiler errors you posted. Paste them as shown.

---

# 1) Missing guard helpers (CS0117 on `StoreGuards.*`)

**File:** `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/StoreGuards.cs`  
**Add** these methods at the bottom of the class (before the closing brace):

```csharp
// ---------- Guard helpers used by Services/UI ----------

// path overloads
public static bool TagIdExists(string storePath, string id)
{
    if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(storePath) || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(id)) return false;
    var s = ProjectStoreService.Load(storePath);
    return TagIdExists(s, id);
}

public static bool TagIdOwnedByParent(string storePath, string id, string parentHandle)
{
    if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(storePath)) return false;
    var s = ProjectStoreService.Load(storePath);
    return TagIdOwnedByParent(s, id, parentHandle);
}

public static bool ChildHandleExists(string storePath, string childHandle)
{
    // v1.0 TagStoreV1 schema does NOT track child bubbles centrally.
    // For now, always return false (prevents false “duplicate bubble” blocks).
    return false;
}

// store overloads
public static bool TagIdExists(V1.ProjectStoreV1 store, string id)
{
    if (store?.Tags == null || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(id)) return false;
    return store.Tags.Any(t => string.Equals(t.Id, id, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
}

public static bool TagIdOwnedByParent(V1.ProjectStoreV1 store, string id, string parentHandle)
{
    if (store?.Tags == null || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(id)) return false;
    return store.Tags.Any(t =>
        string.Equals(t.Id, id, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) &&
        string.Equals(t.EntityHandle ?? "", parentHandle ?? "", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
}
```

---

# 2) Path/object overloads + Save/CreateDefault (CS1503, CS0117)

**File:** `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreService.cs` (the partial you already have)

### 2a) Add simple Save/CreateDefault facades

```csharp
// Back-compat: some callers still use Save(...) and CreateDefault().
public static void Save(string path, V1.ProjectStoreV1 store) => SaveAtomic(path, store);

// Minimal default: delegate to CreateNewStore
public static V1.ProjectStoreV1 CreateDefault(string projectName = "New Project") 
    => CreateNewStore(projectName);
```

### 2b) Add **string path overloads** for the “peek/next” readers used by palette/UI

**File:** `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/NextReaders.cs` (same partial class)

Add these **overloads** (keep your existing V1 versions intact):

```csharp
// ------ Path overloads (loads then delegates) ------
public static IList<SystemNextInfo> GetSystemNextList(string path)
    => GetSystemNextList(Load(path));

public static string PeekLineTagString(string path, string systemKey = null)
    => PeekLineTagString(Load(path), systemKey);

public static string PeekValveTagString(string path, string systemKey = null)
    => PeekValveTagString(Load(path), systemKey);
```

---

# 3) `SystemNextInfo` shape mismatch (CS0117/CS1061 on `.System`)

Your `NextReaders.GetSystemNextList(...)` currently populates a `.System` property. Bring the DTO back into alignment by **including all three** names so any consumer compiles:

**File:** `ProjectStoreService.cs` (where `SystemNextInfo` lives)

Replace the inner class with:

```csharp
public sealed class SystemNextInfo
{
    // Legacy/UI fields (keep all for widest compatibility)
    public string System { get; set; }      // used by some panes
    public string Name { get; set; }        // optional display
    public string SystemKey { get; set; }   // dictionary key

    public string Prefix { get; set; }
    public long   Next { get; set; }
    public int    End  { get; set; }
}
```

And in `GetSystemNextList(V1.ProjectStoreV1 s)` (NextReaders), when you `list.Add(new SystemNextInfo { ... })`, be sure to set both keys:

```csharp
System = kv.Key,
SystemKey = kv.Key,
Name = kv.Key,
```

---

# 4) `XDataLinkUtil.GetXDataString` arity (CS1501 in `CBIValveKeyUtil.cs`)

You have call sites with a **5-arg** signature. Add a compat overload:

**File:** `AutoCAD2020/Block_Operations/XDataLinkUtil.cs`

Add:

```csharp
public static string GetXDataString(Transaction tr, DBObject obj, string appName, string key, string defaultValue)
{
    var v = GetXDataString(tr, obj, appName, key);
    return string.IsNullOrEmpty(v) ? defaultValue : v;
}
```

(Leave your existing 4-arg version as is.)

---

# 5) `TagManagerService` not found (CS0103/CS0234)

This is just a **namespace casing** issue. Your class is in:
```csharp
namespace AutoCAD2020.Tagging.services
```
but call sites use:
```csharp
AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Services
```

**Fix:** change the declaration to:

```csharp
namespace AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Services
{
    public static class TagManagerService
    {
        ...
    }
}
```

Nothing else required.

---

# 6) `TagStoreV1.AllocateNext` missing-args (CS7036)

Two call sites (e.g., `TagManagerService.cs:77`, `ValveTagCommand.cs:85`) pass **named args `by:` and `note:`** but not `reason/source`. Use the 6-arg overload you already have (`reason, by`) by **adding `reason:` and `source:` at the call**.

### 6a) In `TagManagerService.AddTagToSelectedValve()` replace the allocation call with:

```csharp

    store,
    systemKey,
    drawing: doc.Name ?? "",
    entityHandle: handleHex,
    reason: "Tag allocation",
    by: Environment.UserName ?? "unknown");
```

### 6b) In `ValveTagCommand.Run(...)` replace with:

```csharp
    store,
    systemKey,
    drawing: doc.Name,
    entityHandle: br.Handle.ToString(),
    reason: "ValveTagCommand",
    by: Environment.UserName ?? "unknown");
```

(Those 6-arg calls flow to the full 8-arg version with defaults.)

---

# 7) `ProjectStoreValidator.Validate` symbol (CS0117) and “method group > int” (CS0019)

Some older files call a **`Validate(...)`** method. Add a thin shim.

**File:** `AutoCAD_Shared_Project/ProjectStore/ProjectStoreValidator.cs`  
(Wherever your validator lives.)

Add:

```csharp
public static bool Validate(V1.ProjectStoreV1 store)
{
    ValidateOrThrow(store);
    return true;
}
```

The **`CS0019 Operator '>' cannot be applied to operands of type 'method group' and 'int'`** typically means a typo like `if (Validate > 0)` — once `Validate` exists as a method returning `bool`, any `> 0` comparison should be corrected. Quick fix in **`ProjectSettingsService.cs:70`**: change the comparison to just call the method or compare an **int** value that actually exists. If you want me to patch that exact line, paste the snippet around L70 and I’ll give the corrected code.

---

# 8) “Blocks” property missing on the store model (four CS1061 in `InsertValveCommand.cs`)

Your v1 contract **may not** have `Blocks.Valve.Types` compiled yet. Make `InsertValveCommand` resilient:

**Replace** the block-name resolution chunk with this:

```csharp
string blockName = null;

// Prefer JSON mapping if present
try
{
    var blocks = store.GetType().GetProperty("Blocks")?.GetValue(store, null);
    var valve = blocks?.GetType().GetProperty("Valve")?.GetValue(blocks, null);
    var types = valve?.GetType().GetProperty("Types")?.GetValue(valve, null) as System.Collections.IDictionary;

    if (types != null && types.Contains(type))
        blockName = types[type]?.ToString();
}
catch { /* ignore reflection issues */ }

// Fallback to canonical contract defaults if mapping is missing
if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(blockName))
{
    switch (type?.Trim().ToUpperInvariant())
    {
        case "BALL":      blockName = "INST_BALL-VALVE"; break;
        case "BUTTERFLY": blockName = "INST_BFLY-VALVE"; break;
        case "CHECK":     blockName = "INST_CHECK-VALVE"; break;
        default:          blockName = "INST_BALL-VALVE"; break;
    }
}
```

This removes the compile-time dependency on a `Blocks` property while still honoring it when present.

---

# 9) Palette designer errors (CS0120/CS1061 in `TagManagerControl.Designer.cs`)

These come from the nested `partial class` and `components` field being on **`UserControl1`** while you try to override `Dispose` inside an inner `TagManagerControl`. Two simple fixes:

- Put `TagManagerControl` in its **own file** (recommended), **or**
- In that file, remove the nested class and keep a single control.

**Minimal fix inside the file you pasted:**

1) At the top, ensure a **single** class:

```csharp
namespace AutoCAD.Tagging.UI
{
    partial class TagManagerControl : System.Windows.Forms.UserControl
    {
        private System.ComponentModel.IContainer components = null;

        protected override void Dispose(bool disposing)
        {
            if (disposing && (components != null)) components.Dispose();
            base.Dispose(disposing);
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            this.components = new System.ComponentModel.Container();
            this.AutoScaleMode = System.Windows.Forms.AutoScaleMode.Font;
        }
    }
}
```

2) Delete the outer `partial class UserControl1` wrapper in that file.

That removes the static-field/AutoScaleMode errors.

---

# 10) `LineTagSettings.cs` path/object overload errors (four CS1503)

You now have both **object** and **string path** overloads in `ProjectStoreService`. Fix call sites to match:

- If they currently pass a **string path** into a method that expects a **store object**, change the call to the **path** overload, e.g.:

```csharp
// BEFORE (wrong types)
ProjectStoreService.WriteGraceDays(storePath, storeObj);

// AFTER (correct)
ProjectStoreService.WriteGraceDays(storePath,  graceDaysValue);
ProjectStoreService.WritePreferReleasedLowestFirst(storePath, preferLowest);
ProjectStoreService.WriteGlobalValvePrefix(storePath, valvePrefix);
```

If you paste the few lines around **L94/L148/L168/L169** of `LineTagSettings.cs`, I’ll hand you exact replacements.

---

# 11) `ValveTagCommand` transaction arg mismatch (CS1503)

> *Argument 2: cannot convert from ‘Transaction’ to ‘Editor’ (ValveTagCommand.cs:62)*

That means you’re calling a helper with the wrong parameter order. Likely `StoreGuards.TryResolvePath(...)` — your call uses `(db, tr0, out storePath)` but the method is `(Database db, Editor ed, out string path)`.

**Fix the call** to pass the `Editor`:

```csharp
using (var tr0 = doc.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
{
    if (!StoreGuards.TryResolvePath(doc.Database, ed, out storePath))
    {
        ed.WriteMessage("\nCBI: This drawing is not bound to a Project Store.");
        tr0.Commit();
        return;
    }
    tr0.Commit();
}
```

(Do the same pattern anywhere else you passed a `Transaction` into `TryResolvePath`.)

---

# 12) `InsertValveCommand.cs` two more `StoreGuards`/`ProjectStoreValidator` namespace errors (CS0234)

You already reference them correctly here:

```csharp
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;   // ProjectStoreService, ProjectStoreValidator, StoreGuards
```

Make sure you **do not** also have `using AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore;` lines that shadow those types. If you do, delete the `AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore` `using` for this file.

---

// File: ProjectSettingsService.cs
// v2.0.0 (C# 7.3)
// NOTE: Wire this to your existing JSON load/save IO and CBI Properties Home.
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public sealed class ProjectSettingsService : IProjectSettingsService_V2
    {
        private readonly string _storePath;
        public ProjectSettingsService(string storePath) { _storePath = storePath; }

        public ProjectStoreSnapshot Read()
        {
            if (!File.Exists(_storePath)) return new ProjectStoreSnapshot();
            var json = File.ReadAllText(_storePath);
            var snap = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<ProjectStoreSnapshot>(json) ?? new ProjectStoreSnapshot();
            if (ProjectStoreValidator.RepairCommon(snap)) Write(snap);
            return snap;
        }

        public void Write(ProjectStoreSnapshot snapshot)
        {
            var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(snapshot, Formatting.Indented);
            Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(_storePath) ?? ".");
            File.WriteAllText(_storePath, json);
        }

        // === New Project ===
        // v2.0.0 (C# 7.3) — drop-in for the existing method
        public void CreateNewProject(string projectKey, string rootHint, bool scanForDrawings)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(projectKey))
                throw new ArgumentException("projectKey required", nameof(projectKey));
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(rootHint))
                throw new ArgumentException("rootHint required", nameof(rootHint));

            var snap = Read();
            if (snap.Projects == null) snap.Projects = new Dictionary<string, ProjectEntry>();

            if (snap.Projects.ContainsKey(projectKey))
                throw new InvalidOperationException("Project already exists: " + projectKey);

            // Normalize and seed drawings (optionally)
            var normalizedRoot = NewProjectBuilder.NormalizePath(rootHint);
            var drawings = scanForDrawings
                ? NewProjectBuilder.DiscoverDwgs(normalizedRoot)
                : (IEnumerable<string>)new List<string>();

            var entry = NewProjectBuilder.Create(projectKey, normalizedRoot, drawings);

            // Ensure Tagging + Blocks defaults exist
            if (entry.Tagging == null) entry.Tagging = new TaggingEntry();
            if (entry.Blocks == null) entry.Blocks = new BlocksEntry();

            snap.Projects[projectKey] = entry;
            snap.ActiveProjectKey = projectKey;

            // Validate & persist
            var issues = ProjectStoreValidator.Validate(snap);
            // We tolerate empty Drawings[] but NEVER null RootHint or null lists.
            var critical = issues.FindAll(i =>
                i.Path.EndsWith(".RootHint", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                i.Message.IndexOf("null", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0);

            if (critical.Count > 0)
                throw new InvalidOperationException("Invalid new project: " + string.Join("; ", critical.ConvertAll(c => c.Message)));

            Write(snap);
        }

        // === Prefix read/write for CBI Properties Home ===
        public string GetValvePrefix() => Read().Projects.TryGetValue(GetActive(), out var p) ? p.Tagging.Valve.Prefix : "V-";
        public void SetValvePrefix(string prefix)
        {
            var snap = Read();
            var key = GetActiveOrThrow(snap);
            snap.Projects[key].Tagging.Valve.Prefix = prefix ?? "V-";
            Write(snap);
        }

        public string GetLinePrefix() => Read().Projects.TryGetValue(GetActive(), out var p) ? p.Tagging.Line.Prefix : "L-";
        public void SetLinePrefix(string prefix)
        {
            var snap = Read();
            var key = GetActiveOrThrow(snap);
            snap.Projects[key].Tagging.Line.Prefix = prefix ?? "L-";
            Write(snap);
        }

        // === Peek/Allocate (no increment vs increment) ===
        public int PeekNextValveNumber()
        {
            var s = Read(); var k = GetActiveOrThrow(s); return s.Projects[k].Tagging.Valve.NextNumber;
        }
        public int PeekNextLineNumber()
        {
            var s = Read(); var k = GetActiveOrThrow(s); return s.Projects[k].Tagging.Line.NextNumber;
        }

        public string AllocateValveTag()
        {
            var s = Read(); var k = GetActiveOrThrow(s);
            var ch = s.Projects[k].Tagging.Valve;
            var tag = ch.Prefix + ch.NextNumber.ToString(ch.Padding > 0 ? new string('0', ch.Padding) : "0");
            ch.NextNumber++;
            Write(s);
            return tag;
        }

        public string AllocateLineTag()
        {
            var s = Read(); var k = GetActiveOrThrow(s);
            var ch = s.Projects[k].Tagging.Line;
            var tag = ch.Prefix + ch.NextNumber.ToString(ch.Padding > 0 ? new string('0', ch.Padding) : "0");
            ch.NextNumber++;
            Write(s);
            return tag;
        }

        private string GetActive() => Read().ActiveProjectKey;
        private static string GetActiveOrThrow(ProjectStoreSnapshot s)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s.ActiveProjectKey)) throw new InvalidOperationException("No active project.");
            return s.ActiveProjectKey;
        }

        // Ensures a project with key exists; if not, creates a minimal one.
        public void EnsureProject(string projectKey, string rootHint)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(projectKey)) throw new ArgumentException("projectKey required");
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(rootHint)) throw new ArgumentException("rootHint required");

            var snap = Read();
            if (snap.Projects == null) snap.Projects = new Dictionary<string, ProjectEntry>();

            if (!snap.Projects.ContainsKey(projectKey))
            {
                var entry = NewProjectBuilder.Create(projectKey, NewProjectBuilder.NormalizePath(rootHint));
                if (entry.Tagging == null) entry.Tagging = new TaggingEntry();
                if (entry.Blocks == null) entry.Blocks = new BlocksEntry();

                snap.Projects[projectKey] = entry;
                snap.ActiveProjectKey = projectKey;
                Write(snap);
            }
            else if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(snap.ActiveProjectKey))
            {
                snap.ActiveProjectKey = projectKey;
                Write(snap);
            }
        }

        // Adds a DWG path to the project's Drawings[] if missing (de-duplicated).
        public bool AddDrawingIfMissing(string projectKey, string drawingPath)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(projectKey)) throw new ArgumentException("projectKey required");
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(drawingPath)) return false;

            var snap = Read();
            if (snap.Projects == null || !snap.Projects.ContainsKey(projectKey)) return false;

            var norm = NewProjectBuilder.NormalizePath(drawingPath);
            var list = snap.Projects[projectKey].Drawings ?? (snap.Projects[projectKey].Drawings = new List<DrawingEntry>());

            foreach (var d in list)
                if (string.Equals(d?.Path, norm, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                    return false; // already present

            list.Add(new DrawingEntry { Path = norm });
            Write(snap);
            return true;
        }

        // Convenience: Ensure project + add single drawing atomically.
        public bool EnsureProjectAndAddDrawing(string projectKey, string rootHint, string drawingPath)
        {
            EnsureProject(projectKey, rootHint);
            return AddDrawingIfMissing(projectKey, drawingPath);
        }
    }

    public interface IProjectSettingsService_V2
    {
        ProjectStoreSnapshot Read();
        void Write(ProjectStoreSnapshot snapshot);
        void CreateNewProject(string projectKey, string rootHint, bool scanForDrawings);

        string GetValvePrefix();
        void SetValvePrefix(string prefix);
        string GetLinePrefix();
        void SetLinePrefix(string prefix);
        int PeekNextValveNumber();
        int PeekNextLineNumber();

        string AllocateValveTag();
        string AllocateLineTag();
    }
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Project: CBI Tools
// File   : FormLauncher.cs
// Area   : Services (entry points launched by Commands/Ribbon)
// Desc   : Thin wrappers that route to feature services.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;

namespace AutoCAD2020.Services
{
    public static class FormLauncher
    {
        // Tag Manager (now routed via the service)
        public static void ShowTagManager()
            => AutoCAD2020.Tagging.Services.TagManagerService.ShowPalette();

        // --- TEMP stubs to satisfy Commands.cs ---
        public static void ShowBlockAttribViewer()
            => Application.ShowModelessDialog(new AutoCAD2020.Forms.Development.BlockAttributeGridForm());

        public static void ShowCBISearch()
            => Application.ShowAlertDialog("CBI_Search form not wired in this build.");

        public static void ShowFind()
            => Application.ShowAlertDialog("Find form not wired in this build.");

        public static void ShowOPC()
            => Application.ShowAlertDialog("OPC form not wired in this build.");
    }
}

// ============================================================================
// File: AutoCAD2020/Valves/InsertValveCommand.cs
// Version: v0.9.0  (C# 7.3)
// Author: CBI Tools
// Purpose: Unified valve insertion entrypoint (Ball/Butterfly/Check)
// Notes:
//  - Prompts for valve type (unless pre-specified by CommandParameter).
//  - Resolves block name via ProjectStore v1.0 (Blocks.Valve.Types map).
//  - Inserts block and stamps XData links we rely on later.
//  - Delegates visible tag text to ValveTagCommand after insert.
// Dependencies:
//  - AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1
//  - AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.StoreGuards + ProjectStoreValidator
//  - XData helpers in AutoCAD2020.Block_Operations.XDataLinkUtil
// ============================================================================
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Geometry;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;
using AutoCAD2020.Block_Operations;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;

namespace AutoCAD2020.Valves
{
    public static class InsertValveCommand
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Interactive insert. If typeHint is null, user is prompted (Ball/Butterfly/Check).
        /// </summary>
        public static void Run(string typeHint = null)
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            // Type selection
            var type = typeHint;
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(type))
            {
                var op = new PromptKeywordOptions("\nValve type")
                {
                    AllowArbitraryInput = false,
                    Message = "\nSelect valve type"
                };
                op.Keywords.Add("Ball");
                op.Keywords.Add("Butterfly");
                op.Keywords.Add("Check");
                op.Keywords.Default = "Ball";
                var kres = ed.GetKeywords(op);
                if (kres.Status != PromptStatus.OK) return;
                type = kres.StringResult;
            }

            // Pick insert point
            var ppr = ed.GetPoint("\nPick insertion point: ");
            if (ppr.Status != PromptStatus.OK) return;

            // Load store + resolve block name
            V1.ProjectStoreV1 store;
            string storePath;
            using (var tr0 = doc.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                if (!ProjectStore.StoreGuards.TryResolvePath(doc.Database, tr0, out storePath))
                {
                    ed.WriteMessage("\nCBI: This drawing is not bound to a Project Store (CBI/ProjectStore/Path).");
                    tr0.Commit();
                    return;
                }
                tr0.Commit();
            }
            store = ProjectStore.StoreGuards.OpenReadOnly(storePath);
            ProjectStore.ProjectStoreValidator.ValidateOrThrow(store);

            string blockName = null;

            // Prefer JSON mapping if present
            try
            {
                var blocks = store.GetType().GetProperty("Blocks")?.GetValue(store, null);
                var valve = blocks?.GetType().GetProperty("Valve")?.GetValue(blocks, null);
                var types = valve?.GetType().GetProperty("Types")?.GetValue(valve, null) as System.Collections.IDictionary;

                if (types != null && types.Contains(type))
                    blockName = types[type]?.ToString();
            }
            catch { /* ignore reflection issues */ }

            // Fallback to canonical contract defaults if mapping is missing
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(blockName))
            {
                switch (type?.Trim().ToUpperInvariant())
                {
                    case "BALL": blockName = "INST_BALL-VALVE"; break;
                    case "BUTTERFLY": blockName = "INST_BFLY-VALVE"; break;
                    case "CHECK": blockName = "INST_CHECK-VALVE"; break;
                    default: blockName = "INST_BALL-VALVE"; break;
                }
            }

            // Insert the block
            ObjectId brId = ObjectId.Null;
            using (var tr = doc.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var db = doc.Database;
                var bt = (BlockTable)tr.GetObject(db.BlockTableId, OpenMode.ForRead);

                // Ensure the block is present (user handles missing definition/import outside MVP)
                if (!bt.Has(blockName))
                {
                    ed.WriteMessage($"\nCBI: Block '{blockName}' not found in drawing. Import it and try again.");
                    tr.Commit();
                    return;
                }

                var btr = (BlockTableRecord)tr.GetObject(bt[blockName], OpenMode.ForRead);
                var ms = (BlockTableRecord)tr.GetObject(SymbolUtilityServices.GetBlockModelSpaceId(db), OpenMode.ForWrite);

                var br = new BlockReference(ppr.Value, btr.ObjectId);
                ms.AppendEntity(br);
                tr.AddNewlyCreatedDBObject(br, true);

                // Stamp origin + linkage app
                XDataLinkUtil.EnsureRegApp(db, tr, TagConstants.LinkRegApp);
                XDataLinkUtil.StampOrigin(tr, br);

                // Record a parent-handle (self for parent) so child bubbles can link later
                XDataLinkUtil.SetXDataString(tr, br, TagConstants.LinkRegApp, "PARENT_HANDLE", br.Handle.ToString());

                brId = br.ObjectId;
                tr.Commit();
            }

            if (brId.IsNull) return;

            // Delegate to tag command to place visible tag (or attach later)
            ValveTagCommand.Run(brId);
        }
    }
}

// File: Commands_ProjectRepair.cs
// v2.0.0 (C# 7.3)
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;

namespace AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore
{
    public static class ProjectRepairCommands
    {
        private static readonly string StorePath = @"C:\CBICAD\Project_Store.json";

public static void CBI_RepairProjectStore()
        {
            try
            {
                var svc = new ProjectSettingsService(StorePath);
                var snap = svc.Read();
                var changed = ProjectStoreValidator.RepairCommon(snap);

                // Optional: if RootHint empty but ActiveProjectKey known, prompt to set it.
                if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(snap.ActiveProjectKey) &&
                    snap.Projects.ContainsKey(snap.ActiveProjectKey))
                {
                    var p = snap.Projects[snap.ActiveProjectKey];
                    if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(p.RootHint))
                    {
                        // You could reuse the folder prompt here to set RootHint.
                    }
                }

                if (changed) svc.Write(snap);
                Application.ShowAlertDialog("Project store repair completed.");
            }
            catch (System.Exception ex)
            {
                Application.ShowAlertDialog("Repair failed: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }
    }
}

// File: ProjectSettingsService.cs
// v2.0.0 (C# 7.3)
// NOTE: Wire this to your existing JSON load/save IO and CBI Properties Home.
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using Newtonsoft.Json;

namespace AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore
{
    public sealed class ProjectSettingsService : IProjectSettingsService_V2
    {
        private readonly string _storePath;
        public ProjectSettingsService(string storePath) { _storePath = storePath; }

        public ProjectStoreSnapshot Read()
        {
            if (!File.Exists(_storePath)) return new ProjectStoreSnapshot();
            var json = File.ReadAllText(_storePath);
            var snap = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<ProjectStoreSnapshot>(json) ?? new ProjectStoreSnapshot();
            if (ProjectStoreValidator.RepairCommon(snap)) Write(snap);
            return snap;
        }

        public void Write(ProjectStoreSnapshot snapshot)
        {
            var json = JsonConvert.SerializeObject(snapshot, Formatting.Indented);
            Directory.CreateDirectory(Path.GetDirectoryName(_storePath) ?? ".");
            File.WriteAllText(_storePath, json);
        }

        // === New Project ===
        // v2.0.0 (C# 7.3) — drop-in for the existing method
        public void CreateNewProject(string projectKey, string rootHint, bool scanForDrawings)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(projectKey))
                throw new ArgumentException("projectKey required", nameof(projectKey));
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(rootHint))
                throw new ArgumentException("rootHint required", nameof(rootHint));

            var snap = Read();
            if (snap.Projects == null) snap.Projects = new Dictionary<string, ProjectEntry>();

            if (snap.Projects.ContainsKey(projectKey))
                throw new InvalidOperationException("Project already exists: " + projectKey);

            // Normalize and seed drawings (optionally)
            var normalizedRoot = NewProjectBuilder.NormalizePath(rootHint);
            var drawings = scanForDrawings
                ? NewProjectBuilder.DiscoverDwgs(normalizedRoot)
                : (IEnumerable<string>)new List<string>();

            var entry = NewProjectBuilder.Create(projectKey, normalizedRoot, drawings);

            // Ensure Tagging + Blocks defaults exist
            if (entry.Tagging == null) entry.Tagging = new TaggingEntry();
            if (entry.Blocks == null) entry.Blocks = new BlocksEntry();

            snap.Projects[projectKey] = entry;
            snap.ActiveProjectKey = projectKey;

            // Validate & persist
            var issues = ProjectStoreValidator.Validate(snap);
            // We tolerate empty Drawings[] but NEVER null RootHint or null lists.
            var critical = issues.FindAll(i =>
                i.Path.EndsWith(".RootHint", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
                i.Message.IndexOf("null", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0);

            if (critical.Count > 0)
                throw new InvalidOperationException("Invalid new project: " + string.Join("; ", critical.ConvertAll(c => c.Message)));

            Write(snap);
        }

        // === Prefix read/write for CBI Properties Home ===
        public string GetValvePrefix() => Read().Projects.TryGetValue(GetActive(), out var p) ? p.Tagging.Valve.Prefix : "V-";
        public void SetValvePrefix(string prefix)
        {
            var snap = Read();
            var key = GetActiveOrThrow(snap);
            snap.Projects[key].Tagging.Valve.Prefix = prefix ?? "V-";
            Write(snap);
        }

        public string GetLinePrefix() => Read().Projects.TryGetValue(GetActive(), out var p) ? p.Tagging.Line.Prefix : "L-";
        public void SetLinePrefix(string prefix)
        {
            var snap = Read();
            var key = GetActiveOrThrow(snap);
            snap.Projects[key].Tagging.Line.Prefix = prefix ?? "L-";
            Write(snap);
        }

        // === Peek/Allocate (no increment vs increment) ===
        public int PeekNextValveNumber()
        {
            var s = Read(); var k = GetActiveOrThrow(s); return s.Projects[k].Tagging.Valve.NextNumber;
        }
        public int PeekNextLineNumber()
        {
            var s = Read(); var k = GetActiveOrThrow(s); return s.Projects[k].Tagging.Line.NextNumber;
        }

        public string AllocateValveTag()
        {
            var s = Read(); var k = GetActiveOrThrow(s);
            var ch = s.Projects[k].Tagging.Valve;
            var tag = ch.Prefix + ch.NextNumber.ToString(ch.Padding > 0 ? new string('0', ch.Padding) : "0");
            ch.NextNumber++;
            Write(s);
            return tag;
        }

        public string AllocateLineTag()
        {
            var s = Read(); var k = GetActiveOrThrow(s);
            var ch = s.Projects[k].Tagging.Line;
            var tag = ch.Prefix + ch.NextNumber.ToString(ch.Padding > 0 ? new string('0', ch.Padding) : "0");
            ch.NextNumber++;
            Write(s);
            return tag;
        }

        private string GetActive() => Read().ActiveProjectKey;
        private static string GetActiveOrThrow(ProjectStoreSnapshot s)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s.ActiveProjectKey)) throw new InvalidOperationException("No active project.");
            return s.ActiveProjectKey;
        }

        // Ensures a project with key exists; if not, creates a minimal one.
        public void EnsureProject(string projectKey, string rootHint)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(projectKey)) throw new ArgumentException("projectKey required");
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(rootHint)) throw new ArgumentException("rootHint required");

            var snap = Read();
            if (snap.Projects == null) snap.Projects = new Dictionary<string, ProjectEntry>();

            if (!snap.Projects.ContainsKey(projectKey))
            {
                var entry = NewProjectBuilder.Create(projectKey, NewProjectBuilder.NormalizePath(rootHint));
                if (entry.Tagging == null) entry.Tagging = new TaggingEntry();
                if (entry.Blocks == null) entry.Blocks = new BlocksEntry();

                snap.Projects[projectKey] = entry;
                snap.ActiveProjectKey = projectKey;
                Write(snap);
            }
            else if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(snap.ActiveProjectKey))
            {
                snap.ActiveProjectKey = projectKey;
                Write(snap);
            }
        }

        // Adds a DWG path to the project's Drawings[] if missing (de-duplicated).
        public bool AddDrawingIfMissing(string projectKey, string drawingPath)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(projectKey)) throw new ArgumentException("projectKey required");
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(drawingPath)) return false;

            var snap = Read();
            if (snap.Projects == null || !snap.Projects.ContainsKey(projectKey)) return false;

            var norm = NewProjectBuilder.NormalizePath(drawingPath);
            var list = snap.Projects[projectKey].Drawings ?? (snap.Projects[projectKey].Drawings = new List<DrawingEntry>());

            foreach (var d in list)
                if (string.Equals(d?.Path, norm, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                    return false; // already present

            list.Add(new DrawingEntry { Path = norm });
            Write(snap);
            return true;
        }

        // Convenience: Ensure project + add single drawing atomically.
        public bool EnsureProjectAndAddDrawing(string projectKey, string rootHint, string drawingPath)
        {
            EnsureProject(projectKey, rootHint);
            return AddDrawingIfMissing(projectKey, drawingPath);
        }
    }

    public interface IProjectSettingsService_V2
    {
        ProjectStoreSnapshot Read();
        void Write(ProjectStoreSnapshot snapshot);
        void CreateNewProject(string projectKey, string rootHint, bool scanForDrawings);

        string GetValvePrefix();
        void SetValvePrefix(string prefix);
        string GetLinePrefix();
        void SetLinePrefix(string prefix);
        int PeekNextValveNumber();
        int PeekNextLineNumber();

        string AllocateValveTag();
        string AllocateLineTag();
    }
}

// File: AutoCAD2020/ProjectStore/NewProjectCommands.cs
// v2.0.0 (C# 7.3)

using System;
using System.IO;
using AcApp = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application;
using AcDoc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Document;
using AcEd = Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using WinForms = System.Windows.Forms;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;

namespace AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore
{
    /// <summary>Centralized "new project" flows.</summary>
    public static class NewProjectCommands
    {
        private static readonly string GlobalStorePath = @"C:\CBICAD\Project_Store.json";

        /// <summary>
        /// Ribbon-friendly flow: builds support folder next to the active DWG,
        /// seeds Project_Store.json, binds NOD, and refreshes the palette banner.
        /// </summary>
        public static void CreateFromActiveDrawing()
        {
            var doc = AcApp.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            // 1) Require saved drawing
            var dwgPath = doc.Name;
            var root = Path.GetDirectoryName(dwgPath);
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(root))
            {
                ed.WriteMessage("\nPlease save the drawing first.");
                return;
            }

            // 2) Project name default from DWG
            var defaultName = Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(dwgPath);
            var name = PromptForProjectName(ed, defaultName);
            if (name == null) return; // cancel

            // 3) Support folder + local store path
            var supportDir = Path.Combine(root, "CBI_Support");
            Directory.CreateDirectory(supportDir);
            var localStorePath = Path.Combine(supportDir, "Project_Store.json");

            // 4) Create/seed store (Shared service owns shape & validation)
            var projectId = Guid.NewGuid().ToString("D");
            var manifestPath = ProjectStorePaths.GetManifestPath(); // your shared resolver
            ProjectStoreService.CreateNewStore(projectId, name, localStorePath, manifestPath);

            // 5) Bind to drawing via NOD (your AutoCAD side binder)
            ProjectNodBinder.BindProjectToDrawing(doc, projectId, name, localStorePath);

            // 6) Optional readme/changelog (idempotent)
            var readme = Path.Combine(supportDir, "Readme.txt");
            if (!File.Exists(readme))
            {
                File.WriteAllText(readme,
@"CBI Support Folder

- Project_Store.json   : Systems, counters, entities, links (schema v1)
- Changelog.txt        : High-level project log (append-only)
");
            }
            var changelog = Path.Combine(supportDir, "Changelog.txt");
            if (!File.Exists(changelog)) File.WriteAllText(changelog, string.Empty);

            // 7) UI feedback + palette banner refresh
            ed.WriteMessage($"\nCBI Project created at:\n  {localStorePath}");
            AutoCAD2020.PropertiesHub.CbiPropertiesPalette.RefreshBannerIfOpen();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Interactive flow: user picks project name and a root folder anywhere
        /// (also initializes global Project_Store.json if you use one).
        /// </summary>
        public static void CreateInteractive()
        {
            var name = PromptInput("Enter Project Name:");
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name)) return;

            var root = PromptFolder("Select Project Root Folder:");
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(root)) return;

            var scan = WinForms.DialogResult.Yes ==
                       WinForms.MessageBox.Show("Scan root for DWGs and seed the drawing list?",
                                                "Seed Drawings",
                                                WinForms.MessageBoxButtons.YesNo);

            var svc = new ProjectSettingsService(GlobalStorePath);
            svc.CreateNewProject(name, root, scan);

            AcApp.ShowAlertDialog($"Project '{name}' created and set active.\nRoot: {root}");
        }

        // ---------- small UI helpers ----------
        private static string PromptForProjectName(AcEd.Editor ed, string suggestion)
        {
            var p = new AcEd.PromptStringOptions("\nEnter project name")
            {
                AllowSpaces = true,
                DefaultValue = suggestion
            };
            var r = ed.GetString(p);
            if (r.Status != AcEd.PromptStatus.OK) return null;
            var s = (r.StringResult ?? string.Empty).Trim();
            return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(s) ? suggestion : s;
        }

        private static string PromptInput(string message)
        {
            using (var f = new WinForms.Form { Width = 340, Height = 150, Text = "CBI New Project" })
            using (var tb = new WinForms.TextBox { Left = 10, Top = 35, Width = 300 })
            using (var lbl = new WinForms.Label { Left = 10, Top = 10, Width = 300, Text = message })
            using (var ok = new WinForms.Button { Left = 160, Top = 70, Width = 70, Text = "OK", DialogResult = WinForms.DialogResult.OK })
            using (var cancel = new WinForms.Button { Left = 240, Top = 70, Width = 70, Text = "Cancel", DialogResult = WinForms.DialogResult.Cancel })
            {
                f.Controls.Add(lbl); f.Controls.Add(tb); f.Controls.Add(ok); f.Controls.Add(cancel);
                f.AcceptButton = ok; f.CancelButton = cancel;
                return f.ShowDialog() == WinForms.DialogResult.OK ? tb.Text : null;
            }
        }

        private static string PromptFolder(string title)
        {
            using (var dlg = new WinForms.FolderBrowserDialog { Description = title, ShowNewFolderButton = true })
                return dlg.ShowDialog() == WinForms.DialogResult.OK ? dlg.SelectedPath : null;
        }
    }
}

// File: Commands_ProjectRepair.cs
// v2.0.0 (C# 7.3)
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.Runtime;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;

namespace AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore
{
    public static class ProjectRepairCommands
    {
        private static readonly string StorePath = @"C:\CBICAD\Project_Store.json";

public static void CBI_RepairProjectStore()
        {
            try
            {
                var svc = new ProjectSettingsService(StorePath);
                var snap = svc.Read();
                var changed = ProjectStoreValidator.RepairCommon(snap);

                // Optional: if RootHint empty but ActiveProjectKey known, prompt to set it.
                if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(snap.ActiveProjectKey) &&
                    snap.Projects.ContainsKey(snap.ActiveProjectKey))
                {
                    var p = snap.Projects[snap.ActiveProjectKey];
                    if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(p.RootHint))
                    {
                        // You could reuse the folder prompt here to set RootHint.
                    }
                }

                if (changed) svc.Write(snap);
                Application.ShowAlertDialog("Project store repair completed.");
            }
            catch (System.Exception ex)
            {
                Application.ShowAlertDialog("Repair failed: " + ex.Message);
            }
        }
    }
}

// ============================================================================
// File: AutoCAD2020/Valves/ValveTagCommand.cs
// Version: v0.9.0  (C# 7.3)
// Author: CBI Tools
// Purpose: Show/attach the visible valve tag for a valve BlockReference.
// Notes:
//  - Accepts optional preselected valve (ObjectId). If null, asks user to pick.
//  - Allocates next ID (via TagStoreV1) and stamps XData + writes visible attribute.
//  - Primary ID becomes first in XData list, additional bubbles can mirror via XData.
// Dependencies:
//  - AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1 + TagStoreV1 helpers
//  - AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.StoreGuards + ProjectStoreValidator
//  - AutoCAD2020.Block_Operations.XDataLinkUtil
// ============================================================================
using System;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;   // TagStoreV1 (note: not .V1)
using AutoCAD2020.Block_Operations;
using AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;
using TagStore = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.TagStoreV1;
using StoreGuards = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.StoreGuards;
using StoreSvc = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.ProjectStoreService;

namespace AutoCAD2020.Valves
{
    public static class ValveTagCommand
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Attach/ensure a primary valve tag to a valve entity.
        /// </summary>
        public static void Run(ObjectId preselectedValve = default(ObjectId))
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            ObjectId valveId = preselectedValve;
            if (valveId.IsNull)
            {
                var peo = new PromptEntityOptions("\nSelect valve block:")
                {
                    AllowObjectOnLockedLayer = true
                };
                peo.SetRejectMessage("\nOnly block references, please.");
                peo.AddAllowedClass(typeof(BlockReference), exactMatch: false);

                var per = ed.GetEntity(peo);
                if (per.Status != PromptStatus.OK) return;
                valveId = per.ObjectId;
            }

            // Resolve store
            string storePath;
            V1.ProjectStoreV1 store;
            using (var tr0 = doc.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                if (!StoreGuards.TryResolvePath(doc.Database, tr0, out storePath))
                {
                    ed.WriteMessage("\nCBI: This drawing is not bound to a Project Store.");
                    tr0.Commit();
                    return;
                }
                tr0.Commit();
            }
            store = StoreGuards.OpenReadOnly(storePath);
            ProjectStoreValidator.ValidateOrThrow(store);

            // Choose system
            var systemKey = StoreGuards.PromptForSystemKey(ed, store);
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(systemKey)) return;

            string allocatedId = null;

            using (var tr = doc.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var br = tr.GetObject(valveId, OpenMode.ForRead) as BlockReference;
                if (br == null) { tr.Commit(); return; }

                // Allocate next ID via TagStoreV1
                var rec = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.TagStoreV1.AllocateNext(
                    store,
                    systemKey,
                    drawing: doc.Name,
                    entityHandle: br.Handle.ToString(),
                    reason: "ValveTagCommand",
                    by: Environment.UserName ?? "unknown");

                allocatedId = rec != null ? rec.Id : null;

                // Stamp XData ownership
                XDataLinkUtil.AddValveTagId(tr, br, allocatedId);
                XDataLinkUtil.MakePrimaryValveTagId(tr, br, allocatedId);
                XDataLinkUtil.SetInstrTag(tr, br, allocatedId);

                tr.Commit();
            }

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(allocatedId))
            {
                // Save back to disk (atomic)
                StoreGuards.SafeSave(storePath, store);
                ed.WriteMessage($"\nCBI: Assigned {allocatedId}.");
            }
        }
    }
}

// ============================================================================
// File: AutoCAD2020/Valves/ValveTagCommand.cs
// Version: v0.9.0  (C# 7.3)
// Author: CBI Tools
// Purpose: Show/attach the visible valve tag for a valve BlockReference.
// Notes:
//  - Accepts optional preselected valve (ObjectId). If null, asks user to pick.
//  - Allocates next ID (via TagStoreV1) and stamps XData + writes visible attribute.
//  - Primary ID becomes first in XData list, additional bubbles can mirror via XData.
// Dependencies:
//  - AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1 + TagStoreV1 helpers
//  - AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore.StoreGuards + ProjectStoreValidator
//  - AutoCAD2020.Block_Operations.XDataLinkUtil
// ============================================================================
using System;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.DatabaseServices;
using Autodesk.AutoCAD.EditorInput;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;
using AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore;   // TagStoreV1 (note: not .V1)
using AutoCAD2020.Block_Operations;
using AutoCAD2020.ProjectStore;
using V1 = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.V1;
using TagStore = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.TagStoreV1;
using StoreGuards = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.StoreGuards;
using StoreSvc = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.ProjectStoreService;

namespace AutoCAD2020.Valves
{
    public static class ValveTagCommand
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Attach/ensure a primary valve tag to a valve entity.
        /// </summary>
        public static void Run(ObjectId preselectedValve = default(ObjectId))
        {
            var doc = Autodesk.AutoCAD.ApplicationServices.Application.DocumentManager.MdiActiveDocument;
            if (doc == null) return;
            var ed = doc.Editor;

            ObjectId valveId = preselectedValve;
            if (valveId.IsNull)
            {
                var peo = new PromptEntityOptions("\nSelect valve block:")
                {
                    AllowObjectOnLockedLayer = true
                };
                peo.SetRejectMessage("\nOnly block references, please.");
                peo.AddAllowedClass(typeof(BlockReference), exactMatch: false);

                var per = ed.GetEntity(peo);
                if (per.Status != PromptStatus.OK) return;
                valveId = per.ObjectId;
            }

            // Resolve store
            string storePath;
            V1.ProjectStoreV1 store;
            using (var tr0 = doc.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                if (!StoreGuards.TryResolvePath(doc.Database, tr0, out storePath))
                {
                    ed.WriteMessage("\nCBI: This drawing is not bound to a Project Store.");
                    tr0.Commit();
                    return;
                }
                tr0.Commit();
            }
            store = StoreGuards.OpenReadOnly(storePath);
            ProjectStoreValidator.ValidateOrThrow(store);

            // Choose system
            var systemKey = StoreGuards.PromptForSystemKey(ed, store);
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(systemKey)) return;

            string allocatedId = null;

            using (var tr = doc.TransactionManager.StartTransaction())
            {
                var br = tr.GetObject(valveId, OpenMode.ForRead) as BlockReference;
                if (br == null) { tr.Commit(); return; }

                // Allocate next ID via TagStoreV1
                var rec = AutoCAD_Shared_Project.ProjectStore.TagStoreV1.AllocateNext(
                    store,
                    systemKey,
                    drawing: doc.Name,
                    entityHandle: br.Handle.ToString(),
                    reason: "ValveTagCommand",
                    by: Environment.UserName ?? "unknown");

                allocatedId = rec != null ? rec.Id : null;

                // Stamp XData ownership
                XDataLinkUtil.AddValveTagId(tr, br, allocatedId);
                XDataLinkUtil.MakePrimaryValveTagId(tr, br, allocatedId);
                XDataLinkUtil.SetInstrTag(tr, br, allocatedId);

                tr.Commit();
            }

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(allocatedId))
            {
                // Save back to disk (atomic)
                StoreGuards.SafeSave(storePath, store);
                ed.WriteMessage($"\nCBI: Assigned {allocatedId}.");
            }
        }
    }
}
